source_filename: A quick update on your pre-order 🤍 (133).msg
subject: A quick update on your pre-order 🤍
customer_question: What's the status of my pre-order?
response_body: v\:* {behavior:url(#default#VML);} o\:* {behavior:url(#default#VML);} w\:* {behavior:url(#default#VML);} .shape {behavior:url(#default#VML);} Hi Lucy,   I hope you’re having a great Friday. I just wanted to pop in with a quick update on your pre-order and what to expect over the coming weeks.   The Boxes in your order are on track to ship next week, which is very exciting. Your New York 20-Box Stand, which was purchased on pre-order for February, is still tracking well with an expected delivery in mid to late February.   Once each part of your order is ready to leave us, you’ll receive a dispatch notification with tracking information, so you can follow everything easily along the way.   Thank you again for supporting Sagitine. If you have any questions at all, please don’t hesitate to reach out by simply replying to this email, I’m always happy to help.   I hope you have a fabulous weekend. Warm regards, Heidi x     Heidi Melville Owner SAGITINE

source_filename: A small gift I’d love to send you x (25).msg
subject: A small gift I’d love to send you x
customer_question: Where is my order?
response_body: v\:* {behavior:url(#default#VML);} o\:* {behavior:url(#default#VML);} w\:* {behavior:url(#default#VML);} .shape {behavior:url(#default#VML);} Good morning Antoniette, I hope you had a lovely weekend.   Today we launched a new little piece at Sagitine called the Treasure Chest, a plush-lined keepsake box designed to protect the things you treasure most. It’s made from the same beautiful material as our Milan and Miami Boxes, and finished with our signature interchangeable leather pull.   At the moment it’s only available as a gift with purchase on orders over $400, and because your recent order was placed just before we launched it today, I would absolutely love to send one to you as a little thank you for your support.   Before I organise that, could you please just confirm that you’d be happy for it to be sent to the same delivery address as your order? The Treasure Chests ship flat and separately in their own packaging, so it will arrive in its own little parcel.   Thank you again for supporting Sagitine, it truly means so much.   Warm regards, Heidi x   Heidi Melville Owner SAGITINE

response_body: v\:* {behavior:url(#default#VML);} o\:* {behavior:url(#default#VML);} w\:* {behavior:url(#default#VML);} .shape {behavior:url(#default#VML);} Hi Deepika,   I hope you’re having a great week.   I’m happy to share that the Stands have now arrived and will begin shipping next week.   As soon as your order has been dispatched, you’ll receive an email with your tracking details, so you can follow its journey right to your door.   Thank you again for your patience and for supporting Sagitine, it truly means so much. If you have any questions at all in the meantime, please don’t hesitate to reach out by replying to this email.   Warm regards, Heidi x     From: info <info@sagitine.com> Sent: Monday, 2 February 2026 1:18 PM To: Deepika Gupta <deepika.n21@icloud.com>; info <info@sagitine.com> Subject: RE: An update on your pre-order x   Hi Deepika,   Thank you so much for your message, I just wanted to check in as it looks like my update from 23 January may not have come through.   Your order was placed on pre-order, and here’s where things are currently at: * The Insert Sets have been sent out, if you haven’t received a shipping notification you should receive one today.   * The Shanghai 14-Box Stand experienced a small shipping delay and is now due to arrive in mid-February.   As a thank you for your patience, I’ve also added an extra Sunglasses Set to your order at no charge, this will be processed automatically, so there’s nothing you need to do. I’ll also continue to keep you updated as the Stand gets closer to arriving.   If you have any other questions at all, please don’t hesitate to reach out. I’m always happy to help.   Warm regards, Heidi x   From: Deepika Gupta < deepika.n21@icloud.com > Sent: Saturday, 31 January 2026 9:55 AM To: info < info@sagitine.com > Subject: Re: An update on your pre-order x   Hi could you pls tell me when will I receive my order?

response_body: v\:* {behavior:url(#default#VML);} o\:* {behavior:url(#default#VML);} w\:* {behavior:url(#default#VML);} .shape {behavior:url(#default#VML);} Good Morning Deepika,   I wanted to get in touch with an update on your pre-order and what to expect next.   The Insert Sets are ready and will begin shipping next week, which we’re so excited for. However, the Shanghai 14-Box Stand has had an unexpected shipping delay, which means that piece is now due to be delivered in February.   I’m so sorry for the change in timing. To thank you for your patience, I’ll be adding another Sunglasses Set to your order free of charge. This will be processed automatically next week, no action is needed from you.   You’ll receive a dispatch notification and tracking details as soon as the first part of your order is on its way, and I’ll continue to keep you updated as the remaining piece gets closer to arriving.   Thank you again for your understanding and for supporting Sagitine, it truly means so much. If you have any questions at all, please just reply to this email.   I hope you have a lovely weekend. Warm regards, Heidi x     Heidi Melville Owner SAGITINE

Warm Regards Heidi x   From: Angela Karvounis < kiki2209@gmail.com > Sent: Sunday, 30 November 2025 10:22 PM To: info < info@sagitine.com > Subject: Re: Invoice #438331301   How do I pay this? This will be processed automatically next week, no action is needed from you.   You’ll receive a dispatch notification and tracking details as soon as the first part of your order is on its way, and I’ll continue to keep you updated as the remaining piece gets closer to arriving.   Thank you again for your understanding and for supporting Sagitine, it truly means so much. If you have any questions at all, please just reply to this email.   I hope you have a lovely weekend. Warm regards, Heidi x     Heidi Melville Owner SAGITINE

response_body: v\:* {behavior:url(#default#VML);} o\:* {behavior:url(#default#VML);} w\:* {behavior:url(#default#VML);} .shape {behavior:url(#default#VML);} Hi Andrew,   I hope you’re great and that 2025 has been treating you well so far.   I was hoping you could help send through a couple of design files, I don’t seem to have the files for the tall 30-Box Sydney Stand or the Santiago Stand, the one that holds six of the larger Miami Boxes. If possible, could I please get those this week? I’m considering reviving one of them next year and need the files to get updated quotes from the supplier.   Ned sent me the Shanghai 14-Box and New York 20-Box Stand files back in September 2022, but I can’t find the other two anywhere.   Also, the business has had a cracking year! Once I get through the Black Friday chaos, I’ll reach out to pick up a couple of those 2025 briefs I had to put on hold.   Thanks so much, Heidi         Heidi Melville Director SAGITINE M: 0478 401 914 E:  heidi@sagitine.com

subject: Ecommerce Equation - International Expansion
customer_question: How do I assemble/set up my Box?
response_body: If you're an ecommerce brand owner who’s outgrown the Australian market or is feeling the pain of seasonal slumps, this workshop is for you. If you’re ready to: Break free from seasonal revenue plateaus Tap into new customers and new markets Expand internationally without wasting time or profit... we can help! In this workshop, we’ll cover: The costly mistakes brands make when expanding — and how to avoid them. How to know when you're ready and which countries to target first. How to set up pricing, shipping, logistics, and ads for international success. This workshop will give you a clear, actionable plan to expand globally and unlock year-round growth. Join the session here when the time comes: https://us02web.zoom.us/j/84433213503?pwd=bOcbGunvL20IigD3mvpkJPVeEUdiXc.1 Passcode:  scale See you there!

subject: Editorial for the fin review
customer_question: I just wanted to share my feedback
response_body: v\:* {behavior:url(#default#VML);} o\:* {behavior:url(#default#VML);} w\:* {behavior:url(#default#VML);} .shape {behavior:url(#default#VML);} Hi Eugenie,   I hope you’ve had a fabulous week.   Firstly, thank you so much for thinking of Sagitine and your lovely kind words. I hope I’ve got this back to you in time, but if not, all of the images and information are timeless, so please feel free to use for something later.   Attached is the press release.  I was waiting on confirming of inclusion of one more customer.  If I hear back from them today, I’ll send you an updated version. Full transparency, I only thought to include them this morning so have only just sent the release to them for citation confirmation.   We’re currently in the middle of our Warehouse Sale.  The offer is 20% off everything (excluding shipping) and the promotion runs until April 30 th 2025.   HERE is a selection of high-res images.  If there is something else that you’ve seen that you’d like, please don’t hesitate to let me know.   I was having a look at your LinkedIn profile, and I think we may have worked in magazines at the same time. I was at Emap and then ACP from 2006 – 2010. I was in marketing for the men’s, actions sports and entertainment (EMPIRE and Rolling Stone) so didn’t spend a lot of time at Park Street but knew a few of the team there really well.    And finally, Lisa Wilkinson said to say hi x   I hope you have a wonderful long weekend. Warm Regards Heidi x     Heidi Melville Director SAGITINE M: 0478 401 914 E:  heidi@sagitine.com         -----Original Message----- From: Eugenie Kelly eugeniekelly31@gmail.com Sent: Monday, 14 April 2025 5:31 AM To: info info@sagitine.com Subject: Editorial for the fin review   Hi Heidi I have an assortment of pages I do for the fin review and I LOVE your products and think they would be perfect for them. Do you have a link to high res imagery and press releases you can email me at eugenie@eugeniekelly.com Would be lovely to feature you. Kindest Eugenie Kelly 0413022822

source_filename: FW_ (sent to_ Joshua) RE_ Before we can commence your tax work - 2025 Financial Statements & Tax Returns.msg
subject: FW: (sent to: Joshua) RE: Before we can commence your tax work - 2025 Financial Statements & Tax Returns
customer_question: Do you offer wholesale pricing?
response_body: v\:* {behavior:url(#default#VML);} o\:* {behavior:url(#default#VML);} w\:* {behavior:url(#default#VML);} .shape {behavior:url(#default#VML);} Hi Hay, There’s no charge for Air to do your FY2025. Can you please send Karen (or me to forward on) a summary of the sole trader income for FY2025, along with the relevant sales invoices. They have a $300 per Activity Statement fee, but because you had no activity I’ll be able to do those for you. I’ll do them this weekend, I’ll just need to log into you ATO account. Thanks! xx   From: Karen Ibale <karen.ibale@air.com.au> Sent: Friday, 8 August 2025 10:00 AM To: Heidi Melville <heidi@sagitine.com> Cc: Ben Andrews <ben.andrews@air.com.au>; Anthony Angelillo <anthony.angelillo@air.com.au> Subject: (sent to: Joshua) RE: Before we can commence your tax work - 2025 Financial Statements & Tax Returns   Hi Heidi,   Happy Friday!   I'd like to give you update that there will be no additional fee for the preparation of Hayden’s sole trader income for the financial year 2025. Kindly forward us a summary of the sole trader income for FY2025, along with the relevant sales invoices.   With respect to the Business Activity Statements, our fee is $300 plus GST per quarter. Should you wish to engage us for the preparation of all four quarters for the 2025 financial year, we’d be pleased to assist in lodging the activity statements for FY2024 at no extra charge.   Please let us know how you’d like to proceed.   Thank you, Heidi.

customer_question: I just wanted to share my feedback
response_body: v\:* {behavior:url(#default#VML);} o\:* {behavior:url(#default#VML);} w\:* {behavior:url(#default#VML);} .shape {behavior:url(#default#VML);} Hi Hay,   For tax, could you please take a look at the below and let me know if it’s possible to get most of it through my Monday?   Hayden Ruawai 1. Confirm no other salary received after employment from Brighte Capital Pty Limited in July 2024; 2. How many hours per week on average did you work from home during July 2024? 3. Annual home internet cost and work related usage (percentage) during July 2024 ; 4. Annual mobile phone cost and work related usage (percentage) during July 2024; 5. How many kilometres did you travel for work related purposes during July 2024? Please note, travel between home and work is deemed to be private usage. 6. Summary of any other work related expenses in July 2024. 7. Donations made in 2025 financial year. 8. Could you please provide Hayden's consulting income and expense record for the financial year 2025.  This would help us assess if additional cost should be charged.  9. Please also be advised that Hayden is registered for GST and there are outstanding activity statements from December 2023 to June 2025. Kindly let us know if you require our assistance in completing the activity statements. – HM: I thought I’d asked them to do this.  Could you just confirm that there was no earnings against your TFN for this period and I’ll go back to them? Thanks! xx     From: Karen Ibale <karen.ibale@air.com.au> Sent: Wednesday, 23 July 2025 11:21 AM To: Heidi Melville <heidi@sagitine.com> Cc: Joshua Zigori <joshua.zigori@air.com.au> Subject: Before we can commence your tax work - 2025 Financial Statements & Tax Returns   Hi Heidi,   Hope your week is off to a good start.   I'm assisting with the preparation of the 2025 financial statements and tax returns.   Can you please provide the following information at your earliest convenience:   Ten Zero Three Pty Ltd 1. Stock on hand report as at 30 June 2025; 2. Prospa loan statements for the period 1 July 2024 to 30 June 2025; 3. Shopify Capital loan contract and loan statements for the period 1 July 2024 to 30 June 2025; 4. Attached is the general ledger for travel expenses account. Can you please review and confirm whether the costs are 100% business related? 5. Attached is the fixed asset register. Could you please review it and confirm whether any fixed assets were disposed of during the 2025 financial year?   Hayden Ruawai 1. Confirm no other salary received after employment from Brighte Capital Pty Limited in July 2024; 2. How many hours per week on average did you work from home during July 2024? 3. Annual home internet cost and work related usage (percentage) during July 2024 ; 4. Annual mobile phone cost and work related usage (percentage) during July 2024; 5. How many kilometres did you travel for work related purposes during July 2024? Please note, travel between home and work is deemed to be private usage. 6. Summary of any other work related expenses in July 2024. 7. Donations made in 2025 financial year.   On a separate note, could you please provide Hayden's consulting income and expense record for the financial year 2025.  This would help us assess if additional cost should be charged.    Please also be advised that Hayden is registered for GST and there are outstanding activity statements from December 2023 to June 2025. Kindly let us know if you require our assistance in completing the activity statements.   Thank you Heidi, please let me know if you have any questions.

response_body: v\:* {behavior:url(#default#VML);} o\:* {behavior:url(#default#VML);} w\:* {behavior:url(#default#VML);} .shape {behavior:url(#default#VML);} Hi Darlene, I hope you’re great.   I’m helping Hayden out to get on top of the ATO unpaid taxes and lodgements. Are you please able to outline which lodgements and payments are overdue, what the interest is on any unpaid debts and also any upcoming lodgements or payments? Thanks so much, greatly appreciate it. Warm Regards Heidi x     From: Hayden Ruawai <hayden.ruawai@gmail.com> Sent: Tuesday, 17 February 2026 9:13 AM To: Melville <Heidimelville@hotmail.com>; Heidi Melville <heidi@sagitine.com> Subject: Re: Call from ATO re Outstanding Debt       On Mon, Feb 16, 2026, 10:08 AM Darlene Raymundo < darlene.raymundo@air.com.au > wrote: Hi Hayden   Please find attached correspondence from the Australian Taxation Office (ATO) in relation to the late lodgment of your Sep 2025 activity statement.   Payment of $990 is due by 03/03/2026.   Should you have any queries, please don't hesitate to let me know.   Thanks.   Regards,     Darlene Raymundo Admin P: + 612 7200 2516  W: airaccounting.com.au     L:   LinkedI n A: Level 5, 100 Market Street, Sydney NSW 2000 Australia .    Liability limited by a scheme approved under Professional Standards Legislation.  The information contained in this email and any attachments may be privileged and confidential and protected from disclosure. If the reader of this message is not the intended recipient, or an employee or agent responsible for delivering this message to the intended recipient, you are hereby notified that any dissemination, distribution or copying of this communication is strictly prohibited. If you have received this communication in error, please notify us immediately by replying to the message and deleting it immediately from all your devices.   On Mon, Feb 02, 2026 at 11:13 AM, < anthony.angelillo@air.com.au > wrote:   Hi Hayden,    Hope you had a nice weekend. Today we've received another call from the ATO who have ramped up their aggression on your unpaid taxes and unfiled lodgements (particularly the September 2025 BAS).    They have asked that you contact them within 2 business days otherwise formal action may be imposed (debt collection action).    Let me know if you need any assistance from us.

subject: FW: Email - copy update
customer_question: What's the status of my pre-order?
response_body: v\:* {behavior:url(#default#VML);} o\:* {behavior:url(#default#VML);} w\:* {behavior:url(#default#VML);} .shape {behavior:url(#default#VML);} xx   From: Hayden Ruawai <hayden.ruawai@gmail.com> Sent: Friday, 31 October 2025 12:55 PM To: Heidi Melville <heidi@sagitine.com> Subject: Email   A Personal Note Here's what I think will sell out first Hi there, I'm Heidi, owner of Sagitine. Tuesday morning, our biggest sale of the year goes live – up to 40% off across our entire range. And I wanted to give you a bit of insider insight before it kicks off. We don't run sales often. In fact, we've held just one other major sale all year. So when we do, things move  fast . I've been watching stock levels closely, and here's my honest take on what I think will disappear first and what you should keep an eye on.     Deep Blue – Act Fast Our Deep Blue is a limited edition, and it's already running dangerously low. There's a strong chance it'll be sold out by the time you read this. If you've had your eye on it, don't wait. Once it's gone, it's gone. Deep Blue Milan Box Rich, sophisticated navy. Limited edition – once sold out, it's gone forever.   Rose & Cherry – 80% Sold These two are customer favourites, and they've been moving steadily all year. We're sitting at about 80% sold through on both colours. I'd be surprised if they last the stat of the sale . If either of these are on your list, grab them early. Rose Soft, feminine blush Cherry Rich, warm red tone   Terracotta & Lilac – Limited Edition Good news here , we have healthy stock levels on both Terracotta and Lilac. But here's the thing: they're both limited editions. Once this batch is gone, we won't be making more. So while you've got time during the sale, don't put them off indefinitely if they're calling your name. Terracotta Earthy, warm terracotta Lilac Soft, muted purple   Olive – Our Signature Green Olive is one of our signature colours, and it's beloved for good reason. Current stock will sell out during the sale, but the good news is we've got more on the way. If you want it delivered for Christmas, order pretty quickly . Otherwise, pre-orders placed after stock runs out is currently due to arrive in January. Olive Milan Box Our signature green. Available on pre-order – deliveries arrive January. Want it for Christmas? Order during the sale.     Speaking of Pre-Orders... Our Off-White is currently on pre-order, and it's moving faster than we expected. We tried our best to get stock in before the sale, but shipping delays had other plans. If you order during Black Friday, all going according to plan, your Off-White pieces should arrive in late January. It's our most popular colour year-round, so if it's on your wishlist, securing it at sale prices now is a smart move. Off-White – Pre-Order Now Our bestselling classic. Expected delivery: Late January 2025.     Coming Mid-November Something new is on the way We've been listening. Over the past year, so many of you have asked for colours that feel lighter and fresher .  S hades that bring energy and calm to your spaces. Colours for spring mornings and sun-filled rooms. Colours that feel hopeful. I'm thrilled to tell you we've been working on exactly that. Two new colours will launch on  November 4 th , and they're unlike anything we've released before. Think coastal calm. Mediterranean brightness. That first-coffee-of-the-day feeling. One brings serenity and space. The other brings warmth and optimism. Both feel like a breath of fresh air , literally. What to Expect Launch Date:  November 4 th, 2024 Availability:  Pre-order only Delivery:  Early 2025 These colours came directly from your requests , from customers who wanted something uplifting, something that brings lightness into their homes. I can't wait to share them with you properly next week. Watch this space.   Color Stories Discover how different color combinations can transform your space Soft & Serene Classic Contrast   Pastel Harmony Warm Luxury Want to see more styling ideas?  Read the full colour guide   One Last Thing I know sale emails can feel overwhelming. There's always that pressure to act fast, to not miss out. But here's my genuine advice: just buy what you need and will use. We designed Sagitine pieces to last decades, not seasons. They should feel like investments, not impulse purchases. That said, if something's been on your list and the timing feels right, I'm genuinely excited for you to bring these pieces into your home. We've poured everything into making storage that feels special, that you'll want to see. The sale goes live Tuesday morning, November 4th. I'll see you there. Warmly, Heidi x Owner, Sagitine   Black Friday Starts Tuesday Up to 40% off | November 4-25 | While stocks last Browse The Collection

subject: FW: Important Information about your Sagitine pre-order x
customer_question: What's the status of my pre-order?
response_body: v\:* {behavior:url(#default#VML);} o\:* {behavior:url(#default#VML);} w\:* {behavior:url(#default#VML);} .shape {behavior:url(#default#VML);} Hi Hilda,   I have some lovely news to share, part of your order is ready earlier than expected and is due to be delivered this week, either tomorrow or Friday.   Although your purchase was originally part of our January pre-order, we’ve been able to move the 1 x Milan Box in Black ahead of schedule, and I’m so pleased to be able to get this to you sooner.   Thank you again for supporting Sagitine. I hope this little surprise brings a bit of extra joy to your week.   The Insert Set you’ve ordered are still on track to be delivered in January. At this stage the expected delivery is around mid-January, but I’ll get back in touch again closer to date.   If you have any questions at all, I’m always happy to help. Warm regards, Heidi x     Heidi Director SAGITINE

subject: FW: Order #438283701 Confirmed
customer_question: How do I return this?
response_body: v\:* {behavior:url(#default#VML);} o\:* {behavior:url(#default#VML);} w\:* {behavior:url(#default#VML);} .shape {behavior:url(#default#VML);} Morning, when you get a sec can you please look into what happened to the Stand Aimee ordered. Thanks!   From: info <info@sagitine.com> Sent: Sunday, 22 June 2025 6:55 PM To: Aimee Ford <aimee_f@live.com.au>; info <info@sagitine.com> Subject: RE: Order #438283701 Confirmed   Good Evening Aimee, Thank you so much for your message and I’m so sorry to hear that the boxes didn’t live up to your expectation.   I can see you that you’ve placed two orders on June 6 th - #438283701 and #438283801 My sincerest apologies that the Stand from order #438283801 failed to arrive. When the team are back in the office tomorrow, we’ll follow up what happened with our courier partners. I can offer you two options to return your order. 1. You can organise to have the order returned to either of the two return addresses below depending on if you use Australia Post or a courier service.  Once we receive the order we’ll issue a full refund of your order excluding shipping.  2. Alternatively, we’re more than happy to organise for a courier to collect your order, once the order is collected, we’ll issue a refund of your purchase minus the cost of return delivery.   Thank you again for getting in touch and please let me know which return option you’d like to go ahead with. Warm Regards Heidi x   SAGITINE RETURN ADDRESSES: Sagitine Returns PO BOX 1002 Potts Point NSW 1335   Sagitine Returns 177 Cathedral Street Wooloomooloo NSW 2011     From: Aimee Ford < aimee_f@live.com.au > Sent: Sunday, 22 June 2025 12:29 PM To: info < info@sagitine.com > Subject: Fw: Order #438283701 Confirmed   Good morning    Could I please arrange return of this order.    The quality of the boxes is not what I had expected.    Many

response_body: v\:* {behavior:url(#default#VML);} o\:* {behavior:url(#default#VML);} w\:* {behavior:url(#default#VML);} .shape {behavior:url(#default#VML);} Morning! FYI - - Below from Lisa. I’ve just put through the replacement order for the Stand only.   When she replies I might get you to help organising the return of the damaged Stand.   xx     From: info <info@sagitine.com> Sent: Tuesday, 5 August 2025 9:10 AM To: lisa bolton <ljbolton19@gmail.com>; info <info@sagitine.com> Subject: RE: Order No. 2895. Marks on Shanghai stand ( 3rd email)   Good Morning Lisa,   My sincerest apologies for both the damaged Stand you’ve received and not replying sooner.   This is the first email I’ve seen come through. I will organise a replacement Stand to come out to you as soon as possible. You’ll received a reorder notification come through today on this email. Would you still have the original packaging for the damaged Stand you have?  If you do and it’s possible to repackage it I’ll organise for it to be collected as well.   My apologies again Lisa and thank you so much for continuing to email. We’ll get your replacement out to you as quickly as we can. Warm Regards Heidi     From: lisa bolton < ljbolton19@gmail.com > Sent: Tuesday, 5 August 2025 8:08 AM To: info < info@sagitine.com > Subject: Order No. 2895. Previous emails were sent on the 10th and 20th of July.    I have attached photos of the marks below.   Could you please confirm if you have received my previous emails as I have received numerous emails to review you product but I have not received any replies    Kind regards  Lisa

subject: FW: Outfit Valet Sample
customer_question: How do I assemble/set up my Box?
response_body: v\:* {behavior:url(#default#VML);} o\:* {behavior:url(#default#VML);} w\:* {behavior:url(#default#VML);} .shape {behavior:url(#default#VML);} Hi Emma, Hope you’re fab, you’re always fab.   Yvette has let me know that the tooling is because the tube sizes between the Outfit Valet and the current stands are different. I’m assuming she’s referring to the aluminium tubes.   If that’s right, I’ll go ahead with the tooling cost. If not, let me know and I’ll update her, or you can go back to her directly if easier. Whatever’s best for you.   Hides x   From: Great Modest <info@greatmodest.com.tw> Sent: Wednesday, 11 February 2026 8:03 PM To: Heidi Melville <heidi@sagitine.com> Cc: 'YVETTE GM' <1322842122@qq.com>; 'Great Modest' <info@greatmodest.com.tw> Subject: RE: Outfit Valet Sample   Hi Heidi,   Good day and hope you are well :)   No worries and happy you found the mail.   Based on our understanding, these tube sizes below from drawings are not 20x40mm tube. If there is any misunderstand between us, please can assist to let me know?       Thank you very much   Best regards,   Yvette Hsu             Great Modest Enterprises Ltd. E: info@greatmodest.com.tw T: +886 4 2532 3976 M: +886 953 078 777   From: Heidi Melville < heidi@sagitine.com > Sent: Tuesday, February 10, 2026 12:30 PM To: Great Modest < info@greatmodest.com.tw > Cc: 'YVETTE GM' < 1322842122@qq.com > Subject: RE: Outfit Valet Sample   Oh sorry, I have just seen this email, Somehow I missed it, my apologies Yvette.   Can I ask is it possible to use the same aluminium tube and what the difference is between the 20x40 for the Outfit Valet and the tubing we use for the Stands?   Thank you Heidi x   From: Great Modest < info@greatmodest.com.tw > Sent: Friday, 30 January 2026 8:25 PM To: Heidi Melville < heidi@sagitine.com > Cc: 'YVETTE GM' < 1322842122@qq.com >; 'Great Modest' < info@greatmodest.com.tw > Subject: RE: Outfit Valet Sample   Hi Heidi,   Thank you for the mail.   The aluminum tube for box stand is 20x40mm, it is different to Outfit Valet. Therefore there is asked tooling for Outfit Valet tubes.   Besides, please can I know if the tube below for Outfit Valet will change to K/D to save the packing space?   Thank you and looking forward to hearing from you   Best regards,   Yvette Hsu             Great Modest Enterprises Ltd. E: info@greatmodest.com.tw T: +886 4 2532 3976 M: +886 953 078 777   From: Heidi Melville < heidi@sagitine.com > Sent: Friday, January 30, 2026 3:00 AM To: Great Modest < info@greatmodest.com.tw > Cc: 'YVETTE GM' < 1322842122@qq.com > Subject: Outfit Valet Sample   Good Morning Yvette,   I hope you are really well.   Can you please let me know what components the tooling is for? I had a chat with Emma and we were both under the impression that the Outfit Valet was designed with existing componentry. Thanks so much Heidi x   From: Great Modest < info@greatmodest.com.tw > Sent: Wednesday, 14 January 2026 8:40 PM To: Heidi Melville < heidi@sagitine.com > Cc: 'YVETTE GM' < 1322842122@qq.com >; 'Great Modest' < info@greatmodest.com.tw > Subject: RE: Sagitine Order PO202510GM   Hi Heidi,   Thank you for the mail   Please assist to find my reply in green words below.   1. When will the correct Melbourne Samples be available? The correct Melbourne Samples will ship with Australia container for you. Its inspection photos will send you in next few days as well.   2. What are the extra costs associated with the Outfit Valet sample? The total charge for Outfit Valet sample include tooling fee is US$1,565. There will take about 30days for tooling and sample production. If it is confirmed please assist to let me know, I will check the lead time for you.   Thank you very much and have a good evening!     Best regards,   Yvette Hsu             Great Modest Enterprises Ltd. E: info@greatmodest.com.tw T: +886 4 2532 3976 M: +886 953 078 777   From: Heidi Melville < heidi@sagitine.com > Sent: Wednesday, January 14, 2026 6:05 AM To: Great Modest < info@greatmodest.com.tw > Cc: 'YVETTE GM' < 1322842122@qq.com > Subject: RE: Sagitine Order PO202510GM   Good Morning again Yvette,   Can you please also confirm the sample details when you have a moment: 1. When will the correct Melbourne Samples be available? 2. What are the extra costs associated with the Outfit Valet sample? Thank you so much and looking forward to your message. Warm Regards Heidi x   From: Great Modest < info@greatmodest.com.tw > Sent: Tuesday, 13 January 2026 10:28 PM To: Heidi Melville < heidi@sagitine.com > Cc: 'YVETTE GM' < 1322842122@qq.com >; 'Great Modest' < info@greatmodest.com.tw > Subject: RE: Sagitine Order PO202510GM   Hi Heidi,   Thank you for the confirmed quantity for Australia shipment.   As previously notified, due to the new white powder coat color, this shipment will change to the week of Jan. 12 th . Now there is scheduled to inspect products on January 15th. May I know will you send an inspector on-site this time? If not, we will inspect 5% of the total quantity and send you photos.   Product Name Color Quantity Inspect Quantity Florence Black 35 2 Florence White 75 4 Shanghai Black 35 2 Shanghai White 75 4 New York Black 35 2 New York White 75 4   Besides, after confirmed with Cindy, the nearest shipping schedule after inspection is below.   ETC: Jan. 19 th ETA: Feb. 03 rd Vessel: COSCO HONG KONG 203S   I think all the process is on schedule without delay. Furthermore, we absorb the FOB and package printing charges for you as well. To be honest, giving another 5% discount would be a challenge to us. We hope you understand that we always prioritize your needs and strive to provide you with the best.   By the way, the inspection photos will continue to send you on the 15th. If there are no issues, we will proceed with the shipment for you.   Thank you very much and have a lovely day!!   Best regards,   Yvette Hsu             Great Modest Enterprises Ltd. (KGS) Total CBM 202511GM 25111101 Florence Black 15 96.00 1.110 202511GM 25111101 Florence White 75 480.00 5.550 202511GM 25111101 Shanghai Black 20 214.00 2.140 202511GM 25111101 Shanghai White 75 802.50 8.025 202511GM 25111101 New York Black 18 239.40 2.430 202511GM 25111101 New York White 58 771.40 7.830 Replacement Shanghai White 2 21.40 0.214 Replacement New York White 2 26.60 0.270 Sample Melbourne Black 1 Sample Melbourne White 1 Total: 267 2651.30 27.569     From: Great Modest < info@greatmodest.com.tw > Sent: Monday, 12 January 2026 5:09 PM To: Heidi Melville < heidi@sagitine.com > Cc: 'YVETTE GM' < 1322842122@qq.com >; info@greatmodest.com.tw Subject: RE: Sagitine Order PO202510GM   Hi Heidi,   2 pcs of Melbourne samples will ship in Australia container, and 1pc pack in a box and there will be 2 boxes. (KGS) Total G.W. (KGS) CBM Total CBM Carton size (mm) 202511GM 25111101 Florence Black 35 1 35 3.10 6.40 3.10 224.00 0.074 2.590 720 x 410 x 250 202511GM 25111101 Florence White 75 1 75 3.10 6.40 3.10 480.00 0.074 5.550 720 x 410 x 250 202511GM 25111101 Shanghai Black 35 1 35 7.10 10.70 7.10 374.50 0.107 3.745 1040 x 410 x 250 202511GM 25111101 Shanghai White 75 1 75 7.10 10.70 7.10 802.50 0.107 8.025 1040 x 410 x 250 202511GM 25111101 New York Black 35 1 35 8.60 13.30 8.60 465.50 0.135 4.725 1320 x 410 x 250 202511GM 25111101 New York White 75 1 75 8.60 13.30 8.60 997.50 0.135 10.125 1320 x 410 x 250 Replacement Shanghai White 2 1 2 7.10 10.70 7.10 21.40 0.107 0.214 1040 x 410 x 250 Replacement New York White 2 1 2 8.60 13.30 8.60 26.60 0.135 0.270 1320 x 410 x 250 Sample Melbourne Black 1 1 1 0.065 0.065 465 x 1180 x 120 Sample Melbourne White 1 1 1 0.065 0.065 465 x 1180 x 120 Total: 336 336 3392.00 35.374     We will suggest not pack over 28 cbm for a 20ft container.   Look forward to having your confirmed shipping q’ty.   Thank you very much.   Best regards,   Laura Wei             Great Modest Enterprises Ltd. E: info@greatmodest.com.tw T: +886 4 2532 3976   From: 1322842122+auto_=info=greatmodest.com.tw@qq.com < 1322842122+auto_=info=greatmodest.com.tw@qq.com > On Behalf Of Heidi Melville Sent: Monday, January 12, 2026 12:23 PM To: Great Modest < info@greatmodest.com.tw > Cc: 'YVETTE GM' < 1322842122@qq.com > Subject: RE: Sagitine Order PO202510GM   Hi Yvettte, Thank you so much for sending through the below. Can you please confirm which samples will ship with the order and what the CBM is? And also confirm the replacements too. Thank you so much Warm Regards Heidi x   From: Great Modest < info@greatmodest.com.tw > Sent: Monday, 12 January 2026 2:57 PM To: Heidi Melville < heidi@sagitine.com > Cc: 'YVETTE GM' < 1322842122@qq.com >; info@greatmodest.com.tw Subject: RE: Sagitine Order PO202510GM   Hi Heidi,   Thank you for your splits sheet. But there should be added the replacements and samples as well.   I check the volume is about 28.1 cbm for Australia container and it might be too full. I will suggest you to reduce New York stand q’ty to ship to Australia as below. Can you please confirm if this is okay for you?   To Australia PO S/C Item No. Color Order q'ty Total G.W. (KGS) Total CBM 202511GM 25111101 Florence Black 15 96.00 1.110 202511GM 25111101 Florence White 75 480.00 5.550 202511GM 25111101 Shanghai Black 20 214.00 2.140 202511GM 25111101 Shanghai White 75 802.50 8.025 202511GM 25111101 New York Black 18 239.40 2.430 202511GM 25111101 New York White 58 771.40 7.830 Replacement Shanghai White 2 21.40 0.214 Replacement New York White 2 26.60 0.270 Sample Melbourne Black 1 Sample Melbourne White 1 Total: 267 2651.30 27.569     To China PO S/C Item No. Color Order q'ty Total G.W. (KGS) Total CBM 202511GM 25111101 Florence Black 20 128.00 1.480 202511GM 25111101 Florence White 0.00 0.000 202511GM 25111101 Shanghai Black 15 160.50 1.605 202511GM 25111101 Shanghai White 0.00 0.000 202511GM 25111101 New York Black 17 226.10 2.295 202511GM 25111101 New York White 17 226.10 2.295 Total: 69 740.70 7.675     Thank you very much.   Best regards,   Laura Wei             Great Modest Enterprises Ltd. E: info@greatmodest.com.tw T: +886 4 2532 3976   From: 1322842122+auto_=info=greatmodest.com.tw@qq.com < 1322842122+auto_=info=greatmodest.com.tw@qq.com > On Behalf Of Heidi Melville Sent: Saturday, January 10, 2026 4:20 AM To: Great Modest < info@greatmodest.com.tw > Cc: 'YVETTE GM' < 1322842122@qq.com > Subject: RE: Sagitine Order PO202510GM   Sorry Yvette, I have now attached the splits as well. Heidi xx   From: Heidi Melville Sent: Saturday, 10 January 2026 7:18 AM To: 'Great Modest' < info@greatmodest.com.tw > Cc: 'YVETTE GM' < 1322842122@qq.com > Subject: RE: Sagitine Order PO202510GM   Good Morning Yvette, I hope you are having a great week. Please find below the order splits I have also attached them in a sheet for you. AUSTRALIA: * I have calculated the Australia shipment to fit into a 20FT container at 28CBM.  Please let me know if this will not fit and I need to adjust the quantities to fit a 20ft. * The unit CBMs and 20FT total CBM is based off what you gave me last time.   CHINA: The china allocation will need to be sent to ZhenHub in Dongguan. I will need to raise shipmarks for the shipment that will need to be stuck onto each carton. Once you have confirmed that the Australia split is correct to fit into a 20ft container, I will create the shipmarks for the China allocation and send you the warehouse details (contact and address).   Thank you again Yvette, Please let me know if there is anything else you need from me for the order and delivery at this stage. Warm Regards Heidi xx       From: Heidi Melville Sent: Saturday, 10 January 2026 6:49 AM To: Great Modest < info@greatmodest.com.tw > Cc: 'YVETTE GM' < 1322842122@qq.com > Subject: RE: Sagitine Order PO202510GM   Good Morning Yvette,   Thank you so much for all of the information and the email below. I really appreciate everything and thank you for reaching out to Cindy to confirm a shipping date.   THE MELBOURNE STAND: Thank you for trying but this is not the sample I ordered. If it is ready when the order is ready to ship and you would like to include it I am happy for you to, however, I don’t want to pay for this sample.   Can you please create the requested sample in both Black and White?   This will need to be sent separately to me, I am hopeful you will pay for the freight to me. There is no time pressure on this sample, it can be sent with the Outfit Valet.   THE OUTFIT VALET: Can you please let me know what the cost of this sample is to complete?   THE ORDER: Please Yvette can we not delay our orders for samples.  This is very very important. It is very important that our orders are not delayed for other components. An almost three-week delay (18 days) from the original quoted ready day is not okay for our business. I am requesting that you apply a discount of 5% on the order for the delay. As our orders grow I need to have confidence that my supply chain is reliable for our customers. Otherwise I will not have a viable business.   Please can you confirm: * The 5% discount on the order to be applied to the remaining invoice. * When the Melbourne Stand samples will be completed. * That you accept to pay for freight of the Melbourne Stands to me. * The cost of the sample for the Outfit Valet.   Thank you so much for printing the labels onto the box. I really appreciate this, however, I need to know if anything will delay the order. Thank you so much again Yvette, I look forward to hearing back from you Warm Regards Heidi x       From: Great Modest < info@greatmodest.com.tw > Sent: Friday, 9 January 2026 8:03 PM To: Heidi Melville < heidi@sagitine.com > Cc: 'YVETTE GM' < 1322842122@qq.com >; 'Great Modest' < info@greatmodest.com.tw > Subject: RE: Sagitine Order PO202510GM   Hi Heidi,   After confirmed with Cindy (PCFS), we will chase below shipment. Hope it is no problem for you.   ETD SHEKOU:22/Jan ETA SYDNEY:4/Feb V/V:KOTA LAWA/0101S   Thank you very much   Best regards,   Yvette Hsu             Great Modest Enterprises Ltd. E: info@greatmodest.com.tw T: +886 4 2532 3976 M: +886 953 078 777   From: 1322842122+auto_=info=greatmodest.com.tw@qq.com < 1322842122+auto_=info=greatmodest.com.tw@qq.com > On Behalf Of Great Modest Sent: Friday, January 9, 2026 1:38 PM To: 'Heidi Melville' < heidi@sagitine.com > Cc: 'YVETTE GM' < 1322842122@qq.com >; 'Great Modest' < info@greatmodest.com.tw > Subject: RE: Sagitine Order PO202510GM   Hello Heidi,   Good day and thank you for the mail.   I know there is confirmed the shape of Melbourne sample, however factory still made it double side shelf. The delay because there need time for new timber top production.   I am apologize to have the mistake and inconvenience.     We understand you need the products asap, please can I know if still contact with Cindy (PCFS) for delivery? If yes, we will proceed to confirm the shipping schedule and let you know the confirmed lead time, hope it is okay for you.   Besides, please can we have the shipping quantity?   About coat stand, the aluminum tube sizes are different than shoes stand 40 x 20mm. That’s why need make tooling for production.   Besides, we informed Emma the assembled frame in circled below is waste space. There is confirmed to sperate to 3 sections for assembling. It means there are 3 different aluminum tube sizes therefore asked tooling production as well.   Please can you assist to confirm if the tooling production to proceed with? If yes, then there will take about 30days for coat stand sample production.         By the way, to optimization the package. We try to print label on cartons this time, thus sorry to spend some time for print mold.   Please can you confirm what size below is suitable for you? The 148 x 210mm meet A5 size however caused letters deformed.         Thank you and looking forward to hearing from you   Best regards,   Yvette Hsu             Great Modest Enterprises Ltd. E: info@greatmodest.com.tw T: +886 4 2532 3976 M: +886 953 078 777   From: Heidi Melville < heidi@sagitine.com > Sent: Friday, January 9, 2026 3:43 AM To: Great Modest < info@greatmodest.com.tw > Cc: 'YVETTE GM' < 1322842122@qq.com > Subject: RE: Sagitine Order PO202510GM   Hi Laura,   I hope you’re having a lovely week. Thank you so much for your email.   It is really important that the manufacturing for orders is on time, is there a reason for such a long delay? Can you please check if there is anyway the order can be ready earlier?   The reason for the importance is that we offer pre orders for customers based on the shipping dates you give us. We add some extra time for potential shipping delays but and small manufacturing delays.   The original date Yvette quoted for manufacturing to be finished was January 5 th , to now not have the products ready until the end of the month is an issue for the business.   Can you please let me know why there is such a big delay and what can be done about it?   Can you please also let me know what the implications of Aluminium Extrusion tooling is and what the implications of accepting the tooling is? My understanding was that Emma (the designer) was working with Yvette to design a piece that uses the same materials that we currently use for the stands to standardise manufacturing. And I thought the samples would be ready to ship with the order.    Thank you again Warm Regards Heidi   From: Great Modest < info@greatmodest.com.tw > Sent: Thursday, 8 January 2026 6:41 PM To: Heidi Melville < heidi@sagitine.com > Cc: 'YVETTE GM' < 1322842122@qq.com >; info@greatmodest.com.tw Subject: RE: Sagitine Order PO202510GM   Hi Heidi,   Thank you for your email.   Yvette is off today.   Regard to make sample for Outfit Valet, it requires to open Aluminum Extrusion tooling and are you able to accept to open the tooling? We will check all sample costs to you.   About the Melbourne sample and your order, they are still manufacturing and expect to be ready in week Jan. 18 – 24 because the stands are needed time to assemble and powder coat.   Thank you very much.   Best regards,   Laura Wei             Great Modest Enterprises Ltd. E: info@greatmodest.com.tw T: +886 4 2532 3976   From: 1322842122+auto_=info=greatmodest.com.tw@qq.com < 1322842122+auto_=info=greatmodest.com.tw@qq.com > On Behalf Of Heidi Melville Sent: Thursday, January 8, 2026 1:39 PM To: Great Modest < info@greatmodest.com.tw > Cc: 'YVETTE GM' < 1322842122@qq.com > Subject: RE: Sagitine Order PO202510GM   Hello Yvette, I hope you are doing very well and wishing you a wonderful 2026.   Thanks so much for this. Can you please let me know the cost of the samples and if they’ll be ready to ship with the order and also if the Melbourne sample will be ready to ship with the order too? Also just checking if the order is still ready next week as we will confirm the shipment. For this order I will ship 1 x container to Australia and have the remainder stored in a warehouse in China.  I will send you the split details tomorrow. Thank you so much and warm regards Heidi x     From: Great Modest < info@greatmodest.com.tw > Sent: Monday, 29 December 2025 2:50 PM To: Heidi Melville < heidi@sagitine.com > Cc: 'YVETTE GM' < 1322842122@qq.com >; 'Great Modest' < info@greatmodest.com.tw > Subject: RE: Sagitine Order PO202510GM   Hello Heidi,   Happy Holiday and hope you had a wonderful Christmas.   Attached is the quote for Outfit Valet for you. Please feel free to let me know what you need and I will confirm the lead time for you.   Thank you very much and have a great day!   Best regards,   Yvette Hsu             Great Modest Enterprises Ltd. source_filename: FW_ Season Opener May 7th @ Kyiv Social feat.msg
subject: FW: Season Opener May 7th @ Kyiv Social feat
customer_question: How do I assemble this?
response_body: v\:* {behavior:url(#default#VML);} o\:* {behavior:url(#default#VML);} w\:* {behavior:url(#default#VML);} .shape {behavior:url(#default#VML);} Want to go to this with me? xx   From: Chris Wirasinha <chris@linkby.com> Sent: Wednesday, 2 April 2025 10:01 AM To: Taryn Williams <taryn@winkmodels.com.au> Subject: Season Opener May 7th @ Kyiv Social feat   Hi All, Taryn and I are delighted to invite you all to another Season Opener!    The next dinner will take place at 6.30pm on Wednesday the 7th of May at Kyiv Social in Chippendale part of the epic Plate It Forward group. Our guest speaker will be Annie Liao founder of Build Club which is the world's largest community of AI builders. Annie founded the business in Sydney but is now based in San Francisco. Build Club's current product suite is focused on levelling up individuals and enterprises to confidently incorporate AI into their businesses. Build Club was recently backed by Blackbird and Annie will be back in Sydney speaking at the Sunrise conference.    As a refresher Season Opener is a not-for-profit and sponsor free dinner that brings together the finest entrepreneurial minds in technology, commerce, retail and the creative industries to share a meal. As we don't have sponsors everyone covers the cost of their own meal and the associated venue and event costs via their ticket.    Grab your ticket here :  https://www.trybooking.com/DANMO   We're coming off our biggest Season Opener yet so can't wait to see you at the next one!    Cheers Chris & Taryn.      --   Chris Wirasinha Co-founder chris@linkby.com 0401004411 Linkby.com

subject: FW: The big one is back 🖤

response_body: v\:* {behavior:url(#default#VML);} o\:* {behavior:url(#default#VML);} w\:* {behavior:url(#default#VML);} .shape {behavior:url(#default#VML);}     From: Sagitine <info@sagitine.com> Sent: Wednesday, 12 November 2025 6:23 AM To: Heidi Melville <heidi@sagitine.com> Subject: The big one is back 🖤   20-Box New York Stand available for pre-order ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­       The big one is finally back   After months of waiting, our full collection of New York 20-Box Stands is finally available again.   Pre-order now for February 2026 delivery.    The New York 20-Box Stand has always been one of our most loved (and fastest-selling) designs, and for good reason. Elegant, timeless, and endlessly practical. It’s the kind of storage you’ll want to see every day, whether in your bedroom, dressing room, or living space.     SHOP NEW YORK STANDS     $480 off in Black Friday Sale   The Sagitine Black Friday Sale is now on, and the New York Stands are 20% off, saving you $480.   Even though this batch is on pre-order, it’s the perfect time to secure yours at a rare sale price before they sell out again.           Sagitine © 2025 | All rights reserved. source_filename: FW_ We'd still love your thoughts_ Elizabeth – it only takes a few seconds - short shipped.msg
subject: FW: We'd still love your thoughts, Elizabeth – it only takes a few seconds - short shipped
customer_question: Where is my order?
response_body: v\:* {behavior:url(#default#VML);} o\:* {behavior:url(#default#VML);} w\:* {behavior:url(#default#VML);} .shape {behavior:url(#default#VML);} Morning, When you get a sec can you please follow up Elizabeth Symond ’s missing Miami. Thanks x   From: info <info@sagitine.com> Sent: Thursday, 26 June 2025 6:00 AM To: BetSafe Accounts <accounts@betsafe.com.au>; info <info@sagitine.com> Subject: RE: We'd still love your thoughts, Elizabeth – it only takes a few seconds - short shipped   Good Morning Elizabeth,   Thank you so much for getting in touch and letting us know.   When the team are back in this morning, I’ll ask them to follow up on your missing Black Miami Box. Sometimes our delivery partners only partly complete a delivery   In regard to your Deep Bue Milan Boxes and the Belt Insert Set, I can see they are yet to be shipped but are due to be delivered to you early next week, most probably by Tuesday.   Thank you so much again for your support, it really means the world to us. I hope you have a wonderful rest of your week. Warm Regards Heidi x   From: BetSafe Accounts < accounts@betsafe.com.au > Sent: Wednesday, 25 June 2025 4:31 PM To: info < info@sagitine.com > Subject: RE: We'd still love your thoughts, Elizabeth – it only takes a few seconds - short shipped   Hi Heidi   I have received O/N 2861 and O/N 2864.  I only received 2 not 3 of the Blk Miami boxes (O/N  2861) and I am missing the additional 2 Blue Milan boxes and complimentary belt insert. (O/N 2864).  Please advise     Kind Regards Elizabeth Symond From: Heidi, Owner of Sagitine < info@sagitine.com > Sent: Saturday, 21 June 2025 12:22 PM To: BetSafe Accounts < accounts@betsafe.com.au > Subject: We'd still love your thoughts, Elizabeth – it only takes a few seconds   Hi Elizabeth, I thought I'd send one more email to see if you'd be open to sharing your thoughts on Sagitine. I know it'll take years to grow a business like Sagitine, but a few seconds of your time will go a long way in helping us thrive. Your feedback tells me what we're doing right, where we can improve and helps us to create the best products for you and our community.  I hope Sagitine continues to warm your home. Heidi xx   P.S. Don't forget to use FREESHIP if you would like to add another piece to your collection. You received this email from Sagitine. If you would like to unsubscribe, click here .

subject: FW: Welcome to Zhenhub, Heidi!
customer_question: How do I assemble this?
response_body: v\:* {behavior:url(#default#VML);} o\:* {behavior:url(#default#VML);} w\:* {behavior:url(#default#VML);} .shape {behavior:url(#default#VML);} Hi Joy, I know we need to have a catch-up on progress and next steps but in the meantime can you please help Kami out with the below information today? * Address * Operating hours * Contact at the warehouse * Any special packing requirements * Does the booking system generate the barcode for the incoming cargo or do you use the customer barcode they use for their goods? * Who has access to the system to lodge a shipment? We have a shipment that’s ready to be delivered in the next couple of days and need the information. Just on the barcodes, all cartons are already barcoded as per the spec sheet that was sent via the sign-up process from Katherine. Thank you so much Warm Regards Heidi     From: Kami Dougherty <kami@nextpack.com.au> Sent: Monday, 15 December 2025 11:33 AM To: Katherine Famor <katherine@zhenhub.com>; Heidi Melville <heidi@sagitine.com>; Lyra Epe <lyra@zhenhub.com> Cc: Sheree Camus <sheree@nextpack.com.au>; ZhenHub Customer Success <csm@zhenhub.com> Subject: RE: Welcome to Zhenhub, Heidi!   Hi Katherine,   Has Lyra contacted your customer Sagitine to provide the system training?   I have tried to contact her several times without a reply. I really need to know the following information so we can deliver the goods to the Shenzhen warehouse.   * Address * Operating hours * Contact at the warehouse * Any special packing requirements * Does the booking system generate the barcode for the incoming cargo or do you use the customer barcode they use for their goods? * Who has access to the system to lodge a shipment? A reply would be greatly appreciated so we can deliver the goods on time.     Warm regards,   Kami Dougherty Head of Operations Nextpack Pty Ltd       M 0429 499 025 E   kami@nextpack.com.au W www.nextpack.com.au A  Suite 302, 115 Military Rd Neutral Bay NSW 2089 Australia P  PO BOX 753 Neutral Bay NSW 2089 Australia     From: Katherine Famor <katherine@zhenhub.com> Sent: Thursday, 11 December 2025 4:27 PM To: Heidi <heidi@sagitine.com>; Lyra Epe <lyra@zhenhub.com> Cc: Kami Dougherty <kami@nextpack.com.au>; Sheree Camus <sheree@nextpack.com.au>; ZhenHub Customer Success <csm@zhenhub.com> Subject: Welcome to Zhenhub, Heidi!   Hi Heidi,   Thank you again for signing the contract and completing your deposit.   Welcome to  ZhenHub! This is just the beginning of an exciting journey to grow your business with us. To help you make the most of what ZhenHub offers, our Customer Success team is here to guide you through onboarding, system training, and connecting with our network of fulfillment centers. They bring a wealth of knowledge and insights to help you fully leverage our platform to scale your operations.   Attached is a copy of our  Product Label Guide  for your reference. Feel free to bring up any questions during your first system training session.   Let me introduce you to your  System Training Specialist, Lyra . She will be your main point of contact to ensure smooth operations, manage shipments, and address any concerns quickly, so you can focus on growing your business with confidence.   Lyra and the team are already up to speed with your account. I’ve shared your contract and account details. If you have any additional requests or requirements that haven’t been mentioned yet, please don’t hesitate to let her know.   I hope your onboarding experience has been smooth so far. You’re in great hands, and we’re excited to support your journey with ZhenHub.   Thank you!   Best Regards,  Katherine --  ZhenHub  |  Signup Facebook  |  X  |  LinkedIn

source_filename: FW_ We’re just one week out – here’s everything you need to know for the Black Friday Launchpad event.msg
subject: FW: We’re just one week out – here’s everything you need to know for the Black Friday Launchpad event
customer_question: How do I assemble this?
response_body: v\:* {behavior:url(#default#VML);} o\:* {behavior:url(#default#VML);} w\:* {behavior:url(#default#VML);} .shape {behavior:url(#default#VML);} We’re just one week out – here’s everything you need to know for the Black Friday Launchpad event xx   From: campaigns=humanitix.com@email-campaigns.humanitix.com <campaigns=humanitix.com@email-campaigns.humanitix.com> On Behalf Of Jay Wright Sent: Thursday, 31 July 2025 12:17 PM To: Heidi Melville <heidi@sagitine.com> Subject: We’re just one week out – here’s everything you need to know for the Black Friday Launchpad event   Hey Heidi, We’re officially one week away from the Black Friday Launchpad in Sydney! Here’s a quick refresher so you’ve got everything you need: Where: Sofitel Sydney Wentworth – 61–101 Phillip St, Sydney When: Thursday, 7 August – doors open at 8:30am for registration, sessions run 9:30am – 4:30pm The full agenda: * 9:30 – 11:00am: The Sales Strategy Kick off with a powerful blueprint to reverse-engineer your Black Friday revenue goal — covering timelines, offer structure, media spend, and daily pacing. * 11:30 – 12:30pm: The Creative Cut-Through Cut through the noise with creative that gets both new and existing customers to take notice and take action. * 12:40 – 1:35pm: Lunch & Learn Sessions While you enjoy a light lunch, hear directly from Meta, Pinterest, Klaviyo and Google . * 1:45 – 2:45pm: The Tale of Two Sales Get an inside look at two 7-figure sale campaigns — what worked, what didn’t, and how you can apply the same strategy to your next sales event. * 3:15 – 4:30pm: The Founder Mastermind Join a live, founder-led mastermind to workshop your campaign plan, troubleshoot challenges, and leave with actionable feedback and clarity Parking options nearby: * 61–101 Phillip St – Wilson Parking (1 min walk) * 6/10 O'Connell St – Wilson Parking (2 min walk) * 187 Macquarie St – Wilson Parking (3 min walk) * 123 Pitt St – Wilson Parking (4 min walk) * 109 Pitt St – Secure Parking (4 min walk) * 12/2 Chifley Square – public parking (4 min walk, pricing varies) Pre-event drinks: If you’re in Sydney the night before, join us for a relaxed evening with other founders and the team: Bungalow 8 (upstairs) – 3 Lime St, Sydney Wednesday, 6 August – 6:00pm A few quick notes: * Workbooks, pens and all catering are included (morning tea, lunch and afternoon tea) * Meta, Pinterest, Klaviyo and Google will also be on-site with activation booths, so you can chat to their teams one-on-one throughout the day. We’re so close now, and it’s going to be a full day of strategy, clarity and connection. See you in Sydney, The Ecommerce Equation Team Have more questions about the event?  Contact host  This email was sent by Humanitix Limited, Level 1/1-5 Hickson Rd, The Rocks NSW 2000, NSW, Australia. You received this email because you’ve got tickets to the The Black Friday Launchpad 2025 - Sydney. No longer want to receive emails for this event? Unsubscribe

response_body: v\:* {behavior:url(#default#VML);} o\:* {behavior:url(#default#VML);} w\:* {behavior:url(#default#VML);} .shape {behavior:url(#default#VML);} Hi Tania,   Thank you so much for your order, your support means the world to us.   Our annual Warehouse Sale starts tomorrow with an offer of 20% off everything (excluding shipping).   At Sagitine we believe in doing the right thing by our customers.  As a token of our appreciation, we always offer anyone who has purchased in the few days leading up to the sale the opportunity to benefit from our sale price.  We’d love to extend our sale price offer for your order # 438265601 .   Simply confirm by replying to this email, and we’ll process a refund for the difference back to your original payment method. Thank you again. We hope you’re having a wonderful week, and I look forward to hearing from you soon.   Warm regards Heidi x

source_filename: Important Information about your order x.msg
subject: Important Information about your order x
customer_question: Where is my order?
response_body: v\:* {behavior:url(#default#VML);} o\:* {behavior:url(#default#VML);} w\:* {behavior:url(#default#VML);} .shape {behavior:url(#default#VML);} Hi Nicole,   I’ve just seen your review and I’m so sorry, that’s absolutely not the experience we ever want anyone to have with Sagitine.   I’ve looked into your order and, frustratingly, I can’t find any record of your earlier contact attempt via email or social media, so I’m so sorry you’ve had to chase this without a reply. That’s completely our fault for not catching it sooner.   We sent your order via TNT, our most trusted courier partner, and they’ve confirmed all boxes were delivered, but I’ve asked them for full proof of delivery so we can understand exactly what’s happened. In the meantime, I don’t want you to be left with an incomplete stand or feeling disappointed every time you see it.   As we’re now sold out of the Nougat Boxes, the easiest and fairest solution would be to arrange a full refund and have the Stand and Boxes collected from you on Monday, or whenever is most convenient for you.   Please just let me know what day and time suits best, and confirm that you’re happy for the refund to be processed back to the original payment method used for your order. Once I have your confirmation, I’ll organise everything straight away.   Again, I’m so sorry this has happened, Nicole, I completely understand your frustration, and I really appreciate you taking the time to let us know.   Warm Regards Heidi x

We have your order ready for delivery for tomorrow. Because you’re a local Sydney order, we’ve taken the liberty of assembling your stand for you. It’s out small way of saying thank-you for the support. However, it does mean someone will need to be home to take collection of the order.   Would tomorrow be okay to deliver your Nougat Shanghai Stand to you, or is there a better day next week? Warm Regards Heidi x

At Sagitine we love to do the right thing by our customers. subject: Meta analytics report request
customer_question: What should I do about my damaged item?
response_body: v\:* {behavior:url(#default#VML);} o\:* {behavior:url(#default#VML);} w\:* {behavior:url(#default#VML);} .shape {behavior:url(#default#VML);} Morning Kel,   Hope you’re great.  I have a report request if that’s cool. I’m doing a deep dive into the first 4 months of the year.  We’re tracking down on revenue and I need to work out how to pull it up or alternatively cut some costs.   I’d love to see the below by month for Meta please.   Meta - Spent Meta - Reach Meta - Impressions Meta - ATC's Meta - Orders Meta - Order value Meta - Clicks Meta - Link Clicks Meta - CTR   But feel free to add any metrics that that you think could be worthwhile adding or are interesting. I’d then love to see it the same metrics broken down by prospecting and retargeting please.   If there’s any chance I can get it by Friday morning that would be amazing, and if you can please put it in an excel sheet that would be great.   I’ll get back onto our Bris mates for their returned stock and let you know for Monday. And, can I please change our fortnightly catch-up next week from Tuesday to Thursday if possible.  Anytime from 10am onwards is good for me. Thanks a mill Kell, Hides           Heidi Melville Director SAGITINE M: 0478 401 914 E:  heidi@sagitine.com

subject: Next Order & New Product Development
customer_question: How do I assemble this?
response_body: v\:* {behavior:url(#default#VML);} o\:* {behavior:url(#default#VML);} w\:* {behavior:url(#default#VML);} .shape {behavior:url(#default#VML);} Hello Yvette, I hope you’re having a wonderful week!   I have a few things I’d love your help with:   1. Coat Rack / Outfit Valet I have a designer working on drawings for the new Coat Rack (or Outfit Valet). They’ve asked if you could please share the specifications for the aluminium framing that’s used in our current stands? Wherever possible, they’d like to use the same materials to ensure consistency across the range.   2. Next Order Preparation I’d like to start preparing for the next order and am looking to order 100 units each of the Florence , Shanghai , and New York Stands. The business is growing really well, and the plan is to place two orders this year , one within the next month and another in about six months. I wanted to confirm that the pricing is still as follows in $USD: * Florence 8 Box Stand = $152.70 * Shanghai 14 Box Stand = $195.90 * New York 20 Box Stand = 250.40   I also wanted to check if you’d be open to slightly updated payment terms: ·         1/3 on order ·         1/3 on shipment ·         1/3 45 days after shipment This would help provide flexibility to sell some stock before the final payment is due. I completely understand this may add some pressure, but I wanted to ask, as some of my other suppliers work this way.   3. New Stand Prototype – “Melbourne” I have a new stand concept that I’d love to prototype, similar to how you created the Florence 8 Box Stand previously without detailed drawings. The new design will be a variation of the Santiago Stand (which we discontinued around two years ago). I’ve attached some images for reference. The new stand, which I’ll call Melbourne , will hold six Miami Boxes (which are larger than the Milan Boxes) in a single tower, with a total height of around 117 cm. All other design elements and materials would remain the same, apart from a slightly different timber top size. If I provide the design files for the Santiago Stand and send you a Miami Box , would it be possible for you to create a prototype for this new Melbourne Stand ?     Thank you so much, Yvette, I always appreciate your help and partnership. Looking forward to hearing your thoughts and excited to get our next order in!   Warm regards, Heidi Sagitine       Heidi Melville Director SAGITINE M: 0478 401 914 E:  heidi@sagitine.com

subject: Notes and briefs from yesterday
customer_question: I just wanted to share my feedback
response_body: v\:* {behavior:url(#default#VML);} o\:* {behavior:url(#default#VML);} w\:* {behavior:url(#default#VML);} .shape {behavior:url(#default#VML);} Hi Sheree, It was so wonderful to see you yesterday. Thank you so much for the gorgeous basket - I’ve already used it and love it.   We talked through 5 different topics yesterday; below are the notes I took and the briefs for the new products.   1. Nougat Boxes turning Green/Blue 2. Treasure Chest 3. Insert Set – Make-up 4. Insert Set – Jewellery 5. Cherry Box for LNY offer 2026   And here is a summary of our next steps and actions: * Sheree: To work with the manufacturers on a potential coating solution for the discolouration of the Nougat. * Sheree: Can the Treasure Chest come flat if it’s flocked? * Sheree: To let Heidi know what she thinks of the two colour options for the Make-up Insert Set. * Sheree: To begin sampling on the Insert Sets. * Sheree: To confirm which double happy icon would be the best and what type of embossing would be recommended.     1. We’ve had an issue with the Nougat boxes fading to a green or sometimes greeny blue colour. Stew and I dropped off 8 boxes that were from four different circumstances.   Some were full sun, some had never been near the sun. Next Steps: Sheree to work with manufacturers on a coating to prevent the colour change, understanding that fading is inevitable and the boxes shouldn’t be left in direct sun .   2. Treasure Chest Brief - Attached 3. Insert Set – Make-up - Attached 4. Insert Set – Jewellery – Attached 5. Cherry Box with Double Happiness Symbol – which symbol and how to emboss     I’m working on confirming the order before the end of September. Let me know if you need anything else from me in the meantime. Thanks so much again Heidi x       Heidi Melville Director SAGITINE M: 0478 401 914 E:  heidi@sagitine.com

subject: Nougat Boxes - quality issue
customer_question: I just wanted to share my feedback
response_body: v\:* {behavior:url(#default#VML);} o\:* {behavior:url(#default#VML);} w\:* {behavior:url(#default#VML);} .shape {behavior:url(#default#VML);} Hi Rebecca,   Thank you again for reaching out, and I’m so sorry you’ve experienced this.   I’ve checked your order and can see you purchased the Florence 8-Box Stand in Nougat in April last year, just confirming this is the piece you’re referring to?   We have seen a small batch in Nougat that hasn’t aged as beautifully as we expect, even when kept out of direct sunlight. While it’s not common, it is something we identified in a limited run, and it’s absolutely not the standard we hold ourselves to.  I would truly love to make this right for you.   We now have our updated Nougat Boxes in stock, which include an additional UV protectant in the finish. I’m very happy to arrange a full swap of your existing 8 Boxes for the new Nougat version, of course at no charge. Alternatively, if you’d prefer a different colour altogether, I’d be just as happy to organise that for you.   There’s no rush at all, have a think and let me know what you’d love. Once confirmed, I’ll arrange everything from our end to make it as seamless as possible. Thank you again for bringing this to me, Rebecca. I’m so grateful you reached out so we can resolve it properly.   Warm regards, Heidi x   Heidi Melville Owner SAGITINE

I’ve been meaning to reach out over the last couple of weeks, time has absolutely flown, so apologies if this comes a little last-minute.   I was wondering if you’d be open and available to collaborating with us again for November? We’re kicking off our Black Friday / Cyber Monday sale at the beginning of November, it’ll run for the whole month of November as we normally do.  However, this year I want to build a little bit of pre-sale excitement, and I was hoping you’d be available.   Here’s what I’m thinking: Deliverables: * One reel and one post on Saturday, 1 November.   Messaging: * Sale starts Tuesday, November 4 th . * Up to 40% off, but everything is on sale. * We only do a few sales a year, and this is our biggest one. * Stock can move really quickly, so if there’s something you’ve had your eye on, don’t wait!   Usage: * Sharable across organic channels * Used in Meta advertising for November 2026 only * A short quote featured in our “excitement” email launching the same day   Let me know if you’d be keen and what your rate would be. source_filename: Pause Sagitine account management for 3 months .msg
subject: Pause Sagitine account management for 3 months
customer_question: How do I assemble this?
response_body: v\:* {behavior:url(#default#VML);} o\:* {behavior:url(#default#VML);} w\:* {behavior:url(#default#VML);} .shape {behavior:url(#default#VML);} Good Morning Jayne and Kell,   Hope you both had a fabulous weekend.   As you know I’ve been digging into the financials of Sagitine quite deeply over the last month. With revenue down 20% YoY but ad spend up 30% YoY the business has been unprofitable in 2025 to date.   In order to find a long term financially sustainable business model for Sagitine I need to take a few months to reset the business and will need to pause our partnership for three months for June, July and August.   I’m so sorry to do this, I absolutely love working with you both and think you have managed the account wonderfully. It’s simply an affordability decision and I don’t want to continue spending when I don’t have the right profitability bedrock in place.   With a bit of planning and some hard work, I’m hopeful it will just be a short term three month pause. I wanted to let you know today so we can talk through any questions or thoughts you have tomorrow in our catch-up.   Seriously love you guys. Chat tomorrow Hides x   Heidi Melville Director SAGITINE M: 0478 401 914 E:  heidi@sagitine.com

subject: Pip Edwards and Sagitine
customer_question: Where is my order?
response_body: v\:* {behavior:url(#default#VML);} o\:* {behavior:url(#default#VML);} w\:* {behavior:url(#default#VML);} .shape {behavior:url(#default#VML);} Hi Tom, I hope you’re doing well. I’m Heidi, the owner of Sagitine. We create beautiful, long-lasting storage designed to keep favourite clothes and shoes safe while looking stunning in the home.   I wanted to reach out regarding Pip Edwards. I’m currently organising partnerships for November and our Black Friday campaign and would love to explore whether Pip is working with brands at the moment, her availability, and what her usual partnership structures look like. I’ve included a short overview about Sagitine below for context, but please let me know if it would be helpful to send through more details.   Warm regards, Heidi   About Sagitine Sagitine is a luxury storage brand founded in 2014 in Sydney. Our signature designs combine functionality with timeless aesthetics and archival-quality materials that protect clothing, shoes, and accessories, while elevating interiors. Sagitine has been featured in leading design and lifestyle publications, and our customers include stylists, fashion leaders, and design-conscious individuals who value both care and beauty in their homes.   Sagitine — storage you want to see x https://sagitine.com/   Heidi Melville Director SAGITINE M: 0478 401 914 E:  heidi@sagitine.com

source_filename: Potential Salvage Piece for Your Work (Adelaide).msg
subject: Potential Salvage Piece for Your Work (Adelaide)
customer_question: Where is my order?
response_body: v\:* {behavior:url(#default#VML);} o\:* {behavior:url(#default#VML);} w\:* {behavior:url(#default#VML);} .shape {behavior:url(#default#VML);} Hi Baden, I hope you’re having a great week.   I’m reaching out from Sagitine, we create storage pieces that are built to be loved for many years, and we’re in the process of expanding our Product Stewardship Program. The idea is simple: when one of our pieces reaches the end of its life, we do everything we can to keep it out of landfill by reimagining, recycling, or repurposing it.   We have a customer in Unley with one of our aluminium and timber storage stands that needs to be returned as it has some scratches on the side. She isn’t able to re-package it for courier pickup, so instead of letting it go to waste, I’m looking for someone to give it a new life.   I came across your work recently and was wondering if you do pick-ups like this to collect materials for your art. The product is just the frame and timber top of the Florence Stand . It doesn’t include the Olive Boxes. The frame is a white powder coated aluminium and the timber top is walnut. The customer is in Charles Street, Unley.    Let me know if it’s something you’d be interested in.  No pressure either way, I know this is a slightly left-field request. I just wanted to offer it to someone who creates beautiful things from materials that might otherwise be overlooked in Adeliade.   Warm regards, Heidi Heidi Melville Director SAGITINE M: 0478 401 914 E:  heidi@sagitine.com

subject: RE:
customer_question: How do I assemble/set up my Box?
response_body: Good Morning Sanja,   Thanks so much for getting in touch, that’s great news your order has arrived and been assembled.   If the frame is wobbling slightly, the adjustable feet should be able to help balance it unless the floor is particularly uneven. I’d suggest checking that all four feet are making full contact with the floor and adjusting each one slowly until the frame feels steady.   And yes, you’re absolutely right about how the boxes work, they’re designed as removable boxes within a racking as a storage system. You’ll just need to hold the box lightly when opening the flap to keep it steady. The boxes have a snug fit by design to help protect your pieces and limit household dust.   I hope that helps, but please let me know if the stand still feels unstable once you’ve made those adjustments and I’ll be happy to help further.   Warm regards, Heidi x     From: Sanja Maric <son.maric@hotmail.com> Sent: Saturday, 11 October 2025 6:27 PM To: info <info@sagitine.com> Subject:     Hi, We have received or order and assembled. Our frame seems to wobble a bit. Tried unwinding feet a bit but doesn't seem to be working. Also, I gather we need to hold on to box wen trying to use the flap to open. When I try to open with flap only the whole box comes out. Is this how it's meant to be? Regards, Sanja Get Outlook for iOS

I’ll try again though and see if someone will get back to me.   Cheers Heidi x       From: Anthony Angelillo < anthony.angelillo@air.com.au > Sent: Friday, 15 August 2025 10:22 AM To: Heidi Melville < heidi@sagitine.com > Cc: Karen Ibale < karen.ibale@air.com.au > Subject: 2008 Income Tax Return - Heidi Melville   Hey Heidi,   Josh is no longer with Air so I am stepping in to support here.    Something the ATO has been highlighting in recent times is historical income tax returns that haven't previously been lodged.    The team have proactively identified that you haven't lodged an income tax return for FY08 (yes that's 01 July  2007  to 30 June  2008 ).   If you think there's no activity for that year we can simply let the ATO know, however if you think there might be we encourage you to get the outstanding lodgement made.   Let us know if you have any questions.    Anthony Angelillo Client Success Manager P   +61 2 8286 2239 W   airaccounting.com.au  |  cafebookkeepers.com.au A   Level 5, 100 Market Street, Sydney NSW 2000 Australia Liability limited by a scheme approved under Professional Standards Legislation.  The information contained in this email and any attachments may be privileged and confidential and protected from disclosure.
