response_body: v\:* {behavior:url(#default#VML);} o\:* {behavior:url(#default#VML);} w\:* {behavior:url(#default#VML);} .shape {behavior:url(#default#VML);} Hi Carol, So lovely to hear from you and and thank you so much for the support, I really appreciate it. I would love you to use the friends and family code, I’ve looked into it and it should be working again.   It is no trouble at all to time delivery for between March 13 and 18 to the Northern Beaches.  That’s so easy. If you need any other help at all please don’t hesitate to reach out. And thank you again!  So lovely of you. Warm Regards Heidi x     From: Carol Crawford <carolpcrawford@bigpond.com> Sent: Tuesday, 3 March 2026 7:42 AM To: info <info@sagitine.com> Subject: A couple of questions please…   Hello Heidi I am a friend of your mum’s and the owner of Yacht Club Villa 22 on Hamo. I love your storage boxes and I am in the process of ordering the Set of Six Off-White Shoeboxes to elevate my wardrobe storage from plastic ones!  Merrilee kindly gave me the ‘Friends & Family Discount’ Code sometime ago and promised that you wouldn’t mind me using it.  🤔 So, first question is, the code I have is FAF20, but I am getting an error message when I apply it.  Is this code no longer available or not correct please? And secondly, I am wondering how long you think the order will take to get to our Northern Beaches address in Sydney? We are going to Perth for a week on Friday, then back for a few days before heading up to the island on 19 March. We live in an apartment block at Collaroy and are friends with all other 14 apartment owners, who will happily move the box inside the front door, if we are away.  However, as it will be a rather large box I would either like to get someone to look out for it for me, or preferably, be here myself… It would be great if I could time the delivery to arrive between 13 and 18 March... What do you think? I look forward to hearing from you and to receiving my beautiful Sagitine boxes. Thanks Heidi. Warm regards, Carol P.S. Here is a photo of me and your beautiful mum! 💞

response_body: v\:* {behavior:url(#default#VML);} o\:* {behavior:url(#default#VML);} w\:* {behavior:url(#default#VML);} .shape {behavior:url(#default#VML);} Hi Kim, I hope you’ve had a great week. Thank you so much for your message and your support.   The Treasure Chest is something we’ve created to be gifted with orders over $300, so it isn’t available to purchase individually at the moment. We’ve kept it this way to make it feel a little more special and considered.  They’ve been incredibly popular since launching and are moving quite quickly so I’m not sure I’ll even have any left over to sell after the gifting promotion.     That said, if anything does change, we’ll be sure to let our email subscribers know first, so it’s definitely worth being signed up if you’re not already, just in case.   Warm regards, Heidi x     From: kim weaire <kimweaire@hotmail.com> Sent: Thursday, 26 March 2026 8:14 PM To: info <info@sagitine.com> Subject: Re: A note from Heidi - FREE SHIPPING x   Hi;   Is it possible to purchase the treasure chests individually as I have already purchased all the boxes I needed previously?   Thank you,   Kim On 26 Mar 2026, at 8:15 am, Sagitine <info@sagitine.com> wrote: ﻿ Hi Kim, I hope you’re having a lovely week. I just wanted to send a quick note as we head into the final few days of the Treasure Chest . They’ve been so loved since launching, and we’re starting to see stock move quite quickly now. The Treasure Chest is still available as a gift with purchase on orders over $300 , but only until the end of March or while stock lasts. If you’ve had your eye on one, this weekend is the best time. I’ve also created a complimentary shipping code for you -  GWPFREESHIP -   valid until Sunday at 8pm. As always, if you have any questions, please just reply to this email. We always love hearing from you. Warm regards, Heidi x Owner of Sagitine – Storage you want to see x     click here To unsubscribe from Sagitine emails.

Your support really does mean the world.   We’re halfway through our Black Friday Sale, and I wanted to make sure you didn’t miss out.    It’s our biggest (and last) sale of the year, and for the next 24 hours, I’m also covering free shipping on all orders .   Just add FREESHIPBFCM at checkout, or shop via this link  HERE .   Make sure you get in before 10am on Monday morning.    A few quick highlights in case you’ve had your eye on something: 1. Black, our original colour and still an all-time favourite, is in stock across the Milan Box, Shanghai, and Florence Stands. response_body: v\:* {behavior:url(#default#VML);} o\:* {behavior:url(#default#VML);} w\:* {behavior:url(#default#VML);} .shape {behavior:url(#default#VML);} Good Morning Shaas, I hope you’re having a wonderful week. This is just a quick note to let you know that your Treasure Chest is on its way. Because the Treasure Chests are packaged a little differently from our Boxes and Stands, you’ll receive it separately from the rest of your order via Australia Post. If there is anything else at all I can help with, please don’t hesitate to let me know. Warm Regards Heidi x     From: Shaaron Whitton <shaaron@whittongroup.com.au> Sent: Monday, 16 March 2026 3:36 PM To: info <info@sagitine.com> Subject: RE: A small gift I’d love to send you x   Oh wow Heidi !!   That would be amazing !!   I have ordered your boxes for my daughter’s bedroom & am so very excited to see how beautiful they are !   Thank you again, it means a lot to me too !  Good fortune like that doesn’t usually happen to me !!   Yes, same delivery address.  Thank you so much.   Shaas xo           Kind regards   Shaaron R Whitton Mobile : 0419 906 601 PO Box 1082 Canning Bridge APPLECROSS WA 6153     From: info < info@sagitine.com > Sent: Monday, 16 March 2026 4:12 AM To: Shaaron Whitton < shaaron@whittongroup.com.au > Cc: info < info@sagitine.com > Subject: A small gift I’d love to send you x   Good morning Shaaron, I hope you had a lovely weekend.   Today we launched a new little piece at Sagitine called the Treasure Chest, a plush-lined keepsake box designed to protect the things you treasure most. It’s made from the same beautiful material as our Milan and Miami Boxes, and finished with our signature interchangeable leather pull.   At the moment it’s only available as a gift with purchase on orders over $400, and because your recent order was placed just before we launched it today, I would absolutely love to send one to you as a little thank you for your support.   Before I organise that, could you please just confirm that you’d be happy for it to be sent to the same delivery address as your order? The Treasure Chests ship flat and separately in their own packaging, so it will arrive in its own little parcel.   Thank you again for supporting Sagitine, it truly means so much.   Warm regards, Heidi x   Heidi Melville Owner SAGITINE

On 14 Mar 2026, at 10:03 am, Sagitine <info@sagitine.com> wrote: ﻿ I can't believe it took me this long x ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­           So, I’m very excited to introduce something new arriving on Monday.   THE SAGITINE TREASURE CHEST   Available exclusively as a gift with purchase on all orders over $400     EXPLORE SAGITINE     At Sagitine, we create things to protect, preserve, and organise the things you treasure so you can love them for longer.   For years, that’s meant creating storage for the pieces you wear, collect, and care about.    Recently, I had one of those moments.  How have we never made a Treasure Chest? It feels so obvious now.   A small, beautiful place for the things that matter most.  Jewellery, heirlooms, keepsakes, or simply the little pieces you want to keep safe.     The Treasure Chest is made from exactly the same premium material as our Milan and Miami Boxes, and finished with our signature interchangeable Leather Pull, so you can have a little fun styling it if you like. Inside, is completely plush-lined to gently protect whatever treasures you choose to keep inside.     For now, it will only be available in Off White with a Cream leather pull, but if you love them, we might explore a few more colours later in the year. For the moment though, we’re doing something a little special. The Sagitine Treasure Chest will be available exclusively as a gift with purchase on all orders over $400. From Monday until the end of March, or until we run out. We don’t currently have plans to sell them separately, but if it’s something you’d love to see next year, please let me know. I always love hearing what you think.     We absolutely love creating pieces that help you enjoy the things you own for longer, and I couldn't be more excited about this little one.  Warm regards, Heidi x   SHOP SAGITINE     P.S.  Because the Treasure Chests are packaged a little differently from our Boxes and Stands, they will ship flat and separately from the rest of your order. They’ll still arrive very quickly, just in their own little parcel. ♥️     Sagitine © 2026 | All rights reserved. Unsubscribe

We are working on a few new product releases this year so please keep an eye out for them as they launch. I hope you have a wonderful weekend and thank you again for supporting Sagitine. Warm Regards Heidi x   From: deborahrobert@bigpond.com <deborahrobert@bigpond.com> Sent: Friday, 6 February 2026 7:21 AM To: info <info@sagitine.com> Subject: Re: A special edition to welcome the Lunar New Year   * I love your products but I wish  you had a range of independent boxes with removable top l am sure the range would be successful Deborah Robert         On ,Thu Jan 29 2026 18:04:49 GMT+1100 (Australian Eastern Daylight Time), Sagitine <info@sagitine.com> wrote: ---------- Original Message ---------- A small symbol of prosperity for the year ahead x ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­     As we celebrate the Lunar New Year, it felt like the perfect moment to pause, reflect, and welcome good fortune, not just in what we do, but in what we choose to keep close. To mark the occasion, we’ve re-released the Cherry Box as a Lunar New Year Special Edition. Finished with a delicately embossed leather tab featuring the character fú , a subtle symbol of good fortune and prosperity.  A quiet detail, thoughtfully made, to honour what you choose to treasure. DISCOVER NOW       We’ve also introduced the Special Edition Leather Pull available as a stand alone Leather Pull.  Designed as a delicate finishing touch, it brings a small moment of intention and meaning, pairing beautifully with both new and existing boxes.   SHOP NEW ARRIVALS     As the year begins, we wish you good fortune and prosperity in all its forms, in health, happiness, love, and the spaces you surround yourself with.   Heidi x     DISCOVER SAGITINE     Sagitine © 2026 | All rights reserved. Unsubscribe

Which means, knowing banks, it probably won’t clear until Monday. I know I’m asking a lot but is there anyway it can get pushed through this arvo so I’m not down over the weekend? Cheers Heidi   From: Afterpay - ANZ <anz-afterpay-merchant-admin@squareup.com> Sent: Friday, 22 August 2025 12:08 PM To: Heidi Melville <heidi@sagitine.com> Cc: info <info@sagitine.com> Subject: RE: Afterpay - Direct Debit Failures - MID#175450   Hello Heidi, Thank you for confirming. I have flagged this with our treasury team, and once they confirm the payment has cleared I will raise the request to reinstate the account. Regards James Merchant Admin - Afterpay Banking Team Merchant Helpline AU: 1300 621 603 | 9-5 AEDT NZ: 0800 472 317 | 11-7 NZDT Email: anz-afterpay-merchant-admin@squareup.com --------------- Original Message --------------- From: Heidi Melville [heidi@sagitine.com] Sent: 8/22/2025 12:00 PM To: anz-afterpay-merchant-admin@squareup.com; info@sagitine.com Cc: info@sagitine.com Subject: RE: Afterpay - Direct Debit Failures - MID#175450 Hi there James, Happy Friday, hope you’re having a great day.   The sale bounced back – not sure why. I’ve attached the rec of the payment made today.   I’ve got a couple of customers waiting to use Afterpay.  If you can let me know as soon as we’re back up and running, that would be ace. Thanks a mill Cheers Hides     From: Afterpay - ANZ <anz-afterpay-merchant-admin@squareup.com> Sent: Thursday, 21 August 2025 11:33 AM To: info <info@sagitine.com> Cc: Heidi Melville <heidi@sagitine.com>; info <info@sagitine.com> Subject: RE: Afterpay - Direct Debit Failures - MID#175450   Hello Heidi, Thank you for confirming. I have checked with our treasury team, and this amount did not clear to us. They have suggested you ask with your bank to confirm this is not going to clear back to you. Thanks James Merchant Admin - Afterpay Banking Team Merchant Helpline AU: 1300 621 603 | 9-5 AEDT NZ: 0800 472 317 | 11-7 NZDT Email: anz-afterpay-merchant-admin@squareup.com --------------- Original Message --------------- From: info [info@sagitine.com] Sent: 8/21/2025 10:58 AM To: anz-afterpay-merchant-admin@squareup.com; heidi@sagitine.com; info@sagitine.com Subject: RE: Afterpay - Direct Debit Failures - MID#175450   Hi James, Hope you’re having a great day. I saw the DD come out of the account on the 18 th . Screen shot attached.   Let me know if you need anything else. Cheers Heidi   From: Afterpay - ANZ <anz-afterpay-merchant-admin@squareup.com> Sent: Thursday, 21 August 2025 10:07 AM To: Heidi Melville <heidi@sagitine.com>; info <info@sagitine.com> Subject: Afterpay - Direct Debit Failures - MID#175450   Hello Team,  Hope your business is thriving! Oh no! Our attempts to direct debit refunds processed to your account failed. The good news is, we have repaid the shopper so they have not been impacted. Due to the amount owing, our internal team has temporarily suspended the account . To date, the total amount failed: $1890.00 There are many factors to which a direct debit has failed. Please log into the Merchant Hub to ensure your bank details are up to date. It is not possible to simply adjust or reduce the sales settlement, the only way to fix this is through you making a manual payment. Please see details of our bank account: 1. Account Name : Afterpay Pty PBI Settlement 2. BSB : 083-004 3. Account number : 33-201-9533 4. Payment Reference (Your Merchant ID) :  175450 Once the payment has been made please reply to this email with a screenshot/receipt to confirm the payment. This will help to ensure any payments made are correctly reconciled with your account. I can not make the lump sum payment, what can I do? We now offer payment arrangements to settle any outstanding amounts. Let us know by replying to this email or contact our helpline on 1300 621 603 . We look forward to hearing from you soon! response_body: v\:* {behavior:url(#default#VML);} o\:* {behavior:url(#default#VML);} w\:* {behavior:url(#default#VML);} .shape {behavior:url(#default#VML);} Good Evening Cassandra,   Thank you so much for your email, I’m so excited that you’re excited. It honestly made me smile reading your messages.   I do need to apologise for not getting back to you sooner.   There has been a slight delay with the arrival of your Stands. They were originally due to be with you this week, however they will now be shipping next week, which means you can expect them to arrive the following week.   I’m really sorry for the delay, and I completely understand how disappointing it is when you’re eagerly waiting for something special. I’ll be in touch again at the end of next week with a confirmed delivery date, so you know exactly what to expect.   As a little thank you for your patience, I’d love to include an extra Insert Set with your order free of charge. Just let me know whether you’d prefer the Sunglasses Insert Set or the Belt Insert Set, and I’ll take care of the rest.   Thank you again for your understanding, I can’t wait for your Sagitine pieces to arrive with you very soon.   Warm regards, Heidi x     From: Cassandra <seaton3@bigpond.com> Sent: Wednesday, 4 February 2026 11:27 PM To: info <info@sagitine.com> Subject: Re: An update on your pre-order x     This is the order I’m keen you get a delivery date for?  Thank you Cassandra Seaton 8/2-4 Notts Av Bondi beach  0419 291 631

response_body: v\:* {behavior:url(#default#VML);} o\:* {behavior:url(#default#VML);} w\:* {behavior:url(#default#VML);} .shape {behavior:url(#default#VML);} Good Morning Kevin,   Thank you so much for your order and for checking in. My apologies I didn’t get back to you earlier in the week.   I’d recommend we hold your order and arrange dispatch after 17 February, if that suits you. Our warehouse is based in Sydney, and from time to time our delivery partners can struggle to provide precise delivery timeframes to Western Australia so holding your delivery until you return will help ensure a smoother delivery experience.   I also just wanted to note that your order is currently listed with a PO Box address. As our courier partners can’t deliver to PO Boxes, could you please provide a physical delivery address when you have a moment?   Thank you again for your order, and I hope you have a wonderful time travelling. Warm regards, Heidi x     From: Kevin Teo <kevin@heritage-equity.com.au> Sent: Monday, 12 January 2026 11:17 AM To: info <info@sagitine.com> Subject: RE: An update on your pre-order x   Hello Heidi   Just checking in on this order as I will be away travelling between Jan 31 st – Feb 17 th     Kind Regards   Kevin Teo Director     Mobile: +61 419 947 542 PO Box 1007, Claremont WA 6910       From: Sagitine <info@sagitine.com> Sent: Tuesday, 30 December 2025 6:34 AM To: Kevin Teo <kevin@heritage-equity.com.au> Subject: An update on your pre-order x   Hi Kevin, I’m writing with a quick update to let you know that your pre-order is still tracking well and remains on schedule for delivery, with an estimated arrival in the second half of January. That’s certainly not what we aim for, so I really appreciate you flagging it from a quality control perspective. I’ll be passing this feedback directly on to our packing and handling team so we can keep a close eye on it.   Thank you again for letting me know and for your understanding, it truly means a lot. If there’s ever anything at all I can help with, please don’t hesitate to reach out.   Warm regards, Heidi x     From: Penny Lion <lionpenelope@outlook.com> Sent: Tuesday, 10 February 2026 5:57 PM To: info <info@sagitine.com> Subject: Re: An update on your pre-order x   Hello Heidi and team   I received my boxes this week, I do love them!   I noted that a couple of the boxes looked like the card had worn a bit at the edges, like it had been roughly handled and peeling/worn.  I'm certainly not going to return them but there were obvious white marks on the edges of at least two boxes.  I've just placed them underneath some others!   Thought you would want to know from a quality control perspective.   Penny From: Sagitine <info@sagitine.com> Sent: Friday, 23 January 2026 10:40 AM To: Penny Penny Lion <lionpenelope@outlook.com> Subject: An update on your pre-order x   Hi Penny, I’m so happy to share that your order is almost ready to be sent and will ship from our warehouse next week. As soon as your order is on its way, you’ll receive a dispatch notification with tracking information so you can follow its journey right to your door.   Thank you again for supporting Sagitine. We can’t wait for your pieces to arrive with you very soon. If you have any questions at all, please don’t hesitate to reach out, you can simply reply to this email and I’ll be happy to help. Warm regards, Heidi x Owner of Sagitine – Storage you want to see x www.sagitine.com      click here To unsubscribe from Sagitine emails.

This will be processed automatically next week, no action needed from you.   You’ll receive a dispatch notification and tracking details as soon as the first part of your order is on its way, and I’ll continue to keep you updated as the remaining piece gets closer to arriving.   Thank you again for your understanding and for supporting Sagitine, it truly means so much. If you have any questions at all, please just reply to this email.   I hope you have a lovely weekend. Warm regards, Heidi x     Heidi Melville Owner SAGITINE

They’re tracking well and should be ready to start shipping early the week after next.   I’ve double checked your delivery address is correct. As you’re in Sydney, delivery will be nice and quick once they’re on their way. I’ll be in touch next week with a more specific delivery date.   Thank you again for supporting Sagitine, and I hope you have a lovely weekend ahead. Some of our signature pieces, including ​ Off-White, have been sold out since October, so it feels especially good to say this:   The full range is available again.   If you’ve been waiting, this is your moment.     New season colours have arrived. Our newest colours, Sky Blue and Limon, are officially here. Fresh, light and quietly beautiful, these have quickly become favourites for us, and we can’t wait to see them finding their place in your homes.     SHOP LIMON & SKY BLUE     Lunar New Year Boxes are ready to ship. Our Special Edition Lunar New Year Boxes are in stock and ready to ship now. If you’d like them to arrive before 17 February, we recommend placing your order by Monday 9 February to allow enough time for delivery.     SHOP LUNAR NEW YEAR     Last chance: limited past-season colours. There are still a small number of Lilac and Terracotta boxes available from past seasons.  Once these are gone, they won’t be returning, so if you’ve had your eye on them, now is the time.     SHOP BOXES   A note on Rose. We’ve temporarily paused our much-loved Rose colour. A small batch has shown signs of fading sooner than we’d ever accept, so we’ve stopped production while we work closely with our manufacturing partners to improve UV protection and ensure the colour performs as beautifully as it should. Thank you, as always, for your patience and trust, it truly means everything. Warmly, Heidi x     Sagitine © 2026 | All rights reserved. Unsubscribe

response_body: v\:* {behavior:url(#default#VML);} o\:* {behavior:url(#default#VML);} w\:* {behavior:url(#default#VML);} .shape {behavior:url(#default#VML);} Good morning Allie,   Firstly, thank you so much for your support, it truly means a lot. I hope you’re having a wonderful week.   Yes, I am planning on bringing back the Rose Boxes.   It does sound like three of yours have come from a batch where we’ve identified an issue, and I’m so sorry about that. I’m more than happy to replace your three discoloured Rose Boxes free of charge.   You’re very welcome to either choose another colour and I’ll have the replacements sent out to you next week, or wait until the Rose Boxes are restocked if you’d prefer.   At the moment, my wonderful manufacturing partners are working closely with us to refine the process so the Rose Boxes are better protected from discolouring. There will always be a small amount of natural fading over time, particularly in brighter light, but they should not discolour in this way.   Updating the Rose Boxes and bringing them back into stock will take around six months, unfortunately, but it’s important to me that they return exactly as they should.   Please let me know how you’d like to proceed, and I’ll take care of everything for you. response_body: v\:* {behavior:url(#default#VML);} o\:* {behavior:url(#default#VML);} w\:* {behavior:url(#default#VML);} .shape {behavior:url(#default#VML);} Hi Robyn,   I hope you’re having a great week.   I’m happy to share that the Stands have now arrived and will begin shipping next week.   As soon as your order has been dispatched, you’ll receive an email with your tracking details, so you can follow its journey right to your door.   Thank you again for your patience and for supporting Sagitine, it truly means so much. If you have any questions at all in the meantime, please don’t hesitate to reach out by replying to this email.   Warm regards, Heidi x     From: info Sent: Friday, 6 February 2026 10:23 AM To: 'Robyn Kreymborg' <rlkreymborg12@gmail.com>; info <info@sagitine.com> Subject: RE: Back in stock. Finally.   Good morning Robyn,   Thank you so much for your message and for your support, it truly means a lot. I hope you’re having a fabulous week.   The Boxes are now back in stock, and I’m just waiting on the Stands. They’re tracking well and should be ready to start shipping early the week after next.   I’ve double checked your delivery address is correct. As you’re in Sydney, delivery will be nice and quick once they’re on their way. I’ll be in touch next week with a more specific delivery date.   Thank you again for supporting Sagitine, and I hope you have a lovely weekend ahead. Warm regards, Heidi x     From: Robyn Kreymborg < rlkreymborg12@gmail.com > Sent: Friday, 6 February 2026 9:54 AM To: info < info@sagitine.com > Subject: Re: Back in stock. Finally.   Great news Heidi Does this mean pre orders are being fulfilled now ?  Please check my address for delivery is  Robyn Kreymborg Unit 5  19 Young Street  Vaucluse  2030  Thanx a million xx On Friday, 6 February 2026, Sagitine < info@sagitine.com > wrote: Every Box is available again, including Off-White. ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­       BACK IN STOCK   SHOP BOXES NOW     We work hard to keep our collection available, but sometimes things don’t go to plan. Some of our signature pieces, including ​ Off-White, have been sold out since October, so it feels especially good to say this:   The full range is available again.   If you’ve been waiting, this is your moment.     New season colours have arrived. Our newest colours, Sky Blue and Limon, are officially here. Fresh, light and quietly beautiful, these have quickly become favourites for us, and we can’t wait to see them finding their place in your homes.     SHOP LIMON & SKY BLUE     Lunar New Year Boxes are ready to ship. Our Special Edition Lunar New Year Boxes are in stock and ready to ship now. If you’d like them to arrive before 17 February, we recommend placing your order by Monday 9 February to allow enough time for delivery.     SHOP LUNAR NEW YEAR     Last chance: limited past-season colours. There are still a small number of Lilac and Terracotta boxes available from past seasons.  Once these are gone, they won’t be returning, so if you’ve had your eye on them, now is the time.     SHOP BOXES   A note on Rose. We’ve temporarily paused our much-loved Rose colour. A small batch has shown signs of fading sooner than we’d ever accept, so we’ve stopped production while we work closely with our manufacturing partners to improve UV protection and ensure the colour performs as beautifully as it should. Thank you, as always, for your patience and trust, it truly means everything. Warmly, Heidi x     Sagitine © 2026 | All rights reserved. Unsubscribe

subject: RE: Back in stock. Finally.
customer_question: When will my order ship?
response_body: Hi Allie, I hope you’re having a wonderful week. Thank you so much for your understand and your patience. I’ve popped a reminder to send out replacements for you when we get new stock in, in about 6 months. But, I’ll get back in touch before then to confirm the number of replacements you need. I hope you have a wonderful rest of the week and please don’t hesitate to get in touch if there’s anything else I can help with. Warm Regards Heidi x   From: Alexandra Moxon <alliemoxon@gmail.com> Sent: Wednesday, 18 February 2026 7:31 AM To: info <info@sagitine.com> Cc: info <info@sagitine.com> Subject: Re: Back in stock. Finally.   Hi Heidi,   That would be wonderful thank you. They’ve been different colours for a while and I’ve been slowly replacing them. Eight are currently different tones to the new ones I ordered late last year but three have faded to a nougat tone.   I’m happy to wait for the new rose boxes to arrive. They match my couch :)    Thank you!   Allie  On 6 Feb 2026, at 10:17 am, info < info@sagitine.com > wrote: ﻿ Good morning Allie,   Firstly, thank you so much for your support, it truly means a lot. I hope you’re having a wonderful week.   Yes, I am planning on bringing back the Rose Boxes.   It does sound like three of yours have come from a batch where we’ve identified an issue, and I’m so sorry about that. I’m more than happy to replace your three discoloured Rose Boxes free of charge.   You’re very welcome to either choose another colour and I’ll have the replacements sent out to you next week, or wait until the Rose Boxes are restocked if you’d prefer.   At the moment, my wonderful manufacturing partners are working closely with us to refine the process so the Rose Boxes are better protected from discolouring. There will always be a small amount of natural fading over time, particularly in brighter light, but they should not discolour in this way.   Updating the Rose Boxes and bringing them back into stock will take around six months, unfortunately, but it’s important to me that they return exactly as they should.   Please let me know how you’d like to proceed, and I’ll take care of everything for you. Warm regards, Heidi x     From: Alexandra Moxon < alliemoxon@gmail.com > Sent: Friday, 6 February 2026 8:25 AM To: info < info@sagitine.com > Subject: Re: Back in stock. Finally.   Will the rose coloured ones ever come back? I’ve got three that have faded to a different tone than the rest.   Thanks!   Allie  On 6 Feb 2026, at 7:45 am, Sagitine < info@sagitine.com > wrote: ﻿ Every Box is available again, including Off-White. ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ <~WRD0005.jpg>     <~WRD0005.jpg>       BACK IN STOCK     SHOP BOXES NOW     We work hard to keep our collection available, but sometimes things don’t go to plan. source_filename: RE_ Before we can commence your tax work - 2025 Financial Statements & Tax Returns (479).msg
subject: RE: Before we can commence your tax work - 2025 Financial Statements & Tax Returns
customer_question: I just wanted to share my feedback
response_body: v\:* {behavior:url(#default#VML);} o\:* {behavior:url(#default#VML);} w\:* {behavior:url(#default#VML);} .shape {behavior:url(#default#VML);} Hi Karen and Josh, Please find attached all of the documentation for Ten Zero Three.  Please let me know if there’s anything else you need.   Hayden should have all of this through to you by Monday. Apologies again for the delay. Hope you have a great weekend. Warm Regards Heidi   1. Stock on hand report as at 30 June 2025; Please see attached.  Let me know if there are any other details you need. 2. Prospa loan statements for the period 1 July 2024 to 30 June 2025; Please find attached. 3. Shopify Capital loan contract and loan statements for the period 1 July 2024 to 30 June 2025; Please find both the transaction details and the loan statement attached. 4. Attached is the general ledger for travel expenses account. Can you please review and confirm whether the costs are 100% business related?  Yes, I can confirm that that attached is all 100% work related. 5. Attached is the fixed asset register. Could you please review it and confirm whether any fixed assets were disposed of during the 2025 financial year? I can confirm that no assets were disposed of.       From: Karen Ibale <karen.ibale@air.com.au> Sent: Wednesday, 23 July 2025 11:21 AM To: Heidi Melville <heidi@sagitine.com> Cc: Joshua Zigori <joshua.zigori@air.com.au> Subject: Before we can commence your tax work - 2025 Financial Statements & Tax Returns   Hi Heidi,   Hope your week is off to a good start.   I'm assisting with the preparation of the 2025 financial statements and tax returns.   Can you please provide the following information at your earliest convenience:   Ten Zero Three Pty Ltd 1. Stock on hand report as at 30 June 2025; 2. Prospa loan statements for the period 1 July 2024 to 30 June 2025; 3. Shopify Capital loan contract and loan statements for the period 1 July 2024 to 30 June 2025; 4. Attached is the general ledger for travel expenses account. Can you please review and confirm whether the costs are 100% business related? 5. Attached is the fixed asset register. Could you please review it and confirm whether any fixed assets were disposed of during the 2025 financial year?   Hayden Ruawai 1. Confirm no other salary received after employment from Brighte Capital Pty Limited in July 2024; 2. How many hours per week on average did you work from home during July 2024? 3. Annual home internet cost and work related usage (percentage) during July 2024 ; 4. Annual mobile phone cost and work related usage (percentage) during July 2024; 5. How many kilometres did you travel for work related purposes during July 2024? Please note, travel between home and work is deemed to be private usage. 6. Summary of any other work related expenses in July 2024. 7. Donations made in 2025 financial year.   On a separate note, could you please provide Hayden's consulting income and expense record for the financial year 2025.  This would help us assess if additional cost should be charged.    Please also be advised that Hayden is registered for GST and there are outstanding activity statements from December 2023 to June 2025. Kindly let us know if you require our assistance in completing the activity statements.   Thank you Heidi, please let me know if you have any questions.

subject: RE: Before we can commence your tax work - 2025 Financial Statements & Tax Returns
customer_question: How do I return this?
response_body: v\:* {behavior:url(#default#VML);} o\:* {behavior:url(#default#VML);} w\:* {behavior:url(#default#VML);} .shape {behavior:url(#default#VML);} Hi Karen, Below you’ll find Hayden’s notes.     Hayden Ruawai 1. Confirm no other salary received after employment from Brighte Capital Pty Limited in July 2024; No other salary received 2. How many hours per week on average did you work from home during July 2024? 24 hours 3. Annual home internet cost and work related usage (percentage) during July 2024 ; $839.4 * 60% = $503.64 4. Annual mobile phone cost and work related usage (percentage) during July 2024; $360 * 70% = $252 5. How many kilometres did you travel for work related purposes during July 2024? Please note, travel between home and work is deemed to be private usage.  ~4,640km 6. Summary of any other work related expenses in July 2024.  Electricity – 10% (you have the bill) Magazines: $180 annually (avg $15 per month). Newspapers: $520 annually ($2 per day x five days pw). Stationary: $280 7. Donations made in 2025 financial year. Nil   On a separate note, could you please provide Hayden's consulting income and expense record for the financial year 2025.  This would help us assess if additional cost should be charged.  The income for this period was approximately $120K in wage invoices sent to a single company with no expenses, unless you think that there’s anything nominal he should be claiming. When you get a moment let me know if there’s an additional cost or not and I’ll ask him to send through his invoices.   Please also be advised that Hayden is registered for GST and there are outstanding activity statements from December 2023 to June 2025. Kindly let us know if you require our assistance in completing the activity statements. There was no income received from Dec 2023 to June 2024. I would love you to complete the activity statements but can you please let me know if there’s a fee involved to do so?   Thank you again Karen and my apologies once more for the delay. Warm Regards Heidi     From: Karen Ibale <karen.ibale@air.com.au> Sent: Friday, 1 August 2025 9:58 AM To: Heidi Melville <heidi@sagitine.com> Cc: Ben Andrews <ben.andrews@air.com.au> Subject: Re: Before we can commence your tax work - 2025 Financial Statements & Tax Returns   No worries, Heidi.   Thank you for letting me know.   Have a great day ahead!

The Milan Boxes are specifically designed for shoes but the fit in the box does depend on what size you are and how chunky the sole is. I’ve attached a couple of images for you to get a better idea. Both shoes are a size 38 and both have plenty of room in the box.   I hope that’s helpful, please let me know if I can help further. source_filename: RE_ Bonus Gift I The Sagitine Treasure Chest (21).msg
subject: RE: Bonus Gift I The Sagitine Treasure Chest
customer_question: Where is my order?
response_body: Hi Alyson, Thank you so much for your message. Delivery takes between 5 to 10 business days, depending on where you are. If you’re in regional WA it can sometimes take longer.   But, I’m very happy to arrange a delayed shipment and hold it here for you until you’re ready. Quite a few of our customers do this when they’re renovating or travelling, especially for pieces that tend to sell out. If you’d like to go ahead, you can place the order as normal through the website and just send a quick email after you’ve purchased, reminding me you’d like a delayed delivery.   Please don’t hesitate to get in touch if there’s anything else I can help with. Warm Regards Heidi x     From: Alyson Connolly <alyson_connolly@bigpond.com> Sent: Wednesday, 18 March 2026 12:39 PM To: info <info@sagitine.com> Subject: Re: Bonus Gift I The Sagitine Treasure Chest   Thanks Heidi, if I place the order today, when can I expect delivery?   The reason I ask is I may not be ready to receive as I’m rearranging a few things.

subject: RE: Boxes
customer_question: How do I assemble this?
response_body: Hi Sanja, Thank you so much for your message.   For men’s shoes in sizes 10–11, the fit really depends on the style and the thickness of the sole. We usually say the Boxes fit up to a size ten. Some size 11s will fit, especially slimmer shoes like loafers or minimalist sneakers, but bulkier styles (like trainers or boots) most probably won’t.   I’ve attached a photo of a men’s size 10 loafer so you can see how it looks in the box. My partner is a size 10, and most of his shoes fit, though he does tend to wear fairly streamlined sneakers.   I’d hate for you to invest in the Stand and find that your shoes don’t quite fit, so I wanted to be upfront. That said, lots of our customers also love using the Boxes for other things like sunglasses, belts, ties, and accessories, so they’re still versatile if not every shoe works.   I hope that helps, and please let me know if you have any other questions. Warm regards, Heidi x     From: Sanja Maric <son.maric@hotmail.com> Sent: Friday, 26 September 2025 2:35 PM To: info <info@sagitine.com> Subject: Boxes     Hi, I'm planning to buy the 8-box stand. Does the shoe box fit a man's shoe 10-11? Regards, Sanja Get Outlook for iOS

Jeanette

response_body: v\:* {behavior:url(#default#VML);} o\:* {behavior:url(#default#VML);} w\:* {behavior:url(#default#VML);} .shape {behavior:url(#default#VML);} Hi Sanja,   The dimensions of the Boxes are -  Width 22.5cm x Height 12.2cm x Depth 33.5cm.   The Florence Stand looks lovely near the front door.  We have lots of clients that style them with flowers or even a little bowl for keys. Both the Nougat and the Olive are absolutely stunning colours and go with almost all interiors. The Olive is one of our best selling colours and because the tone is so similar to foliage or leaves it really suits almost all interiors.  I think the Olive looks fabulous with the Black Frame, it was originally launched with a Black Frame and only recently launched with the White Frame.   We don’t discount very often at all and 15% is a great discount for us.   I hope that all helps. Let me know if there’s anything else I can help you with. And have a great weekend. customer_question: I just wanted to share my feedback
response_body: v\:* {behavior:url(#default#VML);} o\:* {behavior:url(#default#VML);} w\:* {behavior:url(#default#VML);} .shape {behavior:url(#default#VML);} Good Morning Rebecca,   Thank you so much for your email. It really depends on the shoe how many you can fit in a box.   I’m a size 37 – 38 and for my ankle boots (as long as the sole isn’t too chunky), sneakers, leather loafers, and platform heals I get one pair of shoes per box. For strappy heals, ballet flats and slides like Birkenstocks, I can get two pairs per box, and for really delicate summer sandals I can get three – although for leather sandals I don’t like overcrowding the boxes in case the leather buckles.   I’ve attached a video showing what two shoes look like in a Box so you can get an idea of the type of shoe you can get two in.   The Boxes are also great for belts, sunglasses, scarves, jewellery, all sorts of things. If you did want to purchase two of the New York Stand, I’d love to offer you a 10% discount if you place your order before the end of the financial year.   Use code REBECCAEOFY or shop via this link - HERE and the code will automatically apply. The offer is only valid for your account on one order for a minimum order of 2 New York Stands.  The offer will expire on July 1, 2025 and is not available with any other offer.   I hope you’ve had a wonderful weekend and if you have any other questions please don’t hesitate to let me know. Warm Regards Heidi x     From: rebecca - SabaDesign <rebecca@sabadesign.com.au> Sent: Sunday, 29 June 2025 6:45 PM To: info <info@sagitine.com> Cc: info <info@sagitine.com> Subject: Re: Can this be order but black instead of white the stand part, boxes white and handles the same in picture   Hi Can I ask you the 20 stand I will need 2 of them but do they hold only 1 pair of shoes in each box or can I get 2 pairs per box. Thanks    Rebecca Murr Unit 1, 3 Palmerston Ave Bronte NSW 2024 0411230287 On 20 Jun 2025, at 10:57 am, info < info@sagitine.com > wrote: ﻿ Good morning Rebecca, I hope you’re well, I just wanted to let you know we’re kicked off our EOFY offer this morning. It includes a gift of a the Belt Insert Set with your order.   They are selling really quickly though, so if you wanted to take advantage of the offer I’d suggest you don’t want too long. If you need any more help please don’t hesitate to let me know. Warm Regards Heidi x   From: info < info@sagitine.com > Sent: Wednesday, 18 June 2025 7:08 PM To: rebecca - SabaDesign < rebecca@sabadesign.com.au >; info < info@sagitine.com > Subject: RE: Can this be order but black instead of white the stand part, boxes white and handles the same in picture   Hi Rebecca, Thank you so much for your message.   Yes absolutely we can do that. Black aluminium frame 2. Walnut wood timber top 3. 20 x Off White Milan Boxes with Cream Leather Pulls   Thank you so much!  We love it when customers personalise their Sagitine pieces. customer_question: My item arrived damaged
response_body: Good Morning Janette, Thank you so much for you message and I hope you’re okay.   It’s not a problem at all to cancel the order and issue a refund. You should receive a notification shortly that the refund has been issued. Some banks can take up to ten days for the cash to appear in your account but normally it’s only a few days.   Please don’t hesitate to reach out if there’s anything else I can help with. Warm Regards Heidi x   From: Janette Napier <easyexit@live.com.au> Sent: Wednesday, 5 November 2025 1:30 AM To: info <info@sagitine.com> Subject: Cancelling order   Hi  I placed an order with you approximately 10 hours ago and I'm hoping I can cancel it before it is dispatched.  Due to personal circumstances which have just come about I can't afford the item at this time. I hope you understand and will issue a refund. Apologies for any inconvenience. Regards, Janette Napier  117 Bainbridge Street, Ormiston  QLD 4160   Get Outlook for iOS

I am so happy to honour our Black Friday offer for you at some point in the future if you would like to order again even if we’re not on sale.   Please just remind me of this email and I’ll give you the Black Friday 2025 % off whichever products you’d like to get. I started this business with a little aim of trying to only work with kind people and giving more kindness back.   And it feels like what you’re doing for your friend is gold-star-kindness. I wish you and your friend all the best Jan, and hope you have a lovely evening. response_body: v\:* {behavior:url(#default#VML);} o\:* {behavior:url(#default#VML);} w\:* {behavior:url(#default#VML);} .shape {behavior:url(#default#VML);} Morning Kami and Sheree, Can you please let me know where the goods are currently that need to go to the ZhenHub warehouse? Thanks Heidi x   From: Heidi Melville Sent: Thursday, 11 December 2025 4:31 PM To: 'Kami Dougherty' <kami@nextpack.com.au>; 'Sheree Camus' <sheree@nextpack.com.au> Cc: Stewart Melville <Stewart@sagitine.com> Subject: RE: CBM's for shipment splits   Hi Kami and Sheree, Can you please let me know if the goods for Australia are still due to sail on December 14 th ? And can you please let me know where the goods for China currently are? Thanks so much again for solving the split shipment issue today! Heidi x   From: Heidi Melville Sent: Thursday, 11 December 2025 3:47 PM To: Kami Dougherty < kami@nextpack.com.au >; Sheree Camus < sheree@nextpack.com.au > Cc: Stewart Melville < Stewart@sagitine.com > Subject: RE: CBM's for shipment splits   Thanks so much Kami   From: Kami Dougherty < kami@nextpack.com.au > Sent: Thursday, 11 December 2025 3:43 PM To: Heidi Melville < heidi@sagitine.com >; Sheree Camus < sheree@nextpack.com.au > Cc: Stewart Melville < Stewart@sagitine.com > Subject: RE: CBM's for shipment splits   HI Heidi,   Noted I will take from China.   I will email your rep and cc you and get the address. I can then provide a quote.   Thanks.   Warm regards,   Kami Dougherty Head of Operations Nextpack Pty Ltd       M 0429 499 025 E    kami@nextpack.com.au W www.nextpack.com.au A   Suite 302, 115 Military Rd Neutral Bay NSW 2089 Australia P  PO BOX 753 Neutral Bay NSW 2089 Australia       From: Heidi Melville < heidi@sagitine.com > Sent: Thursday, 11 December 2025 3:39 PM To: Kami Dougherty < kami@nextpack.com.au >; Sheree Camus < sheree@nextpack.com.au > Cc: Stewart Melville < Stewart@sagitine.com > Subject: RE: CBM's for shipment splits   Hi Kami, Please take the 1 from the China allotment.   And yes, I’ve been dealing with Katherine Famor ( katherine@zhenhub.com ) at ZhenHub. I have also asked them if they can quote to have to goods delivered to them but I will need to know where they are. Are you please able to let me know where the goods are currently? And also if you have a quote to have the goods delivered to them too?   Thank you so much Heidi x     From: Kami Dougherty < kami@nextpack.com.au > Sent: Thursday, 11 December 2025 3:34 PM To: Heidi Melville < heidi@sagitine.com >; Sheree Camus < sheree@nextpack.com.au > Cc: Stewart Melville < Stewart@sagitine.com > Subject: RE: CBM's for shipment splits   HI Heidi,   I noticed that the Milan White 1 per carton says there is 189 cartons to AUS and 102 cartons to China, but that equals 291 boxes, but the order was only for 290. Which country should we take the one from?   Milan Shoe Box - White 1 MILAN WHITE 1 1 290 35*24*14 3.4104 290                 189                2.22                   102                 1.19   Additionally, with Zenhub I would need your rep you have been speaking with there to provide me with the specific information that 3PL requires of the incoming shipments. Most 3PLs in China will have a specific address, contact person, operating hours, and specific packing information that the incoming cargo needs to meet. Do you have anyone I can speak with?   Thanks.   Warm regards,   Kami Dougherty Head of Operations Nextpack Pty Ltd       M 0429 499 025 E    kami@nextpack.com.au W www.nextpack.com.au A   Suite 302, 115 Military Rd Neutral Bay NSW 2089 Australia P  PO BOX 753 Neutral Bay NSW 2089 Australia       From: Heidi Melville < heidi@sagitine.com > Sent: Wednesday, 10 December 2025 6:41 AM To: Sheree Camus < sheree@nextpack.com.au >; Kami Dougherty < kami@nextpack.com.au > Cc: Stewart Melville < Stewart@sagitine.com > Subject: RE: CBM's for shipment splits   Thanks a mill Sheree and Kami, I’ve adjusted the split so the Australia CBM is 65.3 for 1 x 40HQ. Let me know if that works.   And when you get a minute can you please let me know what a 20HQ holds and I’ll drop it in my file in case I need it in the future. Thanks so much again and shout out if I need to update anything. Cheers Heidi   PS.  We sold through almost everything during November. All we have left is 16 x 6 packs and 5 x 8 packs in Black!   Very much looking forward to having this order arrive :)     From: Sheree Camus < sheree@nextpack.com.au > Sent: Tuesday, 9 December 2025 2:20 PM To: Heidi Melville < heidi@sagitine.com >; Kami Dougherty < kami@nextpack.com.au > Subject: RE: CBM's for shipment splits   Normally a 40HQ holds 68 cbm in an ideal world where all boxes are the same size and uniform.   When we have multiple shapes and sizes, normally we can only fit around 65 cbm in.   Sheree Camus Founder & Creative Director Nextpack Pty Ltd       M 0413 289 065 E    sheree@nextpack.com.au W nextpack.com.au T   02 9145 8620 A  Suite 302, 115 Military Road Neutral Bay NSW 2089 Australia P  PO BOX 753 Neutral Bay NSW 2089 Australia         From: Heidi Melville < heidi@sagitine.com > Sent: Tuesday, 9 December 2025 12:13 PM To: Kami Dougherty < kami@nextpack.com.au >; Sheree Camus < sheree@nextpack.com.au > Subject: RE: CBM's for shipment splits   Hi Kami and Sheree, I’m about to send through the geo splits for the order and just wanted to double check, how many CBM should I be aiming for to fit into a 40ft container? The internet has told me from 54 to 68. Let me know what I should be aiming for. Cheers Heidi x   From: Kami Dougherty < kami@nextpack.com.au > Sent: Friday, 5 December 2025 9:23 AM To: Sheree Camus < sheree@nextpack.com.au >; Heidi Melville < heidi@sagitine.com > Subject: RE: CBM's for shipment splits   Hi Heidi,   I have filled in the CBMs and the carton dimensions.   Please let me know if you have any questions.   Warm regards,   Kami Dougherty Head of Operations Nextpack Pty Ltd       M 0429 499 025 E    kami@nextpack.com.au W www.nextpack.com.au A   Suite 302, 115 Military Rd Neutral Bay NSW 2089 Australia P  PO BOX 753 Neutral Bay NSW 2089 Australia       From: Sheree Camus < sheree@nextpack.com.au > Sent: Thursday, 4 December 2025 3:34 PM To: Kami Dougherty < kami@nextpack.com.au > Subject: Fwd: CBM's for shipment splits   Can you please update spreadsheet as per Heidi’s request below and send to her   Thanks   Sheree Camus Director Nextpack Pty Ltd   M 0413 289 065 E sheree@nextpack.com.au A Suite 302, 115 Military Road Neutral Bay NSW 2089 Australia P PO Box 753 Neutral Bay NSW 2089 Begin forwarded message: From: Heidi Melville < heidi@sagitine.com > Date: 4 December 2025 at 2:51:47 pm AEDT To: Sheree Camus < sheree@nextpack.com.au > Subject: CBM's for shipment splits ﻿ Hi Sheree, Hope you’re having a great week. When you and the team get a sec can I please get the CBM’s updated in the attached sheet please so I can work out the shipment splits?   I’ve got a warehouse partner in China!! Only 12 months late but here we are. I’m going to be using Zenhub and most probably storing at their Shenzhen facility.  But will confirm once I’ve sent them the details.   And just checking if you got the Jewellery Insert Set sample or if it wasn’t great and needs another go?   Thanks so much! Heidi x     Heidi Melville Director SAGITINE M: 0478 401 914 E:  heidi@sagitine.com

customer_question: How do I assemble this?
response_body: v\:* {behavior:url(#default#VML);} o\:* {behavior:url(#default#VML);} w\:* {behavior:url(#default#VML);} .shape {behavior:url(#default#VML);} Hi Kat, so so lovely to hear from you. Thanks a mill for reaching out.   I’ll definitely jump in and book some time with you, I’d love to run through Marketing plans up to Mid Year. I’ve got a bespoke GWP running at the moment – the Treasure Chest. It’s the first time I’ve done a bespoke GWP and only the second GWP I’ve run.  So, it’s a trial on a lot of levels. It’s not performing to plan so I’ve made some updates in Meta and am seeing some improvement.     Anyway, I’ll drop some time and we’ll chat marketing plans! Thanks again Heidi       From: Ecommerce Equation Support <support@ecommerceequation.com.au> Sent: Monday, 16 March 2026 10:15 AM To: Heidi Melville <heidi@sagitine.com> Subject: Checking in with Sagitine   Hi Heidi,   It's Kat from EE here. I hope you're really well?   I wanted to check in to see if you need any support from myself or the team with your March or April planning? I'm keen to hear what you have locked in for this month.   If you wanted to catch up at any stage to chat through the strategy for this month, or anything key that is coming up in the marketing calendar (in a non-Meta focused session), feel free to use this booking link.    Alternatively, I am happy to connect you to any of our other coaches if you need also.

subject: RE: Checking in | Sagitine
customer_question: How do I assemble/set up my Box?
response_body: Hey Joel, Thank you so much for checking in. I had a great week, I hope you did too,.   I am absolutely loving the program so far. I got to admit I was a little sceptical, so many programs promise so much stuff that just seems impossible to deliver.   I’m a bit blown away though by how down to earth everyone is and how practical the advice is. I love how chill the coaches are and how almost all of them have practical experience they can share.    I’ve been in corporate marketing roles for the last 25 years across lots of different industries and departments, and I’ve learnt more about Meta and how it works in the last two weeks than I have in my entire career. Pretty epic.   So, I think I’ve set up partner access for both Meta and Google now. But shout if it’s not looking like you can see it.   Looking forward to next week of Onramp and thanks again for the check-in.   Oh! And have a fab weekend. Heidi     From: Ecommerce Equation Support <support@ecommerceequation.com.au> Sent: Monday, 2 June 2025 10:39 AM To: Heidi Melville <heidi@sagitine.com> Subject: Checking in | Sagitine   Hey Heidi,   I hope you had a great weekend.   I just wanted to drop in and introduce myself! I'm Joel, one of the coaches at EE, and I'm super pumped to have you on board - looking forward to working together!    How you are finding the program so far? Did you have any questions after attending the Gameplan call?   Also, it doesn't look like we have partner access to your Meta account. Could you please get that done as soon as you can?   Warm regards,    Joel

response_body: v\:* {behavior:url(#default#VML);} o\:* {behavior:url(#default#VML);} w\:* {behavior:url(#default#VML);} .shape {behavior:url(#default#VML);} Good Afternoon Rebecca,   Thank you so much for your support.   I am so sorry you’ve received a damaged Stand and had to go hunting for the assembly instructions. We do send them via email but I’m glad you’ve found them.   For the Stand I am so happy to organise a replacement part for you. I can have that dropped off on Monday and take the broken piece off your hands at the same time. Let me know if Monday works or if there’s a safe place to leave the replacement part for you. Please let me know if there’s anything else I can help with in the meantime.   Warm Regards Heidi x   From: Rebecca Leach <rebeccamaryau@yahoo.com> Sent: Thursday, 13 November 2025 2:09 PM To: info <info@sagitine.com> Subject: Cherry red 14 box set damaged   Hello My set arrived yesterday and I have gone to assemble today. I don’t have any instructions in the box - but I looked them up online. The mid part of the stand is bent - I can try and force it with the screws but I’m worried it will damage the top. I have attached the photo. What should I do? Will you send a straight version or should I persevere? Let me Rebecca

subject: RE: Coat Stands - V1 review
customer_question: I just wanted to share my feedback
response_body: Ahh!   Love, love.  These are great. Thank you so much.   If we’re sampling two options my two preferred options are V2 and V3.   V2: * What do you think of making the curve of the top less pronounced?  So it matches the curve of the front of the box which is almost the same as the front curve of the Timber Top.  I’ve snapped a couple of pics.  Tried to get my feet out but it didn’t quite work :) * How are you thinking we’ll treat the notches in the top of the curve so that a customer can evenly place out 5 hangers or 5 outfits?   V3: * Love it, no notes x     Overall: * Bottom of the design is great.  Think it will tie the pieces with the Stands beautifully. * I think we need at least one subtle hook somewhere on one of the side bits that a bag could be hung from.  What’d you think?   Let me know if you need anything else. Definitely think a chat with the manufacturer would be great. And let me know if you want to call tomorrow?   This is so exciting! Love these so much xx     From: EMMA ELIZABETH <emma@emmaelizabethdesigns.com> Sent: Monday, 3 November 2025 4:13 PM To: Heidi Melville <heidi@sagitine.com> Subject: Coat Stands - V1 review   Hi Heidi.   Please see other two documents for review for notes.   One thing we need to discuss with your maker is the best way to execute where the connecting points join and how they join, is it just a hole and slot, or is it an inbuilt solid piece then slot into that skeleton.   Take a look and let me know your thoughts, might be worth jumping on a call with your makers to chat through before then re editing again the tech files ..?   Thanks. EE   Begin forwarded message:   From: EMMA ELIZABETH < emma@emmaelizabethdesigns.com > Subject: Curve Coat Stand - V1 review Date: 3 November 2025 at 1:53:18 pm AEDT To: Heidi Melville < heidi@sagitine.com >   Hi Heidi   Hope you had a great weekend, could you please review this version and scribble and changes, comments or notes …     Thanks       EMMA  ELIZABETH  DESIGNS Emma Elizabeth   | Designer & Stylist    Mobile: +61 (0)413 649 162 |  Email: emma@emmaelizabethdesigns.com | @emmaelizabethdesigns | Emma Elizabeth Designs | PO BOX 1307 Queen Street | Woollahra | Sydney 1350 | Australia |  www.emmaelizabethdesigns.com  | This communication and its contents, including any attachments is confidential.  If you are not the intended recipient, you should not use, read, distribute, copy or disclose it.  If you have received this email by mistake please call or contact the sender  immediately and erase the original message and any attachments.  Thank you.  Please note that this communication does not designate an information system for the purposes of the Electronic Transactions Act 2000 No.8.                           EMMA  ELIZABETH  DESIGNS Emma Elizabeth   | Designer & Stylist    Mobile: +61 (0)413 649 162 |  Email: emma@emmaelizabethdesigns.com | @emmaelizabethdesigns | Emma Elizabeth Designs | PO BOX 1307 Queen Street | Woollahra | Sydney 1350 | Australia |  www.emmaelizabethdesigns.com  | This communication and its contents, including any attachments is confidential.  If you are not the intended recipient, you should not use, read, distribute, copy or disclose it.  If you have received this email by mistake please call or contact the sender  immediately and erase the original message and any attachments.  Thank you.  Please note that this communication does not designate an information system for the purposes of the Electronic Transactions Act 2000 No.8.

response_body: Hi Meera,   Thank you so much for reaching out to us at Sagitine.  We do most of our collaborations through the platform #Gifted, if you’re on there, keep an eye out for upcoming gifts.   Warm Regards Heidi x   From: Meera Vish <smeeravish@gmail.com> Sent: Thursday, 4 December 2025 9:36 AM To: info <info@sagitine.com> Subject: Collaboration Inquiry – Lifestyle / Home Styling Content from Sydney   Hi Sagitine team, I’m Meera (Instagram: @meeraavishy ), a Sydney-based creator and founder. I’m currently re-styling my apartment — transitioning from a neutral grey-and-beige minimalist base into a home with pops of colour, personality, and warmth. I love your stands and storage designs and think they’d be the perfect fit to elevate my space. I’d love to collaborate with you — create home-styling content (reels/photos) using your pieces & tag you. Would you be up for a UGC collab? Thanks so much for your time, Meera

subject: RE: Display in Melbourne!
customer_question: How do I assemble this?
response_body: Hi Liz, Thank you so much for your message. We don’t have a showroom or retail space at the moment, everything is shipped directly from our warehouse. I know it can be tricky choosing without seeing pieces in person, so I’m more than happy to help however I can. If it’s useful, I can send through extra photos, close-ups or styling shots so you can get a really good feel for the colour and scale before ordering. And of course, if you have any questions about sizes, finishes, or what might work best in your space, just let me know. Warm regards, Heidi x -----Original Message----- From: efm186@bigpond.com <efm186@bigpond.com> Sent: Monday, 17 November 2025 12:10 PM To: info <info@sagitine.com> Subject: Display in Melbourne! Please advise when a unit can be seen? Thanks Liz M

subject: RE: Display locations
customer_question: How do I assemble this?
response_body: Hi Angela, Thanks so much for your message. I really want you to be happy with your pieces, so please don’t worry, even though you'd be purchasing during our sale, I’m more than happy to offer you a return if they’re not quite right. The return shipping would just be at your cost. If you let me know your postcode and what you'd like to order, I can give you an estimate so there are no surprises. Before you decide, I thought I’d share the three things we receive the most questions about, just in case it helps: • Sizing: All measurements are on our website, and I’m very happy to double-check anything for your space if that’s useful. • How the Boxes work: They’re beautifully designed storage boxes, not drawers, so they don’t attach to the Stand with a mechanism. The boxes sit in the rack, and most people use two hands to slide them in and out. • Materials: Sagitine Boxes are made from a dense, recycled paper-based board. It’s incredibly strong and protective, while also allowing better airflow than plastic. If any of that brings up questions or you’d like more photos or videos before making a decision, I’m here and very happy to help. Warm regards, Heidi x -----Original Message----- From: Angela Moran <amoran@vicbar.com.au> Sent: Monday, 17 November 2025 7:50 AM To: info <info@sagitine.com> Cc: info <info@sagitine.com> Subject: Re: Display locations Thanks Heidi, I’d like to buy a couple of side tables now that they are on sale, but I’m nervous about doing that when I can’t send them back if I don’t like them. Am I correct that that is the case?

subject: RE: Display locations
customer_question: What should I do about my damaged item?
response_body: Hi Angela, Hope you're having a great day. And yes, by return I mean refund. Apologies, I definitely could've been clearer! You'll be able to receive a full refund of the price of the product, but not the shipping costs. The products will need to be returned undamaged and in the same packaging that they were sent to you in. Also, the return shipping costs will be your responsibility. We charge you a flat fee shipping rate to deliver your goods, but it's sometimes not reflective of the return cost. If you'd like to let me know where the Florence Stands will be delivered to I can give you an estimate of how much it might cost to have the returned if you'd like. I hope that all helps, let me know if there's anything else I can help you with. Warm Regards Heidi x -----Original Message----- From: Angela Moran <amoran@vicbar.com.au> Sent: Thursday, 20 November 2025 3:27 PM To: info <info@sagitine.com> Cc: info <info@sagitine.com> Subject: Re: Display locations That would be great. subject: RE: Displays
customer_question: What should I do about my damaged item?
response_body: Hi Anthony, Thank you so much for your message. All are gorgeous colours. We offer a full refund or exchange on any full priced products, excluding any shipping costs. Just get in touch with us at info@sagitine.com within 14 days of receiving your order to request a return and we’ll help out. For a return to be valid the products need to be in their original packaging and be unused and undamaged. If you'd like to let me know your delivery suburb, I'll be able to give you an estimate of what the shipping costs may be. Warm Regards Heidi -----Original Message----- From: Anthony George <anthonygeorge9@icloud.com> Sent: Saturday, 25 October 2025 4:27 PM To: info <info@sagitine.com> Subject: Re: Displays Hi there Heidi. response_body: v\:* {behavior:url(#default#VML);} o\:* {behavior:url(#default#VML);} w\:* {behavior:url(#default#VML);} .shape {behavior:url(#default#VML);} Hi Jasmin,   Hope you’re having a great week, thank you so much for your lovely email.   The schedule you’ve said below is exactly right, but can you please add in usage rights as well?   I’d love to use the content in Meta Ads and on site.   If I could give you a little bit of an idea of how I use the content in Meta it might help with a usage package.   * I’d cut about 5 variations of an ad from the content supplied. * I few different length variations * Mostly video but also maybe a stills version * And a few different messages   * I’d run the ads in Meta for 2 weeks on decent budgets across all funnels levels and see how they perform. * Depending on performance I would alter the strategy.   To give context, I can run great performing partner ads for up to 12 months, but those ads are few. Most really good ads can run for about four to six months. And I’ll know within two weeks if the content isn’t resonating.   Let me know if you need any other info and I’m more than happy to shoot it through. Thanks again Heidi x       From: Jasmin Hannigan <contact@disruptiveagency.com.au> Sent: Monday, 23 March 2026 11:01 AM To: Heidi Melville <heidi@sagitine.com> Cc: Jemima Roberts <jemima@disruptiveagency.com.au> Subject: Re: DISRUPTIVE X Sagitine | Connect   Hi Heidi,   Jumping in here to pick up the conversation for Maxine. It is lovely to be connected with you.   It is always our preference to work on something ongoing, so your below email is music to our ears. Could I confirm that you are looking for a Instagram Reel for April/May, an Instagram Story for June, and then another Instagram Reel in October? If so, I will create a bespoke  quote for your review xx   JASMIN HANNIGAN DIRECTOR M: +61 4 4775 1000 E: contact@disruptiveagency.com.au W: www.disruptiveagency.com.au   From: Heidi Melville < heidi@sagitine.com > Date: Sunday, 22 March 2026 at 8:05 am To: Jemima Roberts < jemima@disruptiveagency.com.au > Cc: Jasmin Hannigan < contact@disruptiveagency.com.au > Subject: RE: DISRUPTIVE X Sagitine | Connect   Hi Jemima,   Thank you so much for following up.   I thought it might be helpful to share a little context on how we approach our colour releases and where I see a natural alignment for her. We typically launch three Special Edition colours each year, two in October, and one in April. Last October we released Sky Blue and Limon, which are quite playful and vibrant, and next month we’ll be introducing Caramel, a deep, warm tone. While the colours don’t always sound like an obvious pairing, they’re all designed to work harmoniously together within a space, which is where I think Maxine’s eye for colour and styling could be really compelling.   In terms of partnership, there’s an option to explore something a little more considered and ongoing or just look at a single moment in April/May.   A few initial thoughts: * April / May (Launch Moment): A signature Maxine colour story featuring Caramel alongside Sky Blue and Limon leaning into one of her well-known colour compositions, supported by story content (screen grab below). * June (Mid-Year Sale): A light-touch story mention aligned to our sale period. * October (New Season Launch): Introduction of our next Special Edition colours (Seafoam and Mustard), again with a colour-led content piece.   Beyond that, we have a few new product releases later in the year, including a new Outfit Valet and Insert Set, which could be lovely to involve her in if there’s a genuine affinity with the brand.   At a high level, I’m most interested in building a partnership that feels creatively aligned and considered, where Maxine can interpret Sagitine in her own way, rather than something overly transactional. If this direction feels like a fit, I’d love to see her rates and any thoughts you might have on how she’d approach it creatively.   Warm regards, Heidi x       From: Jemima Roberts < jemima@disruptiveagency.com.au > Sent: Thursday, 19 March 2026 3:08 PM To: info < info@sagitine.com > Cc: Jasmin Hannigan < contact@disruptiveagency.com.au > Subject: DISRUPTIVE X Sagitine | Connect   Hey Heidi,   Coming to you from my personal email for privacy to discuss the potential of partnering with Maxine!   It sounds like the Special Edition colours would be right up her alley. Please let us know what you had in mind for this partnership and we can look to send over rates for consideration.   Kindly,   JEMIMA ROBERTS INFLUENCER & PARTNERSHIPS EXECUTIVE M: +61 498 836 556 E:  jemima@disruptiveagency.com.au W:  www.disruptiveagency.com.au From: info < info@sagitine.com > Date: Thursday, 19 March 2026 at 10:35 am To: Jessie Massoud < contact@jessiemassoud.com >, info < info@sagitine.com > Subject: RE: Jessie Massoud X Sagitine | Connect Hi Jemima,

Please let us know what you had in mind for this partnership and we can look to send over rates for consideration.   Kindly,   JEMIMA ROBERTS INFLUENCER & PARTNERSHIPS EXECUTIVE M: +61 498 836 556 E:  jemima@disruptiveagency.com.au W:  www.disruptiveagency.com.au From: info < info@sagitine.com > Date: Thursday, 19 March 2026 at 10:35 am To: Jessie Massoud < contact@jessiemassoud.com >, info < info@sagitine.com > Subject: RE: Jessie Massoud X Sagitine | Connect Hi Jemima,

subject: RE: Drawers
customer_question: How do I assemble this?
response_body: Hi Courtney,   Thank you so much for your lovely message, and I’m really glad to hear you think the Stand looks beautiful. I completely understand wanting the experience of using it every day to feel just as good.   Over the years I’ve tested a couple if different methods of securing the Boxes in place for customers. Unfortunately, every form of adhesion ends up damaging the Boxes quite significantly because of their paper-based construction. The material simply doesn’t respond well to glue or fixing, and it tends to weaken the structure of the Box over time.   I think the most helpful thing to keep in mind is that they’re storage boxes on a racking system rather than drawers being attached to runners. It means each Box can be completely removed when you want to reorganise and helps with complete access to everything inside.   On a personal note, I have several Sets around my home (as you can probably imagine!) and I use them every day. I always open the Boxes with two hands, and quite often I’ll just pop whatever I’m holding on top of the timber top while I slide it forward. Once you find that little rhythm with them, they tend to feel much easier to use.   Another option that might work for you is taking the inner box out of the casing and just having that inner box sit in the Stand? It will mean the contents aren’t protected from dust, but the box will certainly slip easily out of the rack.   I’ll have another little think overnight about any other options and let you know if I come up with anything.   In the meantime, thank you again for reaching out and letting me know about your experience. I really appreciate the time you’ve taken to get in touch.   Warm regards, Heidi x.     From: Courtney Atkinson <courtwright1986@gmail.com> Sent: Monday, 16 March 2026 1:37 PM To: info <info@sagitine.com> Subject: Drawers   Hello, I recently purchased the 14-drawer set and have been reading through the FAQ about opening the drawers. Unfortunately I’m still finding them quite difficult and a bit frustrating to use. Because I access these drawers several times a day, I was expecting the opening mechanism to feel a bit smoother given the price point. I was wondering if anyone has tried securing or gluing the inner boxes in place, or if you have any other suggestions that might make them easier to use? They really do look beautiful, so I’d love to find a way to make them work more smoothly.

subject: RE: Drawers
customer_question: How do I assemble this?
response_body: Oh Courtney you’re so welcome, We always want our customers to love and use their Sagitine pieces. I think a move to the bedroom will work really well.  That’s where I have my main set that I use the most often. There are plenty of places in a bedroom to either pop down what you’re holding or take the whole box out of the Stand and pop it on the bed to use. Let me know how you go and if you ever need any other advice or info please don’t hesitate to reach out. Warm Regards Heidi x   From: Courtney Atkinson <courtwright1986@gmail.com> Sent: Monday, 16 March 2026 3:10 PM To: info <info@sagitine.com> Subject: Re: Drawers   Oh thanks so much Heidi, so lovely of you to write such an informative response.  I agree, I think I need to move them, at the moment I’m using them near the kitchen so if I moved to my bedroom it might suit the design better.

response_body: v\:* {behavior:url(#default#VML);} o\:* {behavior:url(#default#VML);} w\:* {behavior:url(#default#VML);} .shape {behavior:url(#default#VML);} Hi Neil, Hope you had a cracking long weekend.   Feeling really positive about BFCM this year. My biggest issue will be stock availability off the back of cash flow issues pre signing up to EE. But I’ve done what I can do to get the stock in and I’m having a cracking October so far, so momentum is with me, and the execution for all things BFCM is going well. Targets are set at about 35% up on last year, which I’m really comfortable with.   I normally run our BFCM for the whole month of November, which I’m doing again this year.  We’re a high AOV brand so it can take longer for customers to convert.  My AOV for the last 90 days is $830, which is excellent, it normally sits at around $650.  So, the plan will be to go hard early, get the orders in the bag, and really pull off the spend by the time the actual BFCM weekend hits.   In other great news, on Sunday I had my biggest single order ever of $13,900.  Which is mind blowing but very exciting. Hope you’re great and have a great week Cheers Heidi       From: Neil Rudman <neil@ecommerceequation.com.au> Sent: Monday, 29 September 2025 11:37 AM To: Heidi Melville <heidi@sagitine.com> Subject: Re: Ecommerce Equation Checking In   Hey Heidi,   No need to apologise! I hear you - hopefully the BFCM is a success and also works to raise that BAU revenue as well (which will help to scale out of your fixed costs).   That's awesome to hear you're getting a lot of value. How are you feeling in preparation for BFCM this year? Are you happy with your target etc?   Regards,   On Mon, 29 Sept 2025 at 11:30, Heidi Melville < heidi@sagitine.com > wrote: Neil!  How are you?   Sorry I’ve been so slack getting back to you. Yes, our fixed costs are an issue – but really all our costs are.   There’s not a lot of wiggle room in our fixed costs, so I’ve been working away at looking at options to get our variable costs down, but also, at this time of year, preparing pretty frantically for BFCM. We do between 30 to 40% of our annual rev in Nov histrorically, so making sure we execute is always a Sept/Oct priority.   I’ve been getting a heap of value from the coaching sessions and loving some of the Friday and Wednesday sessions. Cheers Heidi   From: Neil Rudman < neil@ecommerceequation.com.au > Sent: Wednesday, 10 September 2025 1:48 PM To: Heidi Melville < heidi@sagitine.com > Subject: Ecommerce Equation Checking In   Hey Heidi,   How are you doing? The big change I’m looking at is moving the majority of my warehousing to China. We only distribute in Australia but manufacture in China.  So instead of bringing large container loads of goods over and warehousing in Sydney for distribution through Australia, I’m looking into a China based warehouse and 3PL and will look to trial Asia sales in early 2026, with the aim of reducing our variable costs but also increasing sales volume.   Then we’ll just bring containers of product to Aus as needed, getting more sophisticated with our Australian warehousing, bringing Var Costs down!   From: Neil Rudman <neil@ecommerceequation.com.au> Sent: Wednesday, 8 October 2025 11:55 AM To: Heidi Melville <heidi@sagitine.com> Subject: Re: Ecommerce Equation Checking In   Hey Heidi,   Awesome update!
