customer_question: What's the status of my pre-order?
response_body: Hi Katrina, Thanks so much for getting in touch, I hope you had a wonderful week. The Shanghai Off-White 14-Box Stand is available at the moment, though you are correct, there are only a few left. If you’d like to secure one, here’s the direct link to checkout: Shanghai Off-White 14-Box Stand - https://sagitine.com/stands/shanghai-14-box-stand-white-1 A little about the Stand: the Shanghai Stand is our all-time best seller and also the very first product we ever released. It’s become a signature Sagitine piece because it doesn’t just store your belongings - it elevates them. Fourteen beautifully crafted boxes sit neatly inside a sleek, powder-coated steel frame, designed to keep your clothes, shoes, and accessories safe while still being something you’ll love to see every day. The timeless off-white finish makes it the perfect neutral, blending seamlessly into any home while adding a quiet touch of luxury. On the Insert Sets, these will be available for pre-order in November, with delivery most likely in January but I'm still to confirm those dates. I’m happy to add you to the notification list so you’ll be the first to know when pre-orders open. Would you like me to go ahead and add you to that list? Thanks again, Katrina. I hope this helps, and please let me know if you have any more specific questions about the Stand, or anything else. Have a fabulous weekend, Heidi x -----Original Message----- From: Kattysgood <kattysgood@bigpond.com> Sent: Friday, 3 October 2025 1:18 PM To: info <info@sagitine.com> Subject: Enquirey Hi I am just wanting to find out more info on your Shanghai off-white 14 box stand please. All of our Boxes are made from a recycled, dense hard card, which gives your stored treasures better airflow than plastic while still keeping them beautifully protected. If that comes as a surprise, please don’t worry, I can easily adjust your order. Otherwise, if you’re already in love with the design and would like a few more, just let me know and I can reserve the Miami Boxes in Olive for you before they go live.   Warm regards, Heidi x       From: Belinda oddy <beloddy@yahoo.com.au> Sent: Friday, 24 October 2025 8:13 PM To: info <info@sagitine.com> Subject: Re: Enquiry re olive Miami box   Hi Heidi,   Thanks that’s fantastic news - I’ll keep an eye out!   The other colours I’d rate for the Miami would be terracotta and nougat 😊   Have a good weekend!   Belinda  Sent from Yahoo Mail for iPhone   On Friday, October 24, 2025, 11:05 am, info < info@sagitine.com > wrote: Hi Belinda, Thank you so much for your email and your support. subject: RE: Exclusive offer - Final Hours ⏳
customer_question: How do I assemble this?
response_body: You are so welcome!  If you’d like a hand with colour choice let me know. And just in case it’s one of our neutrals, I’ve dropped some advice below that I often give to people: Our three most-loved neutrals - Nougat, Off-White, and Olive - are all equally beautiful. We’re often asked which one to pick, and honestly? You can’t go wrong. Each one brings its own charm and works effortlessly in most interiors. But here are a few tips to help: 🤍 Bright, clean space? Nougat adds just the right touch of warmth. 🤍 Already styling bold or colourful pieces? Off-White balances things perfectly. 🤍 Leaning into moodier tones? Olive is a rich match, especially paired with a Black Stand.   Still unsure? Go with the one that best matches your favourite chair. Because the best design choices always feel personal.   Heidi xx   From: Megan <msinteriors@ozemail.com.au> Sent: Tuesday, 27 January 2026 12:57 PM To: info <info@sagitine.com> Subject: Re: Exclusive offer - Final Hours ⏳   Hi Heidi   Thank you so much, that’s so kind of you.  Just deciding between two colours now.    Kind regards    Megan x

I’ve don’t a cheeky little 20% off for you – please enter the code MEGAN when you checkout. It’s only for products and not on shipping, only for you, so you’ll need to be signed in and can only be used once. And will expire in 2 days, so make sure you’re quick. I hope you’re having a fabulous week already and let me know if there’s anything else I can help you with. subject: RE: Exclusive offer: Free shipping just for you Blake
customer_question: How do I assemble this?
response_body: v\:* {behavior:url(#default#VML);} o\:* {behavior:url(#default#VML);} w\:* {behavior:url(#default#VML);} .shape {behavior:url(#default#VML);} Good Afternoon Blake,   My apologies for the delay in getting back to you, and thank you for your patience.   We usually say the boxes fit up to a men’s size 10 to be safe, though it does depend on the shoe style. I took a bit longer to reply because my brother wears a size 11 and uses the boxes himself, so I’ve done some real-world testing for you!   Now, there’s something to be said about the cleanliness of his shoes (I tried not to look too closely), but I’ve attached a few quick snaps to show how different styles fit. Please excuse the very amateur photography - all of the shoes pictured are a men’s 11.   If it helps, I’m happy to drop over a sample box for you to try. From your recent order, it looks like you’re in Sydney, we have an office in Potts Point and have a few deliveries heading out tomorrow and Friday, so I can easily include one for you.   Just let me know if that would be useful. Warm regards Heidi x     From: Blake McGee <blakemcgee2@gmail.com> Sent: Tuesday, 4 November 2025 6:13 PM To: info <info@sagitine.com> Cc: info <info@sagitine.com> Subject: Re: Exclusive offer: Free shipping just for you Blake   Hey Heidi,    Thank you so much! I was about to order and my wife said that it fits size 10 or 9 mend shoes. I’m an 11 lol. I noticed that each Milan box is D is 33.5. My shoes are 11 but they aren’t as long as the box, so I think it would work fine. My questions are:   Are the boxes 33.5 from the outer of the box to the other end of the outer box, or is that internal? It looks like thin material like there wouldn’t be difference between the outer and inner measurements anyway?   If my shoes don’t fit, would we be able to return it? Once again I really think they’ll be fine, as the shoes are 30-32cm long.    Sorry to be a hassle, we really are all ready to purchase but she told me to just check. Thanks for your help.

response_body: v\:* {behavior:url(#default#VML);} o\:* {behavior:url(#default#VML);} w\:* {behavior:url(#default#VML);} .shape {behavior:url(#default#VML);} Good Morning Blake,   You are so welcome and that is no trouble at all. But, it is very bright, so I understand if you would like it returned. If so I’ll arrange for it to be picked up this week sometime.   Let me know what you’d like to do when you have a minute and I hope you have a wonderful Sunday. Unfortunately after wanting it to fit so badly, and trying every different way, my shoes don’t fit. The issue I worried about wasn’t the issue at all, they can sit flat next to each other because the height was a bit too low, then they also couldn’t sit next to each other because it wasn’t wide enough. We really love your product and both upset it hasn’t worked out. I now see the style of shoe in the promo videos fit because they are for men’s slim shoes, not regular or broad shoes. Some fit but most didn’t and I also feel bad because you went to all the effort with us.    Are you looking at doing something bigger in the future? I feel like a very regular man with regular shoes so I am sure it would be a hit with people. I’m really sorry. I’m happy to return the box to you in Potts Point too if you can tell me what times and days that’s possible.

subject: RE: Fault with product
customer_question: My item arrived damaged
response_body: v\:* {behavior:url(#default#VML);} o\:* {behavior:url(#default#VML);} w\:* {behavior:url(#default#VML);} .shape {behavior:url(#default#VML);} Good Morning Cherie, Thank you so much for getting in touch. My sincerest apologies you’ve had issues with the colour of some of your boxes.   I am more than happy to replace them for you at no cost. I’ve had a quick look at your order history, and it looks like you’ve ordered 4 sets that are three different colours but only 1 Rose coloured Stand and 1 Nougat Stand rather than 2 Rose Stands. Please see the order Summaries are below.   Invoice #438187701 – October 25 2023 2 x Shanghai 14-Box Stand in Olive - HERE   Invoice #438249301 – November 20 2024 1 x Florence 8-Box Stand in Nougat - HERE 1 x Florence 8-Box Stand in Rose - HERE 14 x Cream Leather Pulls - HERE   Because the boxes are made from a paper-based material they do fade over time and will fade faster in direct sunlight or in high UV areas. That said, they certainly shouldn’t fade so dramatically that they lose colour completely within a few short months. I’m more than happy to replace the faded Boxes for you but just want to make sure that I’m replacing them with the colour you’d like.   Please let me know if you would like the replacement Boxes in Nougat or Rose. And if you require one set of 8 or two.   Alternatively, if you are loving the boxes in your other Stands and would like to replace the faded Rose/Nougat Boxes for Olive (or any other colour), I’m happy to do that for you too.   When you have a moment, please let me know how you’d like to proceed. Warm Regards Heidi x         From: max.gulli@optusnet.com.au <max.gulli@optusnet.com.au> Sent: Monday, 31 March 2025 9:00 AM To: info <info@sagitine.com> Subject: Fault with product   To whom it may concern,   Last year I purchased 3 sets of drawers from your company and the two rose coloured sets have faded dramatically. One set has completely lost its colour.   Please reply to this email and outline possible solutions.   Kind regards Cherie Maxwell-Gulli   Email sent using Optus Webmail

subject: RE: Faulty shoe box cabinet
customer_question: My item arrived damaged
response_body: Good Morning Claudia, My sincerest apologies for not getting back to you sooner, there really is no excuse for not reply for such a long time.   Firstly, please let me know which option you’d most prefer to rectify the damage issue.   I’m more than happy to offer you a full refund, I understand the disappointment when you receive something you love and find it to be faulty. Or I’m happy to replace all 14 of the Boxes if you’d prefer. If you’d like me to replace the Boxes, I can replace them in any colour you’d like, so you could switch them to white if you’d like and then keep the Nougats for in cupboard storage, or I even have a few under the bed for storage.   Just let me know, and as soon as I hear back from you, I’ll get onto organising the solutions straight away.   Regarding the fading of the boxes. Yes, they absolute fade over time if in sunlight, just like any paper-based product will such as books in a bookshelf for example. However, we certainly don’t expect this level of fading even after a long time.   Over the hundreds of the Nougat Stands customers have received, we’ve had this quick fading issue happen three times and only from the last batch of stock. We’re working to understand why and to understand if it’s the sunlight that causes the quick fade, or there is potentially a link between a coating on some glass windows that reflects the UV differently, fading the boxes dramatically. Either way, we’re working with our manufacturers, who are the most wonderful partners, to add a stronger UV coating to the Boxes, particularly the Nougat colour, for our future production runs.   I hope that gives you some context into our fading issue and that it’s not something that has been a previous issue for the Sagitine Boxes, nor is it something we hide from customers   Claudia, my sincerest apologies again for not getting back to you sooner. Let me know if you’d like replacement Boxes or a refund. Warm Regards Heidi x         From: Claudia Maher <claudiamaher0207@gmail.com> Sent: Wednesday, 21 May 2025 8:38 PM To: info <info@sagitine.com>; Stewart Melville <Stewart@sagitine.com> Subject: Faulty shoe box cabinet   Good evening,   I wrote to you over two weeks ago, regarding my shoe stand, and I’d appreciate a response.   As indicated, the colour on one side disappeared within three weeks. The shoe box was positioned in a place in our house with approx 1 hour direct sunlight per day, and it’s been April sun. So the light exposure has not been very strong. Even so, the color has faded dramatically on the shoe stand within three weeks.   You must be very aware of this problem, as I can not possibly be the only customer that has had this issue.  I would have expected to be made aware of such a design fault, of colour fading from exposure to sunlight within approx 20 hours of sunlight. I could have easily chosen a different spot in my house and also ordered white drawers, which would have presumably not been fading this obviously.  Fact is that my unit is now looking shocking and I only see two options: 1. I receive a full refund as I consider the product faulty.  2. You replace the 7 faded boxes and I place the new unit completely away from the sun.    I’d appreciate being contacted about this and to be advised which option you’d like to offer me.

I’ve just organised the replacement boxes – 14 x Off White Milan Boxes.   They should be with you before the end of next week. And thank you again for supporting us, it really means the world. I hope you have a wonderful rest of the week and weekend. Putting the problem into context made me feel much better. Thank you!   As for the windows, our windows are quite old, not sure exactly how old, but they could be potentially up to 50 years old. That I guess could be a problem. Having said that, I haven't had trouble in the other rooms with almost the same sunlight exposure. And I have certainly had lots of paper products and books in shelves over the years.    Thank you so much for the options you gave me. I would prefer all new white boxes, please. It is out of stock at the moment. Can you please assist?   Get Outlook for iOS From:  Sagitine <info@sagitine.com> Sent:  Tuesday, November 25, 2025 8:01:05 AM To:  Rachael Cameron <rachael_cameron@hotmail.com> Subject:  FINAL DAYS - BLACK FRIDAY SALE     My top three picks for the end of the Black Friday Sale.    With just a few days left of our Black Friday Sale, I wanted to reach out to make sure you don’t miss out on anything you’ve had your eye on.   We only offer a couple of sales each year, and this is the last one for 2026, in fact, the last one for quite a while, so it’s a lovely moment to finally bring home that piece you’ve been considering, or to add something beautiful to your organisation toolkit. SHOP UP TO 40% OFF   To make things easy, here are my top 3 picks for the remainder of the sale.    1. Shanghai in Black   The Shanghai 14-Box Stand in Black is my top choice from the pieces that are ready to ship straight away. It’s timeless, elegant, and incredibly practical. The Black Boxes are so hard-wearing, I use them every day for my own shoes, and after five years, they still look immaculate. SHOP SHANGHAI STAND IN BLACK   2. Any New York Stand   If you’ve been considering the New York 20-Box Stand, being able to secure one at 20% off ($480) is a rare opportunity. It’s such a beautiful, functional piece, and pre-ordering means you’ll start the new year with something really special in your home.   SHOP ALL NEW YORK STANDS   3. Terracotta & Lilac   Our Terracotta and Lilac Boxes are down to the very last pieces. They were released as limited editions and we don’t have plans to bring them back, so this is the final chance to add one of these colours to your home. SHOP LIMITED EDITION   If there’s a piece you’ve been thinking about, or you’re planning a refresh for the new year, these final days of the Black Friday Sale are a lovely moment to invest in something that will protect and elevate the things you love.   If you need a hand choosing the right piece, just hit reply. I’m always happy to help.   Warm regards, Heidi x.   ♥️   Sagitine © 2025 | All rights reserved. Unsubscribe

subject: RE: Flash Sale Coming Soon
customer_question: I just wanted to share my feedback
response_body: v\:* {behavior:url(#default#VML);} o\:* {behavior:url(#default#VML);} w\:* {behavior:url(#default#VML);} .shape {behavior:url(#default#VML);} Hi Judy, Thank you so much for reaching out and I am so happy to hear that you have some Boxes and how much you’re loving them. Yes – we do offer Stands separately to customers.   Here is our pricing for the Stands only, not including the Boxes:   I did just want to mention it’s often better value to purchase the complete Shanghai 14-Box Stand, inclusive of the 14-Boxes, during a promotion.   Because the bundled price is already more efficient, applying the sale to the complete stand usually works out more favourably than purchasing the frame and additional Boxes separately.   Of course, I’m very happy to arrange whichever option feels right for you. If you’d like to go ahead with the stand-only option, just let me know and I can raise a private invoice for you.   Thank you again for the support. Warm Regards Heidi x   From: Judy Waters <judy@rowdyinc.com.au> Sent: Sunday, 22 February 2026 11:27 AM To: info <info@sagitine.com> Subject: Re: Flash Sale Coming Soon   Hi, I’ve already purchased 6 x Milan boxes (Olive with cream tag) and love them.   I’d now like a Shanghai stand but am wondering if it’s possible to buy the stand and 8 Milan boxes (not 14) in Olive because I already have six to complete the stand?   If it’s possible, I’ll purchase at the flash sale along with accessory inserts.   Thanks so much.   Cheers   Judy On 22 Feb 2026, at 10:45 am, Sagitine <info@sagitine.com> wrote:         A PERSONAL NOTE   I am so excited to share that everything is in stock   Hi Judy   On Tuesday morning, our February Flash Sale begins, and for the first time in a long while, everything is in stock. If you've been with us for a while, you’ll know how rare that is. Our   Milan Boxes in Off-White , the   New York Stands , and the   Insert Sets   usually disappear far quicker than I’d like. But this February, the shelves are full and ready to ship. And that feels very good to say. Explore the range x     A few pieces won't last   We have only a small handful of last year’s Limited Edition colours, Lilac and Terracotta, remaining. They won’t be restocked once they’re gone. If you’ve been thinking about one, or quietly planning to complete your collection, Tuesday will be your moment       A great time to invest in a Stand   We only go on sale two or three times each year. So if a Stand has been on your mind, whether for a wardrobe refresh or a more thoughtful storage solution, this is genuinely the best time to invest. They’re built to last decades, and they transform a space in a way that’s hard to explain until you see it in person.       Our 2026 seasonal colours   I am so proud of how Sky Blue and Limon have turned out. They’re fresh without being fleeting. Now that they’re arriving in your homes, I’ve been quietly smiling at every photo that comes through. They look amazing styled in your homes.       And yes, the Insert Sets are back   Since launching mid-2025, our Insert Sets have sold out twice. This time, I ordered as many as I could physically fit in the warehouse. So whether you're organising sunglasses, belts, watches, or keepsakes, they’re ready.       Thank you x   Whether you’ve purchased from Sagitine, shared a kind message, or simply liked a post along the way, thank you. It truly means more than you know. Sales can feel loud and urgent. That’s never been what Sagitine is about. My advice remains the same: only invest in pieces you’ll use and love for years. These are designed to outlast trends; they’re storage you want to see, not replace. But if something has been sitting quietly on your wishlist, Tuesday is a beautiful time to bring it home. The February Flash Sale goes live Tuesday morning, 24 February. I'll see you there.  Warmly, Heidi x Owner, Sagitine         Sagitine   © 2026 | All rights reserved. Unsubscribe

I'll need to put your proper address in and then can add the instructions as well. Hope that makes sense. And hope Paris was amazing! How fun. Re Shipping, we do a bulk order in China from 2 separate suppliers, one for the frame and one for the box, have those orders shipped to Sydney and we work with a third party warehouse to store and dispatch to customers. Hides xx -----Original Message----- From: Jodie Stewart <jodiestewart04@gmail.com> Sent: Wednesday, 11 June 2025 5:00 PM To: Heidi Melville <heidi@sagitine.com> Subject: Florence 8 Box Stand - Off White – Sagitine Hi Heidi If it's still OK we would love 2 of these beautiful pieces. So please if another colour is better for you it's also wonderful for us. Also no problems at all ever if you would like a potential customer to come and view these! (Brunswick). Address is “DO NOT DELIVER TO MAIN HOUSE. Delivery should be made via Jones St Carpark (behind 27 De Carle St. Brunswick) Call on arrival: 0433757572.” Anyway, I don't want to ask for more than I should ! Even 1 would be great ! Back to you soon on the other discussions - Joel is finally going to Sydney this weekend to get some instructions from Tammie! Hope everyone is well. Currently on train to Paris for work. J. x PS - Q : do you despatch each order individually from China or do you take a container load of inventory at a time and warehouse in Sydney?

subject: RE: FSISSEN2510142637 | Warehouse from Dongguan, Guangdong, China to ,
customer_question: Where is my order?
response_body: v\:* {behavior:url(#default#VML);} o\:* {behavior:url(#default#VML);} w\:* {behavior:url(#default#VML);} .shape {behavior:url(#default#VML);} Good Morning Jake, Thank you so much for getting back to me.   We won’t be sending directly to Australian Customers from warehousing in China. We have an Australian warehouse partner in Sydney.  We currently ship two container loads of goods over at a time from two different suppliers. I am looking for a China warehouse partner that could consolidate the goods from two manufacturers, warehouse any stock that is to be shipped later, and also a partner that has a courier collection facility if we do have any local Chinese orders or orders to be sent to Singapore of Honk Kong.   I hope that is all helpful information. Thank you so much for your standard charge sheet for your warehouse. The only question I have at the moment is if you have courier collection facilities if we had local orders, or orders going to Singapore or ong Kong? Warm Regards Heidi   From: Jake Huang <jake.gz@fssouthchina.com> Sent: Tuesday, 14 October 2025 9:03 PM To: Heidi Melville <heidi@sagitine.com> Cc: Fssourcing <fssourcing@fssouthchina.com>; 2nd.Marketing <2nd.Marketing@fsihk.com>; Ethan Wu <ethan.wu@fsihk.com>; Sino Shipping <Sino-Shipping@fsihk.com> Subject: FSISSEN2510142637 | Warehouse from Dongguan, Guangdong, China to ,   Dear Heidi,   Thanks for your email. This is Jake from Sino Shipping, nice to meet you.   We have our owned warehouse in Guangzhou which is near to Dongguan and normally it takes 1 or 1.5 hours by car. Our warehouse is able to provide multiple warehousing services for you such as cargon consolidation, inventory management, pick & pack, order fulfillment, repacking, labelling, etc. I have attached the warehouse charge standard for your reference.   According to your messages, could you please advise if you are doing B2C mode for send product to your end customer directly by courier in Australia?   Please feel free to let us know if you have any questions.   Best Regards,   发件人 : bounce-2624852@mail172.acems1.com < bounce-2624852@mail172.acems1.com > 代表 Confirmation Email < sino-shipping.en@fsihk.com > 发送时间 : Tuesday, October 14, 2025 11:54:00 AM 收件人 : Wendy Liang < wendy.gz@fssouthchina.com > 主题 : FSISSEN2510142637 | Warehouse from Dongguan, Guangdong, China to ,   Dear Wendy Liang Please assist, thanks. Best regards, SINO Shipping Inquire details as below: Confirmation Email | Warehouse From Dongguan, Guangdong, China to , Email : heidi@sagitine.com Name : Heidi Melville Company Name (If any) : Shippment Details : Port of departure : Dongguan, Guangdong, China Country of departure : China Pickup address : Country of arrival : Delivery address : Service(s) needed :Warehouse Date of the shipment : Kind of goods : Purchase Incoterm : HS code : Current Packaging : Total weight (In Kgs) / Volume (in M3/cbm) : / Phone : Whatsapp and Wechat also works : You have further details : Good Morning, I run Sagitine, an Australian luxury storage brand. I’m looking into storage-only support in/near Dongguan for products that are manufactured in China before they are delivered to other markets. There may be some local deliveries that we would like the option to organise couriers for ourselves, depending on cost and location, which means we’re looking for a warehouse option that has a courier collection facility. I was wondering if that was something you did. Warm Regards Heidi Heidi Melville Director SAGITINE M: 0478 401 914 E: heidi@sagitine.com Geo : Hong Kong Hong Kong 14/10/2025 View Contact   Unsubscribe from these notifications.

Is the $990 referenced below within one the two overdue balance or is that separate? I’m trying to get an understanding of the total amount owing and also a payment prioritisation list. Therefore, are you please able to give me the breakdown of what’s in two overdue balances, when they were due and if there is any interest being charged on them?   Thanks so much Darlene Cheers Heidi x   From: Darlene Raymundo <darlene.raymundo@air.com.au> Sent: Tuesday, 17 February 2026 11:18 AM To: Heidi Melville <heidi@sagitine.com> Cc: Hayden Ruawai <Hayden@sagitine.com>; Ruawai, Hayden <hayden.ruawai@gmail.com> Subject: Re: FW: Call from ATO re Outstanding Debt   Hi Heidi,   I hope you’re well.   Please see below a summary of Hayden’s current ATO position:     Should you have any questions, please let me know. Thanks   Regards,   Darlene Raymundo Admin P: + 612 7200 2516  W: airaccounting.com.au     L:   LinkedI n A: Level 5, 100 Market Street, Sydney NSW 2000 Australia.    Liability limited by a scheme approved under Professional Standards Legislation.  The information contained in this email and any attachments may be privileged and confidential and protected from disclosure. Are you please able to outline which lodgements and payments are overdue, what the interest is on any unpaid debts and also any upcoming lodgements or payments? Thanks so much, greatly appreciate it. Warm Regards Heidi x     From: Hayden Ruawai < hayden.ruawai@gmail.com > Sent: Tuesday, 17 February 2026 9:13 AM To: Melville < Heidimelville@hotmail.com >; Heidi Melville < heidi@sagitine.com > Subject: Re: Call from ATO re Outstanding Debt       On Mon, Feb 16, 2026, 10:08 AM Darlene Raymundo < darlene.raymundo@air.com.au > wrote: Hi Hayden   Please find attached correspondence from the Australian Taxation Office (ATO) in relation to the late lodgment of your Sep 2025 activity statement.   Payment of $990 is due by 03/03/2026.   Should you have any queries, please don't hesitate to let me know.   Thanks.   Regards,     Darlene Raymundo Admin P: + 612 7200 2516  W: airaccounting.com.au     L:   LinkedI n A: Level 5, 100 Market Street, Sydney NSW 2000 Australia .    Liability limited by a scheme approved under Professional Standards Legislation.  The information contained in this email and any attachments may be privileged and confidential and protected from disclosure. If the reader of this message is not the intended recipient, or an employee or agent responsible for delivering this message to the intended recipient, you are hereby notified that any dissemination, distribution or copying of this communication is strictly prohibited. If you have received this communication in error, please notify us immediately by replying to the message and deleting it immediately from all your devices.   On Mon, Feb 02, 2026 at 11:13 AM, < anthony.angelillo@air.com.au > wrote:   Hi Hayden,    Hope you had a nice weekend. Today we've received another call from the ATO who have ramped up their aggression on your unpaid taxes and unfiled lodgements (particularly the September 2025 BAS).    They have asked that you contact them within 2 business days otherwise formal action may be imposed (debt collection action).    Let me know if you need any assistance from us.

subject: RE: gift
customer_question: Where is my order?
response_body: Good Morning Bella, I am so sorry it’s taken me so long to get back to you!   We’re planning on launching gift cards again soon, but not until May at this stage.   If you wanted to take advantage of our current Warehouse Sale, as an alternative option to a gift card, I can delay delivery on anything you purchase.  Which would mean you could purchase the Stand in the colour you think they’ll like, but I can wait until after you’ve given the gift to confirm the colour and delivery details.   Let me know what if that would work. I’m also really happy to do up a printable certificate for you to give as the gift with the Stand size you’ve chosen and the colour options available. Warm Regards Heidi x     From: Bella Cheung <Bcheung@outlook.com.au> Sent: Tuesday, 1 April 2025 1:50 PM To: info <info@sagitine.com> Subject: gift   Hello   Do you offer gift certificates? I am interested in purchasing one of your beautiful units as a gift but am unsure of the colour.    Look forward to hearing from you. Thanks.   Regards Bella

subject: RE: Greeting from Great Modest
customer_question: I just wanted to share my feedback
response_body: v\:* {behavior:url(#default#VML);} o\:* {behavior:url(#default#VML);} w\:* {behavior:url(#default#VML);} .shape {behavior:url(#default#VML);} Hello Yvette, So lovely to hear from you and so sorry it’s taken me so long to get back to you.   Yes, now is the time I normally look to do another order. This year, however, I’d like to sample 2 new products before the order to see which one I’d like to add to the business. I am just in the middle of preparing the design files for the two potential new products: 1. A coat rack 2. A new sized stand to hold 6 or 8 or the Miami (larger) Boxes.   Hopefully I will have the design files soon so we can sample and then start on the order. I think I will order some units of the Bronze stand and I might ask that we sample another couple of colours in the stand with this order too. Thank you so much for reaching out and I hope you’re well. I’ll get in touch soon with sample details. Thanks again Heidi   From: Great Modest <info@greatmodest.com.tw> Sent: Tuesday, 29 July 2025 6:09 PM To: Heidi Melville <heidi@sagitine.com> Cc: 'Great Modest' <info@greatmodest.com.tw> Subject: Greeting from Great Modest   Hi Heidi,   Good day. How are you? I trust you must be very well   From previously orders to see now is your purchase season. Please can I know if there is any order plan recently? Would you like to buy some “ Gold” and  “Pistachio” stands for your customers?   Our production line is available at this moment. We are looking forward to start new production again for you soon.   Thank you very much and have a great day!   Best regards,   Yvette Hsu             Great Modest Enterprises Ltd. W: www.greatmodest.com.tw E: info@greatmodest.com.tw T: +886 4 2532 3976 M: +886 953 078 777     乾淨無病毒。 www.avast.com

subject: RE: Heidi Melville and Sourcing & Fulfillment Expert
customer_question: Where is my order?
response_body: v\:* {behavior:url(#default#VML);} o\:* {behavior:url(#default#VML);} w\:* {behavior:url(#default#VML);} .shape {behavior:url(#default#VML);} Hi Reece, Just checking if you’ve received the below email.  And sorry if I’ve missed your response. Hope you’re having a great week. Warm Regards Heidi     From: Heidi Melville Sent: Thursday, 27 November 2025 7:15 AM To: 'Xu Reece' <reece@ecommerce-express.com> Subject: RE: Heidi Melville and Sourcing & Fulfillment Expert   Hi Reece,   I hope you’ve been well and are having a great week. Thank you for being so patient with me. We’ve had an incredibly busy November period, which has been really exciting but busy.   I’m just coming back to my Chinese warehousing options and for the moment I think I’ll just need warehousing and not shipping. I’ll have approximately 2 x 20” containers worth of goods I’d like stored. Can you please confirm that I’m looking at the right costs in the spreadsheet?   1. Inbound charges a. Administration fee - $5 per shipment b. Unloading fee - $6CBM or $15 per ton c. Inbound handling - $0.05 per unit or $0.50 per shipping carton   2. Storage a. Depending on the carton size, $0.xx per CBM per day.   Our goods all arrive in cartons that don’t need to be opened or inspected.   Thanks so much and look forward to hearing back from you Warm Regards Heidi     From: Xu Reece < reece@ecommerce-express.com > Sent: Thursday, 23 October 2025 2:22 PM To: Heidi Melville < heidi@sagitine.com > Subject: 答复 : Heidi Melville and Sourcing & Fulfillment Expert   Hi Heidi,    It was nice to meet you!   As promised, I’ve prepared below quote for you:  https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/1soX97xb7M4hUHpeIIwhI0RF8rggFLub54o_MBMfsyio/edit?gid=0#gid=0   This quote includes the shipping estimate, storage fee, handling fee, and import taxes. The details can be found in the quote link above.    Let’s jump on a quick call and discuss this in more detail.    Looking forward to talking with you again soon.    Reece Xu   Sales & Marketing Director E-commerce Express +86-18617009119 reece@ecommerce-express.com www.ecommerce-express.com Tianzhan building, No.4, Tairan 5th Road, Tian'an community, Shatou street, Futian District Shenzhen, 518000, China           Schedule an online meeting   with me       发件人 :  Heidi Melville < heidi@sagitine.com > 日期 :   星期三 , 2025 年 10 月 22 日 04:54 收件人 :  Xu Reece < reece@ecommerce-express.com > 主题 :  RE: Heidi Melville and Sourcing & Fulfillment Expert Hello Reece,                                                                                           I’m looking forward to talking tomorrow, but before I thought I might send through some details on our products, the services I’m looking for and also some services I’d like quoted.   Here is dimension information for our core product range. You can see that we sell some large packages.   reece@ecommerce-express.com PRODUCT NAME Length Width Height Gross Weight Shoe Box Small Single Pack Milan Shoe Box 1 36 24 16 1.2 Shoe Box Small Six Pack Milan Shoe Box 6 38 36 48 6.23 Shoe Box Small Eight Pack Milan Shoe Box 8 92 36 24 8.6 Storage Box Medium Single Pack Miami Storage Box 1 60.5 40.8 16 3.5 Storage Box Medium Two Pack Miami Storage Box 2 60.5 40.8 30.5 6 8-Box Stand Florence Stand 72 41 26 7 14-Box Stand Shanghai Stand 104 41 25 10.7 20-Box Stand New York Stand 125 41 25 13.7   Here are the services that I would like quoted: 1. Inbound devanning  (RMB / container) 2. Palletising  (pallet + wrap + labour, RMB / pallet) 3. Storage  (RMB / pallet / week and / month) 4. Outbound handling  (RMB / pallet or / waybill for courier handover) 5. Ancillaries:  receiving outside normal hours; insurance; bonded vs non-bonded; photo-on-receipt (optional) 6. Minimums and contract term ; start-up/one-off fees   Thank you Reece and look forward to talking with you tomorrow. Heidi             -----Original Appointment----- From:  Heidi Melville Sent:  Wednesday, 22 October 2025 7:43 AM To:  Xu Reece Subject:  Accepted: Heidi Melville and Sourcing & Fulfillment Expert When:  Thursday, 23 October 2025 10:30 AM-11:00 AM (UTC+10:00) Canberra, Melbourne, Sydney. Where:  Google Meet (instructions in description); https://meet.google.com/vkk-nzzr-yrq

response_body: Hello Reece,                                                                                           I’m looking forward to talking tomorrow, but before I thought I might send through some details on our products, the services I’m looking for and also some services I’d like quoted.   Here is dimension information for our core product range. You can see that we sell some large packages.   reece@ecommerce-express.com PRODUCT NAME Length Width Height Gross Weight Shoe Box Small Single Pack Milan Shoe Box 1 36 24 16 1.2 Shoe Box Small Six Pack Milan Shoe Box 6 38 36 48 6.23 Shoe Box Small Eight Pack Milan Shoe Box 8 92 36 24 8.6 Storage Box Medium Single Pack Miami Storage Box 1 60.5 40.8 16 3.5 Storage Box Medium Two Pack Miami Storage Box 2 60.5 40.8 30.5 6 8-Box Stand Florence Stand 72 41 26 7 14-Box Stand Shanghai Stand 104 41 25 10.7 20-Box Stand New York Stand 125 41 25 13.7   Here are the services that I would like quoted: 1. Inbound devanning (RMB / container) 2. Palletising (pallet + wrap + labour, RMB / pallet) 3. Storage (RMB / pallet / week and / month) 4. Outbound handling (RMB / pallet or / waybill for courier handover) 5. Ancillaries: receiving outside normal hours; insurance; bonded vs non-bonded; photo-on-receipt (optional) 6. Minimums and contract term ; start-up/one-off fees   Thank you Reece and look forward to talking with you tomorrow. Heidi             -----Original Appointment----- From: Heidi Melville Sent: Wednesday, 22 October 2025 7:43 AM To: Xu Reece Subject: Accepted: Heidi Melville and Sourcing & Fulfillment Expert When: Thursday, 23 October 2025 10:30 AM-11:00 AM (UTC+10:00) Canberra, Melbourne, Sydney. Where: Google Meet (instructions in description); https://meet.google.com/vkk-nzzr-yrq

But understand if you don’t know.  Thank you again for your time.  I really appreciate it.  Warm Regards  Heidi

subject: RE: Hello!
customer_question: How do I assemble/set up my Box?
response_body: Good Morning Jacqui, Thank you so much for your email and my apologies I didn’t get back to you sooner. I'd love to have you on the trade program. To set up a trade account please let me know the below details. It's no stress if you don’t have all of them now, I just need the contact info to get the account rolling. • Business name: • ABN: • Email: • Phone number: • Address: • Business website or social media handle: Then I will set you up with a trade code – our trade pricing is 15% off the RRP – which you can use at any time simply by adding the code at checkout. I hope you have a wonderful wee ahead and please let me know if there’s anything else I can help with. And thank you again for your lovely email! Warm Regards Heidi x -----Original Message----- From: Jacqui Singer <thejacstudio@gmail.com> Sent: Tuesday, 9 September 2025 6:16 AM To: info <info@sagitine.com> Subject: Re: Hello! Hi there, Just wondering if this has been received? Kindest, Jacqui

customer_question: What should I do about my damaged item?
response_body: Good Morning Andrea,   Thank you so much for your email and letting me know. My sincerest apologies for the continuous damaged items you’ve received. It’s certainly not the experience I’d want you to have with Sagitine.   I will organise for two replacements of the Insert Sets to be sent to you this week. I’ve also issued a refund of the two Insert Sets to apologies for the disappointment of receiving damaged stock again. The refund will be issues to the payment method for the order and should appear back in your account in the next few days.  The banks can sometimes take up to 10 days to issue the refund, but please let me know if you have any issues.   Thank you for your support Andrea and my apologies again for receiving damaged stock. I hope you have a lovely rest of the week.   Warm Regards Heidi         From: andrea <andrea@ratfink.com.au> Sent: Monday, 5 May 2025 10:43 PM To: info <info@sagitine.com> Subject: Re: Help Sagitine with a quick review   Hi Heidi the truth is I have ordered many items from you and almost all items have been damaged. I have left attached images of the latest order and how they items were received .       Have a Doris Day   Andrea Wootton   ratfink   e:  andrea@ratfink.com.au ph:  +61 3 5974 2167 m:  0407 979 679   --------------------------------------       ---- On Wed, 23 Apr 2025 14:54:47 +1000 Heidi, Owner of Sagitine < info@sagitine.com > wrote ---   Hi Andrea,   I hope your new Sagitine piece has found its perfect spot in your home and is bringing you joy. I would also like to maybe order 2 Milan boxes. What might shipping be? Thanks Paula.     On Thu, 22 May 2025 at 08:57, info < info@sagitine.com > wrote: Good morning Paula,   I hope you’re well and enjoying your week. Brand new, the larger Miami Storage Boxes shouldn’t bow out like that.   I have several in my cupboard, the Miami Boxes are one of our genuine unsung heroes, they’re so versatile, I have them everywhere. Over time, the Boxes that I’ve had heavier things in, or I open more regularly, will start to bow a little, but that’s with use. If that happens, I often find that gently pushing the inside box back into its casing can help.   But as I mentioned, if they haven’t been used the Box shouldn’t be bowed already. Let me know if you would like me to send you a replacement and I’ll get that out for you as soon as possible. Warm Regards Heidi x     From: Paula M < paula.morrissey@gmail.com > Sent: Tuesday, 20 May 2025 1:08 PM To: info < info@sagitine.com > Subject: Re: Help us with a quick review Paula ✍️   Hello.  I want to ask about the Boeing in the drawer for the large box I received. subject: RE: How can we help?
customer_question: How do I assemble/set up my Box?
response_body: v\:* {behavior:url(#default#VML);} o\:* {behavior:url(#default#VML);} w\:* {behavior:url(#default#VML);} .shape {behavior:url(#default#VML);} Thanks a mill for the follow up Kieren, Sorry I missed your call, I’ve scheduled one for us tomorrow arvo.   I’m currently working with an ad agency and aren’t seeing the return I need, particularly over the last 5 months.  If a change in account direction is what I need, I want to jump on it now, so I’m set up and roaring for November. I’ll drop some details below so we can save some time on the call tomorrow but just shout out if there’s anything else that would be of interest before we chat.   I’m running to an annual rev target of $500K this year, which I’ve been steadily building up since I purchased the business in 2022. Approx annual Rev. 2022 - $150,000 (Horrible year!  Had no stock at all). 2023 - $300,000 2024 - $400,000 (Should have hit $500K but had stock issues again).   The kicker is we only sell into Australia. I think the real growth will come from expanding to overseas markets (Asia first), but to do that I’ll need some funding to increase order volumes. But for funding, I need solid results.   50% of my annual rev comes from 2 sales periods – Warehouse Sale we run in April and November. Total forecasted media and agency fee spend for this calendar year is $90K (ROAS 5.56)   This April we missed our monthly target by 20% with no clear indication of why. Stock was healthy, influencer activity fired, and we had refreshed creative. Meta is our key channel, but it didn’t perform as it had been.   To be honest, my aim is to grow the business as big as possible with as little staff as possible, so I had originally thought to contact Ecommerce Media, but a contact has said they got a lot of value from Ecommerce Equation, so here I am! Thanks again Kieren and look forward to chatting tomorrow. Cheers Heidi     From: Kieren Nguyen <kieren@ecommerceequation.com.au> Sent: Monday, 19 May 2025 10:19 AM To: Heidi Melville <heidi@sagitine.com> Subject: How can we help?   Hi Heidi, ​   Kieren here from Jay’s team. He has just forwarded your message about potentially wanting help growing sagitine.   I wanted to introduce myself first...   Just a quick question to help us get things rolling, are you guys currently:   1. Using an ads agency and aren’t quite seeing the return you’d like to be (when factoring in their fees)? OR 2. Managing things in house and more so looking to continue up-skilling and scaling up more profitably?   Best regards,

source_filename: RE_ Huge Congrats on Your Recent Results + A Special Invitation.msg
subject: RE: Huge Congrats on Your Recent Results + A Special Invitation
customer_question: How do I assemble this?
response_body: v\:* {behavior:url(#default#VML);} o\:* {behavior:url(#default#VML);} w\:* {behavior:url(#default#VML);} .shape {behavior:url(#default#VML);} Oh my goodness Neil, Thank you so so much.  That’s such a lovely email to receive.   Hi Luiza and Stevie – so lovely to connect. What sort of timeframe are you thinking for the testimonial? In the next couple of days, weeks or the next couple of months? The reason I ask is that I don’t really have a space to film in.  I can definitely come up with something but timeframe will help.   Cheers Heid       From: Neil Rudman <neil@ecommerceequation.com.au> Sent: Monday, 16 March 2026 3:10 PM To: Heidi Melville <heidi@sagitine.com> Cc: Stevie Walsh <stevie@ecommerceequation.com.au>; Luiza Pougy <luiza@ecommerceequation.com.au> Subject: Huge Congrats on Your Recent Results + A Special Invitation   Hey Heidi,   Myself and the team wanted to reach out personally and give you a massive congratulations on your recent success - particularly in how you scaled throughout last year, and your epic BFCM result! These kinds of results don't happen by accident. It’s a reflection of your effort, consistency, and all the hard work you’ve been putting in.   Because of this, we’d love to feature you in an upcoming testimonial video. This isn’t a polished, high-pressure production, it would be a relaxed, conversational session designed to capture your story, your wins, and the momentum you’ve created.   Here’s what the session includes: ·   A short interview capturing your experience and growth ·   Light b-roll footage around your office, warehouse, or workspace ·   Total time commitment: max 3 hours ·   Our team will handle everything - filming, setup, production etc ·   You simply choose a date, time, and location. What you get: ·   Ability to capture anything specific you want — e.g., o    Founder story o    Product demo o    Best-seller highlights o    Team moments o    Packaging or unboxing ·   Full access to all raw footage you can repurpose across your social, ads, website, or content library Next steps: If you’re keen, just reply with: 1.       A few dates/times that suit you 2.       The location you’d like us to film (office, warehouse, studio, home office, etc.) From there I've cc'd in our Head of Marketing Luiza, she will lock in the rest.   Again - huge congrats on your success so far. You’ve earned every bit of it, and we can’t wait to spotlight your story.   Chat soon,   -- Neil Rudman Member Success Manager neil@ecommerceequation.com.au ecommerceequation.com.au

subject: RE: Idea
customer_question: How do I assemble this?
response_body: Oh my goodness Jode, I am so so sorry I haven’t got back to you. It’s been an absolutely brutally busy couple of months but there’s really no excuse. So sorry. I caught up with Tam and the crew a couple of weeks ago and she was showing me all the product. It looks amazing, such a great idea to keep things organised in busy homes. Honestly, at the moment, it doesn't feel like basing myself out of Stanmore would work logistically, just with the time from there to Potts and Elle pickup's, drop offs and afterschool activities. I've also solved the issue of not having any stock for people to see, I've given a couple of local city boutiques some pieces to use in their window displays. It's been working really well as a collab. But, it's also not an impossibility, and there's also Stew as an option (I haven’t mentioned it to him though). Tam said you were in town soon and was going to organise a catch-up regardless. Also, if Joel needs a hand looking at any eccom platforms, I'm more than happy to (or Hayden could too) let him know the tech stack I use and what's good / what's not. Hope you are fab and hopefully see you soon Hide xx -----Original Message----- From: Jodie Stewart <jodiestewart04@gmail.com> Sent: Saturday, 9 August 2025 10:04 PM To: Heidi Melville <heidi@sagitine.com> Subject: Idea Hi Heidi How are you? Wanted to get back to you with some thoughts. We are having a little try at a side hustle / nothing major but Wayne has developed these stainless steel storage products (initially for pet things, sports balls but with potential for other applications - wine etc) and Joel isn't working at the moment so it seemed a good time to give this a nudge to see if it's got legs. Setting up a website to see if we can sell any on line and alongside explore any B2B opportunities. What I want to discuss with you: believe you mentioned a while back that one issue for you is not having anywhere to showcase your products. Not sure if you are aware, but Phillips have a place in Stanmore on Parramatta Road. It's one of those old style commercial/retail buildings. Top floor is an apartment that they rent out, ground floor is Sabrina's apartment at the back and the front is a small retail space. Wayne had intended to use that for the business that he is involved in and therefore it has some doors, grates and other things in it that that business sells. However, with the best of intentions, they've never been able to take advantage of it because they never have time to be there and open it. It's only a small space but OK traffic going past. One real issue is that there is no one ever there to make it look like it is open for business. We wondered if you might be interested to base yourself from there and have some of your products for display, we would have ours too (which take up no space because they are affixed to a wall.) Wayne's company would have his stuff too. We would make it look nice. If you were there (as much as you wanted to be) then if there was any enquiry on the other products you could pass the referrals on to us which would be good for us. Not suggesting that you would get that many people just coming in (I could be wrong) but it is, at minimum, a space that you can refer your Sydney (potential) customers to come to and take a look at your beautiful product/s. You could have a desk and just go about your work there. Anyway, just an idea that we are putting out into the universe for your consideration. Let me know any thoughts. Hope otherwise that Elle and Hay are well. Hope to see you this side sometime. Jodie x

source_filename: RE_ Important Information about your order x.msg
subject: RE: Important Information about your order x
customer_question: How do I return this?
response_body: v\:* {behavior:url(#default#VML);} o\:* {behavior:url(#default#VML);} w\:* {behavior:url(#default#VML);} .shape {behavior:url(#default#VML);} Good Morning  Nicole,   I just wanted to quickly follow up in case my earlier email ended up in your junk folder. I completely understand I only sent my first email yesterday, I just want to make sure you’ve seen my note about resolving your order.   Let me know when the best time and day would be to collect the order and confirm the refund.   I’ve copied my personal email here too (heidi@sagitine.com) so it’s easy to reach me directly.   Warm regards, Heidi     From: info Sent: Sunday, 12 October 2025 1:00 PM To: 'nicciliddle@gmail.com' <nicciliddle@gmail.com> Subject: Important Information about your order x   Hi Nicole,   I’ve just seen your review and I’m so sorry, that’s absolutely not the experience we ever want anyone to have with Sagitine.   I’ve looked into your order and, frustratingly, I can’t find any record of your earlier contact attempt via email or social media, so I’m so sorry you’ve had to chase this without a reply. That’s completely our fault for not catching it sooner.   We sent your order via TNT, our most trusted courier partner, and they’ve confirmed all boxes were delivered, but I’ve asked them for full proof of delivery so we can understand exactly what’s happened. In the meantime, I don’t want you to be left with an incomplete stand or feeling disappointed every time you see it.   As we’re now sold out of the Nougat Boxes, the easiest and fairest solution would be to arrange a full refund and have the Stand and Boxes collected from you on Monday, or whenever is most convenient for you.   Please just let me know what day and time suits best, and confirm that you’re happy for the refund to be processed back to the original payment method used for your order. Once I have your confirmation, I’ll organise everything straight away.   Again, I’m so sorry this has happened, Nicole, I completely understand your frustration, and I really appreciate you taking the time to let us know.   Warm Regards Heidi x

customer_question: I just wanted to share my feedback
response_body: Good Morning Stephanie, Thank you so much for your message. We’ve altered the design a little while ago to remove the logo markings from the inside of all of our Boxes based on customer feedback.   Apologies that there are still some images on our website that show the inside of the Boxes with the logo marks on them. I’ll work on getting those taken down, thank you for pointing it out. I hope you’re having a great week. Warm Regards Heidi x   From: Stephanie W <dodgybro@hotmail.com> Sent: Monday, 7 April 2025 9:03 AM To: info <info@sagitine.com> Cc: info <info@sagitine.com> Subject: Re: Important information about your Sagitine Delivery - scheduled for tomorrow   Heidi   Will do.    One thing I won’t mention in my review which took me slightly by surprise is that the box is not lined with the sagitine logo. I was contemplating another stand for my bedroom and wondered if the newer colours don’t have it but some of the older ones might?   I’ve lined them myself with the tissue paper that came with it to try to minimise marks.    Thanks Stephanie

source_filename: RE_ Important information about your Sagitine order x (108).msg
subject: RE: Important information about your Sagitine order x
customer_question: I just wanted to share my feedback
response_body: v\:* {behavior:url(#default#VML);} o\:* {behavior:url(#default#VML);} w\:* {behavior:url(#default#VML);} .shape {behavior:url(#default#VML);} Good afternoon Kelly,   Thank you for your message and for sending through the photos. I’m really sorry for the damage to your Boxes, and I completely understand your disappointment, you’re absolutely right that this is not what you should expect from Sagitine.   We’ve identified an issue with a small batch of our earlier Rose box finishes, where discolouration has occurred, even without direct sunlight. As a result, we’ve paused the Rose colourway while we work closely with our manufacturing partners to introduce an enhanced UV-protective finish and ensure the colour performs exactly as it should.   What I can do for you straight away is organise a replacement of your boxes in an alternative colour. If there’s a specific colour you’d like, please let me know. If you’d like my recommendation, I suggest Off-White, it’s a soft, warm white that sits beautifully within a space, allowing for a wide range of styling and décor.   If you’re happy to proceed with Off-White, just let me know and I’ll arrange the replacement as a priority and confirm next steps for you immediately.  If not, please let me know and we can work out next steps.   I’m very sorry again for the inconvenience this has caused, and I appreciate you bringing it to my attention. I’ll make sure this is resolved as smoothly and quickly as possible.   Warm regards, Heidi x     From: Kelly Segat <segatk@gmail.com> Sent: Tuesday, 3 February 2026 12:40 PM To: info <info@sagitine.com> Subject: Re: Important information about your Sagitine order x   Hi there    We purchased 2 sets from you in late Nov, our order number is as follows. 438308501.    We have been away for 7 weeks and have just arrived home to find our drawers completely discoloured.    I have included photos for your reference.    I would like these replaced as soon as possible please as at this price point I would not have expected to find the product faulty.    Can you please come back to me at your earliest convenience to confirm next steps    Thank you  Kelly Segat            On Wed, 5 Nov 2025 at 1:50 pm, info < info@sagitine.com > wrote: Good Afternoon Kelly,   You are so welcome.   I’ve processed your refund of $416.00 this afternoon. Some banks can take up to ten days for the funds to appear back in your account, but in most cases, it only takes a couple.   If there’s anything else I can help with, please don’t hesitate to reach out.   Our Black Friday Sale will be running for a couple of weeks, it’s one of only a few times we go on sale each year, and the last one for 2025, so it is a lovely time to add another piece if you’ve been considering it.    Wishing you a wonderful day, Warm regards, Heidi x     From: Kelly Segat < segatk@gmail.com > Sent: Sunday, 2 November 2025 11:20 AM To: info < info@sagitine.com > Subject: Re: Important information about your Sagitine order x   Hi there  Thank you  That’s amazing! Yes please ❤️   Thanks again  Kelly    On Sat, 1 Nov 2025 at 5:53 am, info < info@sagitine.com > wrote: Good Morning Kelly,   Thank you so much for your recent order, your support truly means the world to us.   Our annual Black Friday Sale is beginning soon.     We’ve all experienced the disappointment of purchasing something only to see it go on sale shortly after. At Sagitine we love to do the right thing by our customers. As a token of our appreciation, we like to offer anyone who made a purchase in the few days leading up to the sale the opportunity to benefit from our sale price.   We would love to extend our Black Friday pricing to your recent order #438308501 .   To make it simple, we can refund the difference directly to the same payment method you used at checkout. If you’re happy for us to go ahead, please reply to this email confirming your consent, and we’ll process the refund once the sale begins.   If you’re considering adding another piece to your collection, the Sagitine Black Friday Sale starts at 8am on Tuesday November 4 th , and I’ve shared my personal predictions on what will sell out first in this year’s sale - you can read them here: Black Friday 2025: What Will Sell Out .   Thank you again for your support, it’s because of wonderful customers like you that we get to keep creating the pieces we love.   Warm regards, Heidi x   Heidi Melville Owner SAGITINE

The replacement Boxes have just been organised and should be on their way to you next week.   Thank you again for your support, it really is appreciated. I hope you have a wonderful rest of the week. Warm Regards Heidi x   From: Kelly Segat <segatk@gmail.com> Sent: Wednesday, 4 February 2026 1:11 PM To: info <info@sagitine.com> Subject: Re: Important information about your Sagitine order x   Thank you so much for the quick response.   I appreciate that these things happen.    The off white sounds great, thank you.    Please let me know if there is anything else you need from me.    Again thank you and appreciate you rectifying this quickly.    Kind regards  Kelly    On Wed, 4 Feb 2026 at 11:37 am, info < info@sagitine.com > wrote: Good afternoon Kelly,   Thank you for your message and for sending through the photos. I’m really sorry for the damage to your Boxes, and I completely understand your disappointment, you’re absolutely right that this is not what you should expect from Sagitine.   We’ve identified an issue with a small batch of our earlier Rose box finishes, where discolouration has occurred, even without direct sunlight. As a result, we’ve paused the Rose colourway while we work closely with our manufacturing partners to introduce an enhanced UV-protective finish and ensure the colour performs exactly as it should.   What I can do for you straight away is organise a replacement of your boxes in an alternative colour. If there’s a specific colour you’d like, please let me know. If you’d like my recommendation, I suggest Off-White, it’s a soft, warm white that sits beautifully within a space, allowing for a wide range of styling and décor.   If you’re happy to proceed with Off-White, just let me know and I’ll arrange the replacement as a priority and confirm next steps for you immediately.  If not, please let me know and we can work out next steps.   I’m very sorry again for the inconvenience this has caused, and I appreciate you bringing it to my attention. I’ll make sure this is resolved as smoothly and quickly as possible.   Warm regards, Heidi x     From: Kelly Segat < segatk@gmail.com > Sent: Tuesday, 3 February 2026 12:40 PM To: info < info@sagitine.com > Subject: Re: Important information about your Sagitine order x   Hi there    We purchased 2 sets from you in late Nov, our order number is as follows. 438308501.    We have been away for 7 weeks and have just arrived home to find our drawers completely discoloured.    I have included photos for your reference.    I would like these replaced as soon as possible please as at this price point I would not have expected to find the product faulty.    Can you please come back to me at your earliest convenience to confirm next steps    Thank you  Kelly Segat            On Wed, 5 Nov 2025 at 1:50 pm, info < info@sagitine.com > wrote: Good Afternoon Kelly,   You are so welcome.   I’ve processed your refund of $416.00 this afternoon. That sounds good. subject: RE: Inquiry
customer_question: What should I do about my damaged item?
response_body: Afternoon again Karen, I just had a quick think, and took a look at how much it would cost you to order the Stand without the Boxes + 2 Boxes versus the Florence 8-Box Stand with the boxes. With the sale on, it might be worth ordering the stand with the 8-Boxes as per it is on the website. I've popped the options below for you. If you go with the second option I can offer you free shipping x Let me know what you think. Warm Regards Heidi x Order Option 1: 1 x Florence STAND ONLY $680 2 x Milan Boxes $82 1 x Shipping $50 TOTAL: $812 Order Options 2: 1 x Florence Stan with Boxes $832 1 x Free Shipping TOTAL $832 -----Original Message----- From: info Sent: Thursday, 10 April 2025 4:45 PM To: Karen Pringle <Karenpringle2011@hotmail.com>; info <info@sagitine.com> Subject: RE: Inquiry Good Afternoon Karen, Thanks for your email. Unfortunately, we haven't stocked the true white for a few years so I don’t have any left in the store room. But, all of our colours are designed to complement each other, so they are perfect for mixing and matching! They key is to keep the Leather Pulls all the same colour. If I was styling a Florence 8 Box Stand with 6 White Boxes and 2 coloured I'd probably pop the two coloured at the bottom and then maybe have a book or ornament on top that matched the colour of the bottom boxes. With the White Boxes you could almost choose any colour and it would look fabulous, just depends on what your home décor is like. Let me know which colour you think and I'll add it to the invoice. Warm Regards Heidi x -----Original Message----- From: Karen Pringle <Karenpringle2011@hotmail.com> Sent: Wednesday, 9 April 2025 12:51 PM To: info <info@sagitine.com> Subject: Re: Inquiry Hello Heidi Thanks for the email. That sounds good. I am interested in getting the Florence stand only - in white. I just noticed, however, that 2 of the spare boxes I have are a little damaged and so just wondering if you have any white boxes left in your storeroom as I would like to replace those 2. I couldn’t see the original white on the website but maybe you have some stock that I could buy. Otherwise I suppose it’s possible to mix and match colours? response_body: Good Afternoon Karen, Thanks for your email. Unfortunately, we haven't stocked the true white for a few years so I don’t have any left in the store room. subject: RE: Inquiry
customer_question: Where is my order?
response_body: Good Morning Karen, I hope you're having a lovely week. We do offer Stand only purchases for our customers. The RRP for the Florence Stand Only, no Boxes, is $850. With the 20% Warehouse Sale discount the price for the Florence Stand Only, no Boxes, comes to $680 + $50 shipping. The white frame with Rose boxes is such a beautiful combination.   As you know, we’re currently sold out, and I don’t have a confirmed restock date just yet, but it’s looking likely for early next year.   If you’d like, I can add you to our priority waitlist, so you’ll be the first to know as soon as they’re available again, and if we get them in sooner.   Please don’t hesitate to reach out if I can help with anything else. We'd love to order, for delivery to Docklands, Australia (3008).   Cheers  Carina

subject: RE: Instructions please
customer_question: How do I assemble/set up my Box?
response_body: v\:* {behavior:url(#default#VML);} o\:* {behavior:url(#default#VML);} w\:* {behavior:url(#default#VML);} .shape {behavior:url(#default#VML);} Hi Amelia,   Thank you so much for taking the time to write, and for sharing your experience with me.   Firstly, my apologies for taking so long to get back to you.   I’m so sorry to hear about the frustration you encountered when unpacking your stand, especially after it being such a considered purchase. I completely understand how disappointing that must have felt.   Regarding the paint marks on the frame, I’m really sorry about that as well. Unfortunately things can sometimes shift during storage or transit over time. If you’d like, please feel free to send through a couple of photos and I’m very happy to take a look and see how we can best help.   I’ve attached the full assembly instructions for the frame to this email.  If you have any issues at all with them please don’t hesitate to reach out.   And I absolutely loved reading about how you used the coloured handles, what a gorgeous and clever way to organise. I’m so glad it’s already making your mornings easier (and more joyful!).   If you have any trouble at all while finishing the assembly, or if there’s anything else you need, please don’t hesitate to reach out. I’m more than happy to help.   Warm regards, Heidi x     From: Amelia Cooper <ameliacooper@gmail.com> Sent: Monday, 19 January 2026 11:59 AM To: info <info@sagitine.com> Subject: Instructions please   Hi Heidi and Sagitine,   A couple of years ago I purchased a 14 drawer shoe stand. I wasn’t able to put it together at the time so stored the boxes until I could.   After a bumpy couple of years, I decided yesterday was the day. Unfortunately, when I opened the boxes, there were no instructions. And, while the boxes were not damaged externally, there was damage to the stands inside -where paint is missing in a few place on the white frame, which was disappointing as this was a considered purchase for me.   Anyway, I proceeded to attempt to assemble the unit, and while it looks great, there a two metal bits and 4 screws left over, because I cannot work out where they go.    Please could you send me instructions for putting the frame together?   I do love all the colourful handles - I was going to use all blush ones, as pink is my favourite colour,  but ended up using colours to correspond to the colour of the shoes inside. This made finding the right shoes very easy this morning!

subject: RE: Instructions to collect your parcel from Sagitine [SKH9XTJ]
customer_question: How do I assemble/set up my Box?
response_body: v\:* {behavior:url(#default#VML);} o\:* {behavior:url(#default#VML);} w\:* {behavior:url(#default#VML);} .shape {behavior:url(#default#VML);} Instructions to collect your parcel from Sagitine [SKH9XTJ] Tara my sincerest apologies for the delivery issues. I have just issued you a full refund back to the same payment method used to place your order. The refund normally takes about three business days, but some banks can take up to ten days. Please don’t hesitate to get in touch if you have any questions about the refund. I will look into if it’s possible to have someone collect the assembled Stand from you and get back to you by Monday next week on next steps.   Warm Regards Heidi x   From: Tara Rischmueller <tararischmueller@yahoo.com.au> Sent: Wednesday, 19 November 2025 10:41 AM To: info <info@sagitine.com> Subject: Fwd: Instructions to collect your parcel from Sagitine [SKH9XTJ]   Look what I’ve just the received.   Are you kidding?!    Let me tell you that other than the first box being delivered to my neighbour, NO further attempts have been made to deliver the other box. The leaving a card/attempted delivery was BS and there was no re-delivery, despite you guys organising it on your end. I work from home and I am here to receive deliveries.    And now I’m being expected to pick it up myself when I’ve paid $55 for delivery, which btw is miles from my home.   I realise that you guys have tried to resolve this, but honestly the amount of time and frustration this has caused me is too much and I’m over it.   Just refund my money and feel free to have someone pick up the frame, which I won’t be disassembling.   Thank you   Tara

subject: RE: Instructions to collect your parcel from Sagitine [SKH9XTJ]
customer_question: How do I assemble/set up my Box?
response_body: v\:* {behavior:url(#default#VML);} o\:* {behavior:url(#default#VML);} w\:* {behavior:url(#default#VML);} .shape {behavior:url(#default#VML);} Instructions to collect your parcel from Sagitine [SKH9XTJ] Good Afternoon Tara,   I’ve just received an update from Sendle confirming that they have gone ahead and delivered the Boxes to you. I’m incredibly sorry, this isn’t the experience we expect from our delivery partners, and I completely understand how frustrating this has been.   We had requested for the Boxes to remain at the collection centre, and someone had been arranged to collect them, which I’ll now cancel.   Regarding the Stand, I’ve explored every possible option, but unfortunately no courier is able to collect it while it’s fully assembled. Given everything you’ve experienced, if you now have both the Boxes and the Stand and are happy to keep them, I’m more than comfortable for you to have them at no charge.   I’m truly sorry for the amount of hassle this has caused you. I hope your week has improved, and I hope you have a wonderful festive season.   Warm regards, Heidi x     From: Tara Rischmueller <tararischmueller@yahoo.com.au> Sent: Wednesday, 19 November 2025 11:48 AM To: info <info@sagitine.com> Subject: Re: Instructions to collect your parcel from Sagitine [SKH9XTJ]   thank you Heidi.

subject: RE: Instructions
customer_question: What should I do about my damaged item?
response_body: Good Morning Cat,   Thank you for your feedback via DM, I really appreciate you letting me know how disappointed you are. And I am so sorry that your experience with us wasn’t wonderful.   Unfortunately, sometimes our delivery partners split the order, it’s something we talk to them about often but occasionally it’s unavoidable. Although, the marks on your Stand and the bent metal is absolutely something that shouldn’t happen and I’m so sorry that you received your order damaged.   I am more than happy to offer you a return for a full refund if the product isn’t what you were expecting.  Please just let me know. Alternatively, if you would like to keep your Stand, I’d love to offer you a 15% refund on the product as a way to apologies for your experience. The refund will be issued back to your purchase payment method. Just let me know which option you’d like to go ahead with and I’ll organise it as soon as possible. Thank you again for letting me know about your experience. Warm Regards Heidi x       From: Catherine Haggerty <catherine.th@hotmail.com> Sent: Saturday, 19 July 2025 4:30 PM To: info <info@sagitine.com> Subject: Instructions   Hi,   I'm not really happy with my purchase. There are obvious marks and defects, and also arrived without any instructions.    Can someone please send me a PDF manual please? For $3k this is a joke!!!   Cat   Get Outlook for iOS

source_filename: RE_ Issue with Storage Boxes – Marks on Arrival_ Order #3526 (36).msg
subject: RE: Issue with Storage Boxes – Marks on Arrival. Order #3526
customer_question: Where is my order?
response_body: Hi Melissa,   Thank you so much for your message, and I’m so sorry to hear this. I can completely understand how disappointing that must have felt, especially when you were so looking forward to receiving them.   Yes please, if you’re able to send through a few photos of the marks, and let me know how many Boxes are affected, that would be wonderful. As soon as I’ve seen them, I’ll arrange for replacement Boxes to be sent out right away.   I’ll keep an eye out for your photos and we’ll get this sorted quickly for you. Thank you again for letting me know.   Warm regards, Heidi x     From: melissa loz <melissaloz@hotmail.com> Sent: Tuesday, 3 March 2026 12:41 PM To: info <info@sagitine.com> Subject: Issue with Storage Boxes – Marks on Arrival. Order #3526   Hi,   I’ve just received my recent order of storage boxes and unfortunately, they’ve arrived with noticeable marks on them. I’m disappointed, as I was so excited to receive them.   I love your brand and was planning to purchase more, which makes this even more disappointing.   Could you please let me know how we can resolve this? I’m happy to provide photos if needed.   Thank you, and I look forward to your response.

response_body: v\:* {behavior:url(#default#VML);} o\:* {behavior:url(#default#VML);} w\:* {behavior:url(#default#VML);} .shape {behavior:url(#default#VML);} Hi Melissa, Thank you so much for sending through those pics and letting me know about the larger mark. I really appreciate all of the details.   I’ve organised for two replacement Boxes to come to you.  They should be on their way before the end of the week. Thank you again for reaching our and your support.  It really means so much. I hope you have a wonderful rest of the week and if there’s anything else you need in the meantime please don’t hesitate to let me know. Warm Regards Heidi x   From: melissa loz <melissaloz@hotmail.com> Sent: Thursday, 5 March 2026 11:49 AM To: info <info@sagitine.com> Subject: Re: Issue with Storage Boxes – Marks on Arrival. Order #3526   Hi   Sorry, I just wanted to quickly add to my previous email — the larger mark may have occurred when I removed the box from the outer packaging and accidentally brushed it against the shipping box, which was a little dirty on the outside. This could have been my fault - should have been more careful! Hence why I tried to wipe it!     Thank you again for your assistance.

source_filename: RE_ It’s here_ Our biggest sale of the year_ (337).msg
subject: RE: It’s here. Our biggest sale of the year.
customer_question: What's the status of my pre-order?
response_body: v\:* {behavior:url(#default#VML);} o\:* {behavior:url(#default#VML);} w\:* {behavior:url(#default#VML);} .shape {behavior:url(#default#VML);} Hi Mary,   You’re so welcome, and I have some great news.   We do have enough of the Florence Stand in Black available to offer you one without the boxes. However, since you’re also looking to purchase 4 additional Olive Milan Boxes, it works out better value to purchase the Stand complete with 8 Boxes, rather than buying the Stand and Boxes separately.   Here’s a quick breakdown so you can see the difference: * Florence Stand (without Boxes): RRP $850, $680 during our Black Friday Sale * 4 Olive Milan Boxes: $168 ($42 each) * Total = $848 Whereas the Florence Stand with 8 Boxes is normally $1,040, but currently $832 during the sale.   The Olive Milan Boxes and the Florence Stand are both in stock now, while the Olive Miami Storage Boxes are on pre-order and due to arrive in January. They’re such a gorgeous box and sold out so quickly this morning.  But it’s great to get them on pre-order and lock in the Black Friday price.   If you’d like to go ahead with the Stand + 4 Boxes let me know and I’ll raise an invoice for you to pay from. Otherwise, if you’d like to go head with Florence Stand complete with the 8 Milan Boxes you can do that online HERE . And the Miami Storage Boxes are HERE .   Please let me know if there’s anything else I can help you with or don’t hesitate to ask if you have any other questions.     Warm regards, Heidi x   From: Mary Bishop <maryinmelbourne@hotmail.com> Sent: Tuesday, 4 November 2025 1:42 PM To: info <info@sagitine.com> Subject: Re: It’s here. Our biggest sale of the year.   Hi Heidi,   Thank you for your prompt response, it’s much appreciated.   I would like the Florence 8 box stand in black, I have two olive boxes with the cream pull, I will need to order another 4 olive boxes with the cream pull.    I also want to order another 3 Miami storage boxes in the olive with the cream pull.    Is that all possible and in stock?

subject: RE: Leather pulls
customer_question: Where is my order?
response_body: v\:* {behavior:url(#default#VML);} o\:* {behavior:url(#default#VML);} w\:* {behavior:url(#default#VML);} .shape {behavior:url(#default#VML);} Good Morning Kerry,   You won’t believe it, your email has been sitting in my inbox for almost a year, and I’ve thought of it often. I’m so happy to let you know that we finally have Vegan pulls in the pipeline!   I don’t have an exact delivery date just yet, but I wanted you to be the first to know. It makes me genuinely happy to be able to start offering this option soon, especially knowing how important it is for you and lots of our customers.   I’ll keep you updated as soon as I have timing confirmed, but in the meantime, I just wanted to share the news.   Warm regards, Heidi x       From: Kerry Keegan-Watson <kwatson@choicecapital.com.au> Sent: Tuesday, 8 October 2024 10:52 AM To: info <info@sagitine.com> Subject: RE: Leather pulls   Hi Heidi,    This sounds great, I’d definitely be interested in being part of a test run.   I’d like a Florence, 8-box stand, but I can't decide between olive or terracotta at the moment!   There’s no rush and I really appreciate you looking into this Heidi, as I’m Vegan and avoid animal products where I can 😊     Look forward to speaking soon,   Kerry     From: info < info@sagitine.com > Sent: Tuesday, 8 October 2024 8:12 AM To: Kerry Keegan-Watson < kwatson@choicecapital.com.au >; info < info@sagitine.com > Subject: RE: Leather pulls   Good Morning Kerry, Apologies this has taken me a week to get back to you.   I don’t have non-leather handles on the road map, but it’s something I keep looking into. So, I was thinking about getting a bespoke option worked up for you as a test run.  Let me know if you’d be interested.  It will take a couple of months to get them design finished and the samples made.   Let me know which Sagitine product you were looking at and I can send you a couple of the design options that I’ve looked at previously. I hope you had a wonderful weekend and look forward to hearing back from you. Warm Regards Heidi x     From: Kerry Keegan-Watson < kwatson@choicecapital.com.au > Sent: Wednesday, 2 October 2024 1:30 PM To: info < info@sagitine.com > Subject: Leather pulls   Hi Team,    Hope you’re well.   Just checking if you have any future plans to offer alternatives to the leather pulls. No worries if not, I’ll find another storage option, but if there is potential in the nearish future, I’ll hold out!
