source_filename: RE_ Loan term sheet - REPAYMENT DETAILS .msg
subject: RE: Loan term sheet - REPAYMENT DETAILS
customer_question: I just wanted to share my feedback
response_body: Good Morning Jode, I hope you had a fabulous weekend. It sounds like the trip to Portugal (I think that's where Joan said you were all going) was amazing, and Mum mentioned Tam and Wayne were staying on with you for a visit. I'm emailing to let you know I have your loan funds ready to pay back! Loan Amount: $45,000 AUD Interest Amount: $3,105 AUD Interest Terms: - 10% annualised. - The loan was held for 252 days from August 27th, 2024, to May 6th 2025, or 69% of the year. - Therefore, interest payable is 69% of 10% of $45,000 = $3,105) Just confirming the below details are correct for the repayment? NAME: Jodie Stewart and Joel Aurisch BSB: 062-243 ACC: 1019 0834 I'll transfer on confirmation x Jode, I can't thank you enough again for supporting me. It's been a huge year for the business and hopefully more big growth to come. Thank you from the bottom of my heart. Heidi xx

source_filename: RE_ Loan term sheet - REPAYMENT DETAILS.msg
subject: RE: Loan term sheet - REPAYMENT DETAILS
customer_question: I just wanted to share my feedback
response_body: Hi Jode, Sounds like everyone had an amazing time. I've processed two payments. 1. $45,000 as the loan repayment - principle 2. $3,105 as the loan repayment - interest Because you're a first-time payee I had a notification from the bank saying they might hold the funds for 48 hours but we're both Commonwealth so it might go straight through. YES!!! I would love to hear more about the business idea. YES, I'd love to hear more about initial thoughts. How exciting Jode. Can't wait to hear more about it. And absolutely the offer still stands for any Sagitine products you'd like. Just take a look on the site - https://sagitine.com/ - let me know what you’d like, where you need it and when you'd like it to arrive and I'll get it organised. Thank you for the support Jodie! xx -----Original Message----- From: Jodie Stewart <jodiestewart04@gmail.com> Sent: Monday, 5 May 2025 1:16 PM To: Heidi Melville <heidi@sagitine.com> Subject: Re: Loan term sheet - REPAYMENT DETAILS Hi Heidi Thank you so much for making contact on this. Bank details are correct. We've had a blast with everyone. Tam and Wayne just left yesterday. Whilst here, Tam and I discussed quite a bit about your business. At the same time we are also thinking about (maybe) starting a business with some wall cool storage products (think wine, sports balls and dog leads) that Wayne has built some prototypes around that we think are really good. Actually we've been sitting on this idea for a while but think we needed some .. time .. ie time between the end of about life and also time to actually put into further developing the idea. Joel's work contract recently finished and while he's actively looking for work, this presents an opportunity to take some steps forward on this. He is tentatively planned to travel to Australia later this month with that intention. We think that there could be some good cross over opportunities with Sagitine that could help both parties and thought it might be good to brainstorm this if you would be interested. Nothing heavy- just a discussion especially given your business is advanced and ours is still at ideation! Anyway, do let me know and I can share more information and initial thoughts. Unrelated. is there still the offer to get 1-2 pieces of your beautiful products? Would take old stock that you are less likely sell. Joel will be setting up our place in Melbourne whilst there and that timing would be good. Take care Heidi and hope Hayden and Elle are well and thriving. Jodie x > On May 5, 2025, at 2:08 AM, Heidi Melville <heidi@sagitine.com> wrote: > ﻿Good Morning Jode, > > I hope you had a fabulous weekend. > It sounds like the trip to Portugal (I think that's where Joan said you were all going) was amazing, and Mum mentioned Tam and Wayne were staying on with you for a visit. > > I'm emailing to let you know I have your loan funds ready to pay back! > > Loan Amount: $45,000 AUD > Interest Amount: $3,105 AUD > > Interest Terms: > - 10% annualised. > - The loan was held for 252 days from August 27th, 2024, to May 6th 2025, or 69% of the year. > - Therefore, interest payable is 69% of 10% of $45,000 = $3,105) > > Just confirming the below details are correct for the repayment? > NAME: Jodie Stewart and Joel Aurisch > BSB: 062-243 > ACC: 1019 0834 > I'll transfer on confirmation x > > Jode, I can't thank you enough again for supporting me. > It's been a huge year for the business and hopefully more big growth to come. > Thank you from the bottom of my heart. > Heidi xx

subject: RE: Location & Pick Up
customer_question: I just wanted to share my feedback
response_body: Good Afternoon Edwina,   Thank you so much for your email.   We are an online business, we do have a Sydney office, but don’t offer a pick-up service. Are you in Sydney yourself? Warm Regards Heidi x       From: Edwina Ovens <eovens@iinet.net.au> Sent: Tuesday, 30 September 2025 9:47 AM To: info <info@sagitine.com> Subject: Location & Pick Up   Good morning,    I’m just wondering where you are located and if you offer the service to pick up from you directly?   I have provided a link to the item I’m interested in.    https://sagitine.com/stands/new-york-20-box-stand-white-with-cream-leather-handles   Many thanks in advance for your assistance. Edwina Ovens.

subject: RE: Location & Pick Up
customer_question: Where is my order?
response_body: Hi Edwina,   It really does sound like the perfect fit.   For Sydney, delivery is usually about a week from order to arrival, give or take a few days. That said, since we have a Sydney office, we can easily arrange something sooner if you need it more quickly. We only have a small number of the New York Stand in Off White left in stock. They’ve been so popular that once these sell out, it may be a few months before they’re available again.   If you’d like to secure one, I’d love to offer you complimentary shipping if you order within the next 2 days. Just enter the code FREESHIP at checkout. And don’t hesitate to reach out if I can help with anything else.   Warm regards, Heidi     From: Edwina Ovens <eovens@iinet.net.au> Sent: Tuesday, 30 September 2025 5:38 PM To: info <info@sagitine.com> Subject: Re: Location & Pick Up   Thank you so much for your reply Heidi.    This piece would be for our place in Cremorne, so yes we are Sydney based 😁 I’m requiring a piece that can store shoes, potential sunglasses and perhaps some smaller clothing pieces. This seems like a really good option and not only that, looks beautiful too.   What is the delivery timeframe like? I’m just in the process of sorting everything now so I’m looking at options that are available promptly.   Thanks so much for your help Heidi. Edwina. Are you in Sydney yourself? source_filename: RE_ Lou's Closet VIP shopping night (563).msg
subject: RE: Lou's Closet VIP shopping night
customer_question: How do I assemble/set up my Box?
response_body: v\:* {behavior:url(#default#VML);} o\:* {behavior:url(#default#VML);} w\:* {behavior:url(#default#VML);} .shape {behavior:url(#default#VML);} Hi Eugenie, Oh I totally get it, they’re a decent size.  Let me know if you’d like one next year though.   In the meantime I’m more than happy to donate some of the Milan Shoe Boxes in Black (the smaller ones) and some of the Belt Insert Sets. I am completely sold out of the Sunglasses Insert Sets, they have flown off the shelves for the second time!   Let me know if that works and what a good number of them would be. I could do 8 of each if that’s a good number?   Cheers Heidi x     From: Eugenie Karangis <eugenie@lousplace.com.au> Sent: Thursday, 17 April 2025 8:32 AM To: Heidi Melville <heidi@sagitine.com>; Gmail <pamelajbartlett@gmail.com> Cc: Laura Prittie <Laura@lousplace.com.au> Subject: Re: Lou's Closet VIP shopping night   Hi Heidi,   Thank you for your kind offer,this is a gorgeous,useful piece,however it is quite big and I’m not sure it will fit this year’s Closet sale.   I was thinking more along the lines of something smaller like sunglass storage boxes/shoe boxes etc.   That’s ok,maybe next year!   Your offer is kindly appreciated.   Thanks again, Eugenie  From: Heidi Melville < heidi@sagitine.com > Sent: 17 April 2025 07:06 To: Eugenie Karangis < eugenie@lousplace.com.au >; Gmail < pamelajbartlett@gmail.com > Cc: Laura Prittie < Laura@lousplace.com.au > Subject: RE: Lou's Closet VIP shopping night   Good Morning Eugenie,   Oh how fabulous, I genuinely can’t wait to come along.   I have a 14-Box Shanghai Stand in Black with Black Boxes and Cream Leather Pulls – I’ve attached photos for you. The Boxes are in the older style which has only tiny differences to our current style, but in ‘unopened’ perfect condition. It’s all assembled and retails for $1,650. Let me know if you would like it or if you don’t think it’ll quite fit this year. And if you would I’m more than happy to drop it off to you, or if it’s easier, to save you moving it around I can bring it to bump in of the Lou’s Closet at the end of April.  Happy with whatever works best for you.   Happy Easter everyone!  I hope you all have a fabulous weekend. Heidi x     From: Eugenie Karangis < eugenie@lousplace.com.au > Sent: Wednesday, 9 April 2025 3:30 PM To: Heidi Melville < heidi@sagitine.com >; Gmail < pamelajbartlett@gmail.com > Cc: Laura Prittie < Laura@lousplace.com.au > Subject: Re: Lou's Closet VIP shopping night   Hi Heidi,   Thank you, this is wonderful!   We are definitely open to anything you’d like to donate.   Apart from women’s clothing,this year we will have a little section of brand-new men’s designer suits and shirts,Lou’s Pantry and some beautiful candles and some umbrellas.   We would love to expand and sell some other lovely products.   Thank you, Eugenie  From: Heidi Melville < heidi@sagitine.com > Sent: 09 April 2025 12:31 To: Eugenie Karangis < eugenie@lousplace.com.au >; Gmail < pamelajbartlett@gmail.com > Cc: Laura Prittie < Laura@lousplace.com.au > Subject: RE: Lou's Closet VIP shopping night   The blog and story are live!!   HERE is the blog post and the story is live on the Sagitine Insta profile. I’ve tagged Lou’s Place and Lou’s Closet about a billion times but if you want any of the frames to share or save off just let me know and I can easily send them through.   I also can’t believe I haven’t offered earlier, but if you’d ever like any Sagitine product to auction or sell please don’t hesitate to let me know. I’d love to donate what I can.    And finally, I can’t wait to meet everyone at the end of the month at Lou’s Closet! I’m so excited. Have a wonderful rest of the week everyone and if there’s anything else at all you need from me please don’t hesitate to let me know. Heidi xx     From: Eugenie Karangis < eugenie@lousplace.com.au > Sent: Monday, 7 April 2025 6:47 PM To: Heidi Melville < heidi@sagitine.com >; Gmail < pamelajbartlett@gmail.com > Cc: Laura Prittie < Laura@lousplace.com.au > Subject: Re: Lou's Closet VIP shopping night   Hi Heidi,   This is fantastic!! Thank you,looks great.   Your help is very much appreciated.   Warmest regards, Eugenie X   From: Heidi Melville < heidi@sagitine.com > Sent: 07 April 2025 13:40 To: Eugenie Karangis < eugenie@lousplace.com.au >; Gmail < pamelajbartlett@gmail.com > Cc: Laura Prittie < Laura@lousplace.com.au > Subject: RE: Lou's Closet VIP shopping night   Happy Monday everyone,   I hope you all had a fab weekend.   The Blog post and story are all set to publish. Just waiting for my dev to push the blog live.    I think I mentioned it’d been on my list of things to sort out for the last 6 months, so thank you!! Promoting Lou’s Closet has been the push I needed to get it done. As soon as the blog is live I’ll publish the below 6 story frame to Insa and FB. I’m expecting it all to go live either this evening or tomorrow.  I’ll take up Lou’s Place and Lou’s Closet so whoever’s on your socials will get an alert.     Once I got to designing the Story I ended up changing some of the details of the content slightly to fit. Hope that’s okay.  But there’s still plenty of time for changes so just let me know if you’d like anything updated. Heidi xx   From: Eugenie Karangis < eugenie@lousplace.com.au > Sent: Friday, 4 April 2025 3:49 PM To: Heidi Melville < heidi@sagitine.com >; Gmail < pamelajbartlett@gmail.com > Cc: Laura Prittie < Laura@lousplace.com.au > Subject: Re: Lou's Closet VIP shopping night   Thank you Heidi.   From: Heidi Melville < heidi@sagitine.com > Sent: 04 April 2025 14:48 To: Eugenie Karangis < eugenie@lousplace.com.au >; Gmail < pamelajbartlett@gmail.com > Cc: Laura Prittie < Laura@lousplace.com.au > Subject: RE: Lou's Closet VIP shopping night   Oh thank you!  Baz is a legend, of course I can add her. xx     From: Eugenie Karangis < eugenie@lousplace.com.au > Sent: Friday, 4 April 2025 6:09 AM To: Heidi Melville < heidi@sagitine.com >; Gmail < pamelajbartlett@gmail.com > Cc: Laura Prittie < Laura@lousplace.com.au > Subject: Re: Lou's Closet VIP shopping night   Hi again Heidi,   Sorry forgot an important point,Baz also supports Lou’s Closet. Could you possibly add her name to the designer list?   Thank you, Eugenie From: Eugenie Karangis < eugenie@lousplace.com.au > Sent: 03 April 2025 15:43 To: Heidi Melville < heidi@sagitine.com >; Gmail < pamelajbartlett@gmail.com > Cc: Laura Prittie < Laura@lousplace.com.au > Subject: Re: Lou's Closet VIP shopping night   You’re amazing Heidi,THANK YOU for all your help.   Really appreciate it and look forward to meeting you!   Warmest regards, Eugenie From: Heidi Melville < heidi@sagitine.com > Sent: 03 April 2025 15:09 To: Eugenie Karangis < eugenie@lousplace.com.au >; Gmail < pamelajbartlett@gmail.com > Cc: Laura Prittie < Laura@lousplace.com.au > Subject: RE: Lou's Closet VIP shopping night   Thank you so much for checking through that all Eugenie! I’ll get it all in creative and once that’s done I’ll let you know when it’s scheduled to go live x   From: Eugenie Karangis < eugenie@lousplace.com.au > Sent: Thursday, 3 April 2025 2:47 PM To: Gmail < pamelajbartlett@gmail.com >; Heidi Melville < heidi@sagitine.com > Cc: Laura Prittie < Laura@lousplace.com.au > Subject: Re: Lou's Closet VIP shopping night   Hi Heidi,   This is absolutely wonderful!!   Thank you for putting this together.   Just a few points:   -I know in the past we asked for people to dry clean their clothing prior to donating,but this is a very big ask. Instead,  we can just ask them to donate clothing that is clean and in good condition.   - There is a little spelling error in the drop off location of Point Piper-   -Can you also add that 100% of the proceeds from the sale go directly to Lou’s Place?   -We can also pick up their donation if in the Eastern Suburbs-they can contact me.   Thanks again, Eugenie From: Gmail < pamelajbartlett@gmail.com > Sent: 03 April 2025 13:44 To: Heidi Melville < heidi@sagitine.com > Cc: Eugenie Karangis < eugenie@lousplace.com.au >; Laura Prittie < Laura@lousplace.com.au > Subject: Re: Lou's Closet VIP shopping night   This is so amazing ladies. What wonderful teamwork. Heidi can’t wait to meet you.    Love to you all from Charleston    Pam

response_body: v\:* {behavior:url(#default#VML);} o\:* {behavior:url(#default#VML);} w\:* {behavior:url(#default#VML);} .shape {behavior:url(#default#VML);} Happy Monday everyone,   I hope you all had a fab weekend.   The Blog post and story are all set to publish. Just waiting for my dev to push the blog live.    I think I mentioned it’d been on my list of things to sort out for the last 6 months, so thank you!! Promoting Lou’s Closet has been the push I needed to get it done. As soon as the blog is live I’ll publish the below 6 story frame to Insa and FB. I’m expecting it all to go live either this evening or tomorrow.  I’ll take up Lou’s Place and Lou’s Closet so whoever’s on your socials will get an alert.     Once I got to designing the Story I ended up changing some of the details of the content slightly to fit. Hope that’s okay.  But there’s still plenty of time for changes so just let me know if you’d like anything updated. Heidi xx   From: Eugenie Karangis <eugenie@lousplace.com.au> Sent: Friday, 4 April 2025 3:49 PM To: Heidi Melville <heidi@sagitine.com>; Gmail <pamelajbartlett@gmail.com> Cc: Laura Prittie <Laura@lousplace.com.au> Subject: Re: Lou's Closet VIP shopping night   Thank you Heidi.   From: Heidi Melville < heidi@sagitine.com > Sent: 04 April 2025 14:48 To: Eugenie Karangis < eugenie@lousplace.com.au >; Gmail < pamelajbartlett@gmail.com > Cc: Laura Prittie < Laura@lousplace.com.au > Subject: RE: Lou's Closet VIP shopping night   Oh thank you!  Baz is a legend, of course I can add her. xx     From: Eugenie Karangis < eugenie@lousplace.com.au > Sent: Friday, 4 April 2025 6:09 AM To: Heidi Melville < heidi@sagitine.com >; Gmail < pamelajbartlett@gmail.com > Cc: Laura Prittie < Laura@lousplace.com.au > Subject: Re: Lou's Closet VIP shopping night   Hi again Heidi,   Sorry forgot an important point,Baz also supports Lou’s Closet. Could you possibly add her name to the designer list?   Thank you, Eugenie From: Eugenie Karangis < eugenie@lousplace.com.au > Sent: 03 April 2025 15:43 To: Heidi Melville < heidi@sagitine.com >; Gmail < pamelajbartlett@gmail.com > Cc: Laura Prittie < Laura@lousplace.com.au > Subject: Re: Lou's Closet VIP shopping night   You’re amazing Heidi,THANK YOU for all your help.   Really appreciate it and look forward to meeting you!   Warmest regards, Eugenie From: Heidi Melville < heidi@sagitine.com > Sent: 03 April 2025 15:09 To: Eugenie Karangis < eugenie@lousplace.com.au >; Gmail < pamelajbartlett@gmail.com > Cc: Laura Prittie < Laura@lousplace.com.au > Subject: RE: Lou's Closet VIP shopping night   Thank you so much for checking through that all Eugenie! I’ll get it all in creative and once that’s done I’ll let you know when it’s scheduled to go live x   From: Eugenie Karangis < eugenie@lousplace.com.au > Sent: Thursday, 3 April 2025 2:47 PM To: Gmail < pamelajbartlett@gmail.com >; Heidi Melville < heidi@sagitine.com > Cc: Laura Prittie < Laura@lousplace.com.au > Subject: Re: Lou's Closet VIP shopping night   Hi Heidi,   This is absolutely wonderful!!   Thank you for putting this together.   Just a few points:   -I know in the past we asked for people to dry clean their clothing prior to donating,but this is a very big ask. Instead,  we can just ask them to donate clothing that is clean and in good condition.   - There is a little spelling error in the drop off location of Point Piper-   -Can you also add that 100% of the proceeds from the sale go directly to Lou’s Place?   -We can also pick up their donation if in the Eastern Suburbs-they can contact me.   Thanks again, Eugenie From: Gmail < pamelajbartlett@gmail.com > Sent: 03 April 2025 13:44 To: Heidi Melville < heidi@sagitine.com > Cc: Eugenie Karangis < eugenie@lousplace.com.au >; Laura Prittie < Laura@lousplace.com.au > Subject: Re: Lou's Closet VIP shopping night   This is so amazing ladies. What wonderful teamwork. Heidi can’t wait to meet you.    Love to you all from Charleston    Pam

source_filename: RE_ Lou's Closet VIP shopping night (597).msg
subject: RE: Lou's Closet VIP shopping night
customer_question: I just wanted to share my feedback
response_body: v\:* {behavior:url(#default#VML);} o\:* {behavior:url(#default#VML);} w\:* {behavior:url(#default#VML);} .shape {behavior:url(#default#VML);} Morning everyone, I hope you’re having a fabulous week. Below is the content for the blog post and insta story.   Let me know if you’re happy with it, or please feel free to make any changes. Also, I’ve taken some info from last year, so let me know if anything isn’t accurate (ala designers that donate new clothing).   I’ve got everything sorted to launch my Journal section on Sagitine.com so THANK YOU for giving me a reason to get it sorted!! Once I hear back from you, I’ll get it live.   Heidi x     BLOG POST CONTENT   Heading: Lou’s Closet Donation Information Sub Head: Lou’s Place, a one-of-a-kind, kindness place for women in crisis.   We know of the perfect new home for those gorgeous clothes of yours you no longer wear or want. Lou’s Place is sourcing donations for their famous Lou’s Closet – a fabulous new, preloved, and vintage clothing sale supporting women in crisis.   WHAT TO DONATE: Women’s clothing, shoes, bags and accessories – no children’s or menswear.   Over 14 years Lou’s Closet has established a high standard of clothing and accessories on offer. Therefore, they only accept clean and well cared for donations. Please launder or dry clean your pre-loved pieces before donating.   Donations close APRIL 20th   WHERE TO DONATE: You can drop off your pieces to a handful of wonderful volunteers around Sydney. Please message for details.   Eugenie – Maroubra – 0414 473 740 Jennie – Mosman – 0415 451 475 Jenny – Fairlight – 0414 942 725 Jo – Palm Beach and Castlecrag – 0419 435 504 Karen – Centeniial Park – 0413 877 742 Kate – Hunters Hill – 0412 434 969 Kirsten – Bondi Beach – 0433 833 031 Pam – Pint Piper – 0407 362 419   Or, anything can be dropped at: Kennards Storage 866 Bourke St Waterloo The clothing needs to be bagged or boxed and clearly labelled Lou’s Place.   Lou’s Closet. Come along, shop and support Lou’s Place.   May 1 Thursday, 9am – 7pm May 2 Friday 9am – 6pm May 3 Saturday 9am – 3pm The Tramsheds, 1 Dalgal Way, Glebe   There are two sections of The Closet sale. The designer room, showcasing our well-loved designer brands. The general room, with beautiful preloved and new designs.   A special shout out to the wonderful Australian Designers who donate new clothes to Lou’s Closet year after year to be sold. * Baz Inc * Carla Zampatti * Bianca Spender * Moss and Spy     Lou’s Place: Lou’s place, located in Redfern, is a community-based day time drop-in centre for women in crisis.    On average 40 women access Lou’s every day to have a cooked meal, receive legal and social support, to have a shower and access emergency clothing or to partake in social interactions through the daily classes and activities.   Most of the women who visit have experienced multipole traumas with the majority facing issues of homelessness, domestic violence, mental health and drug and alcohol abuse.   For additional information on Lou’s Closet or Lou’s Place please feel free to contact Eugenie on   INSTA STORY CONTENT   Frame 1: We know of the perfect new home for those gorgeous clothes of yours you no longer wear or want. Lou’s Place is sourcing donations for their famous Lou’s Closet – a fabulous new, preloved, and vintage clothing sale supporting women in crisis.   Lou’s Place, a one-of-a-kind, kindness place for women in crisis.   Frame 2: WHAT TO DONATE     Women’s clothing, shoes, bags and accessories – no children’s or menswear.   Over 14 years Lou’s Closet has established a high standard of clothing and accessories on offer. Therefore, they only accept clean and well cared for donations. Please launder or dry clean your pre-loved pieces before donating. <<LINK TO BLOG FOR MORE INFO>>   Donations close APRIL 20 th   Frame 3:   WHERE TO DONATE: You can drop off your pieces to a handful of wonderful volunteers around Sydney.   Eugenie – Maroubra and Waterloo Jennie – Mosman Jenny – Fairlight Jo – Palm Beach and Castlecrag Karen – Centeniial Park Kate – Hunters Hill Kirsten – Bondi Beach Pam – Pint Piper <<LINK TO BLOG FOR MORE INFO>>   Frame 4: Lou’s Closet. Come along, shop and support Lou’s Place.   May 1 Thursday, 9am – 7pm May 2 Friday 9am – 6pm May 3 Saturday 9am – 3pm The Tramsheds, 1 Dalgal Way, Glebe   There are two sections of The Closet sale. The designer room, showcasing our well-loved designer brands. The general room, with beautiful preloved and new designs. <<LINK TO LOU’S PLACE>>     Frame 5: A special shout out to the wonderful Australian Designers who donate new clothes to Lou’s Closet year after year to be sold. * Baz Inc * Carla Zampatti * Bianca Spender * Moss and Spy <<TAG EVERYONE>>   Frame 6: Lou’s place, located in Redfern, is a community-based day time drop-in centre for women in crisis.    On average 40 women access Lou’s every day to have a cooked meal, receive legal and social support, to have a shower and access emergency clothing or to partake in social interactions through the daily classes and activities.   Most of the women who visit have experienced multipole traumas with the majority facing issues of homelessness, domestic violence, mental health and drug and alcohol abuse.   <<LINK TO CASH DONATE>>       From: Eugenie Karangis <eugenie@lousplace.com.au> Sent: Saturday, 29 March 2025 9:14 AM To: Laura Prittie <Laura@lousplace.com.au>; Heidi Melville <heidi@sagitine.com>; Pamela Bartlett <pamelajbartlett@gmail.com> Subject: Re: Lou's Closet VIP shopping night     Hi Heidi,   Thank you for putting this together.   Regarding the drop off points- Maybe the best option would be to post the suburb with name and Phone number and you could also add: Kennards Storage 866 Bourke St Waterloo The bags/boxes of donations need to be labelled Lou’s Place. This is where our storage is and I’m notified straight away..seems like I’m living there anyway at the moment!   Please feel free to include my details as advertised on the flyer attached for any further information on The Closet. Baz is a wonderful supporter of Lou’s Place and particularly The Closet.   The cut off date for donations is April 20th.   Thanks again, Eugenie      From: Laura Prittie < Laura@lousplace.com.au > Sent: 28 March 2025 15:51 To: Heidi Melville < heidi@sagitine.com >; Eugenie Karangis < eugenie@lousplace.com.au >; Pamela Bartlett < pamelajbartlett@gmail.com > Subject: RE: Lou's Closet VIP shopping night   Thank you so much Heidi!!!   I’ll leave Eugenie to get back re including drop-off details as she’s the guru.   Really appreciate your help and support, I know these things take time.   Have a lovely weekend.   Thanks Laura   From: Heidi Melville < heidi@sagitine.com > Sent: Thursday, 27 March 2025 3:08 PM To: Laura Prittie < Laura@lousplace.com.au >; Eugenie Karangis < eugenie@lousplace.com.au >; Pamela Bartlett < pamelajbartlett@gmail.com > Subject: RE: Lou's Closet VIP shopping night   Thank you so much for all the info! Just starting to pull the content together.   I’m going to use this as a good excuse to finally get my Journal section for Sagitine up and running. I’ll do a long form journal article with all the info and link backs to Lou’s place.  I’m also happy to link back to any other supporters. And I’ll also do some content to share in my Instagram stories. My plan is to post on Sunday.   I just wanted to check a couple of things for the donation drop-off points.  Are you happy for me to publish the phone numbers and address’s to Insta of the drop off points? Just conscience that they look to be people’s person details. Alternatively, I could just include the suburbs and an email address for people to get in touch for the details of their local drop off. I’ve also had a chat to Baz, from the gorgeous Baz Inc, and she’s happy to have an allocated day next week or the week after to accept deliveries at her new store on Macleay St too.    Let me know about the drop off details when you have a minute, and I’ll share the content before I publish it! Heidi x       From: Laura Prittie < Laura@lousplace.com.au > Sent: Friday, 21 March 2025 10:14 AM To: Eugenie Karangis < eugenie@lousplace.com.au >; Heidi Melville < heidi@sagitine.com >; Pamela Bartlett < pamelajbartlett@gmail.com >; heidi Melville < heidimelville@hotmail.com > Cc: Merrilee Ireland < merrilee.ireland@icloud.com > Subject: RE: Lou's Closet VIP shopping night   Thanks Heide and thanks Eugenie for jumping. Heidi, let me know if there is anything else you need and thank you again!   From: Eugenie Karangis < eugenie@lousplace.com.au > Sent: Wednesday, 19 March 2025 12:17 PM To: Heidi Melville < heidi@sagitine.com >; Laura Prittie < Laura@lousplace.com.au >; Pamela Bartlett < pamelajbartlett@gmail.com >; heidi Melville < heidimelville@hotmail.com > Cc: Merrilee Ireland < merrilee.ireland@icloud.com > Subject: Re: Lou's Closet VIP shopping night   Hi Heidi,   Thank you for your email.This is a wonderful incentive. * we are after women’s clothing,shoes,bags and accessories-we do not accept children’s or menswear. * There are two sections of The Closet sale.  The designer room with all the designer brands which is the most popular section and The general room,still with beautiful clothing,just not top designer brands.  We also have a vintage clothing section. * Lou’s Closet prides itself on the quality and cleanliness of the clothing,so we ask that any donations received are clean and in good condition.  * The cut off date for donations is 20th April so that we have enough time to sort and price! * We have drop-off points around Sydney,I have attached a flyer for your reference. The only issue here is that we try not to advertise this to the masses as people’s names and addresses on the list may be compromised. Could you possibly give this to a select few or screen the enquiries?   We also have a drop off point at  Kennards storage 866 Bourke St Waterloo   Items can be delivered there as this is where our storage is. If bags/boxes can be secured well and labelled:   For Lou’s Place-Eugenie    We are informed of the delivery and pick up almost straight away!   I have also attached a couple of Lou’s Closet flyers which include information about Lou’s Place.   Please let me know if you have any other questions.   Thanks again, Eugenie From: Heidi Melville < heidi@sagitine.com > Sent: 19 March 2025 06:43 To: Laura Prittie < Laura@lousplace.com.au >; Pamela Bartlett < pamelajbartlett@gmail.com >; heidi Melville < heidimelville@hotmail.com >; Eugenie Karangis < eugenie@lousplace.com.au > Cc: Merrilee Ireland < merrilee.ireland@icloud.com > Subject: RE: Lou's Closet VIP shopping night   Good Morning Laura, Thanks so much for the email. I hope you’re having a fabulous week.   When you have a moment could you please let me know the details for clothing donations for Lou’s Closet. The ‘what’ you’re looking for in donations, as well as how or where to deliver the clothing to and by when.   I’ve found some info on the Lou’s Place website about the history and what it is you do, as well as how to donate cash. I’ll pull a few frames together telling a story about Lou’s place and Lou’s closet and share it with you before I share on Sagitine.   Thanks again.  I’m thrilled to be able to help out in a small way. Warm Regards Heidi x   From: Laura Prittie < Laura@lousplace.com.au > Sent: Thursday, 13 March 2025 2:17 PM To: Pamela Bartlett < pamelajbartlett@gmail.com >; heidi Melville < heidimelville@hotmail.com >; Eugenie Karangis < eugenie@lousplace.com.au > Cc: Heidi Melville < heidi@sagitine.com >; Merrilee Ireland < merrilee.ireland@icloud.com > Subject: RE: Lou's Closet VIP shopping night   Thanks again Pam and lovely to e-meet you Heidi!   Appreciate your amazing support Heidi re Instagram and I can definitely help with any info, assets etc to assist with this. If we can ever do anything in return to share the love let me know. Also, as Pam mentioned I’d be very happy to show you around Lou’s and take you through what we do so if you would like to come sooner rather than later please reach out.   So looking forward to properly meeting everyone in person at the Closet.   Thanks Laura     Laura Prittie  (she/her)   Philanthropy Manager   |  Lou’s Place   P:  0434 417 166   | E:  laura@lousplace.com.au 67 Renwick Street  | Redfern  | 2016 NSW My working days are Monday to Wednesday. Lou’s Place acknowledge the Gadigal people of the Eora nation, on whose land we work. We pay our respects to their Elders past and present, and to all Aboriginal and Torres Strait Islander Peoples .           From: Pamela Bartlett < pamelajbartlett@gmail.com > Sent: Thursday, 13 March 2025 9:31 AM To: heidi Melville < heidimelville@hotmail.com >; Eugenie Karangis < eugenie@lousplace.com.au >; Laura Prittie < Laura@lousplace.com.au > Cc: Heidi Melville < heidi@sagitine.com >; Merrilee Ireland < merrilee.ireland@icloud.com > Subject: Re: Lou's Closet VIP shopping night   Dear Heidi,   Thank you so much for your note - and I am very excited to meet you and take you to Lou’s Place to show you around.  I am copying in two very important people - Eugenie who organises Lou’s Closet and Laura who is our Philanthropy Manager for all of Lou’s Place.   Really appreciate your offer to share Lou’s Closet on the Sagitine insta (which looks amazing btw) …. the best people to ask about that are Eugenie and Laura.     They will be able to give you an Instagram friendly version and one that  is approved to be shared widely.   Just to confirm - the VIP night can’t be shared widely as it is only by invitation -  and we don’t have the room for a broad distribution for that night … So that night is for you and Mum or you and a friend to come along Heidi.  My daughter and I will be there.   I am sorry I am off to the US so soon and can’t take you to Lou’s Closet to meet with Laura before I go.  We will do it next time your Mum is in Sydney… and of course, if you’d like to go earlier (while I am away) please feel free to organise that with Laura directly.  We are always so excited to have new supporters who want to learn more about Lou’s.     And, just a note to Laura and Eugenie so you don’t get too confused … We are on Heidi Number 2 - this month for new supporters to Lou’s Closet … This Heidi is NOT my neighbour but the daughter of my new friend Merrilee.    I hope that clears things up!  HA   Best to everyone …    Pam B 0407 362 419                   From: heidi Melville < heidimelville@hotmail.com > Date: Thursday, 13 March 2025 at 9:04 AM To: pamelajbartlett@gmail.com < pamelajbartlett@gmail.com > Cc: Heidi Melville < heidi@sagitine.com >, Merrilee Ireland < merrilee.ireland@icloud.com > Subject: RE: Lou's Closet VIP shopping night Good Morning Pam, Thank you so much for forwarding me the VIP night invite through Mum. I’m so excited to join for the night. If you are still looking for clothing donations for the event and had any information about how and when to donate, I’d be more than delighted to share the information on Sagitine’s Instagram account in the stories. Let me know if you think that would be good for donations.   Sagitine Instagram - HERE   Thank you again for the invite. Warm Regards Heidi x   From: Merrilee Ireland < merrilee.ireland@icloud.com > Sent: Thursday, 6 March 2025 10:34 AM To: Melville < heidimelville@hotmail.com > Subject: Fwd: Lou's Closet VIP shopping night

source_filename: RE_ Lou's Closet VIP shopping night.msg
subject: RE: Lou's Closet VIP shopping night
customer_question: How do I assemble/set up my Box?
response_body: v\:* {behavior:url(#default#VML);} o\:* {behavior:url(#default#VML);} w\:* {behavior:url(#default#VML);} .shape {behavior:url(#default#VML);} Good Morning Eugenie,   I am so sorry I haven’t got around to getting these Boxes and Insert Sets to you sooner. Please let me know if you would still like them and I can drop them directly to the Tramsheds today if you’d like. Unfortunately, I’ve had some personal things come up and I’m devastated that I won’t be able to attend the VIP night tonight. But, I’m more than happy to drop the boxes to you any time before 3 this afternoon if you would still like them and if that works for you.   But no pressure at all, and completely understand if I’ve left it too late and we can try again next year.   Warm Regards Heidi x     From: Eugenie Karangis <eugenie@lousplace.com.au> Sent: Thursday, 17 April 2025 9:20 AM To: Heidi Melville <heidi@sagitine.com>; Gmail <pamelajbartlett@gmail.com> Cc: Laura Prittie <Laura@lousplace.com.au> Subject: Re: Lou's Closet VIP shopping night   Hi Heidi,   The Shoe boxes and belt insert sets would be great! Yes perfect,8 of each,Thank you!   Warmest regards, Eugenie From: Heidi Melville < heidi@sagitine.com > Sent: 17 April 2025 09:04 To: Eugenie Karangis < eugenie@lousplace.com.au >; Gmail < pamelajbartlett@gmail.com > Cc: Laura Prittie < Laura@lousplace.com.au > Subject: RE: Lou's Closet VIP shopping night   Hi Eugenie, Oh I totally get it, they’re a decent size.  Let me know if you’d like one next year though.   In the meantime I’m more than happy to donate some of the Milan Shoe Boxes in Black (the smaller ones) and some of the Belt Insert Sets. I am completely sold out of the Sunglasses Insert Sets, they have flown off the shelves for the second time!   Let me know if that works and what a good number of them would be. I could do 8 of each if that’s a good number?   Cheers Heidi x     From: Eugenie Karangis < eugenie@lousplace.com.au > Sent: Thursday, 17 April 2025 8:32 AM To: Heidi Melville < heidi@sagitine.com >; Gmail < pamelajbartlett@gmail.com > Cc: Laura Prittie < Laura@lousplace.com.au > Subject: Re: Lou's Closet VIP shopping night   Hi Heidi,   Thank you for your kind offer,this is a gorgeous,useful piece,however it is quite big and I’m not sure it will fit this year’s Closet sale.   I was thinking more along the lines of something smaller like sunglass storage boxes/shoe boxes etc.   That’s ok,maybe next year!   Your offer is kindly appreciated.   Thanks again, Eugenie  From: Heidi Melville < heidi@sagitine.com > Sent: 17 April 2025 07:06 To: Eugenie Karangis < eugenie@lousplace.com.au >; Gmail < pamelajbartlett@gmail.com > Cc: Laura Prittie < Laura@lousplace.com.au > Subject: RE: Lou's Closet VIP shopping night   Good Morning Eugenie,   Oh how fabulous, I genuinely can’t wait to come along.   I have a 14-Box Shanghai Stand in Black with Black Boxes and Cream Leather Pulls – I’ve attached photos for you. The Boxes are in the older style which has only tiny differences to our current style, but in ‘unopened’ perfect condition. It’s all assembled and retails for $1,650. Let me know if you would like it or if you don’t think it’ll quite fit this year. And if you would I’m more than happy to drop it off to you, or if it’s easier, to save you moving it around I can bring it to bump in of the Lou’s Closet at the end of April.  Happy with whatever works best for you.   Happy Easter everyone!  I hope you all have a fabulous weekend. Heidi x     From: Eugenie Karangis < eugenie@lousplace.com.au > Sent: Wednesday, 9 April 2025 3:30 PM To: Heidi Melville < heidi@sagitine.com >; Gmail < pamelajbartlett@gmail.com > Cc: Laura Prittie < Laura@lousplace.com.au > Subject: Re: Lou's Closet VIP shopping night   Hi Heidi,   Thank you, this is wonderful!   We are definitely open to anything you’d like to donate.   Apart from women’s clothing,this year we will have a little section of brand-new men’s designer suits and shirts,Lou’s Pantry and some beautiful candles and some umbrellas.   We would love to expand and sell some other lovely products.   Thank you, Eugenie  From: Heidi Melville < heidi@sagitine.com > Sent: 09 April 2025 12:31 To: Eugenie Karangis < eugenie@lousplace.com.au >; Gmail < pamelajbartlett@gmail.com > Cc: Laura Prittie < Laura@lousplace.com.au > Subject: RE: Lou's Closet VIP shopping night   The blog and story are live!!   HERE is the blog post and the story is live on the Sagitine Insta profile. I’ve tagged Lou’s Place and Lou’s Closet about a billion times but if you want any of the frames to share or save off just let me know and I can easily send them through.   I also can’t believe I haven’t offered earlier, but if you’d ever like any Sagitine product to auction or sell please don’t hesitate to let me know. I’d love to donate what I can.    And finally, I can’t wait to meet everyone at the end of the month at Lou’s Closet! I’m so excited. Have a wonderful rest of the week everyone and if there’s anything else at all you need from me please don’t hesitate to let me know. Heidi xx     From: Eugenie Karangis < eugenie@lousplace.com.au > Sent: Monday, 7 April 2025 6:47 PM To: Heidi Melville < heidi@sagitine.com >; Gmail < pamelajbartlett@gmail.com > Cc: Laura Prittie < Laura@lousplace.com.au > Subject: Re: Lou's Closet VIP shopping night   Hi Heidi,   This is fantastic!! Thank you,looks great.   Your help is very much appreciated.   Warmest regards, Eugenie X   From: Heidi Melville < heidi@sagitine.com > Sent: 07 April 2025 13:40 To: Eugenie Karangis < eugenie@lousplace.com.au >; Gmail < pamelajbartlett@gmail.com > Cc: Laura Prittie < Laura@lousplace.com.au > Subject: RE: Lou's Closet VIP shopping night   Happy Monday everyone,   I hope you all had a fab weekend.   The Blog post and story are all set to publish. Just waiting for my dev to push the blog live.    I think I mentioned it’d been on my list of things to sort out for the last 6 months, so thank you!! Promoting Lou’s Closet has been the push I needed to get it done. As soon as the blog is live I’ll publish the below 6 story frame to Insa and FB. I’m expecting it all to go live either this evening or tomorrow.  I’ll take up Lou’s Place and Lou’s Closet so whoever’s on your socials will get an alert.     Once I got to designing the Story I ended up changing some of the details of the content slightly to fit. Hope that’s okay.  But there’s still plenty of time for changes so just let me know if you’d like anything updated. Heidi xx   From: Eugenie Karangis < eugenie@lousplace.com.au > Sent: Friday, 4 April 2025 3:49 PM To: Heidi Melville < heidi@sagitine.com >; Gmail < pamelajbartlett@gmail.com > Cc: Laura Prittie < Laura@lousplace.com.au > Subject: Re: Lou's Closet VIP shopping night   Thank you Heidi.   From: Heidi Melville < heidi@sagitine.com > Sent: 04 April 2025 14:48 To: Eugenie Karangis < eugenie@lousplace.com.au >; Gmail < pamelajbartlett@gmail.com > Cc: Laura Prittie < Laura@lousplace.com.au > Subject: RE: Lou's Closet VIP shopping night   Oh thank you!  Baz is a legend, of course I can add her. xx     From: Eugenie Karangis < eugenie@lousplace.com.au > Sent: Friday, 4 April 2025 6:09 AM To: Heidi Melville < heidi@sagitine.com >; Gmail < pamelajbartlett@gmail.com > Cc: Laura Prittie < Laura@lousplace.com.au > Subject: Re: Lou's Closet VIP shopping night   Hi again Heidi,   Sorry forgot an important point,Baz also supports Lou’s Closet. Could you possibly add her name to the designer list?   Thank you, Eugenie From: Eugenie Karangis < eugenie@lousplace.com.au > Sent: 03 April 2025 15:43 To: Heidi Melville < heidi@sagitine.com >; Gmail < pamelajbartlett@gmail.com > Cc: Laura Prittie < Laura@lousplace.com.au > Subject: Re: Lou's Closet VIP shopping night   You’re amazing Heidi,THANK YOU for all your help.   Really appreciate it and look forward to meeting you!   Warmest regards, Eugenie From: Heidi Melville < heidi@sagitine.com > Sent: 03 April 2025 15:09 To: Eugenie Karangis < eugenie@lousplace.com.au >; Gmail < pamelajbartlett@gmail.com > Cc: Laura Prittie < Laura@lousplace.com.au > Subject: RE: Lou's Closet VIP shopping night   Thank you so much for checking through that all Eugenie! I’ll get it all in creative and once that’s done I’ll let you know when it’s scheduled to go live x   From: Eugenie Karangis < eugenie@lousplace.com.au > Sent: Thursday, 3 April 2025 2:47 PM To: Gmail < pamelajbartlett@gmail.com >; Heidi Melville < heidi@sagitine.com > Cc: Laura Prittie < Laura@lousplace.com.au > Subject: Re: Lou's Closet VIP shopping night   Hi Heidi,   This is absolutely wonderful!!   Thank you for putting this together.   Just a few points:   -I know in the past we asked for people to dry clean their clothing prior to donating,but this is a very big ask. Instead,  we can just ask them to donate clothing that is clean and in good condition.   - There is a little spelling error in the drop off location of Point Piper-   -Can you also add that 100% of the proceeds from the sale go directly to Lou’s Place?   -We can also pick up their donation if in the Eastern Suburbs-they can contact me.   Thanks again, Eugenie From: Gmail < pamelajbartlett@gmail.com > Sent: 03 April 2025 13:44 To: Heidi Melville < heidi@sagitine.com > Cc: Eugenie Karangis < eugenie@lousplace.com.au >; Laura Prittie < Laura@lousplace.com.au > Subject: Re: Lou's Closet VIP shopping night   This is so amazing ladies. What wonderful teamwork. Heidi can’t wait to meet you.    Love to you all from Charleston    Pam

source_filename: RE_ Love your boxes_ love to purchase during sale_ your advice needed! Please!.msg
subject: RE: Love your boxes, love to purchase during sale, your advice needed! Please!
customer_question: I just wanted to share my feedback
response_body: Good Afternoon Maria,   Thank you so much for your message. I can do any colour at all with the black frame!   It really depends on your taste and décor but is there a combination you were hoping for?  I’ve attached a picture of the Lilac in the black frame so you can see how a pastel colour looks. Unfortunately I don’t have any other pics of other combinations but we can do anything that you think will work in your space. Just let me know and I’ll raise an invoice for the combination you’d like.   And please don’t hesitate to reach out if you have any other questions or a combination you’d like my opinion on!  We love having these chats.   Warm Regards Heidi x     From: M Zapp <mariazapp08@gmail.com> Sent: Friday, 7 November 2025 10:21 AM To: info <info@sagitine.com> Subject: Love your boxes, love to purchase during sale, your advice needed! Please!   Hi,   Love your product and would really like to purchase whilst on sale.   I have a super small heritage listed cottage with NO STORAGE!    Am interested in your Florence Stand but need black frame and the advertised combinations black, red and olive aren’t suitable. Are these the only colours that suit the black frame? Are any other combinations possible?    Sorry, I hate being that person……   Maria Maria Zappala Mobile:0438607220

subject: RE: MAMAMIA
customer_question: How do I assemble this?
response_body: v\:* {behavior:url(#default#VML);} o\:* {behavior:url(#default#VML);} w\:* {behavior:url(#default#VML);} .shape {behavior:url(#default#VML);} Hi Casey,   So lovely to hear from you, and thank you for the very kind words about Sagitine.  I'm still so chuffed to hear when people love the brand. I’m Heidi, the owner of Sagitine. The email came through to our general inbox, so I just wanted to introduce myself.   I really appreciate you flagging this. I’ve paused the content on our end so we can make sure everything is aligned properly from a licensing perspective. I’m tied up today and away tomorrow and Monday, but I’d love to chat next week if that works?   In the meantime, if you’re able to send through any details around Usage Agreement and Licensing, that would be wonderful.   Thanks so much again for the brand love and I hope you have a great rest of the day. Warm regards, Heidi x   From: Casey Guth <casey.guth@mamamia.com.au> Sent: Thursday, 26 February 2026 9:34 AM To: info <info@sagitine.com> Subject: MAMAMIA   Hi there, I was hoping someone from Marketing could call me on 0478181770. I noticed that the editorial piece we produced is being utilized in a Meta ad campaign. Because paid usage falls outside our initial editorial scope, we’ll need to formalize a Usage Agreement to ensure everything is cleared on the licensing side.     Look forward to chatting and I am also obsessed with your brand! we all are   Cheers   Casey      -- Casey Guth Senior NSW Sales Manager  m: 0478 181 770 a: Level 12, 580 George Street   Sydney NSW 2000 We pay our respects to the Gadigal people of the Eora Nation, whose land we live and work on.

response_body: v\:* {behavior:url(#default#VML);} o\:* {behavior:url(#default#VML);} w\:* {behavior:url(#default#VML);} .shape {behavior:url(#default#VML);} Thank you.  Should I send the files and starter boards through to the manufacturer before the call?  Or just wait to talk through on the call? Hides x   From: EMMA ELIZABETH <emma@emmaelizabethdesigns.com> Sent: Wednesday, 5 November 2025 3:15 PM To: Heidi Melville <heidi@sagitine.com> Subject: Materials : Coat Stands - V1 review   Hi Heidi.   Please see some thought starter boards for materials to discuss with the makers.   Thanks       On 5 Nov 2025, at 1:24 pm, Heidi Melville < heidi@sagitine.com > wrote:   Ahh!   Love, love.  These are great. Thank you so much.   If we’re sampling two options my two preferred options are V2 and V3.   V2: * What do you think of making the curve of the top less pronounced?  So it matches the curve of the front of the box which is almost the same as the front curve of the Timber Top.  I’ve snapped a couple of pics.  Tried to get my feet out but it didn’t quite work :) * How are you thinking we’ll treat the notches in the top of the curve so that a customer can evenly place out 5 hangers or 5 outfits?     V3: * Love it, no notes x     Overall: * Bottom of the design is great.  Think it will tie the pieces with the Stands beautifully. * I think we need at least one subtle hook somewhere on one of the side bits that a bag could be hung from.  What’d you think?   Let me know if you need anything else. Definitely think a chat with the manufacturer would be great. And let me know if you want to call tomorrow?   This is so exciting! Love these so much xx     From:   EMMA ELIZABETH < emma@emmaelizabethdesigns.com >   Sent:   Monday, 3 November 2025 4:13 PM To:   Heidi Melville < heidi@sagitine.com > Subject:   Coat Stands - V1 review   Hi Heidi.     Please see other two documents for review for notes.   One thing we need to discuss with your maker is the best way to execute where the connecting points join and how they join, is it just a hole and slot, or is it an inbuilt solid piece then slot into that skeleton.   Take a look and let me know your thoughts, might be worth jumping on a call with your makers to chat through before then re editing again the tech files ..?   Thanks. subject: RE: Materials : Coat Stands - V2 review
customer_question: I just wanted to share my feedback
response_body: Amazing, they look so good. I got this response re a meeting from my manufacturer: I am no problem to have technical call with you and your designer. However I concerned that I am not expert at production thus couldn’t give correct answer immediately. If possible will suggest your designer send email and list her questions that may be more efficient to solve her issues.   She’s so lovely but she always really evasive to have a phone call. She’s come out to Australia for a meet ’n greet so I know she’s a real person but I think she’s really uncomfortable about her English and gets a bit stressed when she doesn’t understand.   You cool to start with an email to accompany designs to get it rolling? She’ll pass it onto her partner factory.  It’ll take a bit more back and forth but I’m not stressed about timing.   Hope Bali is fab! x     From: EMMA ELIZABETH <emma@emmaelizabethdesigns.com> Sent: Thursday, 6 November 2025 1:22 PM To: Heidi Melville <heidi@sagitine.com> Subject: Re: Materials : Coat Stands - V2 review   Morning Heidi   Please find updated drawings   Thanks   On 5 Nov 2025, at 7:49 pm, Heidi Melville < heidi@sagitine.com > wrote:   Thank you.  Should I send the files and starter boards through to the manufacturer before the call?  Or just wait to talk through on the call? subject: RE: Melbourne display
customer_question: When will my order ship?
response_body: Good Morning Leticia, I hope you had a wonderful long weekend. Unfortunately, we don’t have any where in Melbourne at the moment that they're on display. We sometimes lend some stock to stores for window displays but we don't have any up in Melbourne. Was there a specific product you were looking at? I'm more than happy to send you any extra photos from our catalogue or if I have any customer photos I can send you those too. Let me know if that might help. We've got our Warehouse Sale on at the moment. It’s one of only 2 sales we do each year so it's a great time to shop if you do find something you love. The sale ends on April 30th. source_filename: RE_ Miami storage box in nougat.msg
subject: RE: Miami storage box in nougat
customer_question: I just wanted to share my feedback
response_body: Good Evening Lindsay,   I hope you’ve had a great start to the week.   Unfortunately we don’t have any plans to release the Miami Boxes in the Nougat colour at the moment, but I must admit they would be stunning. If the Off-White is a too pale for your colour scheme, take a look at the Miami in Olive.  It’s our second most popular box colour, after the Off-White, because it’s so versatile. The tone of the green really lends itself to matching with any greenery you have inside. It might be worth a little look.   And in the meantime, you’ve got me thinking about the Milan in Nougat. We work more than 12 months in advance on our colour releases so if we do release it, it won’t be soon but thank you for the inspiration.   If there’s anything else we can help you with please don’t hesitate to reach out. Warm Regards Heidi x   From: Lindsay Sloan <mrslindsaysloan@gmail.com> Sent: Monday, 14 July 2025 8:35 AM To: info <info@sagitine.com> Subject: Miami storage box in nougat   Hi,   Your boxes are utterly gorgeous. I am a writer and would love to get the Miami for desk organisation. Any chance it will be coming out in nougat colour?  The off white is too pale for my colour scheme.   Thank you Lindsay

subject: RE: My order
customer_question: What's the status of my pre-order?
response_body: Good Morning Amanda, Thank you so much for your message and your order. I hope you're having a wonderful week. You have purchased the Insert Set on pre-order with a current delivery estimation of January. We’ll keep you up to date over the next few weeks with shipment progress and any indication if that date will change. The Seafoam Leather Pulls should have arrived to you already though. I'm so sorry for the delay on those. We'll follow up with our delivery partner but in the meantime get replacements out to you today, so you should have them early next week. I hope information helps but please let me know if there’s anything at all I can help you with. And thank you again for supporting Sagitine. The jewellery box sample will be arriving later this week and we will get that out to you.   You should receive the two samples tomorrow at your PO Box.   Warm regards,   Kami Dougherty Head of Logistics Nextpack Pty Ltd       M 0429 499 025 E    kami@nextpack.com.au W www.nextpack.com.au A   Suite 302, 115 Military Rd Neutral Bay NSW 2089 Australia P  PO BOX 753 Neutral Bay NSW 2089 Australia       From: Heidi Melville < heidi@sagitine.com > Sent: Thursday, 30 October 2025 3:47 PM To: Sheree Camus < sheree@nextpack.com.au > Cc: Daisy Kuang < daisy@nextpack.com.au >; Kami Dougherty < kami@nextpack.com.au >; Carolina Briscoe < carolina@nextpack.com.au > Subject: RE: New Inserts   Thanks so much Sheree, The sample can go to:   Heidi Melville – Sagitine PO BOX 1002 Potts Point NSW 1335   And thank you so much for the bottom inserts, really appreciate it x   From: Sheree Camus < sheree@nextpack.com.au > Sent: Thursday, 30 October 2025 2:08 PM To: Heidi Melville < heidi@sagitine.com > Cc: Daisy Kuang < daisy@nextpack.com.au >; Kami Dougherty < kami@nextpack.com.au >; Carolina Briscoe < carolina@nextpack.com.au > Subject: RE: New Inserts   Hi Heidi,   Ok.  Noted about the treasure box.   Sample is on its way and arriving any day now.    What address would you like it sent to?   The 20 trays for the bottom of inserts we are providing FOC.     Best Regards   Sheree Camus Founder & Creative Director Nextpack Pty Ltd       M 0413 289 065 E   sheree@nextpack.com.au W nextpack.com.au T   02 9145 8620 A  Suite 302, 115 Military Road Neutral Bay NSW 2089 Australia P  PO BOX 753 Neutral Bay NSW 2089 Australia         From: Heidi Melville < heidi@sagitine.com > Sent: Thursday, 30 October 2025 9:55 AM To: Sheree Camus < sheree@nextpack.com.au > Cc: Daisy Kuang < daisy@nextpack.com.au >; Kami Dougherty < kami@nextpack.com.au > Subject: RE: New Inserts   Morning Sheree, It might sound a bit crazy but I’m going to leave the Leather Pull on the Treasure Chest. For the diff of $1.42USD I can make the min purchase value to receive the GWP a bit higher to cover. Then, if the Treasure Chest performs how I think it will, there could even be an option to turn it into a paid product later down the track. So, I want to put our best ‘product’ foot forward to see how it goes.   Thanks so much for getting that price for me though, I really appreciate it! Do you also want me to cost it up without the leather pull and just have a magnetised opening?  I reckon as this is a gift with purchase, you could get a way with no leather pull.   Let me know your thoughts.   Best Regards   Sheree Camus Founder & Creative Director Nextpack Pty Ltd       M 0413 289 065 E    sheree@nextpack.com.au W nextpack.com.au T   02 9145 8620 A  Suite 302, 115 Military Road Neutral Bay NSW 2089 Australia P  PO BOX 753 Neutral Bay NSW 2089 Australia         From: Heidi Melville < heidi@sagitine.com > Sent: Thursday, 23 October 2025 11:13 AM To: Sheree Camus < sheree@nextpack.com.au > Cc: Daisy Kuang < daisy@nextpack.com.au >; Kami Dougherty < kami@nextpack.com.au > Subject: RE: New Inserts   THanks so much Sheree, Really appreciate it.   From: Sheree Camus < sheree@nextpack.com.au > Sent: Wednesday, 22 October 2025 5:53 PM To: Heidi Melville < heidi@sagitine.com > Cc: Daisy Kuang < daisy@nextpack.com.au >; Kami Dougherty < kami@nextpack.com.au > Subject: RE: New Inserts   Ok noted.  Leave this with us.  I have put in a request to have the goods finished and ready to sail around the 10th of December .    Kami will work with your forwarder closer to the time to see vessel schedules so we can lock in a more firm date.   Sheree Camus Founder & Creative Director Nextpack Pty Ltd       M 0413 289 065 E    sheree@nextpack.com.au W nextpack.com.au T   02 9145 8620 A  Suite 302, 115 Military Road Neutral Bay NSW 2089 Australia P  PO BOX 753 Neutral Bay NSW 2089 Australia         From: Heidi Melville < heidi@sagitine.com > Sent: Wednesday, 22 October 2025 3:52 PM To: Sheree Camus < sheree@nextpack.com.au > Cc: Daisy Kuang < daisy@nextpack.com.au > Subject: RE: New Inserts   Thanks so much Sheree, I’m thinking I’ll launch them around Aug/Sep next year before peak season.  And yup, really want to get them right and not rush the development because I think they’ll do so well!!   Speaking of not rushing, appreciate we need the time for the Box order to get it right. But, I was hoping to ship a week or two earlier so I could have them on pre-order for a January delivery to customers.   Let me know if any earlier could be possible. I’ve planned a launch date later in 2026 so I’ll place them in the next order. Apologies, I thought I mentioned that in my order email.  I am sooo excited to launch them, but strategically it works better to wait. Hides x       From: Sheree Camus < sheree@nextpack.com.au > Sent: Tuesday, 21 October 2025 4:10 PM To: Heidi Melville < heidi@sagitine.com > Cc: Daisy Kuang < daisy@nextpack.com.au > Subject: New Inserts   Hi Heidi,   Re: The jewellery and make up inserts.  Didn’t see these on your PO.     Can you pls confirm the quantities so we can work on pricing.   Thanks   Best Regards   Sheree Camus Founder & Creative Director Nextpack Pty Ltd       M 0413 289 065 E    sheree@nextpack.com.au W nextpack.com.au T   02 9145 8620 A  Suite 302, 115 Military Road Neutral Bay NSW 2089 Australia P  PO BOX 753 Neutral Bay NSW 2089 Australia

subject: RE: New Order
customer_question: How do I assemble this?
response_body: Hi Emma, Thank you so much for your lovely message, and for taking the time to write. I’m so glad Maryann recommended us, that’s always the nicest way to discover Sagitine. Congratulations on the new cottage as well. Small homes really do make clever storage so important, and it sounds like you’re putting together a beautiful setup. You’ve actually reached out at a funny moment, we had a Flash Sale last week with 15% off everything, which unfortunately finished a few days ago. But given how thoughtfully you’ve put your order together (and Maryann’s lovely referral), I’d be very happy to honour the same 15% for you so you can complete your order. You can use the code EMMA15 at checkout. I’ll keep the code active for three days, so you have a little time to finalise everything and add the extra pieces you mentioned for the second bedroom. And if you’d like a hand choosing which Stands or Boxes might work best in the cottage spaces, please feel very welcome to email me, I’m always happy to help. Warm regards, Heidi x -----Original Message----- From: Emma Aucutt <emma.aucutt@icloud.com> Sent: Friday, 6 March 2026 11:19 PM To: info <info@sagitine.com> Subject: New Order Hi Heidi, I've just moved into a small cottage with no storage and I'm trying to find clever storage ideas. My lovely friend Maryann Bignall highly recommended your products. She has purchased from you before. I've put together an order and it's crept over $2000 which I'm struggling with as i would like to add some more products. I looked online for discount codes because I would like to be able to order more for another bedroom. Online one site mentioned if you sign up you are given a one off discount code. I'm praying this is true. I've subscribed to on your website but haven't received anything yet? I was hoping you could assist me as a discount code would really help me as it's becoming such a large order. Huge thanks Emma Aucutt 0498240267 Sydney

subject: RE: New Order
customer_question: How do I assemble this?
response_body: Morning Emma, Thank you so much for your lovely message. I’m so sorry to hear you’re going through such a lot at the moment, that sounds like an incredibly full plate to be carrying. Sending all my thoughts and good wishes for a quick return for your husband, what a terrible situation. I’m really glad the little gesture helped in some small way. Renovating and organising a home is a big job at the best of times, let alone with everything else you have happening. Please take it gently where you can. Wishing you all the very best with the surgery next month, and I hope the cottage starts to feel beautifully organised very soon. Warm regards, Heidi x -----Original Message----- From: Emma Aucutt <emma.aucutt@icloud.com> Sent: Saturday, 7 March 2026 9:15 AM To: info <info@sagitine.com> Subject: Re: New Order Bless you Heidi, I'm so so grateful. Kindness really make a difference at the moment. My husband is stranded in the Middle East and I'm scrambling in pain to finish renovating and organising my bedrooms because I need major spinal surgery in just over a month. So your kind gesture was such a nice thing to wake up to. Have a lovely weekend Emma

subject: RE: New York stand
customer_question: How do I assemble this?
response_body: Good Morning Gina,   Thank you so much for your message, that’s wonderful news your Stand has arrived.   I have attached the assembly instructions for you. It’s a really simple setup, you’ll just need an Allen key and a screwdriver.   You can also find all our instruction guides anytime on our website, with the product information (just in case you ever need them again). If you run into any trouble at all, please reach out. I'm more than happy to help.   And I hope you enjoy your gorgeous new Stand and thank you again for your support.   Warm regards, Heidi x     From: Gina Clark <mrsgmclark@gmail.com> Sent: Wednesday, 12 November 2025 9:08 PM To: info <info@sagitine.com> Subject: New York stand   Hi guys,   My delivery arrived today but I have no instructions on how to put it together.   Could you please send me a copy.

source_filename: RE_ Next Order & New Product Development (367).msg
subject: RE: Next Order & New Product Development
customer_question: Where is my order?
response_body: v\:* {behavior:url(#default#VML);} o\:* {behavior:url(#default#VML);} w\:* {behavior:url(#default#VML);} .shape {behavior:url(#default#VML);} Hello Yvette, I hope you had a lovely weekend. Thank you so much for the below.  I have organised for the Boxes to be picked up today. I’ve included 1 x Miami Storage Box and 2 x Milan Shoe Box. As soon as I have the tracking number I will send it through.   I’m excited to see how the new Stand works!   Warm Regards Heidi x     From: Great Modest <info@greatmodest.com.tw> Sent: Wednesday, 22 October 2025 7:17 PM To: Heidi Melville <heidi@sagitine.com>; 'GM YVETTE' <1322842122@qq.com> Cc: 'Great Modest' <info@greatmodest.com.tw> Subject: RE: Next Order & New Product Development   Hi Heidi,   Good day and hope you are well 😊   Thank you so much for the files. We are read on it and will send quote for your refer.   Please can you send Miami Box to address below?   Great Modest Enterprises Ltd. Address: No. 1, Mulian 1st Road, Tianxin, Tangxia Town, Dongguan City, Guangdong Province, China 523718 Contact: Mr. Chen +86 134 3148 9807 / Mr. Ning  +86 188 7773 4887   Besides, please can you help to send 1pc of Milan box as well? Our QC put the box in factory when last inspection however now the box is disappear. I am sorry to cause the inconvenience, it will avoid not happened again.   Once boxes sent please can you help to send tracking number to us?   Thank you very much   Best regards,   Yvette Hsu             Great Modest Enterprises Ltd. E: info@greatmodest.com.tw T: +886 4 2532 3976 M: +886 953 078 777   From: Heidi Melville < heidi@sagitine.com > Sent: Monday, October 20, 2025 3:21 AM To: Great Modest < info@greatmodest.com.tw >; 'GM YVETTE' < 1322842122@qq.com > Subject: RE: Next Order & New Product Development   Good Morning Yvette, I hope you had a fabulous weekend. Please find attached the files and the brief for the Melbourne Stand prototype. Let me know what the best address is to send a Miami Box to ensure the fitting is correct. Thank you so much for suggesting another payment term option.  I will have a look at those over the next couple of days and let you know. Warm Regards Heidi x   From: Great Modest < info@greatmodest.com.tw > Sent: Wednesday, 15 October 2025 3:06 PM To: Heidi Melville < heidi@sagitine.com >; 'GM YVETTE' < 1322842122@qq.com > Cc: 'Great Modest' < info@greatmodest.com.tw > Subject: RE: Next Order & New Product Development   Hello Heidi,   I went Xiamen and had a very relax time there, thank you.   About the payment, we are no problem to go with your opinion.   To think long term cooperation, we are pleased to provide another payment option for your choose. 40% deposit on order and 60% arrive in harbor before telex release.   Please can you assist to let us know what is suitable for you?   We are exciting to have files and brief of Melbourne from you this week soon!   Thank you very much and have a lovely day ❤   Best regards,   Yvette Hsu             Great Modest Enterprises Ltd. E: info@greatmodest.com.tw T: +886 4 2532 3976 M: +886 953 078 777   From: Heidi Melville < heidi@sagitine.com > Sent: Wednesday, October 15, 2025 4:58 AM To: Great Modest < info@greatmodest.com.tw >; 'GM YVETTE' < 1322842122@qq.com > Subject: RE: Next Order & New Product Development   Hello Yvette! I hope you had a wonderful time on your annual leave.   1. Thank you for letting me know the aluminium dimensions.   2. Thank you for checking in with price, I really appreciate it.   3. I very much understand that 45 days is too much but thank you for considering it and coming back with another option. I think previous terms were 50% on order and 50% arrive in harbour. Would you be open to: * 30% deposit on order * 20% before shipment * 50% arrive in harbour before telex release   4. I didn’t realise I didn’t have the Santigo Files from my designer so have asked for them.  I will send them over with a brief for the Melbourne Stand before the end of the week.     Thank you again and I hope you’re enjoying being back at work.   Warm Regards Heidi x       From: Great Modest < info@greatmodest.com.tw > Sent: Tuesday, 14 October 2025 5:47 PM To: Heidi Melville < heidi@sagitine.com >; 'GM YVETTE' < 1322842122@qq.com > Cc: 'Great Modest' < info@greatmodest.com.tw > Subject: RE: Next Order & New Product Development   Hello Heidi,   Good day :) Sorry about the late reply, I just back from annual leaving today.   ． We used 20 x 40mm aluminum tube for production.   ． About the price, I am checking with suppliers. Will let you know the confirmed charge this week.   ． Regard to the payment, 45 days after shipment is too long to run our business. How about reduce the deposit? It may assist to have some space during production time.   1/3 deposit after order confirmed 1/3 before shipment  1/3 ship arrive in your harbor and before telex release the container   ． I think it is not a problem to prototype Melbourne without drawing. Please can you assist to give the file for Santiago Stand and let us know what size you’d like to have first? We will discuss with supplier and let you know.   Thank you very much and looking forward to hearing from you   Best regards,   Yvette Hsu             Great Modest Enterprises Ltd. E: info@greatmodest.com.tw T: +886 4 2532 3976 M: +886 953 078 777   From: Heidi Melville < heidi@sagitine.com > Sent: Tuesday, October 14, 2025 5:11 AM To: 'GM YVETTE' < 1322842122@qq.com >; Great Modest < info@greatmodest.com.tw > Subject: RE: Next Order & New Product Development   Good Morning Yvette, I hope you’re really well.   Sorry to follow up, I just wanted to check that you’ve received the below. I’ve had a rush on orders over the last week and am keen to start preparing the next order with you.   Warm Regards Heidi x   From: Heidi Melville Sent: Friday, 10 October 2025 3:01 PM To: 'GM YVETTE' < 1322842122@qq.com >; Great Modest < info@greatmodest.com.tw > Subject: Next Order & New Product Development   Hello Yvette, I hope you’re having a wonderful week!   I have a few things I’d love your help with:   1. Coat Rack / Outfit Valet I have a designer working on drawings for the new Coat Rack (or Outfit Valet). They’ve asked if you could please share the specifications for the aluminium framing that’s used in our current stands? Wherever possible, they’d like to use the same materials to ensure consistency across the range.   2. Next Order Preparation I’d like to start preparing for the next order and am looking to order 100 units each of the Florence , Shanghai , and New York Stands. The business is growing really well, and the plan is to place two orders this year , one within the next month and another in about six months. I wanted to confirm that the pricing is still as follows in $USD: * Florence 8 Box Stand = $152.70 * Shanghai 14 Box Stand = $195.90 * New York 20 Box Stand = 250.40   I also wanted to check if you’d be open to slightly updated payment terms: ·         1/3 on order ·         1/3 on shipment ·         1/3 45 days after shipment This would help provide flexibility to sell some stock before the final payment is due. I completely understand this may add some pressure, but I wanted to ask, as some of my other suppliers work this way.   3. New Stand Prototype – “Melbourne” I have a new stand concept that I’d love to prototype, similar to how you created the Florence 8 Box Stand previously without detailed drawings. The new design will be a variation of the Santiago Stand (which we discontinued around two years ago). I’ve attached some images for reference. The new stand, which I’ll call Melbourne , will hold six Miami Boxes (which are larger than the Milan Boxes) in a single tower, with a total height of around 117 cm. All other design elements and materials would remain the same, apart from a slightly different timber top size. If I provide the design files for the Santiago Stand and send you a Miami Box , would it be possible for you to create a prototype for this new Melbourne Stand ?     Thank you so much, Yvette, I always appreciate your help and partnership. Looking forward to hearing your thoughts and excited to get our next order in!   Warm regards, Heidi Sagitine       Heidi Melville Director SAGITINE M: 0478 401 914 E:  heidi@sagitine.com       乾淨無病毒。 www.avast.com
