customer_question: Where is my order?
response_body: v\:* {behavior:url(#default#VML);} o\:* {behavior:url(#default#VML);} w\:* {behavior:url(#default#VML);} .shape {behavior:url(#default#VML);} Good Afternoon Yvette, I have good news that the boxes are in transit. Here is the tracking link - https://au.interparcel.com/tracking/AU6049133762   Cheers Heidi x   From: Heidi Melville Sent: Monday, 27 October 2025 9:37 AM To: Great Modest <info@greatmodest.com.tw>; 'GM YVETTE' <1322842122@qq.com> Subject: RE: Next Order & New Product Development   Hello Yvette, I hope you had a lovely weekend. Thank you so much for the below.  I have organised for the Boxes to be picked up today. I’ve included 1 x Miami Storage Box and 2 x Milan Shoe Box. As soon as I have the tracking number I will send it through.   I’m excited to see how the new Stand works!   Warm Regards Heidi x     From: Great Modest < info@greatmodest.com.tw > Sent: Wednesday, 22 October 2025 7:17 PM To: Heidi Melville < heidi@sagitine.com >; 'GM YVETTE' < 1322842122@qq.com > Cc: 'Great Modest' < info@greatmodest.com.tw > Subject: RE: Next Order & New Product Development   Hi Heidi,   Good day and hope you are well 😊   Thank you so much for the files. We are read on it and will send quote for your refer.   Please can you send Miami Box to address below?   Great Modest Enterprises Ltd. Address: No. 1, Mulian 1st Road, Tianxin, Tangxia Town, Dongguan City, Guangdong Province, China 523718 Contact: Mr. Chen +86 134 3148 9807 / Mr. Ning  +86 188 7773 4887   Besides, please can you help to send 1pc of Milan box as well? Our QC put the box in factory when last inspection however now the box is disappear. I am sorry to cause the inconvenience, it will avoid not happened again.   Once boxes sent please can you help to send tracking number to us?   Thank you very much   Best regards,   Yvette Hsu             Great Modest Enterprises Ltd. E: info@greatmodest.com.tw T: +886 4 2532 3976 M: +886 953 078 777   From: Heidi Melville < heidi@sagitine.com > Sent: Monday, October 20, 2025 3:21 AM To: Great Modest < info@greatmodest.com.tw >; 'GM YVETTE' < 1322842122@qq.com > Subject: RE: Next Order & New Product Development   Good Morning Yvette, I hope you had a fabulous weekend. Please find attached the files and the brief for the Melbourne Stand prototype. Let me know what the best address is to send a Miami Box to ensure the fitting is correct. Thank you so much for suggesting another payment term option.  I will have a look at those over the next couple of days and let you know. Warm Regards Heidi x   From: Great Modest < info@greatmodest.com.tw > Sent: Wednesday, 15 October 2025 3:06 PM To: Heidi Melville < heidi@sagitine.com >; 'GM YVETTE' < 1322842122@qq.com > Cc: 'Great Modest' < info@greatmodest.com.tw > Subject: RE: Next Order & New Product Development   Hello Heidi,   I went Xiamen and had a very relax time there, thank you.   About the payment, we are no problem to go with your opinion.   To think long term cooperation, we are pleased to provide another payment option for your choose. 40% deposit on order and 60% arrive in harbor before telex release.   Please can you assist to let us know what is suitable for you?   We are exciting to have files and brief of Melbourne from you this week soon!   Thank you very much and have a lovely day ❤   Best regards,   Yvette Hsu             Great Modest Enterprises Ltd. E: info@greatmodest.com.tw T: +886 4 2532 3976 M: +886 953 078 777   From: Heidi Melville < heidi@sagitine.com > Sent: Wednesday, October 15, 2025 4:58 AM To: Great Modest < info@greatmodest.com.tw >; 'GM YVETTE' < 1322842122@qq.com > Subject: RE: Next Order & New Product Development   Hello Yvette! I hope you had a wonderful time on your annual leave.   1. Thank you for letting me know the aluminium dimensions.   2. Thank you for checking in with price, I really appreciate it.   3. I very much understand that 45 days is too much but thank you for considering it and coming back with another option. I think previous terms were 50% on order and 50% arrive in harbour. Would you be open to: * 30% deposit on order * 20% before shipment * 50% arrive in harbour before telex release   4. I didn’t realise I didn’t have the Santigo Files from my designer so have asked for them.  I will send them over with a brief for the Melbourne Stand before the end of the week.     Thank you again and I hope you’re enjoying being back at work.   Warm Regards Heidi x       From: Great Modest < info@greatmodest.com.tw > Sent: Tuesday, 14 October 2025 5:47 PM To: Heidi Melville < heidi@sagitine.com >; 'GM YVETTE' < 1322842122@qq.com > Cc: 'Great Modest' < info@greatmodest.com.tw > Subject: RE: Next Order & New Product Development   Hello Heidi,   Good day :) Sorry about the late reply, I just back from annual leaving today.   ． We used 20 x 40mm aluminum tube for production.   ． About the price, I am checking with suppliers. Will let you know the confirmed charge this week.   ． Regard to the payment, 45 days after shipment is too long to run our business. How about reduce the deposit? It may assist to have some space during production time.   1/3 deposit after order confirmed 1/3 before shipment  1/3 ship arrive in your harbor and before telex release the container   ． I think it is not a problem to prototype Melbourne without drawing. Please can you assist to give the file for Santiago Stand and let us know what size you’d like to have first? We will discuss with supplier and let you know.   Thank you very much and looking forward to hearing from you   Best regards,   Yvette Hsu             Great Modest Enterprises Ltd. E: info@greatmodest.com.tw T: +886 4 2532 3976 M: +886 953 078 777   From: Heidi Melville < heidi@sagitine.com > Sent: Tuesday, October 14, 2025 5:11 AM To: 'GM YVETTE' < 1322842122@qq.com >; Great Modest < info@greatmodest.com.tw > Subject: RE: Next Order & New Product Development   Good Morning Yvette, I hope you’re really well.   Sorry to follow up, I just wanted to check that you’ve received the below. I’ve had a rush on orders over the last week and am keen to start preparing the next order with you.   Warm Regards Heidi x   From: Heidi Melville Sent: Friday, 10 October 2025 3:01 PM To: 'GM YVETTE' < 1322842122@qq.com >; Great Modest < info@greatmodest.com.tw > Subject: Next Order & New Product Development   Hello Yvette, I hope you’re having a wonderful week!   I have a few things I’d love your help with:   1. Coat Rack / Outfit Valet I have a designer working on drawings for the new Coat Rack (or Outfit Valet). They’ve asked if you could please share the specifications for the aluminium framing that’s used in our current stands? Wherever possible, they’d like to use the same materials to ensure consistency across the range.   2. Next Order Preparation I’d like to start preparing for the next order and am looking to order 100 units each of the Florence , Shanghai , and New York Stands. The business is growing really well, and the plan is to place two orders this year , one within the next month and another in about six months. I wanted to confirm that the pricing is still as follows in $USD: * Florence 8 Box Stand = $152.70 * Shanghai 14 Box Stand = $195.90 * New York 20 Box Stand = 250.40   I also wanted to check if you’d be open to slightly updated payment terms: ·         1/3 on order ·         1/3 on shipment ·         1/3 45 days after shipment This would help provide flexibility to sell some stock before the final payment is due. I completely understand this may add some pressure, but I wanted to ask, as some of my other suppliers work this way.   3. New Stand Prototype – “Melbourne” I have a new stand concept that I’d love to prototype, similar to how you created the Florence 8 Box Stand previously without detailed drawings. The new design will be a variation of the Santiago Stand (which we discontinued around two years ago). I’ve attached some images for reference. The new stand, which I’ll call Melbourne , will hold six Miami Boxes (which are larger than the Milan Boxes) in a single tower, with a total height of around 117 cm. All other design elements and materials would remain the same, apart from a slightly different timber top size. If I provide the design files for the Santiago Stand and send you a Miami Box , would it be possible for you to create a prototype for this new Melbourne Stand ?     Thank you so much, Yvette, I always appreciate your help and partnership. Looking forward to hearing your thoughts and excited to get our next order in!   Warm regards, Heidi Sagitine       Heidi Melville Director SAGITINE M: 0478 401 914 E:  heidi@sagitine.com       乾淨無病毒。 www.avast.com

source_filename: RE_ Notes and briefs from yesterday (426).msg
subject: RE: Notes and briefs from yesterday
customer_question: What's the status of my pre-order?
response_body: v\:* {behavior:url(#default#VML);} o\:* {behavior:url(#default#VML);} w\:* {behavior:url(#default#VML);} .shape {behavior:url(#default#VML);} Hi Sheree, I’ve updated the order with the Pantone colours for sampling and a couple of other ‘products’. Here’s the summary:   New ‘products’ 1. Vegan Leather Pulls – I get asked occasionally if we do non leather pulls for the Boxes.  I was hoping to order 100 each of the Black and the Cream Pulls in a Vegan Leather alternative if that’s possible? 2. Just the bottom of the Insert Sets for the Belts.  The way they were packed in cartons of 20 for the last order meant that a few of them got squashed. So I have 20 of the Belt Insert top compartment, and instead of dumping them I thought If I could get 20 of just the bottom with this order, I can package them up and use them.   Pantone Samples. We have a few ‘different’ ones this time, so excited to see how they turn out. 1. MILAN BOX: Forest Green - 553 C 2. LEATHER PULL: Maple - 4695 C 3. MILAN BOX: Mustard - 7555 U 4. MILAN BOX: Plum - 518 C 5. MILAN BOX: Seafoam - 324 U     Next Steps: * Pricing for the Tray Bottom only. * Can the Treasure Chest be flat packed? * Pricing for the Treasure Chest. * Double Happiness Icon and type of embossing for LNY Boxes   I’m keen to get this order in as soon as possible so I can have most of the products on sale as pre-order for November and also so manufacturing doesn’t run into Chinese New Year, so let me know if you need anything else from me.   So excited that these orders keep growing too! Heidi x   From: Heidi Melville Sent: Tuesday, 23 September 2025 4:42 PM To: 'Sheree Camus' <sheree@nextpack.com.au> Cc: Stewart Melville <Stewart@sagitine.com> Subject: RE: Notes and briefs from yesterday   Afternoon Sheree, Ah that’s great news.  I hope the manufacturers are enjoying the ‘prototypes’ as much as we did. And I have the first draft of our next order for you!   I’ve done a bunch of planning for next year’s marketing calendar so know which of the exciting new items I’ll get live at the beginning of the year.   Here’s the summary: All the details are attached.   And a few notes. * I’m going to take a break from the Rose boxes for an order.  They are the least popular of the Signature Colours (nougat has clearly overtaken it), so there are no units of Rose in this order. * I’ll hold off launching the Make-up and Jewellery insert sets until later in 2026, so will wait for the next order before we do production quantities of those. * I’ve got the Treasure Chests in this order, but we still need to confirm a few things like if we can flatpack it. * As well as confirming the Double Happy icon and embossing for the ‘Cherry Happy’ Boxes for LNY26. * I haven’t got the Pantones in here for the next run of Sample colours (Forest Green, Plum, Mustard, Seafoam) but I’ll work on those this week.   Cartons and markings. * The only carton size update is to the Miami 2 pack.  It was originally packaged with the Miami’s on top of one anther but the last order arrived with them packaged side by side.  Can we please revert to original packaging. * And just some updates on the carton markings.  I’ve added details attached but in a nutshell, just take out the information we don’t need.   That’s it.  Let me know if you have any questions and I’ll get working on those sample pantones. Thanks a mill Sheree Heidi xx   Oh and the basket, I cannot believe how much I’m using it!! It’s a staple in my week now.  Never knew I needed it so badly. Thank you!   From: Sheree Camus < sheree@nextpack.com.au > Sent: Friday, 12 September 2025 1:45 PM To: Heidi Melville < heidi@sagitine.com > Cc: Stewart Melville < Stewart@sagitine.com > Subject: RE: Notes and briefs from yesterday   Hi Team,   All your handicrafts are now overseas with our box manufacturer so we will get started on these exciting new items!!!   So glad you love the basket Heidi.  People are always saying it’s the basket they didn’t know they needed!!   You’ll start to see some pics over the next few weeks as we work through making the new samples.    Best Regards   Sheree Camus Founder & Creative Director Nextpack Pty Ltd       M 0413 289 065 E    sheree@nextpack.com.au W nextpack.com.au T   02 9145 8620 A  Suite 302, 115 Military Road Neutral Bay NSW 2089 Australia P  PO BOX 753 Neutral Bay NSW 2089 Australia         From: Heidi Melville < heidi@sagitine.com > Sent: Thursday, 4 September 2025 4:51 PM To: Sheree Camus < sheree@nextpack.com.au > Cc: Stewart Melville < Stewart@sagitine.com > Subject: Notes and briefs from yesterday   Hi Sheree, It was so wonderful to see you yesterday. Thank you so much for the gorgeous basket - I’ve already used it and love it.   We talked through 5 different topics yesterday; below are the notes I took and the briefs for the new products.   1. Nougat Boxes turning Green/Blue 2. Treasure Chest 3. Insert Set – Make-up 4. Insert Set – Jewellery 5. Cherry Box for LNY offer 2026   And here is a summary of our next steps and actions: * Sheree: To work with the manufacturers on a potential coating solution for the discolouration of the Nougat. * Sheree: Can the Treasure Chest come flat if it’s flocked? * Sheree: To let Heidi know what she thinks of the two colour options for the Make-up Insert Set. * Sheree: To begin sampling on the Insert Sets. * Sheree: To confirm which double happy icon would be the best and what type of embossing would be recommended.     1. We’ve had an issue with the Nougat boxes fading to a green or sometimes greeny blue colour. Stew and I dropped off 8 boxes that were from four different circumstances.   Some were full sun, some had never been near the sun. Next Steps: Sheree to work with manufacturers on a coating to prevent the colour change, understanding that fading is inevitable and the boxes shouldn’t be left in direct sun .   2. Treasure Chest Brief - Attached 3. Insert Set – Make-up - Attached 4. Insert Set – Jewellery – Attached 5. Cherry Box with Double Happiness Symbol – which symbol and how to emboss     I’m working on confirming the order before the end of September. Let me know if you need anything else from me in the meantime. Thanks so much again Heidi x       Heidi Melville Director SAGITINE M: 0478 401 914 E:  heidi@sagitine.com

source_filename: RE_ Notes and briefs from yesterday (427).msg
subject: RE: Notes and briefs from yesterday
customer_question: I just wanted to share my feedback
response_body: v\:* {behavior:url(#default#VML);} o\:* {behavior:url(#default#VML);} w\:* {behavior:url(#default#VML);} .shape {behavior:url(#default#VML);} Oh wow Sheree, Thank you so much! Honestly, I think they both look great.   I agree that the outside colour in a white and the inside colour in the 50% MM looks better though. I’ve been thinking about how I assume most people will use the inserts in the Milan Boxes, but honestly, they look so good we might find people put them on their bathroom countertop.   So, let’s go with the outside in the white of the other inserts and the inside in the MM at 50% for the first run. Then we can always change it to be all Mocha Mousse if we find we get feedback that it would be more practical that way.   Thanks again. And I hope School holidays are going okay. I made Elle come and do some local deliveries with Stew and I yesterday! She loved it, not sure she’ll still love it next week :)     Heidi x       From: Sheree Camus <sheree@nextpack.com.au> Sent: Monday, 29 September 2025 3:05 PM To: Heidi Melville <heidi@sagitine.com> Cc: Stewart Melville <Stewart@sagitine.com> Subject: RE: Notes and briefs from yesterday   Hi Heidi,   Just been playing around with the make-up insert colours. Below is swatch of Pantone Mocha Mousse at 50%.  In terms of aesthetics, I’m leaning more towards external colour to match your current inserts with the internal mocha mousse 50% or even lighter.   Internal and external all 50% mocha mousse would be more practical but I am not sure it looks as nice.   Pic of that look also below.   Which do you prefer?         Sheree Camus Founder & Creative Director Nextpack Pty Ltd       M 0413 289 065 E   sheree@nextpack.com.au W nextpack.com.au T   02 9145 8620 A  Suite 302, 115 Military Road Neutral Bay NSW 2089 Australia P  PO BOX 753 Neutral Bay NSW 2089 Australia         From: Heidi Melville < heidi@sagitine.com > Sent: Monday, 29 September 2025 11:52 AM To: Sheree Camus < sheree@nextpack.com.au > Cc: Stewart Melville < Stewart@sagitine.com > Subject: RE: Notes and briefs from yesterday   Hi Sheree,   Thanks so much for the below.  I had thought initially that it should just be the outside, but looking at how the bottom try of the last set of Insert Sets were made I wonder if it will look ‘neater’ if the whole set is the same colour.   It’s a long-winded way of saying – which ever way you think will look better.  I’m happy with it all being one colour or have just the inside the mocha/latte colour. Heidi x   From: Sheree Camus < sheree@nextpack.com.au > Sent: Monday, 29 September 2025 11:49 AM To: Heidi Melville < heidi@sagitine.com > Cc: Stewart Melville < Stewart@sagitine.com > Subject: RE: Notes and briefs from yesterday   Hi Heidi,   Quick question about the make up set inserts.  The Latte or Mocha Mousse colour is for the internals only?  Externally we are the same colour as belts and sunglasses inserts?  Pls correct me if I am wrong.    I’ll come back to you on recommended latte v mocha once I have this confirmation.   Thanks   Best Regards   Sheree Camus Founder & Creative Director Nextpack Pty Ltd       M 0413 289 065 E   sheree@nextpack.com.au W nextpack.com.au T   02 9145 8620 A  Suite 302, 115 Military Road Neutral Bay NSW 2089 Australia P  PO BOX 753 Neutral Bay NSW 2089 Australia         From: Heidi Melville < heidi@sagitine.com > Sent: Thursday, 4 September 2025 4:51 PM To: Sheree Camus < sheree@nextpack.com.au > Cc: Stewart Melville < Stewart@sagitine.com > Subject: Notes and briefs from yesterday   Hi Sheree, It was so wonderful to see you yesterday. Thank you so much for the gorgeous basket - I’ve already used it and love it.   We talked through 5 different topics yesterday; below are the notes I took and the briefs for the new products.   1. Nougat Boxes turning Green/Blue 2. Treasure Chest 3. Insert Set – Make-up 4. Insert Set – Jewellery 5. Cherry Box for LNY offer 2026   And here is a summary of our next steps and actions: * Sheree: To work with the manufacturers on a potential coating solution for the discolouration of the Nougat. * Sheree: Can the Treasure Chest come flat if it’s flocked? * Sheree: To let Heidi know what she thinks of the two colour options for the Make-up Insert Set. * Sheree: To begin sampling on the Insert Sets. * Sheree: To confirm which double happy icon would be the best and what type of embossing would be recommended.     1. We’ve had an issue with the Nougat boxes fading to a green or sometimes greeny blue colour. Stew and I dropped off 8 boxes that were from four different circumstances.   Some were full sun, some had never been near the sun. Next Steps: Sheree to work with manufacturers on a coating to prevent the colour change, understanding that fading is inevitable and the boxes shouldn’t be left in direct sun .   2. Treasure Chest Brief - Attached 3. Insert Set – Make-up - Attached 4. Insert Set – Jewellery – Attached 5. Cherry Box with Double Happiness Symbol – which symbol and how to emboss     I’m working on confirming the order before the end of September. Let me know if you need anything else from me in the meantime. Thanks so much again Heidi x       Heidi Melville Director SAGITINE M: 0478 401 914 E:  heidi@sagitine.com

response_body: v\:* {behavior:url(#default#VML);} o\:* {behavior:url(#default#VML);} w\:* {behavior:url(#default#VML);} .shape {behavior:url(#default#VML);} Sounds like a great plan, Thanks Sheree   From: Sheree Camus <sheree@nextpack.com.au> Sent: Wednesday, 1 October 2025 1:19 PM To: Heidi Melville <heidi@sagitine.com> Cc: Stewart Melville <Stewart@sagitine.com> Subject: RE: Notes and briefs from yesterday   Hi Heidi,   We’ll start with blank mock ups of the inserts first but when we do a printed version of the make up insert we’ll do the half/half colourway as discussed and yes if you have any negative feedback about the colour getting too dirty we can def adjust in follow up production runs.   That is such a cute photo of Elle and Stewart.  Those little pigtails!! Miss that adorable age.   Best Regards   Sheree Camus Founder & Creative Director Nextpack Pty Ltd       M 0413 289 065 E    sheree@nextpack.com.au W nextpack.com.au T   02 9145 8620 A  Suite 302, 115 Military Road Neutral Bay NSW 2089 Australia P  PO BOX 753 Neutral Bay NSW 2089 Australia         From: Heidi Melville < heidi@sagitine.com > Sent: Tuesday, 30 September 2025 8:11 AM To: Sheree Camus < sheree@nextpack.com.au > Cc: Stewart Melville < Stewart@sagitine.com > Subject: RE: Notes and briefs from yesterday   Oh wow Sheree, Thank you so much! Honestly, I think they both look great.   I agree that the outside colour in a white and the inside colour in the 50% MM looks better though. I’ve been thinking about how I assume most people will use the inserts in the Milan Boxes, but honestly, they look so good we might find people put them on their bathroom countertop.   So, let’s go with the outside in the white of the other inserts and the inside in the MM at 50% for the first run. Then we can always change it to be all Mocha Mousse if we find we get feedback that it would be more practical that way.   Thanks again. And I hope School holidays are going okay. I made Elle come and do some local deliveries with Stew and I yesterday! She loved it, not sure she’ll still love it next week :)     Heidi x       From: Sheree Camus < sheree@nextpack.com.au > Sent: Monday, 29 September 2025 3:05 PM To: Heidi Melville < heidi@sagitine.com > Cc: Stewart Melville < Stewart@sagitine.com > Subject: RE: Notes and briefs from yesterday   Hi Heidi,   Just been playing around with the make-up insert colours. Below is swatch of Pantone Mocha Mousse at 50%.  In terms of aesthetics, I’m leaning more towards external colour to match your current inserts with the internal mocha mousse 50% or even lighter.   Internal and external all 50% mocha mousse would be more practical but I am not sure it looks as nice.   Pic of that look also below.   Which do you prefer?         Sheree Camus Founder & Creative Director Nextpack Pty Ltd       M 0413 289 065 E   sheree@nextpack.com.au W nextpack.com.au T   02 9145 8620 A  Suite 302, 115 Military Road Neutral Bay NSW 2089 Australia P  PO BOX 753 Neutral Bay NSW 2089 Australia         From: Heidi Melville < heidi@sagitine.com > Sent: Monday, 29 September 2025 11:52 AM To: Sheree Camus < sheree@nextpack.com.au > Cc: Stewart Melville < Stewart@sagitine.com > Subject: RE: Notes and briefs from yesterday   Hi Sheree,   Thanks so much for the below.  I had thought initially that it should just be the outside, but looking at how the bottom try of the last set of Insert Sets were made I wonder if it will look ‘neater’ if the whole set is the same colour.   It’s a long-winded way of saying – which ever way you think will look better.  I’m happy with it all being one colour or have just the inside the mocha/latte colour. Heidi x   From: Sheree Camus < sheree@nextpack.com.au > Sent: Monday, 29 September 2025 11:49 AM To: Heidi Melville < heidi@sagitine.com > Cc: Stewart Melville < Stewart@sagitine.com > Subject: RE: Notes and briefs from yesterday   Hi Heidi,   Quick question about the make up set inserts.  The Latte or Mocha Mousse colour is for the internals only?  Externally we are the same colour as belts and sunglasses inserts?  Pls correct me if I am wrong.    I’ll come back to you on recommended latte v mocha once I have this confirmation.   Thanks   Best Regards   Sheree Camus Founder & Creative Director Nextpack Pty Ltd       M 0413 289 065 E   sheree@nextpack.com.au W nextpack.com.au T   02 9145 8620 A  Suite 302, 115 Military Road Neutral Bay NSW 2089 Australia P  PO BOX 753 Neutral Bay NSW 2089 Australia         From: Heidi Melville < heidi@sagitine.com > Sent: Thursday, 4 September 2025 4:51 PM To: Sheree Camus < sheree@nextpack.com.au > Cc: Stewart Melville < Stewart@sagitine.com > Subject: Notes and briefs from yesterday   Hi Sheree, It was so wonderful to see you yesterday. Thank you so much for the gorgeous basket - I’ve already used it and love it.   We talked through 5 different topics yesterday; below are the notes I took and the briefs for the new products.   1. Nougat Boxes turning Green/Blue 2. Treasure Chest 3. Insert Set – Make-up 4. Insert Set – Jewellery 5. Cherry Box for LNY offer 2026   And here is a summary of our next steps and actions: * Sheree: To work with the manufacturers on a potential coating solution for the discolouration of the Nougat. * Sheree: Can the Treasure Chest come flat if it’s flocked? * Sheree: To let Heidi know what she thinks of the two colour options for the Make-up Insert Set. * Sheree: To begin sampling on the Insert Sets. * Sheree: To confirm which double happy icon would be the best and what type of embossing would be recommended.     1. We’ve had an issue with the Nougat boxes fading to a green or sometimes greeny blue colour. Stew and I dropped off 8 boxes that were from four different circumstances.   Some were full sun, some had never been near the sun. Next Steps: Sheree to work with manufacturers on a coating to prevent the colour change, understanding that fading is inevitable and the boxes shouldn’t be left in direct sun .   2. Treasure Chest Brief - Attached 3. Insert Set – Make-up - Attached 4. Insert Set – Jewellery – Attached 5. Cherry Box with Double Happiness Symbol – which symbol and how to emboss     I’m working on confirming the order before the end of September. Let me know if you need anything else from me in the meantime. Thanks so much again Heidi x       Heidi Melville Director SAGITINE M: 0478 401 914 E:  heidi@sagitine.com

subject: RE: Nougat 20 box
customer_question: How do I assemble this?
response_body: Good Morning Anna, Thank you so much for your email. That should be no problem at all, but just confirming that by next Thursday you mean Thursday April 10th. If that is the case and you can place the order today, we'll get your order on its way to you. There's a slight possibility you might receive it by the end of this week, but to be sure we'd forecast receiving your order towards the beginning of next week. Hope that helps and please let us know if there's anything else at all I can help with. Warm Regards Heidi x -----Original Message----- From: Anna O <annaormrod@gmail.com> Sent: Tuesday, 1 April 2025 8:35 AM To: info <info@sagitine.com> Subject: Nougat 20 box Hi team I have a big request. I’m in Ballarat VIC until next Thursday. If I place an order today, is there somehow to have it delivered before then? Thank you Anna

subject: RE: Nougat Boxes - quality issue
customer_question: I just wanted to share my feedback
response_body: v\:* {behavior:url(#default#VML);} o\:* {behavior:url(#default#VML);} w\:* {behavior:url(#default#VML);} .shape {behavior:url(#default#VML);} Oh Rebecca, thank you so much, your message truly made my day.   We care so deeply about what we create, and even more about the homes our pieces end up in. We want every customer to absolutely love their Sagitine pieces, and if something isn’t quite right, it matters to us that we fix it properly. Sometimes things do go wrong, it’s part of running a business. But we feel incredibly lucky to have such thoughtful, understanding customers. The way you’ve handled this means more than you probably realise.   Take your time deciding what you’d prefer, and when you’re ready, just let me know. Thank you again, Heidi x   From: Rebecca Hegarty <gibbsreb@gmail.com> Sent: Thursday, 19 February 2026 2:40 PM To: info <info@sagitine.com> Subject: Re: Nougat Boxes - quality issue   I'll have a little think and let you know, but I wanted to let you know I am so impressed with your customer service. Thank you for responding so quickly and nicely, while also acknowledging a fault in a small batch during manufacturing.    I really appreciate it.   Regards, Rebecca   On Thu, 19 Feb 2026, 13:53 info, < info@sagitine.com > wrote: Hi Rebecca,   Thank you again for reaching out, and I’m so sorry you’ve experienced this.   I’ve checked your order and can see you purchased the Florence 8-Box Stand in Nougat in April last year, just confirming this is the piece you’re referring to?   We have seen a small batch in Nougat that hasn’t aged as beautifully as we expect, even when kept out of direct sunlight. While it’s not common, it is something we identified in a limited run, and it’s absolutely not the standard we hold ourselves to.  I would truly love to make this right for you.   We now have our updated Nougat Boxes in stock, which include an additional UV protectant in the finish. I’m very happy to arrange a full swap of your existing 8 Boxes for the new Nougat version, of course at no charge. Alternatively, if you’d prefer a different colour altogether, I’d be just as happy to organise that for you.   There’s no rush at all, have a think and let me know what you’d love. Once confirmed, I’ll arrange everything from our end to make it as seamless as possible. Thank you again for bringing this to me, Rebecca. I’m so grateful you reached out so we can resolve it properly.   Warm regards, Heidi x   Heidi Melville Owner SAGITINE

response_body: v\:* {behavior:url(#default#VML);} o\:* {behavior:url(#default#VML);} w\:* {behavior:url(#default#VML);} .shape {behavior:url(#default#VML);} Jamie-Lee!! These are absolutely perfect. Thank you so so much. xx   From: Jamie-Lee Burns <jamielee@mademois-elle.com> Sent: Wednesday, 29 October 2025 3:55 PM To: Heidi Melville <heidi@sagitine.com> Subject: Re: November collaboration with Sagitine   Hi Heidi,   It was really nice (bar not feeling 100%) - my uncle lives there and it's where I grew up so always good to get in a little trip home, this time to celebrate his birthday.   Beautiful! That would have been such a great trip! Waiheke is stunning.    Okay so I've recorded the VOs - I checked the IG Stories and I'd filmed them more thinking about sharing them to my stories so I rambled on a little whereas the VO is much more succinct. See attached. I've done two variations for the second one, both including a little extra bit at the end which you can easily chop off :)   Let me know if I need to re-record; I can do it tomorrow morning x   On Tue, Oct 28, 2025 at 11:50 AM Heidi Melville < heidi@sagitine.com > wrote: Hi Jamie-Lee, Oh I hope Wellington was lovely.  My parents were just on Waiheke Island for the weekend.  They can’t stop raving about it, absolutely loved every minute.   Whichever is easiest for you.  So happy for you to cut the voice to camera you’ve done is that’s easy, or send through the VO’s. I’m really after two sale pieces, one I can use for the pre-sale excitement period, so Sunday and Monday, and then the second piece talking to the sale being on for the rest of the sale period.   Let me know what works best for you. And yes! All ready to go for Sunday. Heidi x   From: Jamie-Lee Burns < jamielee@mademois-elle.com > Sent: Monday, 27 October 2025 11:22 AM To: Heidi Melville < heidi@sagitine.com > Subject: Re: November collaboration with Sagitine   Hi Heidi,   Hope you had the best weekend! Sorry for the delay on my side, I had a quick trip to Wellington for my uncle's birthday.   That is the best feedback, I'm so happy to hear! So all set to go live on Sunday then :)   Coincidentally, I did film a voice to camera about the sale starting for IG Stories so I can edit that and share with you if you like to see what you think?   Otherwise yes, I can record both of those voice overs. I'm still a little sniffly so if you can wait a day or two my voice might sound a little cleaner, otherwise I can record today. Did you need any other B Roll?   Kindest Jamie-Lee     On Fri, Oct 24, 2025 at 10:28 AM Heidi Melville < heidi@sagitine.com > wrote: Oh, my goodness Jamie-Lee,   I’m never surprised at how absolutely perfect your content is, but I’m always wowed by it and so so grateful. This is all brilliant. I love it.  Thank you. I’m happy not to mention the sale in the reel caption.  I think the caption is perfect how it is. I think all the content and captions are perfect xx If possible, would I be able to ask for two extra voiceovers? I’d love to make a 15-30 second cut of the reel with a sale VO that I can use in ads for the hype phase and the end phase of the sale based on your IG Story 1 caption.     VO ONE:   The sale PSA you are going to want to mark your calendar.   Sagitine’s Black Friday sale kicks off Tuesday 4 November. EVERYTHING will be on sale (mark downs are up to 40% off) - it’s their biggest sale of the year and stock moves *fast* so if you have your eye on anything, I recommend building your cart now so you’re ready to shop once the sale goes live.    VO TWO: Sagitine’s Black Friday sale is currently on. EVERYTHING is on sale (mark downs are up to 40% off) - it’s their biggest sale of the year, and one of their only sales of the year. Now is a great time if you’ve been thinking about adding Sagitine to your home.   Let me know if that’s okay. And I’m totally happy to cut the vid myself so would just need the VO in a audio file.   Thank you again Jamie-Lee. It’s always such a pleasure working with you Heidi x       From: Jamie-Lee Burns < jamielee@mademois-elle.com > Sent: Thursday, 23 October 2025 3:00 PM To: Heidi Melville < heidi@sagitine.com > Subject: Re: November collaboration with Sagitine   Hi Heidi,   Thank you so much; I'm still recovering - the cough just won't quit! Looking forward to properly getting my voice back.   You're too good, thank you. I wanted to share with you the reel and stories for review - content is uploaded here:  https://www.dropbox.com/scl/fo/ninapx1fiekhyrv8usegl/AGJLeknRmNAFLWAxod13QGs?rlkey=ywvmi5w3lb8lmfime3q6kffyf&st=erbqh7x6&dl=0   Proposed captions are below. I didn't mention the sale in the IG Reel caption but let me know if you'd like me to weave this in?   Looking forward to hearing your thoughts!   Kindest Jamie-Lee     IG REEL Answering my most frequently asked question today; where my beautiful shoe storage is from (and what else I keep in there!). It’s the Shanghai 14-Box Stand from @sagitine (I have two stacked side-by-side) with off-white boxes and cream leather pull tabs, though half the fun is in curating your colour combo (the olive boxes are especially striking!).    For me these strike that perfect balance of being both practical *and* chic, and the sky’s the limit on what you can store inside. I mostly store my off-season and special occasion shoes in the boxes, and recently have started to use it to store smaller bags to keep them protected from potential light damage. I have a couple of Sagitine’s inserts so I can store sunglasses and belts/silk scarves/small accessories, and they’re also home to my stationary overflow and wardrobe maintenance kit.   Comment LINK & I’ll send you the details of the exact one I have 💌☺️ [AD]     IG STORY 1 The sale PSA you are going to want to mark your calendars for 👀 @sagitine   Sagitine’s Black Friday sale kicks off Tuesday 4 November. EVERYTHING will be on sale (mark downs are up to 40% off) - it’s their biggest sale of the year and stock moves *fast* so if you have your eye on anything, I recommend building your cart now so you’re ready to shop once the sale goes live   SHOP SAGITINE HERE: https://sagitine.com/shop     IG STORY 2 I have the Shanghai 14 Box Stand (x2) which you’ll spy in the back of *most* of my videos and perhaps no surprise where it’s from is one of my FAQs!   It’s one of my favourite furniture pieces in our home as it is the perfect blend of form and function (she’s practical AND chic) so if you’ve been eyeing it up, you won’t want to sleep on this sale 👀   @sagitine   THESE ARE THE STANDS I HAVE: https://sagitine.com/stands/shanghai-14-box-stand-white-1   IG STORY 3 You can also purchase the boxes separately & there are two sizes; the stands have the smaller sized boxes which are perfect for storing and protecting your shoes (you can easily get two pairs in a box!) but you can keep small tech, sunglasses, jewellery, small accessories, mini bags etc in there too.   @sagitine ’s most popular styles tend to sell out *QUICK* so set an alarm as this is definitely one you don’t want to miss!   DON’T MISS OUT: https://sagitine.com/shop     On Tue, Oct 21, 2025 at 5:59 AM Heidi Melville < heidi@sagitine.com > wrote: Good Morning Jamie-Lee, Oh no, I hope you’re okay. That’s terrible news, InfA is the worst. Absolutely no worries at all to share content later in the week. Please don’t push yourself and end up sicker either.  If Wednesday doesn’t work and it needs to be later that’s absolutely fine.   Rest up and I hope you’re back to full health soon. Warm Regards   Heidi x     From: Jamie-Lee Burns < jamielee@mademois-elle.com > Sent: Monday, 20 October 2025 11:18 AM To: Heidi Melville < heidi@sagitine.com > Subject: Re: November collaboration with Sagitine   Hi Heidi,   Hope you had a great weekend!   Mine was very quiet, I got influenza A at the end of last week so spent it in bed trying to recover. My throat is still incredibly sore/scratchy so not quite in the best place to record a VO. Are you okay for me to share content for review on Wednesday instead? I hope that's alright with you!   Kindest Jamie-Lee   On Tue, Oct 14, 2025 at 11:59 AM Heidi Melville < heidi@sagitine.com > wrote: Thanks a mill Jamie-Lee, That timing is perfect xx   From: Jamie-Lee Burns < jamielee@mademois-elle.com > Sent: Tuesday, 14 October 2025 11:50 AM To: Heidi Melville < heidi@sagitine.com > Subject: Re: November collaboration with Sagitine   Hi Heidi   And same to you! Very excited for this. Thank you so much for sending over a detailed brief - this all looks really straightforward. Yes I think iPhone imagery looks a lot more organic/natural. Just upgraded to the 17 Pro Max and gosh it makes a difference!    I'm hoping to shoot this week and will have edits to you at the start of next week, does that time line work for you?   If I have any other questions I'll let you know.   Chat soon! Jamie-Lee   On Mon, Oct 13, 2025 at 8:24 AM Heidi Melville < heidi@sagitine.com > wrote: Good Morning Jamie-Lee, I hope you had a fabulous weekend. I’m genuinely so happy we get to work together again.   Below is the full brief, let me know if you have any questions or thoughts. Your content always captures Sagitine so beautifully, and I can’t wait to see what you create this time. Heidi x     CAMPAIGN OVERVIEW: The purpose is to build anticipation for our Black Friday / Cyber Monday Sale, which runs for the whole month of November. The sale officially starts Tuesday, November 4th at 8am, with up to 40% off everything (prices marked). It’s our biggest sale of the year, and we tend to sell out of favourites early, so we’re focusing on driving excitement ahead of launch day.     Pronunciation Notes & Considerations Sagitine = Sa-Gi-Teen * Sa → as in Saddle * Gi → as in Giraffe * Teen → as in Teenager   A small but important note, please try to refer to them as Boxes rather than Drawers. Because they’re so beautiful, people sometimes assume they behave like traditional drawers that slide out on runners. But Sagitine Boxes are removable storage boxes designed to be taken in and out of the stand. This flexibility means you can easily move them around, access them fully, and the snug fit helps protect your pieces from dust.   DELIVERABLES: * 1 x Reel — focus on the product rather than the sale to give the piece longevity. * 1 x 3-frame Story — focus on the sale announcement and urgency messaging .     DETAILS: Reel Love your idea of framing this as “My most asked question” it’s so authentic to you and perfectly aligned with what people want to know. The main purpose is to showcase: * The product itself. * How you personally use them and what’s inside them. * If it feels natural, a quick visual of how the Boxes sit within (not affixed to) the frame, highlighting their flexibility and that the snug fit helps protect what’s inside. Please feel free to approach this however feels most you.  The goal is to hero the product and create a piece that feels timeless, not just sale-specific.  This content piece will be used to give people that are in the ‘interest’ or ‘considering’ phases reasons to convert outside of value.     Story The goal of the Story is to drive excitement and awareness for the sale. Your idea of combining two stills and one short video is perfect, it’ll give a lovely mix of polish and movement.   Key messages: * The Sagitine Sale starts in just a couple of days - Tuesday, November 4th. * It’s our biggest sale of the year, and we don’t go on sale often (only twice a year, with the occasional small flash sale for old colours). * Up to 40% off everything. * Favourites do sell out, so encourage people to load their carts early. This content ,especially the video, will be used for organic posting and across Meta ads during the pre-sale and potentially through the sale period. You can absolutely shoot on whichever camera feels right.  iPhone may feel more natural and organic but go with what works best for your aesthetic. And a Sunday posting day is perfect.   Thank you again,  it’s always such a pleasure collaborating with you. I can’t wait to see what you create! Heidi x     From: Jamie-Lee Burns < jamielee@mademois-elle.com > Sent: Wednesday, 8 October 2025 9:47 PM To: Heidi Melville < heidi@sagitine.com > Subject: Re: November collaboration with Sagitine   Hi Heidi,   Beautiful! Ahh I'm so excited to work with you on this.    Perfect - well, I can shoot this as early as next week if you like so we can have everything all set to go. For the IG Stories did you want me to do a mix of a couple stills and a short video (giving a little look inside some of the boxes)? The reel I'll film on my iPhone and then for the IG Stories I can either do iPhone which feels a little more natural/organic, or shoot with my DSLR for a more polished image. Let me know if you had a preference, and also what key messaging you'd like me to highlight.   The days I usually post are Sun, Mon, Weds and Thurs - so in theory I can post on any day, but as it's outside of my usual posting window I can't speak to how the content would perform so I think the Sunday would be better if that's okay for you.    I'll keep an eye out for a full brief from you.   And same to you! My kids are growing way  too fast, kinda scary to think that H will be at school next year (wish he could be "little" forever)!   Chat soon xx   On Wed, Oct 8, 2025 at 4:12 PM Heidi Melville < heidi@sagitine.com > wrote: Hi Jamie-Lee,   This all sounds amazing, I’m so excited that you have availability!   I absolutely love the idea of doing something like “This is my most asked question” with the Q pop-ups, that would be incredible. Honestly, I love everything you do.   Here’s what I had in mind for deliverables: * 1 x Instagram Reel * 1 x Instagram Story (3 frames) * 30-day usage fee   If the content performs as well in ads as I think it will, I’ll be in touch about extending the usage too. And no worries at all about not posting on Saturday, would Friday, October 31st work instead? If not, Sunday, November 2nd is perfectly fine.   I’m genuinely so excited to be working with you again. Hope you and the family are all really well.   Warm regards, Heidi x     From: Jamie-Lee Burns < jamielee@mademois-elle.com > Sent: Tuesday, 7 October 2025 5:36 PM To: Heidi Melville < heidi@sagitine.com > Subject: Re: November collaboration with Sagitine   Hi Heidi,   Hope you had a beautiful long weekend! Just lovely to see your name pop up in my inbox. Oh gosh yes time is flying by right now, hey?   Yes I would LOVE to work with you on this - I think also creates the perfect space for me to give a bit more of a peek at the storage boxes and what I keep inside (I get questions about where it is from on YT and in my DMs every single week - just spitballing here but I could frame it as "This is my most asked question" and then do pop ups on screen of all the times I've been asked where they're from to intro the video content; that would be fun!   I don't typically post on a Saturday so wonder if Sunday 2 November would work for you timing wise? Were you wanting to do an IG reel and IG Story Set or two in-feed posts (one video and one static/carousel)? I've provided costing options for both along with the fee for paid marketing usage as well below.   RATES (quoted in AUD) Instagram Carousel Post: $950+GST Instagram Reel:  $1350 + GST Insta-story (per 3 frames):  $400 + GST Paid usage fee for 30 days: $375   Let me know what you think - hope we can align as I'd love to work with you on this :)   Kindest Jamie-Lee   On Tue, Oct 7, 2025 at 1:23 PM Heidi Melville < heidi@sagitine.com > wrote: Hi Jamie-Lee,   I hope you’re doing so well! I’ve been meaning to reach out over the last couple of weeks, time has absolutely flown, so apologies if this comes a little last-minute.   I was wondering if you’d be open and available to collaborating with us again for November? It’s our biggest sale of the year, and we tend to sell out of favourites early, so we’re focusing on driving excitement ahead of launch day.     Pronunciation Notes & Considerations Sagitine = Sa-Gi-Teen * Sa → as in Saddle * Gi → as in Giraffe * Teen → as in Teenager   A small but important note, please try to refer to them as Boxes rather than Drawers. Jamie-Lee   On Mon, Oct 13, 2025 at 8:24 AM Heidi Melville < heidi@sagitine.com > wrote: Good Morning Jamie-Lee, I hope you had a fabulous weekend. I’m genuinely so happy we get to work together again.   Below is the full brief, let me know if you have any questions or thoughts. Your content always captures Sagitine so beautifully, and I can’t wait to see what you create this time. Heidi x     CAMPAIGN OVERVIEW: The purpose is to build anticipation for our Black Friday / Cyber Monday Sale, which runs for the whole month of November. The sale officially starts Tuesday, November 4th at 8am, with up to 40% off everything (prices marked). It’s our biggest sale of the year, and we tend to sell out of favourites early, so we’re focusing on driving excitement ahead of launch day.     Pronunciation Notes & Considerations Sagitine = Sa-Gi-Teen * Sa → as in Saddle * Gi → as in Giraffe * Teen → as in Teenager   A small but important note, please try to refer to them as Boxes rather than Drawers. Because they’re so beautiful, people sometimes assume they behave like traditional drawers that slide out on runners. But Sagitine Boxes are removable storage boxes designed to be taken in and out of the stand. This flexibility means you can easily move them around, access them fully, and the snug fit helps protect your pieces from dust.   DELIVERABLES: * 1 x Reel — focus on the product rather than the sale to give the piece longevity. * 1 x 3-frame Story — focus on the sale announcement and urgency messaging .     DETAILS: Reel Love your idea of framing this as “My most asked question” it’s so authentic to you and perfectly aligned with what people want to know. The main purpose is to showcase: * The product itself. * How you personally use them and what’s inside them. * If it feels natural, a quick visual of how the Boxes sit within (not affixed to) the frame, highlighting their flexibility and that the snug fit helps protect what’s inside. Please feel free to approach this however feels most you.  The goal is to hero the product and create a piece that feels timeless, not just sale-specific.  This content piece will be used to give people that are in the ‘interest’ or ‘considering’ phases reasons to convert outside of value.     Story The goal of the Story is to drive excitement and awareness for the sale. Your idea of combining two stills and one short video is perfect, it’ll give a lovely mix of polish and movement.   Key messages: * The Sagitine Sale starts in just a couple of days - Tuesday, November 4th. * It’s our biggest sale of the year, and we don’t go on sale often (only twice a year, with the occasional small flash sale for old colours). * Up to 40% off everything. * Favourites do sell out, so encourage people to load their carts early. This content ,especially the video, will be used for organic posting and across Meta ads during the pre-sale and potentially through the sale period. You can absolutely shoot on whichever camera feels right.  iPhone may feel more natural and organic but go with what works best for your aesthetic. And a Sunday posting day is perfect.   Thank you again,  it’s always such a pleasure collaborating with you. I can’t wait to see what you create! Heidi x     From: Jamie-Lee Burns < jamielee@mademois-elle.com > Sent: Wednesday, 8 October 2025 9:47 PM To: Heidi Melville < heidi@sagitine.com > Subject: Re: November collaboration with Sagitine   Hi Heidi,   Beautiful! Ahh I'm so excited to work with you on this.    Perfect - well, I can shoot this as early as next week if you like so we can have everything all set to go. For the IG Stories did you want me to do a mix of a couple stills and a short video (giving a little look inside some of the boxes)? The reel I'll film on my iPhone and then for the IG Stories I can either do iPhone which feels a little more natural/organic, or shoot with my DSLR for a more polished image. Let me know if you had a preference, and also what key messaging you'd like me to highlight.   The days I usually post are Sun, Mon, Weds and Thurs - so in theory I can post on any day, but as it's outside of my usual posting window I can't speak to how the content would perform so I think the Sunday would be better if that's okay for you.    I'll keep an eye out for a full brief from you.   And same to you! We’re kicking off our Black Friday / Cyber Monday sale at the beginning of November, it’ll run for the whole month of November as we normally do.  However, this year I want to build a little bit of pre-sale excitement, and I was hoping you’d be available.   Here’s what I’m thinking: Deliverables: * One reel and one post on Saturday, 1 November.   Messaging: * Sale starts Tuesday, November 4 th . * Up to 40% off, but everything is on sale. * We only do a few sales a year, and this is our biggest one. * Stock can move really quickly, so if there’s something you’ve had your eye on, don’t wait!   Usage: * Sharable across organic channels * Used in Meta advertising for November 2026 only * A short quote featured in our “excitement” email launching the same day   Let me know if you’d be keen and what your rate would be. It’s the Shanghai 14-Box Stand from @sagitine (I have two stacked side-by-side) with off-white boxes and cream leather pull tabs, though half the fun is in curating your colour combo (the olive boxes are especially striking!).    For me these strike that perfect balance of being both practical *and* chic, and the sky’s the limit on what you can store inside. I mostly store my off-season and special occasion shoes in the boxes, and recently have started to use it to store smaller bags to keep them protected from potential light damage. I have a couple of Sagitine’s inserts so I can store sunglasses and belts/silk scarves/small accessories, and they’re also home to my stationary overflow and wardrobe maintenance kit.   Comment LINK & I’ll send you the details of the exact one I have 💌☺️ [AD]     IG STORY 1 The sale PSA you are going to want to mark your calendars for 👀 @sagitine   Sagitine’s Black Friday sale kicks off Tuesday 4 November. Heidi x     CAMPAIGN OVERVIEW: The purpose is to build anticipation for our Black Friday / Cyber Monday Sale, which runs for the whole month of November. The sale officially starts Tuesday, November 4th at 8am, with up to 40% off everything (prices marked). It’s our biggest sale of the year, and we tend to sell out of favourites early, so we’re focusing on driving excitement ahead of launch day.     Pronunciation Notes & Considerations Sagitine = Sa-Gi-Teen * Sa → as in Saddle * Gi → as in Giraffe * Teen → as in Teenager   A small but important note, please try to refer to them as Boxes rather than Drawers. Because they’re so beautiful, people sometimes assume they behave like traditional drawers that slide out on runners. But Sagitine Boxes are removable storage boxes designed to be taken in and out of the stand. This flexibility means you can easily move them around, access them fully, and the snug fit helps protect your pieces from dust.   DELIVERABLES: * 1 x Reel — focus on the product rather than the sale to give the piece longevity. * 1 x 3-frame Story — focus on the sale announcement and urgency messaging .     DETAILS: Reel Love your idea of framing this as “My most asked question” it’s so authentic to you and perfectly aligned with what people want to know. The main purpose is to showcase: * The product itself. * How you personally use them and what’s inside them. * If it feels natural, a quick visual of how the Boxes sit within (not affixed to) the frame, highlighting their flexibility and that the snug fit helps protect what’s inside. Please feel free to approach this however feels most you.  The goal is to hero the product and create a piece that feels timeless, not just sale-specific.  This content piece will be used to give people that are in the ‘interest’ or ‘considering’ phases reasons to convert outside of value.     Story The goal of the Story is to drive excitement and awareness for the sale. Your idea of combining two stills and one short video is perfect, it’ll give a lovely mix of polish and movement.   Key messages: * The Sagitine Sale starts in just a couple of days - Tuesday, November 4th. * It’s our biggest sale of the year, and we don’t go on sale often (only twice a year, with the occasional small flash sale for old colours). * Up to 40% off everything. * Favourites do sell out, so encourage people to load their carts early. This content ,especially the video, will be used for organic posting and across Meta ads during the pre-sale and potentially through the sale period. You can absolutely shoot on whichever camera feels right.  iPhone may feel more natural and organic but go with what works best for your aesthetic. And a Sunday posting day is perfect.   Thank you again,  it’s always such a pleasure collaborating with you. I can’t wait to see what you create! I didn't mention the sale in the IG Reel caption but let me know if you'd like me to weave this in?   Looking forward to hearing your thoughts!   Kindest Jamie-Lee     IG REEL Answering my most frequently asked question today; where my beautiful shoe storage is from (and what else I keep in there!). It’s the Shanghai 14-Box Stand from @sagitine (I have two stacked side-by-side) with off-white boxes and cream leather pull tabs, though half the fun is in curating your colour combo (the olive boxes are especially striking!).    For me these strike that perfect balance of being both practical *and* chic, and the sky’s the limit on what you can store inside. I mostly store my off-season and special occasion shoes in the boxes, and recently have started to use it to store smaller bags to keep them protected from potential light damage. I have a couple of Sagitine’s inserts so I can store sunglasses and belts/silk scarves/small accessories, and they’re also home to my stationary overflow and wardrobe maintenance kit.   Comment LINK & I’ll send you the details of the exact one I have 💌☺️ [AD]     IG STORY 1 The sale PSA you are going to want to mark your calendars for 👀 @sagitine   Sagitine’s Black Friday sale kicks off Tuesday 4 November. EVERYTHING will be on sale (mark downs are up to 40% off) - it’s their biggest sale of the year and stock moves *fast* so if you have your eye on anything, I recommend building your cart now so you’re ready to shop once the sale goes live   SHOP SAGITINE HERE: https://sagitine.com/shop     IG STORY 2 I have the Shanghai 14 Box Stand (x2) which you’ll spy in the back of *most* of my videos and perhaps no surprise where it’s from is one of my FAQs!   It’s one of my favourite furniture pieces in our home as it is the perfect blend of form and function (she’s practical AND chic) so if you’ve been eyeing it up, you won’t want to sleep on this sale 👀   @sagitine   THESE ARE THE STANDS I HAVE: https://sagitine.com/stands/shanghai-14-box-stand-white-1   IG STORY 3 You can also purchase the boxes separately & there are two sizes; the stands have the smaller sized boxes which are perfect for storing and protecting your shoes (you can easily get two pairs in a box!) but you can keep small tech, sunglasses, jewellery, small accessories, mini bags etc in there too.   @sagitine ’s most popular styles tend to sell out *QUICK* so set an alarm as this is definitely one you don’t want to miss!   DON’T MISS OUT: https://sagitine.com/shop     On Tue, Oct 21, 2025 at 5:59 AM Heidi Melville < heidi@sagitine.com > wrote: Good Morning Jamie-Lee, Oh no, I hope you’re okay. That’s terrible news, InfA is the worst. Absolutely no worries at all to share content later in the week. Please don’t push yourself and end up sicker either.  If Wednesday doesn’t work and it needs to be later that’s absolutely fine.   Rest up and I hope you’re back to full health soon. I hope that's alright with you!   Kindest Jamie-Lee   On Tue, Oct 14, 2025 at 11:59 AM Heidi Melville < heidi@sagitine.com > wrote: Thanks a mill Jamie-Lee, That timing is perfect xx   From: Jamie-Lee Burns < jamielee@mademois-elle.com > Sent: Tuesday, 14 October 2025 11:50 AM To: Heidi Melville < heidi@sagitine.com > Subject: Re: November collaboration with Sagitine   Hi Heidi   And same to you! Jamie-Lee   On Mon, Oct 13, 2025 at 8:24 AM Heidi Melville < heidi@sagitine.com > wrote: Good Morning Jamie-Lee, I hope you had a fabulous weekend. I’m genuinely so happy we get to work together again.   Below is the full brief, let me know if you have any questions or thoughts. Your content always captures Sagitine so beautifully, and I can’t wait to see what you create this time. Heidi x     CAMPAIGN OVERVIEW: The purpose is to build anticipation for our Black Friday / Cyber Monday Sale, which runs for the whole month of November. The sale officially starts Tuesday, November 4th at 8am, with up to 40% off everything (prices marked). It’s our biggest sale of the year, and we tend to sell out of favourites early, so we’re focusing on driving excitement ahead of launch day.     Pronunciation Notes & Considerations Sagitine = Sa-Gi-Teen * Sa → as in Saddle * Gi → as in Giraffe * Teen → as in Teenager   A small but important note, please try to refer to them as Boxes rather than Drawers. Because they’re so beautiful, people sometimes assume they behave like traditional drawers that slide out on runners. But Sagitine Boxes are removable storage boxes designed to be taken in and out of the stand. This flexibility means you can easily move them around, access them fully, and the snug fit helps protect your pieces from dust.   DELIVERABLES: * 1 x Reel — focus on the product rather than the sale to give the piece longevity. * 1 x 3-frame Story — focus on the sale announcement and urgency messaging .     DETAILS: Reel Love your idea of framing this as “My most asked question” it’s so authentic to you and perfectly aligned with what people want to know. The main purpose is to showcase: * The product itself. * How you personally use them and what’s inside them. * If it feels natural, a quick visual of how the Boxes sit within (not affixed to) the frame, highlighting their flexibility and that the snug fit helps protect what’s inside. Please feel free to approach this however feels most you.  The goal is to hero the product and create a piece that feels timeless, not just sale-specific.  This content piece will be used to give people that are in the ‘interest’ or ‘considering’ phases reasons to convert outside of value.     Story The goal of the Story is to drive excitement and awareness for the sale. Your idea of combining two stills and one short video is perfect, it’ll give a lovely mix of polish and movement.   Key messages: * The Sagitine Sale starts in just a couple of days - Tuesday, November 4th. * It’s our biggest sale of the year, and we don’t go on sale often (only twice a year, with the occasional small flash sale for old colours). * Up to 40% off everything. * Favourites do sell out, so encourage people to load their carts early. This content ,especially the video, will be used for organic posting and across Meta ads during the pre-sale and potentially through the sale period. You can absolutely shoot on whichever camera feels right.  iPhone may feel more natural and organic but go with what works best for your aesthetic. And a Sunday posting day is perfect.   Thank you again,  it’s always such a pleasure collaborating with you. I can’t wait to see what you create! Heidi x     From: Jamie-Lee Burns < jamielee@mademois-elle.com > Sent: Wednesday, 8 October 2025 9:47 PM To: Heidi Melville < heidi@sagitine.com > Subject: Re: November collaboration with Sagitine   Hi Heidi,   Beautiful! Ahh I'm so excited to work with you on this.    Perfect - well, I can shoot this as early as next week if you like so we can have everything all set to go. For the IG Stories did you want me to do a mix of a couple stills and a short video (giving a little look inside some of the boxes)? The reel I'll film on my iPhone and then for the IG Stories I can either do iPhone which feels a little more natural/organic, or shoot with my DSLR for a more polished image. Let me know if you had a preference, and also what key messaging you'd like me to highlight.   The days I usually post are Sun, Mon, Weds and Thurs - so in theory I can post on any day, but as it's outside of my usual posting window I can't speak to how the content would perform so I think the Sunday would be better if that's okay for you.    I'll keep an eye out for a full brief from you.   And same to you! My kids are growing way  too fast, kinda scary to think that H will be at school next year (wish he could be "little" forever)!   Chat soon xx   On Wed, Oct 8, 2025 at 4:12 PM Heidi Melville < heidi@sagitine.com > wrote: Hi Jamie-Lee,   This all sounds amazing, I’m so excited that you have availability!   I absolutely love the idea of doing something like “This is my most asked question” with the Q pop-ups, that would be incredible. Honestly, I love everything you do.   Here’s what I had in mind for deliverables: * 1 x Instagram Reel * 1 x Instagram Story (3 frames) * 30-day usage fee   If the content performs as well in ads as I think it will, I’ll be in touch about extending the usage too. And no worries at all about not posting on Saturday, would Friday, October 31st work instead? If not, Sunday, November 2nd is perfectly fine.   I’m genuinely so excited to be working with you again. Hope you and the family are all really well.   Warm regards, Heidi x     From: Jamie-Lee Burns < jamielee@mademois-elle.com > Sent: Tuesday, 7 October 2025 5:36 PM To: Heidi Melville < heidi@sagitine.com > Subject: Re: November collaboration with Sagitine   Hi Heidi,   Hope you had a beautiful long weekend! Just lovely to see your name pop up in my inbox. Oh gosh yes time is flying by right now, hey?   Yes I would LOVE to work with you on this - I think also creates the perfect space for me to give a bit more of a peek at the storage boxes and what I keep inside (I get questions about where it is from on YT and in my DMs every single week - just spitballing here but I could frame it as "This is my most asked question" and then do pop ups on screen of all the times I've been asked where they're from to intro the video content; that would be fun!   I don't typically post on a Saturday so wonder if Sunday 2 November would work for you timing wise? Were you wanting to do an IG reel and IG Story Set or two in-feed posts (one video and one static/carousel)? I've provided costing options for both along with the fee for paid marketing usage as well below.   RATES (quoted in AUD) Instagram Carousel Post: $950+GST Instagram Reel:  $1350 + GST Insta-story (per 3 frames):  $400 + GST Paid usage fee for 30 days: $375   Let me know what you think - hope we can align as I'd love to work with you on this :)   Kindest Jamie-Lee   On Tue, Oct 7, 2025 at 1:23 PM Heidi Melville < heidi@sagitine.com > wrote: Hi Jamie-Lee,   I hope you’re doing so well! I’ve been meaning to reach out over the last couple of weeks, time has absolutely flown, so apologies if this comes a little last-minute.   I was wondering if you’d be open and available to collaborating with us again for November? We’re kicking off our Black Friday / Cyber Monday sale at the beginning of November, it’ll run for the whole month of November as we normally do.  However, this year I want to build a little bit of pre-sale excitement, and I was hoping you’d be available.   Here’s what I’m thinking: Deliverables: * One reel and one post on Saturday, 1 November.   Messaging: * Sale starts Tuesday, November 4 th . * Up to 40% off, but everything is on sale. * We only do a few sales a year, and this is our biggest one. * Stock can move really quickly, so if there’s something you’ve had your eye on, don’t wait!   Usage: * Sharable across organic channels * Used in Meta advertising for November 2026 only * A short quote featured in our “excitement” email launching the same day   Let me know if you’d be keen and what your rate would be. Would love to work together again, your content is always so beautiful and such a perfect fit for Sagitine.   Warm Regards Heidi x     Heidi Melville Director SAGITINE M: 0478 401 914 E:  heidi@sagitine.com

subject: RE: Order #3445
customer_question: How do I assemble/set up my Box?
response_body: v\:* {behavior:url(#default#VML);} o\:* {behavior:url(#default#VML);} w\:* {behavior:url(#default#VML);} .shape {behavior:url(#default#VML);} Good morning Hannah,   Thank you so much for your detailed message and for sending through the photos, I’m really sorry to hear you’ve had a frustrating experience assembling your Stand. I completely understand how disappointing that would feel.   Regarding the points you’ve raised: Screw without thread: This certainly shouldn’t have been included, and I’m very sorry for that oversight. I’m more than happy to send a replacement self-tapping screw to you straight away so the timber top can be fully secured.   Rear brace alignment: From your description and photos, it looks like the frame screws may have been tightened fully before all components were in position. With assembly, it can help to insert all screws loosely first, allowing for natural alignment of the frame, and then tighten them once everything is in place. If they’re tightened early, the frame can pull slightly out of square, which prevents the rear braces from lining up correctly.   Hardware residue: The black Allen key screws are coated to allow them to drive smoothly into the powder-coated frame. That coating can leave a light residue during assembly, which is why we package them separately. It wipes away easily (as you’ve done), but I’m sorry that wasn’t clearer beforehand.   That said, if you would prefer not to proceed with adjustments and a replacement screw and feel the piece isn’t right for you, I’m very happy to organise collection and provide a full refund of the product price. There’s no rush to decide, when you’re ready just let me know how you’d like to move forward, and I’ll take care of it for you.   Warm regards, Heidi x   From: Hannah Reidy <hrreidy@gmail.com> Sent: Thursday, 19 February 2026 6:55 PM To: info <info@sagitine.com> Subject: Order #3445   Hi there, I received my order, #3445, on Tuesday and tonight have put together my item and I am extremely disappointed. There are a number of issues with the product which surprised me given the amount of money I paid for the Florence 8 Box Stand. The issues are as follows: - I was not sent a complete set of functional screws, instead sent one without a thread that cannot be used. As such, the timber top is not entirely secured to the vertical frames. - The rear braces cannot be screwed into place as all holes do not align with those on the vertical frames. - The hardware was extremely dirty, leaving black marks all over the white frame as I assembled it, requiring cleaning following (partial) assembly. Please see the photos attached, and subsequently advise how these issues can be rectified. Hannah

response_body: v\:* {behavior:url(#default#VML);} o\:* {behavior:url(#default#VML);} w\:* {behavior:url(#default#VML);} .shape {behavior:url(#default#VML);} Good Morning Tim and Anna, Thank you so much for your email and pulling together the supporting documentation. Because the sale of the New York Stand was to you as an Australian customer at an Australian address, the Australian GST of $171.82 has already been counted towards our Q4 BAS statement to the Australian Government as part of our month end reporting process. Therefore, I believe it would be the Australian Taxation Office that will need to issue you the refund of the $171.82 Australian GST that has been paid. It’s not something I’ve ever dealt with before, but perhaps you could seek advice if the refund could be issued during your personal end of year tax claim to the Australian Government.   I hope that information is helpful, but please don’t hesitate to reach out if there’s anything else I can help with. When the team are back in the office tomorrow, we’ll follow up what happened with our courier partners. I can offer you two options to return your order. 1. You can organise to have the order returned to either of the two return addresses below depending on if you use Australia Post or a courier service.  Once we receive the order we’ll issue a full refund of your order excluding shipping.  2. Alternatively, we’re more than happy to organise for a courier to collect your order, once the order is collected, we’ll issue a refund of your purchase minus the cost of return delivery.   Thank you again for getting in touch and please let me know which return option you’d like to go ahead with. subject: RE: Order #438288401 Confirmed
customer_question: How do I assemble/set up my Box?
response_body: v\:* {behavior:url(#default#VML);} o\:* {behavior:url(#default#VML);} w\:* {behavior:url(#default#VML);} .shape {behavior:url(#default#VML);} Good Morning Divinia, My sincerest apologies for the inconvenience and thank you so much for letting me know. Unfortunately, we don’t have a bigger screw size, but rest assured we’ll do absolutely everything we can solve the issue.   Would it be possible for you to take a photo of the screws that you are putting into the bottom of the stand, as well as a photo of the bottom of the stand showing where the screws are falling out please?   When the base plates are lined up correctly there are 10 screws in the bottom of the stand. * 6 x screws that are secured with an Allen key – one at each corner of each base plate and one in the middle. * 4 x ‘shoes’, these are the adjustable screws with the plastic cap and are screwed in by hand – one at each corner of each base plate.   At each corner there is one of each of the above screws with the ‘shoes’ screwed into the hole closest to the outside. I’ve attached a photo of the bottom of a completed Stand for you so you can check that yours matches. Thank you again for your patience, I really appreciate it. Once we have solved the issue, I’m more than happy to look at a good-will refund for you.   But first I’d love to get you out the right replacement part for the stand rather than delay your completed piece any further and just want to check if I need to send replacement screws or replacement base plates.   Thank you again Divinia, Warm Regards Heidi x       From: Divinia <DVC23@proton.me> Sent: Wednesday, 9 July 2025 4:31 PM To: info <info@sagitine.com> Subject: Re: Order #438288401 Confirmed   Hello, We received our delivery a couple days ago & set up the stand last night. Unfortunately the 4 x screws for feet for the bottom of the stand do not screw in at all, they completely fall out. This is not acceptable especially due to the high cost you charge for the stand. I had higher expectations of quality, this was a key reason why I decided to our have here. Do you happen to have bigger size screws you could send us to see if they fit? This would be a better solution rather than returning everything. A good will credit refund of 10% of the value of the stand would be appreciated for the inconvenience. Looking forward to how you respond. Thanks Divinia Sent from Proton Mail Android -------- Original Message -------- On 28/6/25 11:53, Sagitine wrote:     Thank You For Your Order   Below is a summary of your order 2884. You can check the status of your order at any time by logging into your account.   LOG IN   Order Details   Insert Set - Belts - 2025 EOFY Gift x - Belts Quantity: 1 Total: 0.00 Florence 8 Box Stand - Black - Black / Black / Black Quantity: 1 Total: 1,040.00 Subtotal: 1,040.00 GST: 99.10 Shipping: 50.00 Total: 1,090.00   Billing Address: Divinia Cox 72 Henry Parkes Drive Berkeley Vale, New South Wales 2261 Australia Shipping Address: Divinia Cox 72 Henry Parkes Drive Berkeley Vale, New South Wales 2261 Australia         © 2023 | All rights reserved.

subject: RE: Order #438313201 Confirmed
customer_question: Where is my order?
response_body: v\:* {behavior:url(#default#VML);} o\:* {behavior:url(#default#VML);} w\:* {behavior:url(#default#VML);} .shape {behavior:url(#default#VML);} Hi Tara,   Thank you so much for your message.  I’m really sorry to hear what’s happened here.   I’m so sorry you feel as though your emails have been ignored. I completely understand how frustrating that must feel on top of the delivery experience you’ve had. Stewart has been trying to get in contact with our delivery partners regarding you delivery today but as I’m sure you can understand it’s a particularly busy time for them.   I’m very concerned to hear that the courier left your order over the neighbour’s fence, and at the wrong address. That’s absolutely not the standard we expect from our delivery partners.   I’ve already raised this with our logistics team to find out exactly what’s happened and why it was handled this way. In the meantime, please rest assured we’ll work out a solution for you.   As soon as you’re able to access the parcel from your neighbour’s property, please let me know what condition the box is in. If there’s any damage at all, we will of course make it right for you as quickly as we can.   Thank you again for bringing this to our attention, and I’ll come back to you as soon as I hear from the courier team. If there’s anything else at all I can help you with, please don’t hesitate to get in touch. If you respond to this email, any response should arrive safely.   Warm regards and my apologies again. Heidi x   From: Tara Rischmueller <tararischmueller@yahoo.com.au> Sent: Friday, 14 November 2025 3:14 PM To: info <info@sagitine.com> Subject: Re: Order #438313201 Confirmed   Hi   It really is quite annoying that my emails from earlier today have been ignored.   I just want you to be aware that your courier ended up dumping my delivery over the fence of my neighbours property at about 7.30am. They’re not home. Nor have they been home all day. Yet I was home and expecting this delivery.   The courier has managed to wedge the box in between their hedge and their fence. It is impossible for me to retrieve the box without them being home.  Furthermore, it is raining in Adelaide as you will see from the attached video, so who knows what state the product is going to be in.   This has been a terrible client experience, which is not helped by having no reply to my emails that I sent you early this morning.   I don’t even know if the people next door have gone away, as they usually are home during the day. I’m not sure what to do about this, but I would suggest you seriously review your delivery partners.  I do not expect an expensive piece of furniture to be just chucked over a fence into a garden, much less it being the wrong address.   I would appreciate hearing  back from you.    Tara

subject: RE: Order #438313201 Confirmed
customer_question: What should I do about my damaged item?
response_body: Good Morning Tara, Oh that’s great news that you have the box and the Milan Shoe Boxes aren’t damaged.   Yes, you’re correct in assuming it would all be delivered together.  We do send it all together from the warehouse.  Unfortunately, sometimes our delivery partners split the order on delivery.  Honestly, I’m not sure why, it seems really inefficient, but it’s something that can happen, especially when they’re busy.    We’ve already been in touch with them to try to find out when your stand will be delivered and as soon as we hear back, we’ll let you know. The second delivery is normally not too far away.   In the meantime, I’ve attached your assembly instructions for you. You should have been sent an email with them already, but just in case it’s gone astray please find them attached. If there’s anything else you need in the meantime please don’t hesitate to reach out. Warm Regards Heidi x     From: Tara Rischmueller <tararischmueller@yahoo.com.au> Sent: Friday, 14 November 2025 6:09 PM To: info <info@sagitine.com> Subject: Re: Order #438313201 Confirmed   hi Heidi,   I’ve just received the package from my neighbour. The items inside are not damaged, but there are no shoe boxes, it’s just the frame. Were the storage boxes supposed to be delivered too? I would have assumed everything was included in the one delivery, but there appears to be only one box and the green shoe boxers are missing from the order. Please let me know.   Thank you Tara

subject: RE: Order #438330501 quality issue
