response_body: v\:* {behavior:url(#default#VML);} o\:* {behavior:url(#default#VML);} w\:* {behavior:url(#default#VML);} .shape {behavior:url(#default#VML);} Good Morning Neva, Thank you so much for sending the photos through.   From what I can see, it looks like the outer surface has been scratched or rubbed against something slightly abrasive. Because the Boxes are paper-based and wrapped in a refined finish, they can mark if they sit against rough surfaces or are used in a way that creates friction along the sides or edges.   They’re designed to function as protective storage Boxes rather than everyday sliding drawers, so keeping them free from contact with rough or textured surfaces will help preserve their finish beautifully over time.   That said, I completely understand how disappointing this would be, especially given they were a gift, and I’d love to replace the damaged pieces for you. I can see two Boxes photographed but you mentioned you ordered 6, could you please let me know how many in total you would like replaced?   Once I have that confirmed, I’ll arrange the replacements for you. response_body: v\:* {behavior:url(#default#VML);} o\:* {behavior:url(#default#VML);} w\:* {behavior:url(#default#VML);} .shape {behavior:url(#default#VML);} Good Morning Belinda,   Thank you for taking the time to write and for sharing your feedback. I’m genuinely sorry to hear how disappointing this experience has been for you. I completely understand how frustrating it is when something doesn’t meet expectations.   I’ve carefully reviewed your order, and it appears that you purchased two Insert Sets , but no Boxes. Our inserts are designed to sit inside our Milan Boxes or within a drawer, and aren’t intended to function as boxes or lids on their own. This would explain why the piece feels unfinished or impractical when used independently. It also looks like the photo didn’t come through with your third email, so I wasn’t able to view that just yet.   From what you’ve described, it sounds like the Love Letter Tray may be being used as a lid, which wouldn’t provide the secure fit or structure our boxes are designed to offer. I’m really sorry if this wasn’t clear at the time of purchase, I completely appreciate how easily that confusion could happen, and that’s on us to communicate more clearly.   I’d really like to resolve this for you properly. Could you please let me know one of the following? * Whether you’d like to return the inserts for a full refund , or * If you were intending to purchase boxes, I can help you organise the correct boxes at a discounted rate , or * If you do have the Milan Shoe Boxes as well as the Insert Sets but they were purchased under a different name or email address, I’m very happy to investigate further.   Thank you again for choosing to reach out directly and for giving us the opportunity to make this right. I truly appreciate it, and I’d love to turn this around for you.   Warm regards, Heidi x     From: Belinda Brown <belindajanbrown@gmail.com> Sent: Saturday, 7 February 2026 10:00 AM To: info <info@sagitine.com> Subject: Re: Order #438339901 Confirmed   Photo attached

subject: RE: Order #438339901 Confirmed
customer_question: How do I assemble this?
response_body: v\:* {behavior:url(#default#VML);} o\:* {behavior:url(#default#VML);} w\:* {behavior:url(#default#VML);} .shape {behavior:url(#default#VML);} Hi Belinda,   Thank you so much for your patience, and for taking the time to explain a little more.   I’ve attached a couple of photos showing how I personally use the Belt Insert Set for my own belts, I hope that helps give some context around how they’re designed to be used. It’s also worth noting that the dividers inside the Insert Sets are removable, so you can create larger sections if that suits your belts better. That flexibility might be a nice option for you.   I’ve also included a short video showing how the Insert Set works. The piece you’re referring to as the “lid” is actually a bottom compartment, designed for love letters, small trinkets, or sentimental items you want to keep especially safe, it isn’t intended to function as a lid or dust cover on its own.   With that in mind, I’d really love to offer the following to help resolve this for you properly: I’m very happy for you to keep both Insert Sets, and I’ll send you one of our Milan Boxes free of charge, including shipping. The Milan Boxes are designed to fully enclose and protect your pieces from household dust. They do have a snug fit by design, so you’ll find they open best using two hands, one to hold the outer shell steady, and one to slide the internal box out.   If that sounds suitable, just let me know which colour you’d prefer and I’ll arrange that straight away.   Alternatively, if you’d still prefer to return the Belt Insert Set, you’re very welcome to send it back to the address below and I’ll issue a refund as soon as it’s on its way. Please let me know what feels right for you, I’m more than happy to help either way.   Warm regards, Heidi x       From: Belinda Brown <belindajanbrown@gmail.com> Sent: Monday, 9 February 2026 1:02 PM To: info <info@sagitine.com> Cc: info <info@sagitine.com> Subject: Re: Order #438339901 Confirmed   Hi Heidi  Yes first time purchasing and i ordered just the inserts.   See photo attached of my belt that there is no way of fitting in. I can’t see any other way to do it.    The sunglass holder is functional if the lid was secure. How much is a drawer for the Suns sunglass insert. Which I’m guessing would protect the sunglasses from dust. It could potentially go on my shelf in my cupboard instead of a drawer.   Potentially I will just return the bet store and swap for a draw to cover glasses??   Regards  Belinda

customer_question: Where is my order?
response_body: Good Afternoon Liza,   I hope you’re having a wonderful week.   Thank you so much for your order, I can see Stewart has already replied to your email regarding delivery, and it looks like your boxes should be with you very soon.   I must apologise as I’ve been meaning to get in touch. Last week we ran a flash sale from Thursday to Sunday, and I noticed you placed your order on Wednesday.   We know how disappointing it can be to purchase something only to see it go on sale shortly after, which is why we always extend the offer to customers who ordered just before a sale. As a token of appreciation, we’d love to honour the sale price for your recent purchase, order #438299801.   Simply reply to this email to confirm you’re happy for me to process a refund of the difference back to your original payment method.   Thank you again for your support, and I hope you love the boxes when they arrive. You’ve chosen some of my favourite colours.   Warm regards, Heidi x     From: L & J Laird <jml03@bigpond.com> Sent: Wednesday, 1 October 2025 7:27 AM To: info <info@sagitine.com> Subject: Order   Hello, Order #438299801 Placed on September 24, 2025 at 6:45 am I note the order status is still unfulfilled. I go overseas on holiday on 14 October and I was hoping to have my order before then.  I also DO NOT want my item left unattended at my address. I only want delivery of if I sign for it (or taken to post office for collection). Can you please provide delivery update and confirm that parcel will not be left unattended.  Thanks Liza

subject: RE: Order
customer_question: What should I do about my damaged item?
response_body: Hi Megan,   Thank you for being so open about how you’re feeling, I really do understand where you’re coming from. If something arrived and looked like “seconds”, I’d feel exactly the same way.   That said, I wouldn’t be comfortable discounting it to that level. A Sagitine Stand should never feel like a seconds piece, and I don’t want it sitting in your home as something that feels so compromised it needs to be so heavily marked down.   At that point, I would much rather replace the Stand entirely, so you have the quality you originally expected.   Or of course, arrange a full refund if you’d prefer not to proceed.   Let me know how you’d like to move forward and I’ll take care of it. Warm regards, Heidi x     From: Megan <msinteriors@ozemail.com.au> Sent: Tuesday, 24 February 2026 11:34 AM To: info <info@sagitine.com> Subject: Re: Order   Hi Heidi   Thanks for the email. Can I push for 30% discount? I feel I have received what would be classed ‘seconds’ and that if I was knowingly purchasing this I would expect it to be approx 50% off or more.  I appreciate that you will be replacing the damaged boxes. Thanks for the offer of the free ship on the inserts.    Let me know if you agree    Kind regards Megan

subject: RE: Order
customer_question: How do I assemble/set up my Box?
response_body: v\:* {behavior:url(#default#VML);} o\:* {behavior:url(#default#VML);} w\:* {behavior:url(#default#VML);} .shape {behavior:url(#default#VML);} Hi Megan,   Thank you so much for your thoughtful message, and for sending through the photo. The Stand look so beautiful styled in your space. Even in the corner, it’s such an elegant piece, and I’m so grateful you shared that with me.   I really appreciate your suggestion, and yes, I think that’s a great solution. Thank you for approaching it so reasonably.   I’ll organise replacements for the five damaged Boxes straight away, and I’ll process an additional 15% refund on your Shanghai Stand to acknowledge the condition it arrived in. The refund will be to the payment method used to place the original order and normally takes about three days to come through, but some banks do say it can take up to ten days. Let me know if that sounds good and I’ll process the refund for you.   For your upcoming order of the Insert Ses, please use the code FREESHIP at checkout and shipping will be on me. If you have any trouble at all, just let me know and I can take care of it for you.   Again, I’m truly sorry the Stand arrived in that condition. It’s absolutely not the quality we expect either. I’m very grateful for your understanding, thank you so much.   Warm regards, Heidi x   From: Megan <msinteriors@ozemail.com.au> Sent: Tuesday, 24 February 2026 8:37 AM To: info <info@sagitine.com> Subject: Re: Order   Hi Heidi   I have assembled the unit and it looks so lovely despite the faults and damage, I have put it in a corner so you can easily see the frame damage. What if you give me a partial refund and send the replacement boxes, I was also going to order the sunglasses dividers and 2 of the small dividers for jewellery etc.  I really believe this is not your usual quality and do appreciate how well you have dealt with and responded to the situation.  Do you think this is a fair solution?    Kind regards Megan

response_body: v\:* {behavior:url(#default#VML);} o\:* {behavior:url(#default#VML);} w\:* {behavior:url(#default#VML);} .shape {behavior:url(#default#VML);} Hi Natalie,   I have some lovely news to share, your order is ready earlier than expected and is due to be shipped this week.   Although your purchase was originally part of our January pre-order, we’ve been able to move things along ahead of schedule, and I’m so pleased to be able to get this to you sooner. Once your order has been dispatched, you’ll receive an email with your tracking details.   Your order will be coming in two cartons from two separate warehouses. You’ll receive one carton with 8 x Milan Boxes in Olive, and another carton with the Florence 8-Box Stand. I’ve attached the assembly instructions for you so you have all the information you need when your order arrives.   Thank you again for supporting Sagitine. I hope this little surprise brings a bit of extra joy to your week.   If you have any questions at all, please don’t hesitate to get in touch, especially considering I know you’ll be receiving a split order, please don’t hesitate to reach out if you need information or a hand with anything.   Warm regards, Heidi x     From: info Sent: Thursday, 27 November 2025 8:40 AM To: 'Natalie Wykman' <nat.wykman@gmail.com>; info <info@sagitine.com> Subject: RE: Order - Natalie Wykman ordered 12/11 and not fulfilled on my account   Good morning Natalie,                         Thank you so much for your message and your order, your support means the world to us.                                                            You’ve purchased the Florence 8-Box Stand on pre-order with a current delivery estimation of January. We’ll keep you up to date over the next few weeks with shipment progress and any indication if that date will change.   I hope that information helps but please let me know if there’s anything at all I can help you with. Warm Regards Heidi x     From: Natalie Wykman < nat.wykman@gmail.com > Sent: Thursday, 27 November 2025 7:45 AM To: info < info@sagitine.com > Subject: Order - Natalie Wykman ordered 12/11 and not fulfilled on my account   Hi, Can you please advise when I will be receiving my item. Can you please advise when I will receive this. Copy attached of order. Thank you Natalie Wykman

subject: RE: Order details
customer_question: What's the status of my pre-order?
response_body: v\:* {behavior:url(#default#VML);} o\:* {behavior:url(#default#VML);} w\:* {behavior:url(#default#VML);} .shape {behavior:url(#default#VML);} Hi Sheree, Hope you had a great long weekend. That all sounds wonderful re the Nougat, thanks a lot.   Are you please able to let me know what the dimensions are and CBM’s for the below when you have a sec, that way I’ll be able to plan the stock splits for Aus v China.   1. Milan Box - Single 2. Milan Box – 6 pack 3. Milan Box – 8 pack 4. Miami Box – single 5. Miami Box – 2 pack 6. Insert Set – Single 7. Insert Set – 2 pack 8. Treasure chest – when we know. Thanks a mill Heidi x   From: Sheree Camus <sheree@nextpack.com.au> Sent: Friday, 3 October 2025 1:45 PM To: Heidi Melville <heidi@sagitine.com> Cc: Stewart Melville <Stewart@sagitine.com> Subject: RE: Order details   Hi Heidi,   Re: Nougat. We will add something to the ink to help with the fade. Its kind of like an anti UV additive.   It will cost a little more however now we have your official order I’ll use this to try and push our box guys down on the additive price.  Try and keep price the same as the others.   Leave it with me.     Once you have splits for goods sailing to Australia V staying in China send through so we can start looking at target vessels for the Australian stock.   Thanks   Best Regards   Sheree Camus Founder & Creative Director Nextpack Pty Ltd       M 0413 289 065 E    sheree@nextpack.com.au W nextpack.com.au T   02 9145 8620 A  Suite 302, 115 Military Road Neutral Bay NSW 2089 Australia P  PO BOX 753 Neutral Bay NSW 2089 Australia         From: Heidi Melville < heidi@sagitine.com > Sent: Thursday, 2 October 2025 12:48 PM To: Sheree Camus < sheree@nextpack.com.au > Cc: Stewart Melville < Stewart@sagitine.com > Subject: RE: Order details   Hi Sheree, That all sounds great. Let’s go with the curvy/plump character for our Leather Pull embossing on the Red Leather Pulls on the Cherry Happiness Milan Boxes.   And yay! Let’s get the order in the system. I’ve split the order form in 2 (attached) to separate the products with pricing we know versus don’t. I’ve also attached the excel in case that’s easier for your team to copy over.     This is going to sound like DeJa’Vu, but I’m going to leave part of the shipment in China to start testing the Asian Market (finally!).   The difference this year is that I’ll leave in China and not ship to Singapore, and that I’m down to two final warehouses/3PL, just working through cost comparison. At this stage it looks like I’ll warehouse near Shenzhen. My plan is to have a final decision in two weeks and then I’ll be able to give you the splits, but I’m assuming we’ll just be sending one 40HQ to Australia.   When you get a moment let me know if the team have come up with anything re the Nougat Boxes turning green. Thanks so much Heidi x       From: Sheree Camus < sheree@nextpack.com.au > Sent: Wednesday, 1 October 2025 4:28 PM To: Heidi Melville < heidi@sagitine.com > Cc: Stewart Melville < Stewart@sagitine.com > Subject: Order details   Hi guys,   Pls see my reply below in green:   Sheree Camus Founder & Creative Director Nextpack Pty Ltd       M 0413 289 065 E    sheree@nextpack.com.au W nextpack.com.au T   02 9145 8620 A  Suite 302, 115 Military Road Neutral Bay NSW 2089 Australia P  PO BOX 753 Neutral Bay NSW 2089 Australia         From: Heidi Melville < heidi@sagitine.com > Sent: Tuesday, 30 September 2025 8:49 AM To: Sheree Camus < sheree@nextpack.com.au > Cc: Stewart Melville < Stewart@sagitine.com > Subject: RE: Notes and briefs from yesterday   Hi Sheree, I’ve updated the order with the Pantone colours for sampling and a couple of other ‘products’. Here’s the summary:   New ‘products’ 1. Vegan Leather Pulls – I get asked occasionally if we do non leather pulls for the Boxes.  I was hoping to order 100 each of the Black and the Cream Pulls in a Vegan Leather alternative if that’s possible?    Yes no probs to do some vegan leather handles. 2. Just the bottom of the Insert Sets for the Belts.  The way they were packed in cartons of 20 for the last order meant that a few of them got squashed. So I have 20 of the Belt Insert top compartment, and instead of dumping them I thought If I could get 20 of just the bottom with this order, I can package them up and use them.    No probs.   Pantone Samples. We have a few ‘different’ ones this time, so excited to see how they turn out .   Very on trend colours for 2026 I see 😊 1. MILAN BOX: Forest Green - 553 C 2. LEATHER PULL: Maple - 4695 C 3. MILAN BOX: Mustard - 7555 U 4. MILAN BOX: Plum - 518 C 5. MILAN BOX: Seafoam - 324 U     Next Steps: * Pricing for the Tray Bottom only.  Yep sure.  Will come back on this one. * Can the Treasure Chest be flat packed?  We are working on this one and will come back to you. We’ll sample for a bit and have a play around. * Pricing for the Treasure Chest.  Yep will have this as soon as we have worked out the final structure/design. * Double Happiness Icon and type of embossing for LNY Boxes.  The black and the gold character below means ‘happiness’, 'fortune' or 'good luck'.  Its very associated with Chinese New Year.  We could do a more ‘curvy, plump’ version of the character like the black version below or  a ‘sharp and angular’ version like in gold.    Let me know which one you prefer.  I would recommend the curvy and plump character.  Will look more authentic.  Up to you though.   Best Regards   Sheree     I’m keen to get this order in as soon as possible so I can have most of the products on sale as pre-order for November and also so manufacturing doesn’t run into Chinese New Year, so let me know if you need anything else from me. Shall we get this order in the system and get things underway?    They total 2 x 40HQ containers.       So excited that these orders keep growing too! Heidi x   From: Heidi Melville Sent: Tuesday, 23 September 2025 4:42 PM To: 'Sheree Camus' < sheree@nextpack.com.au > Cc: Stewart Melville < Stewart@sagitine.com > Subject: RE: Notes and briefs from yesterday   Afternoon Sheree, Ah that’s great news.  I hope the manufacturers are enjoying the ‘prototypes’ as much as we did. And I have the first draft of our next order for you!   I’ve done a bunch of planning for next year’s marketing calendar so know which of the exciting new items I’ll get live at the beginning of the year.   Here’s the summary: All the details are attached.   And a few notes. * I’m going to take a break from the Rose boxes for an order.  They are the least popular of the Signature Colours (nougat has clearly overtaken it), so there are no units of Rose in this order. * I’ll hold off launching the Make-up and Jewellery insert sets until later in 2026, so will wait for the next order before we do production quantities of those. * I’ve got the Treasure Chests in this order, but we still need to confirm a few things like if we can flatpack it. * As well as confirming the Double Happy icon and embossing for the ‘Cherry Happy’ Boxes for LNY26. * I haven’t got the Pantones in here for the next run of Sample colours (Forest Green, Plum, Mustard, Seafoam) but I’ll work on those this week.   Cartons and markings. * The only carton size update is to the Miami 2 pack.  It was originally packaged with the Miami’s on top of one anther but the last order arrived with them packaged side by side.  Can we please revert to original packaging. * And just some updates on the carton markings.  I’ve added details attached but in a nutshell, just take out the information we don’t need.   That’s it.  Let me know if you have any questions and I’ll get working on those sample pantones. Thanks a mill Sheree Heidi xx   Oh and the basket, I cannot believe how much I’m using it!! It’s a staple in my week now.  Never knew I needed it so badly. Thank you!   From: Sheree Camus < sheree@nextpack.com.au > Sent: Friday, 12 September 2025 1:45 PM To: Heidi Melville < heidi@sagitine.com > Cc: Stewart Melville < Stewart@sagitine.com > Subject: RE: Notes and briefs from yesterday   Hi Team,   All your handicrafts are now overseas with our box manufacturer so we will get started on these exciting new items!!!   So glad you love the basket Heidi.  People are always saying it’s the basket they didn’t know they needed!!   You’ll start to see some pics over the next few weeks as we work through making the new samples.    Best Regards   Sheree Camus Founder & Creative Director Nextpack Pty Ltd       M 0413 289 065 E    sheree@nextpack.com.au W nextpack.com.au T   02 9145 8620 A  Suite 302, 115 Military Road Neutral Bay NSW 2089 Australia P  PO BOX 753 Neutral Bay NSW 2089 Australia         From: Heidi Melville < heidi@sagitine.com > Sent: Thursday, 4 September 2025 4:51 PM To: Sheree Camus < sheree@nextpack.com.au > Cc: Stewart Melville < Stewart@sagitine.com > Subject: Notes and briefs from yesterday   Hi Sheree, It was so wonderful to see you yesterday. Thank you so much for the gorgeous basket - I’ve already used it and love it.   We talked through 5 different topics yesterday; below are the notes I took and the briefs for the new products.   1. Nougat Boxes turning Green/Blue 2. Treasure Chest 3. Insert Set – Make-up 4. Insert Set – Jewellery 5. Cherry Box for LNY offer 2026   And here is a summary of our next steps and actions: * Sheree: To work with the manufacturers on a potential coating solution for the discolouration of the Nougat. * Sheree: Can the Treasure Chest come flat if it’s flocked? * Sheree: To let Heidi know what she thinks of the two colour options for the Make-up Insert Set. * Sheree: To begin sampling on the Insert Sets. * Sheree: To confirm which double happy icon would be the best and what type of embossing would be recommended.     1. We’ve had an issue with the Nougat boxes fading to a green or sometimes greeny blue colour. Stew and I dropped off 8 boxes that were from four different circumstances.   Some were full sun, some had never been near the sun. Next Steps: Sheree to work with manufacturers on a coating to prevent the colour change, understanding that fading is inevitable and the boxes shouldn’t be left in direct sun .   2. Treasure Chest Brief - Attached 3. Insert Set – Make-up - Attached 4. Insert Set – Jewellery – Attached 5. Cherry Box with Double Happiness Symbol – which symbol and how to emboss     I’m working on confirming the order before the end of September. Let me know if you need anything else from me in the meantime. Thanks so much again Heidi x       Heidi Melville Director SAGITINE M: 0478 401 914 E:  heidi@sagitine.com

response_body: Good Morning Tess, I hope you're having a great week. Thank you so much for your order, that's wonderful news your Florence 8-Box Stands and their Boxes have arrived. I hope you're loving them. You have purchased 1 x Sunglasses Insert Set, 2 x Belt Insert Set and 3 x Milan Boxes in Off-White on pre-order with a current delivery estimation of January. customer_question: How do I return this?
response_body: Hi Tess, Thank you so much for getting in touch, and my sincere apologies for the mix-up with your order. Just to double-check so I can arrange this correctly, can you please confirm that you’ve received 3 × Sunglasses Insert Sets, while your actual order was for 1 × Sunglasses Insert Set and 2 × Belt Insert Sets? Once confirmed, I’ll organise a reply-paid return label for the extra Sunglasses Inserts, and the 2 × Belt Insert Sets to be sent out to you straight away. Thank you so much for flagging this, and again, I’m really sorry for the inconvenience. How do l return the sunglasses inserts and when can you send out the Belt inserts instead? Regards Tess Marasco

subject: RE: Order No. 438332401
customer_question: What should I do about my damaged item?

I just wanted to let you know that the 2 × Belt Insert Sets have been organised and will be on their way to you, exactly as originally ordered. You’ll receive a shipping confirmation shortly with tracking details. Please don’t worry about returning the extra Sunglasses Insert Sets, if you would like to keep them. With return postage and the increased risk of items being damaged in transit, it’s far simpler for you to keep them, with our compliments. I hope they come in handy for you. Thank you again for your patience, and my apologies once more for the mix-up. If there’s anything at all I can help with in the meantime, please don’t hesitate to reach out. source_filename: RE_ Order no_ 438348501  Florence 8 box stand .msg
subject: RE: Order no. 438348501  Florence 8 box stand
customer_question: How do I assemble/set up my Box?
response_body: v\:* {behavior:url(#default#VML);} o\:* {behavior:url(#default#VML);} w\:* {behavior:url(#default#VML);} .shape {behavior:url(#default#VML);} Hi Judith,   Thank you so much for forwarding this through, and I’m so sorry for the frustration this has caused.   You are absolutely right, if you’ve received two centre frames and only one end frame, the Stand simply can’t be assembled properly, and that’s not the experience we ever want for you.  Thank you for checking the contents so carefully. The incorrect frame combination was packed at our end, and I sincerely apologise for that oversight.   I will arrange for the correct end frame to be sent to you as a priority.     Before I dispatch the replacement, I just want to quickly confirm one detail, so we get this exactly right the first time. I am assuming the photo hasn’t been mirrored, and the Stand is upside down on the floor with the curved edge of the timber top facing you, and therefore the missing piece is the left-hand side frame.  If you can confirm this that would be wonderful.   You absolutely will not need to pay for any return shipping. Once the replacement is on its way, I’ll email you the tracking details.   In the meantime, you’re welcome to keep the extra centre frame safely aside, and I’ll let you know whether we need it returned or if we can arrange something simpler, but please don’t worry about that just yet.   Thank you again for your patience, Judith. I know how disappointing it is to be ready to assemble something and not be able to finish the job. We’ll get this sorted for you quickly.   Warm regards, Heidi x     From: gth11656@bigpond.net.au <gth11656@bigpond.net.au> Sent: Saturday, 28 February 2026 5:21 PM To: info <info@sagitine.com> Subject: Fw: Order no. 438348501 Florence 8 box stand   Dear Sagitine Customer Service I forwarded to you, for your information an email sent earlier to the address below. Hope you can assist me in correcting the order which has been paid for, and needs your attention. The box stand is useless at present. Regards. Judith Thorn gth11656@bigpond.net.au   From: gth11656@bigpond.net.au < gth11656@bigpond.net.au > Sent: Saturday, 28 February 2026 3:04 PM To: store+22266904650@t.shopifyemail.com < store+22266904650@t.shopifyemail.com > Subject: Order no. 438348501 Florence 8 box stand   Dear Customer Service,   I received  my order yesterday [Judith Thorn]. Order No. 438348501, summary of order 3485.   Started checking contents and discovered that the parts delivered are incorrect. Regarding the "vertical frame" 2 centre frames were in box, together with only one end frame,  as shown on enclosed photo.  I was looking forward to receiving this 'box stand'.    Please rectify this situation, and I look forward to your quick response.  I am not paying for the return of the incorrect frame.   Regards. Judith Thorn gth11656@bigpond.net.au

Just double check that it’s the correct colour, I’ve assumed you wanted the New York in the Off-White,  then follow the link to pay the remainder of the invoice.   Thank you so much again and don’t hesitate to let me know if there’s anything else I can help you with. Also, just a reminder that there are only a couple of days left of our Black Friday Sale, so if you wanted to add anything else to your order like an Insert Set now is a great time.  Just email me and I can add anything on so you don’t double up on shipping costs. Can you please confirm you’re happy for me to refund to the same payment method and I’ll send confirmation as soon as it’s been processed.   In the meantime, I’ll organise collection of the Stand and Boxes. subject: RE: Organise a redelivery for your parcel from Sagitine [SKH9XTJ]
customer_question: What should I do about my damaged item?
response_body: v\:* {behavior:url(#default#VML);} o\:* {behavior:url(#default#VML);} w\:* {behavior:url(#default#VML);} .shape {behavior:url(#default#VML);} Organise a redelivery for your parcel from Sagitine [SKH9XTJ] Good Morning Tara, I can’t apologies enough for the frustration and challenges we’re having with your order. I am so sorry.   We will get in touch with delivery partner this morning as an urgent priority. Stewart has a contact he has a great relationship with and can hopefully get an answer on what’s happened. We will organise for Boxes to get to your home.  Please rest assured there’ll be no additional cost to you.  We will look after any additional costs for delivery if they arise. Regarding the damage on your Stand. I can’t apologies for that enough either!  I am so so sorry. Normally we would have a replacement Stand sent straight out and the damaged one collected, however, I’m anxious to organise another delivery for you until we have the Boxes safely at your home.     Can I ask, is the damage to the stand scratches or marks that could be cleaned off? If the marks can be cleaned off and we don’t need to send a replacement stand I’m so happy to offer you a further discount by the way of a refund.  Please let me know if you think the Stand ca be cleaned or not when you have a moment. I can’t apologies enough Tara.  Thank you so much for your patience and understanding, it’s really appreciated. We’ll work through getting the Boxes to you and either Stewart or I will be back in touch as soon as we have an answer for you, or even just to check in with a progress update before the end of today. Warm Regards Heidi x     From: Tara Rischmueller <tararischmueller@yahoo.com.au> Sent: Sunday, 16 November 2025 8:51 PM To: info <info@sagitine.com> Subject: Re: Organise a redelivery for your parcel from Sagitine [SKH9XTJ]   This is a blatant lie. No attempt was made. No card was left. What’s more I do have a doorbell that could be used if they actually did come here.   I look forward to hearing from you tomorrow with exactly is happening.

I’ll need to send you a replacement side frame. Thank you for confirming it’s the RIGHT side frame as you’re looking at the frame standing in front of it. I can see from the pics with your gorgeous cat in the background too.   Just to manage delivery timing expectations for the replacement for you, we will aim to have that dispatched to you before the end of the week. Replacement parts can take a little extra time as they’re outside our normal process. Once it’s on its way I’ll email again with tracking details.  And I think we’ll look to use a different courier service for this shipment! customer_question: How do I assemble this?
response_body: I’m so excited for the Outfit Valet! Aiming for files to be ready by Friday 31 st for prototyping with Great Modest. But there’s flexibility so no stress if they’re a bit later.   Hokay, so next steps are for me to get you: 1. Tech drawings – attached a. I’ve used the Shanghai Stand as the base.  Think it will be the most complete to work from. 2. Assembly Instructions – attached 3. Pole/frame piece – by Sunday 22/10 4. Leather Pull selection – by Sunday 22/10 5. Chicago screws we use for the leather pulls – by Sunday 22/10 6. Screwdriver!! – by Sunday 22/10   We’ll progress with concept V1.1 but split it into a couple of versions.   * V1.1i – Hero: Shoehorn inspired (previously called falling leaves?) * V1.1ii – Simple curve With accessory options: * V1.1a1 Metal side piece * V1.1a2 Leather side piece * V1.1a3 Leather corner covers   Notes on version V1.1i – Hero * How do we protect the Shoehorn hanging bar if it is made from metal? * Consider leather hole rim protectors * How do we connect the hanging piece to the side bars? * How can the Shoehorn hanging bar affix to a wall?   Notes on versions V1.1II – Simple * We didn’t discuss this, but what do the ‘notches’ look like to hang the hangers from, and how do we protect the metal here if it’s metal too?   Notes on accessory V1.1a3 Leather corner covers * Em to get treatmnent oiptions from leather guy when in Bali.   Think that’s it but shout out if I missed anything. xx       From: EMMA ELIZABETH <emma@emmaelizabethdesigns.com> Sent: Wednesday, 15 October 2025 10:05 AM To: Heidi Melville <heidi@sagitine.com> Subject: Re: Outfit Valet - top line / invoice deposit / timeline   Great thanks Heidi, will start sketching out today and will come back to you with any further questions.   Thanks. If the reader of this message is not the intended recipient, or an employee or agent responsible for delivering this message to the intended recipient, you are hereby notified that any dissemination, distribution or copying of this communication is strictly prohibited. subject: RE: Pip Edwards and Sagitine
customer_question: Do you offer wholesale pricing?
response_body: v\:* {behavior:url(#default#VML);} o\:* {behavior:url(#default#VML);} w\:* {behavior:url(#default#VML);} .shape {behavior:url(#default#VML);} Hi Tom, Thanks a mill for getting back to me so quickly. Your OOO mentions Paris Fashion week – I hope you’re having the best time.   Yes, we definitely love building longer partnerships. We have so many fun product launches coming up – new seasonal colours, new Insert Sets, a luxury coat rack specifically designed to plan and organise your weekly outfits. I’m probably giving too much away considering half of it isn’t designed yet, but you get the excitement.   My turn for transparency.  We’ve been very fortunate to receive a lot of organic exposure through gifting from creators who genuinely love our product. Alongside that, we invest in paid partnerships, but with those we really need to see results. For us that normally looks like a strong increase in followers/traffic or an immediate sales spike. Either is great, neither is not, especially if we’re committing spend and activity long term.     Do you think it could make sense to explore an initial piece of paid activity with a partnership continuation clause if we see the kind of results we both expect? Let me know what you think. Heidi x     From: Tom Ryan <Tom.Ryan@img.com> Sent: Thursday, 2 October 2025 7:17 PM To: Heidi Melville <heidi@sagitine.com> Subject: Re: Pip Edwards and Sagitine   Hi Heidi,   I’m well thanks! Great to be in touch and thank you for thinking of Pip.   Seems like this could be a great alignment, Pip has an incredible fashion archive that could really use some organisation and protection.   Transparently, we typically only look at longer term partnerships with Pip over once-off social postings as this creates a more authentic partnership and resonates better with Pip’s content flow and audience engagement.   Is there room to explore something with a longer tail here?   Kindest, Tom Tom Ryan Senior Talent Manager, IMG Australia tom.ryan@img.com M:   +61 402 726 456 A:  Level 25, 25 Martin Place, Sydney NSW, 2000 Australia   From: Heidi Melville < heidi@sagitine.com > Date: Thursday, 2 October 2025 at 1:39 am To: Tom Ryan < Tom.Ryan@img.com > Subject: Pip Edwards and Sagitine **EXTERNAL SENDER**   Hi Tom, I hope you’re doing well. I’m Heidi, the owner of Sagitine. We create beautiful, long-lasting storage designed to keep favourite clothes and shoes safe while looking stunning in the home.   I wanted to reach out regarding Pip Edwards. I’m currently organising partnerships for November and our Black Friday campaign and would love to explore whether Pip is working with brands at the moment, her availability, and what her usual partnership structures look like. I’ve included a short overview about Sagitine below for context, but please let me know if it would be helpful to send through more details.   Warm regards, Heidi   About Sagitine Sagitine is a luxury storage brand founded in 2014 in Sydney. Our signature designs combine functionality with timeless aesthetics and archival-quality materials that protect clothing, shoes, and accessories, while elevating interiors. Sagitine has been featured in leading design and lifestyle publications, and our customers include stylists, fashion leaders, and design-conscious individuals who value both care and beauty in their homes.   Sagitine — storage you want to see x https://sagitine.com/   Heidi Melville Director SAGITINE M: 0478 401 914 E: heidi@sagitine.com     The preceding e-mail message (including any attachments) contains information that may be confidential, may be protected by the attorney-client or other applicable privileges, or may constitute non-public information. It is intended to be conveyed only to the designated recipient(s) named above. If you are not an intended recipient of this message, please notify the sender by replying to this message and then delete all copies of it from your computer system. Any use, dissemination, distribution, or reproduction of this message by unintended recipients is not authorized and may be unlawful.

source_filename: RE_ Potential Salvage Piece for Your Work (Adelaide).msg
subject: RE: Potential Salvage Piece for Your Work (Adelaide)
customer_question: Where is my order?
response_body: v\:* {behavior:url(#default#VML);} o\:* {behavior:url(#default#VML);} w\:* {behavior:url(#default#VML);} .shape {behavior:url(#default#VML);} Baden thanks so much for getting back to me. The customer has changed their mind and decided to keep the Stand but if I ever have any other similar pieces in Adelaide I’ll definitely drop you a note.   It’s been lovely to connect, I hope you’re having a great week. Warm Regards Heidi   From: corrocreations@gmail.com <corrocreations@gmail.com> Sent: Friday, 21 November 2025 2:00 PM To: Heidi Melville <heidi@sagitine.com> Subject: RE: Potential Salvage Piece for Your Work (Adelaide)   Hi Heidi,   Thank you greatly of think of me!! I’m interested and also very busy. Is there a time frame that the future will need to collected by? I could be down around this area in a couple of weeks?   Yours gratefully, Baden         From: Heidi Melville < heidi@sagitine.com > Sent: Wednesday, 19 November 2025 12:43 PM To: corrocreations@gmail.com Subject: Potential Salvage Piece for Your Work (Adelaide)   Hi Baden, I hope you’re having a great week.   I’m reaching out from Sagitine, we create storage pieces that are built to be loved for many years, and we’re in the process of expanding our Product Stewardship Program. The idea is simple: when one of our pieces reaches the end of its life, we do everything we can to keep it out of landfill by reimagining, recycling, or repurposing it.   We have a customer in Unley with one of our aluminium and timber storage stands that needs to be returned as it has some scratches on the side. She isn’t able to re-package it for courier pickup, so instead of letting it go to waste, I’m looking for someone to give it a new life.   I came across your work recently and was wondering if you do pick-ups like this to collect materials for your art. The product is just the frame and timber top of the Florence Stand . It doesn’t include the Olive Boxes. The frame is a white powder coated aluminium and the timber top is walnut. The customer is in Charles Street, Unley.    Let me know if it’s something you’d be interested in.  No pressure either way, I know this is a slightly left-field request. I just wanted to offer it to someone who creates beautiful things from materials that might otherwise be overlooked in Adeliade.   Warm regards, Heidi Heidi Melville Director SAGITINE M: 0478 401 914 E:  heidi@sagitine.com

And please say hi to Eugenie for me.

subject: RE: Private photography training
customer_question: How do I assemble this?
response_body: Thank you so much Sarah, I'll try to get along to one of your Sunday 1 day sessions. Hope you have a great week Warm Regards Heidi x -----Original Message----- From: Sarah Jenkins <studio@signaturephoto.com.au> Sent: Thursday, 15 May 2025 3:42 PM To: Heidi Melville <heidi@sagitine.com> Subject: Private photography training Hi Heidi Thank you for your email enquiry re Private photography training for learning how to take social media content photos for your business using your Canon R100 mirrorless camera. As I say to my clients who are are wanting to learn photography to take good photos for their business social media - no matter what type of images - you need to first have an understanding of the photography exposure triangle your camera’s, main manual settings and focus settings along with light and composition. Once you have an understanding of these key components then can take begin to practice to take photos of whatever subjects/ objects you are wanting for your social media content. So I would suggest you first join my popular 1-day Essentials beginner regular course 11am-4pm - link below with more info and course dates https://www.signaturephoto.com.au/essentials_photography_course_sydney.html I would recommended you learn how to shoot still images first on your Canon R100 before you try and learn how to use the video on this camera as very different camera settings and file formats etc for video or use your phone camera to shoot video. Thanks Sarah 0419 447635 https://www.signaturephoto.com.au Digital Photography & Image-editing Courses Subject: Private photography lessons From: Heid [heidi@sagitine.com] Message: Hi there, hope you’re having a great week. I was wondering if you do private photography sessions in a studio environment. Or at a private residence. I own the business Sagitine (https://sagitine.com/) and want to learn to take UGC content style photos and videos for social media. I don’t want to be able to take the professional-quality pics I have on the website. I appreciate the years of craft that goes into that standard. I’d just love to be good enough to capture social content. I have a Canon eos R100 and need a bit of help maximising it. Let me know if you need any more info. Thanks a mill Heidi

subject: RE: Problems with Florence stand
customer_question: My item arrived damaged
response_body: Hi Karen, Thank you so much for being so understanding, and again my apologies for the issues. And yes, I am happy to replace the Boxes at no  charge.   I’ll organise that today and they should be on their wat to you next week. Thank you again for your support. I hope you have a wonderful rest of the week. Warm Regards Heidi x   From: Karen Pringle <karenpringle2011@hotmail.com> Sent: Tuesday, 3 February 2026 9:42 PM To: info <info@sagitine.com> Subject: Re: Problems with Florence stand     Thank you so much Heidi for your fast and considered response.       I appreciate you acknowledging that there have been issues with the rose boxes and that they haven’t met your standards either for Sagitine products.   I think in terms of replacement I will go with Off white as it’s as neutral as possible.  It’s not standing next to my bright white set so the colour matching doesn’t really matter.    I’m assuming you are offering to replace these at no cost to me but it’s not exactly clear from your email if this is your intention.   Can you confirm this for me please.   On this basis I’m happy for you to go ahead and send the replacement boxes.   My Address is    116 Park street St Kilda West Victoria 3182   Many thanks for following up.   Karen Pringle                On 30 Jan 2026, at 2:18 PM, info < info@sagitine.com > wrote:   Good afternoon Karen,   Thank you so much for taking the time to write, and for sending through the photos. I’m really sorry to hear about this, I completely understand how disappointing it would be, especially when you’ve looked after the pieces so carefully.   You’re absolutely right to flag it. We have had a small number of reports about our Rose Milan Boxes where discolouration has occurred over time. It’s not something we were happy with, and as a result we made the decision to pause our Rose colourway while we refine the protective finish moving forward.   In terms of next steps, I’d recommend replacing the boxes with   Off-White. It’s a softer, warmer white (rather than a bright white), and it’s proven to be a completely stable finish over time. From memory, your earlier white set is quite a bright white, so Off-White would still sit beautifully alongside it without feeling stark.   The other option could be the   Olive .  I know it is technically a ‘colour’ but we really treat it as a neutral as it’s so close to foliage it feels a lot like bringing the outside in. We’ve never had any reports of our Off-White or Olive discolouring.     I’d be very happy to help organise to replace the Boxes for you, just let me know which colour you’d like me to send out. Thank you again for reaching out, and I’m so sorry for the frustration this has caused. I really appreciate you bringing it to my attention.   Warm regards, Heidi x     From:   Karen Pringle < karenpringle2011@hotmail.com > Sent:   Thursday, 29 January 2026 5:10 PM To:   info < info@sagitine.com > Subject:   Problems with Florence stand     ﻿ Good afternoon Heidi,   I am sorry to have to write to you about this but I have an issue with the Florence 8 box stand I bought from you 8 months ago.  I ordered the rose blush boxes which looked beautiful on arrival but unfortunately they have completely discoloured. subject: RE: Problems with Florence stand
customer_question: Where is my order?
response_body: v\:* {behavior:url(#default#VML);} o\:* {behavior:url(#default#VML);} w\:* {behavior:url(#default#VML);} .shape {behavior:url(#default#VML);} Good afternoon Karen,   Thank you so much for taking the time to write, and for sending through the photos. I’m really sorry to hear about this, I completely understand how disappointing it would be, especially when you’ve looked after the pieces so carefully.   You’re absolutely right to flag it. We have had a small number of reports about our Rose Milan Boxes where discolouration has occurred over time. It’s not something we were happy with, and as a result we made the decision to pause our Rose colourway while we refine the protective finish moving forward.   In terms of next steps, I’d recommend replacing the boxes with Off-White. It’s a softer, warmer white (rather than a bright white), and it’s proven to be a completely stable finish over time. From memory, your earlier white set is quite a bright white, so Off-White would still sit beautifully alongside it without feeling stark.   The other option could be the Olive .  I know it is technically a ‘colour’ but we really treat it as a neutral as it’s so close to foliage it feels a lot like bringing the outside in. We’ve never had any reports of our Off-White or Olive discolouring.   I’d be very happy to help organise to replace the Boxes for you, just let me know which colour you’d like me to send out. Thank you again for reaching out, and I’m so sorry for the frustration this has caused. I really appreciate you bringing it to my attention.   Warm regards, Heidi x     From: Karen Pringle <karenpringle2011@hotmail.com> Sent: Thursday, 29 January 2026 5:10 PM To: info <info@sagitine.com> Subject: Problems with Florence stand   ﻿ Good afternoon Heidi,   I am sorry to have to write to you about this but I have an issue with the Florence 8 box stand I bought from you 8 months ago.  I ordered the rose blush boxes which looked beautiful on arrival but unfortunately they have completely discoloured. subject: RE: Product Feedback
customer_question: I just wanted to share my feedback
response_body: v\:* {behavior:url(#default#VML);} o\:* {behavior:url(#default#VML);} w\:* {behavior:url(#default#VML);} .shape {behavior:url(#default#VML);} Good afternoon Cassandra,   Thank you so much for taking the time to write, I’m really sorry to hear about this, and I completely understand how disappointing that would be, especially after such minimal use.   This certainly isn’t the experience we want for our customers, and it’s not something we commonly see. Thank you for sending the photos, they’re very helpful. To help me organise replacements for you as quickly as possible, could you please confirm exactly how many boxes are affected? As soon as I have that, I’ll arrange for replacements to be sent out straight away.   Thank you again for bringing this to my attention, and I really appreciate your understanding while we sort this for you.   Warm regards, Heidi x     From: Cassandra Tobin <cassandra_tobin@hotmail.com> Sent: Tuesday, 16 December 2025 5:47 PM To: info <info@sagitine.com> Subject: Product Feedback   Good afternoon,   After eyeing off some of your larger products for a while, I took the Black Fridays sales as an opportunity to purchase some of the smaller sets of storage boxes to start.    I’ve received half my order, waiting the final 6 white boxes on pre order and would like to comment how disappointed I am in the quality after minimal use.    See attached, the black coating has chipped off two of the boxes with barely any use at all. I wouldn’t expect this having them for less than a month and opening only a handful of times.  I wouldn’t expect this assume this is not a common occurrence…   Cassandra Tobin

subject: RE: Product Feedback
customer_question: What should I do about my damaged item?
response_body: You’re so welcome Cassandra, And apologies again regarding the damage. Your replacement Boxes have been organised and will be shipped with your White Boxes in the New Year. At the moment we’re estimating a delivery of about mid January, but I’ll be in touch again in another couple of weeks with a more specific date.   I hope you have a wonderful and safe Christmas and holiday season. Warm Regards Heidi x   From: Cassandra Tobin <cassandra_tobin@hotmail.com> Sent: Thursday, 18 December 2025 12:51 PM To: info <info@sagitine.com> Cc: info <info@sagitine.com> Subject: Re: Product Feedback   Much appreciated Heidi,   3 are damaged.  More then happy for these to be sent with the remaining pending order for the white boxes if it saves additional postage.    Thank you for your quick help!   Cassandra Tobin

These will be 80% sole trader and 20% Brighte – unless that contradicts with figures previously submitted.  Let me know and let me know if it’s even worth the trouble doing it for the potential return? 3. Electricity has been update.  Thank you!   Shout out if you need anything else Cheers Heidi x   From: Karen Ibale <karen.ibale@air.com.au> Sent: Friday, 15 August 2025 4:00 PM To: Heidi Melville <heidi@sagitine.com>; Hayden Ruawai <Hayden@sagitine.com> Cc: Anthony Angelillo <anthony.angelillo@air.com.au> Subject: Queries - 2025 Financial Statements & Tax Return   Hi Heidi and Hayden,   Happy Friday!   Acknowledging the receipt of Hayden's sole trader invoices.   I have listed a few queries below for your assistance please.   Ten Zero Three Pty Ltd 1. We note following transactions are not found in the Prospa Loan Statement (with facility limit of $35K) previously provided to us. Could you please provide us the relevant Prospa Loan Statement supporting the transactions below?   2. Attached is the general ledger for entertainment and gifts expenses. Could you please review and confirm whether all transactions are correctly classified as entertainment?   Hayden Ruawai 1. We note that your employment with Bright Capital Py Ltd has ended in July 2024 . Could you please clarify if the total kilometers you traveled for work purposes which is ~4,640KM includes any portion attributable to your sole trader business. If so, please apportion the travel between the period you were employed and the period you operated as a sole trader. 2. We note the work related expenses detailed below covers the annual  cost for FY2025. Could you also please confirm whether these annual amounts also include portion attributable to your Marketing Consulting business for the period February 2025 to June 2025.  If so, please advise whether the business-use percentage remains consistent with the figures you have previously provided: * Internet -  $839.4 * 60% = $503.64 * Phone -  $360 * 70% = $252 * Electricity -  $2,400*10% = $240 * Magazine -  $180 annually (avg $15 per month) * Newspaper -  $520 annually ($2 per day x five days pw)   3. Kindly provide the amount of electricity bill incurred. Please note we do not hold copy of the electricity bill.   On a separate note, please let us know once Hayden's outstanding business activity statements have been lodged. Have a great weekend ahead!   Thank you.

subject: RE: Question re boxes
customer_question: What's the status of my pre-order?
response_body: v\:* {behavior:url(#default#VML);} o\:* {behavior:url(#default#VML);} w\:* {behavior:url(#default#VML);} .shape {behavior:url(#default#VML);} Hi Mary,   Thank you so much for your message, and my apologies for missing your last email.   I completely understand how that could feel frustrating, and I’m glad you reached out. Our boxes are designed first and foremost as storage boxes rather than traditional drawers. The Stand system itself is a racking system, so unlike a conventional drawer unit, there are no runners for the boxes to slide in and out on. Instead, the boxes are designed to sit openly within the frame.   The boxes have an intentionally snug fit, which serves two purposes: it helps minimise household dust entering the box, while the paper-based material still allows for gentle airflow, ideal for storing and protecting your items.   Because of this design, it’s quite normal for the box to come forward out of the Stand when you pull on the leather tab. I personally find it easiest to open the boxes using two hands, or to lift the box out of the Stand and place it on a bed or flat surface while filling or organising it. Once you get into the rhythm of using them this way, it tends to feel much more natural and fuss-free.   I hope that helps explain what’s happening, but if anything, ever feels unusual or not quite right with your set, please don’t hesitate to let me know, I’m always happy to help.   Warm regards, Heidi x     From: Mary Bishop <maryinmelbourne@hotmail.com> Sent: Thursday, 5 February 2026 3:35 AM To: info <info@sagitine.com> Subject: Question re boxes   Hi Heidi,   (Resending)   Thank you for the update,    I was putting things into my draws yesterday, when I pull the tab to pull out the draw, the whole box comes out from the shelving, which is annoying, is there a way to stop that from happening?      Mary Bishop Mobile: 0400 105 794 From: Mary Bishop <maryinmelbourne@hotmail.com> Sent: Friday, January 23, 2026 8:55:42 AM To: Sagitine <info@sagitine.com> Subject: Re: An update on your pre-order x   Hi Heidi,   Thank you for the update,    I was putting things into my draws yesterday, when I pull the tab to pull out the draw, the whole box comes out from the shelving, which is annoying, is there a way to stop that from happening?

subject: RE: Ready to use $1000.00voucher
customer_question: How do I assemble this?
response_body: Happy New Year Jane and Ian!! So, so lovely to hear from you. We’re in full prep mode for school starting on Monday. I honestly can’t wait, I’m so excited for Elle. That’s wonderful news that you’re finally back in the house at Lugarno, and how exciting (and slightly dangerous!) to be re-imagining spaces again. I completely understand the shift away from the walk-in wardrobe, entrance halls and living areas are actually some of my favourite places to use the pieces, especially when you want storage that feels considered rather than hidden away. Jane, let me know when would be a good time to chat about what you’re thinking and we can take it from there, no rush at all, just whenever suits. Whenever someone mentions lounge or entry hall ideas, my first thought is usually the Shanghai 14 Box Stand. I’ll pop a link to the range below in case you’d like to have a look. I can also definitely pop out to the house. If we narrow it down to a couple of options first, I can bring them along and we can try them in the space together. So lovely to hear from you both. Warm Regards Heidi x Shanghai 14-Box Stand range - https://sagitine.com/shanghai-stands -----Original Message----- From: Ian Black <wildeloo2005@hotmail.com> Sent: Wednesday, 28 January 2026 9:26 AM To: info <info@sagitine.com> Cc: Jane Fitzgerald <jmfgarnet10@gmail.com> Subject: Ready to use $1000.00voucher Hi Heidi Happy New Year. I Hope you are going well and excited about Elle starting the school year. We have finally moved back into the house in Lugarno and started to unpack. Jane has started to think about where we could use the storage units. Initially I thought Jane would use them in her walk-in wardrobe, but, things change and now we are considering using them in the either the entrance hallway or lounge area. Anyways it won’t be me deciding! 😂 I would like to connect you with Jane to discuss. I’m not sure if it is an option for you to come to the house with some samples but if possible I think makes the most sense. The best email for Jane is jmfgarnet10@gmail.com I have included her in this email. Look forward to hearing from you. Regards Ian Black

subject: RE: Recent order
customer_question: How do I assemble/set up my Box?
response_body: Hi Matt, Thank you for your message, and I’m so glad to hear your sets have arrived and are assembled. The design of our Boxes is intentionally simple, they’re made to slide in and out freely, so there aren’t any fixings that secure them to the frame. This way, you can easily take a box out completely if you’d like to reorganise, store elsewhere, shift to a different position in the frame, or access items more comfortably. That said, the Boxes shouldn’t feel unstable when in the frame. If they’re sliding out more than expected, sometimes it just takes a small adjustment of the frame to make sure everything sits square and the boxes glide as intended. Ensure the Boxes are pushed to the back of the frame, and you can adjust the level of the entire frame by using the adjustable/screwable feet on the underside of the frame. If you would like to, please feel free to send me a quick photo of the setup, that way I can check if there’s any issue we need to fix, or if it’s just a quick adjustment. Warm regards, Heidi x -----Original Message----- From: Matt Roberts <matt-roberts@doctors.org.uk> Sent: Thursday, 2 October 2025 1:28 PM To: info <info@sagitine.com> Subject: Recent order Hi, I have received and assembled my two Sagitine 8 drawer sets however the boxes don’t appear to have anything to secure them to the frame? This means that the whole drawer slides out when I pulll the handle Was there something missing from the pack that would fix the drawers in place?

customer_question: How do I return this?
response_body: Good Morning Helen,   Thank you so much for your note, and for choosing Sagitine. I’m so sorry to hear the Miami Boxes weren’t quite the right fit for how you’d hoped to use them.   Of course, we’ll be happy to accept your return. If you could repackage the boxes in their original packaging and send them back to:   Sagitine PO BOX 1002 Potts Point, NSW 1335   We’ll arrange your refund as soon as they arrive back with us.   I also wanted to share a little context, just in case it helps. The Miami Boxes are designed as storage pieces rather than everyday drawers. The deliberately snug fit is a design feature to help limit household dust and ensures your treasured pieces are protected for the long term (you’ll find this detail noted on the product page too).   That said, I completely understand that everyone’s storage needs are different, and we want you to have pieces that feel effortless in your home.    Thank you again for giving Sagitine a try, Helen. I truly appreciate your support, and I hope you can find something that feels right for you. If we can help with anything in the future, please don’t hesitate to let us know.   Warm Regards Heidi x     From: Helen O'Brien <helen@hobrien.au> Sent: Sunday, 21 September 2025 10:47 AM To: info <info@sagitine.com> Subject: FW: return # 438297601         Hello Team,   Return order# 2976   I’d like to arrange a return for my order please.   While the product looks good the draws don’t slide in and out with ease.

subject: RE: return # 438297601

response_body: Good Morning Helen, I hope you had a wonderful weekend. Your return has been received, and I have just processed your refund of $376 to the payment method you used for your original order. It normally takes about three days to receive the refund, but some banks do say it can take up to ten days. If you have any issues at all, please don’t hesitate to let me know.   And I hope you have a lovely week ahead. Warm Regards Heidi x     From: Helen O'Brien <helen@hobrien.au> Sent: Tuesday, 23 September 2025 1:39 PM To: info <info@sagitine.com> Subject: RE: return # 438297601   Thank you Heidi,

It really helps a small brand like ours, and your experience goes a long way in helping others choose the right piece for their home.   You can leave a review HERE .   Absolutely no pressure at all, only if you feel up to it.   Thank you again for being such a wonderful part of Sagitine. response_body: Hi Michelle, Thank you so much for your message, and I hope you’re loving your new pieces. You’re absolutely welcome to a refund for the extra pulls, but please don’t worry about sending them back. So, if you'd like you’re very welcome to keep the Rose Gold Pulls and I’ll organise the refund for the product price today. You'll receive the refund back to the same payment method you used for the order. It normally takes about three days, but some banks do take up to ten days. If you have any questions at all about the refund, please don't hesitate to reach out. If there’s anything else I can help with, please let me know. subject: RE: RE: Order #438288401 Confirmed
customer_question: How do I assemble/set up my Box?
response_body: v\:* {behavior:url(#default#VML);} o\:* {behavior:url(#default#VML);} w\:* {behavior:url(#default#VML);} .shape {behavior:url(#default#VML);} Good Afternoon Divinia, Thank you so much for sending through those photos and the video. That’s so helpful.  I’m more than happy to send you replacement screws and base plates but I think I may be able to solve the issue before I post them out. I can see by your video that one of the base plates isn’t assembled properly and is missing the middle screw. Pease see my screen grab of your video below and note the position of the screw hole.     You will need to unscrew that base plate completely and flip it over so that the middle hole, that currently has no screw in it, is lined up to the hole in the centre frame. You will know it’s in the right position because the hole will be more towards the centre of the Stand. Please see the reference image below.  The red dot is where you currently have the hole positioned, whereas if you flip the base plate over, the hole with line up with where you can see the centre screw is in the reference image below that I have highlighted in yellow.     Once you have done that, I’m hopeful that other holes will be in their correct position and therefore all of the screws and shoes will screw in.   Let me know how you go with the above instructions and if it works please replicate it on the back base plate as well. I am also more than happy to give you a call to talk you through it if you would find that helpful. In the meantime I will get the replacement Base Plates and Screws ready to send but will hold off on posting them until I hear back from you. Warm Regards Heidi x     From: Divinia <DVC23@proton.me> Sent: Friday, 18 July 2025 8:31 AM To: info <info@sagitine.com> Subject: Re: RE: Order #438288401 Confirmed   Hello, Sorry I havnt had a chance to provide this earlier. Please see pictures & videos attached for your review. The feet screws just don't thread at all, I assumed the screws were wrong but maybe its the plate too. Maybe send both as replacements?            mso-level-text: · ; mso-level-tab-stop:none;     mso-level-number-position:left; text-indent:-18.0pt;               font-family:Symbol;} @list l0:level8            {mso-level-number-format:bullet;            mso-level-text: § ;                mso-level-tab-stop:none;                mso-level-number-position:left;                text-indent:-18.0pt;   font-family:Wingdings;} ol               {margin-bottom:0cm;} ul          {margin-bottom:0cm;} --> Good Morning Divinia, My sincerest apologies for the inconvenience and thank you so much for letting me know. Unfortunately, we don’t have a bigger screw size, but rest assured we’ll do absolutely everything we can solve the issue.   Would it be possible for you to take a photo of the screws that you are putting into the bottom of the stand, as well as a photo of the bottom of the stand showing where the screws are falling out please?   When the base plates are lined up correctly there are 10 screws in the bottom of the stand. 6 x screws that are secured with an Allen key – one at each corner of each base plate and one in the middle. 4 x ‘shoes’, these are the adjustable screws with the plastic cap and are screwed in by hand – one at each corner of each base plate.   At each corner there is one of each of the above screws with the ‘shoes’ screwed into the hole closest to the outside. I’ve attached a photo of the bottom of a completed Stand for you so you can check that yours matches. Thank you again for your patience, I really appreciate it. Once we have solved the issue, I’m more than happy to look at a good-will refund for you.   But first I’d love to get you out the right replacement part for the stand rather than delay your completed piece any further and just want to check if I need to send replacement screws or replacement base plates.   Thank you again Divinia, Warm Regards Heidi x       From: Divinia < DVC23@proton.me > Sent: Wednesday, 9 July 2025 4:31 PM To: info < info@sagitine.com > Subject: Re: Order #438288401 Confirmed   Hello, We received our delivery a couple days ago & set up the stand last night. Unfortunately the 4 x screws for feet for the bottom of the stand do not screw in at all, they completely fall out. This is not acceptable especially due to the high cost you charge for the stand. I had higher expectations of quality, this was a key reason why I decided to our have here. Do you happen to have bigger size screws you could send us to see if they fit? This would be a better solution rather than returning everything. A good will credit refund of 10% of the value of the stand would be appreciated for the inconvenience. Looking forward to how you respond. Thanks Divinia Sent from Proton Mail Android -------- Original Message -------- On 28/6/25 11:53, Sagitine wrote: ￼     Thank You For Your Order   Below is a summary of your order 2884. Like exact date the products will arrive to you and also the number of SKU’s and the CBM of the order.   Are you please able to let me know the difference between your two warehouses – Shenzhen and Guangzhou? The only storage requirement I have is that the cartons are kept dry and not wet nor damp as our Box product is made from a paper based material. I will get the answers to the order details to you on Monday next week. Thank you again I look forward to working with you. Warm Regards Heidi   From: Katherine Famor <katherine@zhenhub.com> Sent: Wednesday, 3 December 2025 1:43 PM To: Heidi Melville <heidi@sagitine.com> Cc: Sales <sales@zhenhub.com> Subject: RE: RE: ZhenHub Contact Form Submission - Heidi Melville   Hi Heidi,      Please notify us atleast 1 week in advance prior to your shipment date so we have time to set up your account.  To get started, kindly fill out our  RFI  and  Account Opening Form  Thank you!   Best Regards,  Katherine --  ZhenHub  |  Signup Facebook  |  X  |  LinkedIn December 2 at 1:41 PM, Katherine Famor <katherine@zhenhub.com> wrote: Dear Heidi,   Thank you for your message and for considering working with us. We understand your current focus is on warehousing for oversupply stock, and we can absolutely assist with that.  To get started, kindly fill out our  RFI  and  Account Opening Form .   Please also note that we have direct injection shipment to Australia and do the fulfillment in Australia to local market. We also can assist with you on this as well.   Meanwhile, thank you so much for the confirmation.   Have a good day!     Best Regards,  Katherine --  ZhenHub  |  Signup Facebook  |  X  |  LinkedIn December 2 at 12:55 PM, Heidi Melville <heidi@sagitine.com> wrote: [EXTERNAL EMAIL]: DO NOT provide username and password under any circumstances. Confirm links and attachments are safe before clicking or opening. Hi Katherine, Thank you so much for all of this information, it’s really helpful. At this stage I would most probably like to go ahead and work with you.   At the moment we only sell out products in Australia, however, we manufacture in China. Which is why I’m looking just for warehousing to store over supply stock, however, if we look to distribute in other places in the future we could look to also use your logistics capability. All of our products come in cartons with large barcodes and product information.  There is no kitting or repackaging requirements at this stage.   I will have two separate orders coming to you to be stored.  One in the next week or two and another one in early January.  I will be storing with you for over 60 days, most probably up to 5 or 6 months. Are you please able to confirm the warehouse address, once I have that I will be able to confirm the size and quantity of goods to store with you. Can you please also confirm any other details or information I need, or actions I need to take.   Thank you so much again for your patience with me!  It’s really appreciated and so is all of your help. Warm Regards Heidi   From: Katherine Famor <katherine@zhenhub.com> Sent: Monday, 1 December 2025 2:57 PM To: Heidi Melville <heidi@sagitine.com> Cc: Sales <sales@zhenhub.com> Subject: RE: ZhenHub Contact Form Submission - Heidi Melville   Dear Heidi,   No worries.   1.  System subscription  - monthly subscription fee for the use of the system. 2. Warehouse and fulfillment fees - please see attached rates card for our China warehouse. 3. BULK OUT BOUND - Need to have the Packing List enable us to determine the cost if 20' or 40' container or LCL cargo and destination as well. Kindly advise if you have additional packing requirements. For now, do you require fulfillment services? if yes, you can use the Zhenhub calculator for shipping cost and ensure to set your origin "CHINA" ":  https://cloud.zhenhub.com/default/cloud/shipping-rate-calculator   Note: Our shipping rates calculator reflects the estimate costing and pricing may fluctuate. Tax and duties are excluded. Our minimum monthly spend is USD 250. This includes storage fees, pick and pack fees, and shipping fees. We also require barcodes for your products. Please refer to the attached product label guide for more information.   Thank you, and feel free to reach out if you have any questions.       Best Regards,  Katherine --  ZhenHub  |  Signup Facebook  |  X  |  LinkedIn   December 1 at 9:59 AM, Sales <sales@zhenhub.com> wrote:   From: Heidi Melville <heidi@sagitine.com> Sent: Monday, December 1, 2025 4:58:45 AM (UTC+03:00) Istanbul To: Katherine Famor <katherine@zhenhub.com> Cc: Sales <sales@zhenhub.com> Subject: RE: ZhenHub Contact Form Submission - Heidi Melville [EXTERNAL EMAIL]: DO NOT provide username and password under any circumstances. Monthly order volume : We are only starting out, so will be very small to begin with. 4. Preferred warehouse location(s ): Close to Shenzhen but it would be great to know what options you have. 5. Product origin (Where are your goods manufactured?): China – we have two manufacturers, both on mainland China . 6. Primary shipping destination: This will initially be Singapore. 7. Target go-live date for fulfillment: We would like to start warehousing in December and with orders not starting to be fulfilled until March 2026.   PRODUCT NAME Length (CM) Width (CM) Height (CM) Gross Weight (KG) Shoe Box Small Single Pack Milan Shoe Box 1 36 24 16 1.2 Shoe Box Small Six Pack Milan Shoe Box 6 38 36 48 6.23 Shoe Box Small Eight Pack Milan Shoe Box 8 92 36 24 8.6 Storage Box Medium Single Pack Miami Storage Box 1 60.5 40.8 16 3.5 Storage Box Medium Two Pack Miami Storage Box 2 60.5 40.8 30.5 6 8-Box Stand Florence Stand 72 41 26 7 14-Box Stand Shanghai Stand 104 41 25 10.7 20-Box Stand New York Stand 125 41 25 13.7     Are you please able to let me know if you need any extra information to help to quote on the below? 1. Inbound devanning (RMB / container) 2. Palletising (pallet + wrap + labour, RMB / pallet) 3. Storage (RMB / pallet / week and / month) 4. Outbound handling (RMB / pallet or / waybill for courier handover) 5. Ancillaries: receiving outside normal hours; insurance; bonded vs non-bonded; photo-on-receipt (optional) 6. Minimums and contract term ; start-up/one-off fees   Thank you so much and look forward to hearing back from you Warm Regards Heidi x       From: Heidi Melville Sent: Wednesday, 15 October 2025 4:58 PM To: Katherine Famor <katherine@zhenhub.com> Cc: Sales <sales@zhenhub.com> Subject: RE: ZhenHub Contact Form Submission - Heidi Melville   Good Afternoon Katherine, Thank you so much for following up. There are a few details below I am just waiting on.  Once I have them I will send them through. For now, here is our company website – www.sagitine.com   I also wanted to confirm that you are okay with warehousing only but have the possibility of courier collection?   I will follow up with the rest of the details tomorrow. Warm Regards Heidi       From: Katherine Famor < katherine@zhenhub.com > Sent: Wednesday, 15 October 2025 2:12 PM To: Heidi Melville < heidi@sagitine.com > Cc: Sales < sales@zhenhub.com > Subject: RE: ZhenHub Contact Form Submission - Heidi Melville   Dear Heidi, I trust this message finds you well. I am writing to follow up on the detailed requirements pertaining to requirements. In order to proceed effectively and ensure our proposed solution aligns with your operational needs, we kindly request confirmation or clarification on the following points: *   1. Company website 2. Average weight and dimensions of your products 3. Monthly order volume 4. Preferred warehouse location(s) 5. Product origin (Where are your goods manufactured?) 6. Primary shipping destination 7. Target go-live date for fulfillment Should there be any additional considerations or updates, please do not hesitate to share them. Once we receive the complete information, we will promptly finalize the proposal and outline the next steps. Thank you for your attention to this matter. We look forward to your response.   Best Regards,  Katherine --  ZhenHub  |  Signup Facebook  |  X  |  LinkedIn   October 14 at 10:34 AM, Katherine Famor < katherine@zhenhub.com > wrote: Dear Ms. Heidi,   Thank you very much for reaching out and for considering   ZhenHub  as a potential fulfilment partner. We truly appreciate if you could forward detailed overview of your requirements few key details below 1. Company website 2. Average weight and dimensions  of your products 3. Monthly order volume 4. Fulfillment Options * Pick & Pack * B2B Fulfillment * Product Returns * FBA Transfer (for sellers) 1. Packaging * Custom packaging available (with MOQ) * Clients may provide their own packaging materials * barcode 1. Storage * Secure and affordable storage facilities 1. Infrastructure * Loading docks for efficient inbound/outbound logistics 1. Shipping Services * Postal: China Post, HK Post  * Express: DHL, EMS, FedEx, UPS   1. Trackability * All shipping services are trackable via your Zhenhub account integrated with your shopify/tiktok accounts 1. Global Coverage * warehouses across HKG / CHINA * Locations include Hong Kong, China (Shenzhen),  ✅ Order Accuracy: >99.5%  ⏰ Cut-Off Times: Orders received before 10 AM local warehouse time are processed and freight same-day  📸 Photo QC: Available upon request for outbound shipments  🔁 Returns Handling: Supported with custom SOPs and inspection protocols  🚚 DAP and DDP Options: available     In the meantime, if there are any additional specifications or questions, please feel free to let us know and book a meeting  See my schedule and  book a time here  at your convenient time, also I will add you to our whatsapp for a quick response.     Best Regards,  Katherine --  ZhenHub  |  Signup Facebook  |  X  |  LinkedIn   October 14 at 6:07 AM, Welcome to ZhenHub < hello@zhenhub.com > wrote: ________________________________________ From: Welcome to ZhenHub < hello@zhenhub.com > Sent: Tuesday, October 14, 2025 6:07:54 AM (UTC+08:00) Kuala Lumpur, Singapore To: Welcome to ZhenHub Subject: ZhenHub Contact Form Submission - Heidi Melville From: Heidi Melville < heidi@sagitine.com > Subject: Contact Form Submission Message Body: Good Morning, I run Sagitine, an Australian luxury storage brand.
