Have they been able to advise you on transporting the stands or did they say you need to organise yourself?   Warm regards,   Kami Dougherty Head of Operations Nextpack Pty Ltd       M 0429 499 025 E    kami@nextpack.com.au W www.nextpack.com.au A   Suite 302, 115 Military Rd Neutral Bay NSW 2089 Australia P  PO BOX 753 Neutral Bay NSW 2089 Australia       From: Heidi Melville < heidi@sagitine.com > Sent: Tuesday, 27 January 2026 10:35 AM To: Kami Dougherty < kami@nextpack.com.au > Subject: RE: Welcome to Zhenhub, Heidi!   Hi Kami, Hope you’re great. Are you please able to let me know if there are tracking details and when the shipment should arrive so I can update the portal? And also, are you please able to let me know who you used to send the goods?  I’m organising for the Stand order to go there too. Hope you had a fabulous long weekend! Heidi x   From: Kami Dougherty < kami@nextpack.com.au > Sent: Wednesday, 21 January 2026 11:08 AM To: Heidi Melville < heidi@sagitine.com > Subject: RE: Welcome to Zhenhub, Heidi!   HI Heidi,   For trucking and packing and loading the China portion of the order the cost is AUD2,765. This quote is lower because we are not palletising.   Per our conversation, please confirm you agree.   Thanks.   Warm regards,   Kami Dougherty Head of Operations Nextpack Pty Ltd       M 0429 499 025 E    kami@nextpack.com.au W www.nextpack.com.au A   Suite 302, 115 Military Rd Neutral Bay NSW 2089 Australia P  PO BOX 753 Neutral Bay NSW 2089 Australia       From: Heidi Melville < heidi@sagitine.com > Sent: Saturday, 17 January 2026 1:30 PM To: Kami Dougherty < kami@nextpack.com.au > Subject: RE: Welcome to Zhenhub, Heidi!   Hi Kami, Thanks so much for the info.  And yup, the warehouse is climate controlled. Thanks again though for checking in. Here’s the PDF again. Let me know if it doesn’t work and I’ll redownload it.   From: Kami Dougherty < kami@nextpack.com.au > Sent: Friday, 16 January 2026 10:45 AM To: Heidi Melville < heidi@sagitine.com > Subject: RE: Welcome to Zhenhub, Heidi!   HI Heidi,   For some reason I cannot open that file. Could you resend it.   Is Zhen Hub climate controlled? I don’t know how long you will keep the boxes there and I wanted to make you aware of the monsoon season in China is from Feb to June. As you know the boxes are not meant to be kept in humid wet conditions for long.   Once the boxes are received by Zhen Hub it is out of our hands if there are issues related to environmental issues.   I hope that makes sense.   I will also provide the cost of packing and trucking the boxes to Zhen Hub shortly.   Warm regards,   Kami Dougherty Head of Operations Nextpack Pty Ltd       M 0429 499 025 E    kami@nextpack.com.au W www.nextpack.com.au A   Suite 302, 115 Military Rd Neutral Bay NSW 2089 Australia P  PO BOX 753 Neutral Bay NSW 2089 Australia       From: Heidi Melville < heidi@sagitine.com > Sent: Friday, 16 January 2026 10:55 AM To: Kami Dougherty < kami@nextpack.com.au > Subject: RE: Welcome to Zhenhub, Heidi!   Thanks a mill for picking that up Kami, I’ve updated it and attached the new shipmarks.   Shout out if there’s anything else I need to change Cheers Heidi x   From: Kami Dougherty < kami@nextpack.com.au > Sent: Friday, 16 January 2026 9:28 AM To: Heidi Melville < heidi@sagitine.com > Subject: RE: Welcome to Zhenhub, Heidi!   Hi Heidi,   There are a few changes that need to be made on the platform and new shipping marks provided.   I have attached the sea freight packing list and you will see that the difference is related to the Milan Shoe Boxes in Caramel, Sky Blue, Limon, Olive and White.   For Caramel, Sky Blue and Limon 6 per carton you have 10 cartons, but it should be 9 as that extra carton went by sea.   For Olive 8 per carton there are only 47 cartons not 48. Same here the extra carton went by sea.   For White 1 per carton there are 101cartons not 102. Extra carton went by sea.   Item Per Carton Wrong Qty Carton on Shipping Mark Correct Qty Carton on Shipping Mark Milan Caramel 6 10 9 Milan Sky Blue 6 10 9 Milan Limon 6 10 9 Milan Olive 8 48 47 Milan White 1 102 101     Let me know if you have any questions.   Warm regards,   Kami Dougherty Head of Operations Nextpack Pty Ltd       M 0429 499 025 E    kami@nextpack.com.au W www.nextpack.com.au A   Suite 302, 115 Military Rd Neutral Bay NSW 2089 Australia P  PO BOX 753 Neutral Bay NSW 2089 Australia       From: Heidi Melville < heidi@sagitine.com > Sent: Thursday, 15 January 2026 3:39 PM To: Kami Dougherty < kami@nextpack.com.au > Subject: Re: Welcome to Zhenhub, Heidi!   Next to them please Kami x

source_filename: RE_ Your Member Success Manager at Ecommerce Equation (497).msg
subject: RE: Your Member Success Manager at Ecommerce Equation
customer_question: I just wanted to share my feedback
response_body: v\:* {behavior:url(#default#VML);} o\:* {behavior:url(#default#VML);} w\:* {behavior:url(#default#VML);} .shape {behavior:url(#default#VML);} Oh my goodness Neil, Thank you so much for following me up and my apologies for being so tardy with my reply!   Firstly, I am absolutely loving EE and have got so much value from it already. I know I’m not leaning in as much as I should be though, and am super excited to spend more time and effort in the EE program. I would love a chat, I’ve just booked us in for next week. Hope you have a fab rest of the week and thanks again Heidi   From: Neil Rudman <neil@ecommerceequation.com.au> Sent: Monday, 30 June 2025 1:48 PM To: Heidi Melville <heidi@sagitine.com> Subject: Re: Your Member Success Manager at Ecommerce Equation   Hey Heidi,   Neil here again! Just checking in with you to see how things are going and if you're wanting to book in some time to catch up with me?   Regards,   On Wed, 18 Jun 2025 at 16:57, Neil Rudman < neil@ecommerceequation.com.au > wrote: Hi Heidi,   My name is Neil, and I'll be your dedicated point of contact as part of the newly formed Member Experience Team here at Ecommerce Equation. It was great to see you on the flight plan call!   As Koby and I outlined, my role is to be a layer of support between you and the coaches so that you always feel like you have a point of contact and someone to help guide you and hold you accountable. I’m here to understand your brand, where you are in your business, and help you navigate the wealth of resources Ecommerce Equation offers. I will be checking in regularly to ensure you are getting the most out of the program, reaching your goals and to ensure you are kept up to date with all the new coaching content, curriculum and events Ecommerce Equation is rolling out.   On that note, it would be great to tee up an intro meeting where we can dive into your goals and big rock projects, and help you set out a plan moving forward. I'd also be keen to learn more about your brand and why you joined Ecommerce Equation.   You can  book a time with me here . I look forward to chatting soon! Regards,   -- Neil Rudman Member Success Manager kelsey@ecommerceequation.com.au ecommerceequation.com.au   -- Neil Rudman Member Success Manager neil@ecommerceequation.com.au ecommerceequation.com.au

The bedheads look incredible.   Unfortunately I won’t be able to attend but I’m so excited for you. Hope you and the fam are all keeping really well.   Warm Regards Heidi x   From: Stephanie Ferrara <studio@laidbackleedesign.com> Sent: Wednesday, 16 July 2025 3:26 PM To: Heidi Melville <heidi@sagitine.com> Subject: You’re Invited: ‘Drift’ Event by Laidback Lee Design   We’re delighted to invite you to celebrate the launch of Drift — a special collaboration between Marlow & Finch and Laidback Lee Design. ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ An Invitation, just for you.   Introducing a dream collaboration between Laidback Lee Design Studio and Marlow & Finch — where effortless style meets refined craftsmanship. This exclusive collection of bedheads and matching bolsters blends our signature tailored finish with the easy elegance of the laid-back Australian lifestyle. Designed to elevate your bedroom with subtle sophistication, each piece reflects thoughtful detailing, soft structure, and a relaxed yet polished aesthetic. It’s comfort, curated. Join us for an evening of cocktails, conversation and design as we unveil our new collection of custom bedheads and bolsters. When: 14th August Where: Marlow & Finch Showroom ( 1 Atchison Street St Leonards, NSW 2065 )  Commencing at 5pm - Drop in at any time between 5-7pm! What to expect: – View the Drift collection up close  – Enjoy a curated sample bag – Meet the designer behind Laidback Lee Design – Chat with the Marlow & Finch team about orders, customisations and more We’d love to see you there — pop by, have a drink with us, and be inspired. RSVP: https://www.eventcreate.com/e/driftlaidbackleedesign Warmly,  Stephanie x     RSVP HERE!         LAIDBACK LEE PTY LTD POX 507 EARLWOOD Australia Powered by Squarespace Unsubscribe

source_filename: RE_ ZhenHub Contact Form Submission - Heidi Melville (275).msg
subject: RE: ZhenHub Contact Form Submission - Heidi Melville
customer_question: Where is my order?
response_body: v\:* {behavior:url(#default#VML);} o\:* {behavior:url(#default#VML);} w\:* {behavior:url(#default#VML);} .shape {behavior:url(#default#VML);} Hi Katherine, I am so so sorry for not getting back to you sooner. I have just been too busy.   I am just looking at warehousing for now. Are you please able to resend me the rate card and perhaps a quick summary of the below?   1. Inbound charges a. Administration fee - $?? per shipment b. Unloading fee - $??CBM or $?? per ton c. Inbound handling - $?? per unit or $?? per shipping carton   2. Storage a. What are your storage fees?  By pallet or CBM?   Any other fees of note for storage or administration?   And then bulk out bound fee? So if I were to organise for a container of goods to go from the warehouse to the port. What fees would be associate? Thank you so much And my apologies again. Warm Regards Heidi       From: Katherine Famor <katherine@zhenhub.com> Sent: Friday, 28 November 2025 3:07 PM To: Heidi Melville <heidi@sagitine.com> Cc: Sales <sales@zhenhub.com> Subject: RE: ZhenHub Contact Form Submission - Heidi Melville   Hi Heidi,   I haven’t heard from you, I assume you’re not interested, but just in case you are, I thought I’d check in.   If you are no longer interested, I would appreciate it if you can provide any feedback:   1) You’re all set with another fulfillment partner. (Can you share which fulfillment service you went with?) 2) You’re still interested but the timing is off. 3) Any reason you can share with us?   Your feedback is greatly appreciated. Thank you!     Best Regards,  Katherine --  ZhenHub  |  Signup Facebook  |  X  |  LinkedIn November 21 at 2:12 PM, Katherine Famor <katherine@zhenhub.com> wrote: Hi Heidi,   Good day to you.   Have you had the time to review the rate I forwarded? Please let me know how you’d like to proceed—I’m happy to assist further.     Thank you and have a good day ahead!    Best Regards,  Katherine --  ZhenHub  |  Signup Facebook  |  X  |  LinkedIn November 13 at 12:49 PM, Katherine Famor <katherine@zhenhub.com> wrote: Dear Heidi,   I hope you’re doing well. I wanted to kindly follow up regarding the rates I shared earlier. Please let me know if you have any questions or need further clarification—I’d be happy to assist. If you’re ready to proceed or would like to discuss next steps, just let me know. Looking forward to your update.   Best Regards,  Katherine --  ZhenHub  |  Signup Facebook  |  X  |  LinkedIn November 6 at 5:19 PM, Katherine Famor <katherine@zhenhub.com> wrote: Dear Heidi, I wanted to follow up regarding the rate I shared in my previous email. Please let me know if you have any feedback or if you need additional details. Thank you for your time and consideration—I truly appreciate it. Looking forward to your response.   Best Regards,  Katherine --  ZhenHub  |  Signup Facebook  |  X  |  LinkedIn November 4 at 4:48 PM, Katherine Famor <katherine@zhenhub.com> wrote:  Dear Heidi,   Good day to you.   Just wondering if you still need  warehousing and fulfillment  to see if you’re still exploring storage or logistics solutions with  ZhenHub . We’d be happy to assist with tailored warehousing options that align with your business operations — whether it’s storage, fulfillment, or distribution support. If you’re still considering your options, I’d love to understand where you’re at in the process and how we can best support you. As per you're initial email information regarding you're requirements , I'm sharing the costs associated with using our warehouse and fulfillment services. 1.  System subscription  - monthly subscription fee for the use of the system. 2. Warehouse and fulfillment fees - please see attached rates card for our China warehouse. Our minimum monthly spend is USD 250. This includes storage fees, pick and pack fees, and shipping fees. We also require barcodes for your products. Please refer to the attached product label guide for more information.   Best Regards,  Katherine --  ZhenHub  |  Signup Facebook  |  X  |  LinkedIn October 22 at 4:39 AM, Heidi Melville <heidi@sagitine.com> wrote: [EXTERNAL EMAIL]: DO NOT provide username and password under any circumstances. Confirm links and attachments are safe before clicking or opening. Hello Katherine, Thank you so much for your emails.   Here is some information for you. 1. Company website: ww.sagitine.com 2. Average weight and dimensions of your products: I have listed a product dimensions table below for you, with some of our products. 3. Monthly order volume : We are only starting out, so will be very small to begin with. 4. Preferred warehouse location(s ): Close to Shenzhen but it would be great to know what options you have. 5. Product origin (Where are your goods manufactured?): China – we have two manufacturers, both on mainland China . 6. Primary shipping destination: This will initially be Singapore. 7. Target go-live date for fulfillment: We would like to start warehousing in December and with orders not starting to be fulfilled until March 2026.   PRODUCT NAME Length (CM) Width (CM) Height (CM) Gross Weight (KG) Shoe Box Small Single Pack Milan Shoe Box 1 36 24 16 1.2 Shoe Box Small Six Pack Milan Shoe Box 6 38 36 48 6.23 Shoe Box Small Eight Pack Milan Shoe Box 8 92 36 24 8.6 Storage Box Medium Single Pack Miami Storage Box 1 60.5 40.8 16 3.5 Storage Box Medium Two Pack Miami Storage Box 2 60.5 40.8 30.5 6 8-Box Stand Florence Stand 72 41 26 7 14-Box Stand Shanghai Stand 104 41 25 10.7 20-Box Stand New York Stand 125 41 25 13.7     Are you please able to let me know if you need any extra information to help to quote on the below? 1. Inbound devanning (RMB / container) 2. Palletising (pallet + wrap + labour, RMB / pallet) 3. Storage (RMB / pallet / week and / month) 4. Outbound handling (RMB / pallet or / waybill for courier handover) 5. Ancillaries: receiving outside normal hours; insurance; bonded vs non-bonded; photo-on-receipt (optional) 6. Minimums and contract term ; start-up/one-off fees   Thank you so much and look forward to hearing back from you Warm Regards Heidi x       From: Heidi Melville Sent: Wednesday, 15 October 2025 4:58 PM To: Katherine Famor <katherine@zhenhub.com> Cc: Sales <sales@zhenhub.com> Subject: RE: ZhenHub Contact Form Submission - Heidi Melville   Good Afternoon Katherine, Thank you so much for following up. There are a few details below I am just waiting on.  Once I have them I will send them through. For now, here is our company website – www.sagitine.com   I also wanted to confirm that you are okay with warehousing only but have the possibility of courier collection?   I will follow up with the rest of the details tomorrow. Warm Regards Heidi       From: Katherine Famor < katherine@zhenhub.com > Sent: Wednesday, 15 October 2025 2:12 PM To: Heidi Melville < heidi@sagitine.com > Cc: Sales < sales@zhenhub.com > Subject: RE: ZhenHub Contact Form Submission - Heidi Melville   Dear Heidi, I trust this message finds you well. I am writing to follow up on the detailed requirements pertaining to requirements. In order to proceed effectively and ensure our proposed solution aligns with your operational needs, we kindly request confirmation or clarification on the following points: *   1. Company website 2. Average weight and dimensions of your products 3. Monthly order volume 4. Preferred warehouse location(s) 5. Product origin (Where are your goods manufactured?) 6. Primary shipping destination 7. Target go-live date for fulfillment Should there be any additional considerations or updates, please do not hesitate to share them. Once we receive the complete information, we will promptly finalize the proposal and outline the next steps. Thank you for your attention to this matter. We look forward to your response.   Best Regards,  Katherine --  ZhenHub  |  Signup Facebook  |  X  |  LinkedIn   October 14 at 10:34 AM, Katherine Famor < katherine@zhenhub.com > wrote: Dear Ms. Heidi,   Thank you very much for reaching out and for considering   ZhenHub  as a potential fulfilment partner. We truly appreciate if you could forward detailed overview of your requirements few key details below 1. Company website 2. Average weight and dimensions  of your products 3. Monthly order volume 4. Preferred warehouse location(s) 5. Product origin  (Where are your goods manufactured?) 6. Primary shipping destinations 7. Target go-live date  for fulfillment Below includes all the requested details—from inbound receiving and storage to Shopify/Tiktok integration, SLAs, and compliance support. 🏢 Core Warehousing Features 1. Fulfillment Options * Pick & Pack * B2B Fulfillment * Product Returns * FBA Transfer (for sellers) 1. Packaging * Custom packaging available (with MOQ) * Clients may provide their own packaging materials * barcode 1. Storage * Secure and affordable storage facilities 1. Infrastructure * Loading docks for efficient inbound/outbound logistics 1. Shipping Services * Postal: China Post, HK Post  * Express: DHL, EMS, FedEx, UPS   1. Trackability * All shipping services are trackable via your Zhenhub account integrated with your shopify/tiktok accounts 1. Global Coverage * warehouses across HKG / CHINA * Locations include Hong Kong, China (Shenzhen),  ✅ Order Accuracy: >99.5%  ⏰ Cut-Off Times: Orders received before 10 AM local warehouse time are processed and freight same-day  📸 Photo QC: Available upon request for outbound shipments  🔁 Returns Handling: Supported with custom SOPs and inspection protocols  🚚 DAP and DDP Options: available     In the meantime, if there are any additional specifications or questions, please feel free to let us know and book a meeting  See my schedule and  book a time here  at your convenient time, also I will add you to our whatsapp for a quick response.     Best Regards,  Katherine --  ZhenHub  |  Signup Facebook  |  X  |  LinkedIn   October 14 at 6:07 AM, Welcome to ZhenHub < hello@zhenhub.com > wrote: ________________________________________ From: Welcome to ZhenHub < hello@zhenhub.com > Sent: Tuesday, October 14, 2025 6:07:54 AM (UTC+08:00) Kuala Lumpur, Singapore To: Welcome to ZhenHub Subject: ZhenHub Contact Form Submission - Heidi Melville From: Heidi Melville < heidi@sagitine.com > Subject: Contact Form Submission Message Body: Good Morning, I run Sagitine, an Australian luxury storage brand. I’m looking into storage-only support in/near Dongguan for products that are manufactured in China before they are delivered to other markets. There may be some local deliveries that we would like the option to organise couriers for ourselves, depending on cost and location, which means we’re looking for a warehouse option that has a courier collection facility. I was wondering if that was something you did. Warm Regards Heidi Phone: +61478401914 Date Submitted: Tue Oct 14 2025 -- This e-mail was sent from a contact form on ZhenHub ( https://zhenhub.com )

At this stage I would most probably like to go ahead and work with you.   At the moment we only sell out products in Australia, however, we manufacture in China. Which is why I’m looking just for warehousing to store over supply stock, however, if we look to distribute in other places in the future we could look to also use your logistics capability. All of our products come in cartons with large barcodes and product information.  There is no kitting or repackaging requirements at this stage.   I will have two separate orders coming to you to be stored.  One in the next week or two and another one in early January.  I will be storing with you for over 60 days, most probably up to 5 or 6 months. Are you please able to confirm the warehouse address, once I have that I will be able to confirm the size and quantity of goods to store with you. To add additional comments, reply to this email. Our opening hours are Monday to Friday 9am-5.30pm AEST. Dj (Sendle) Aug 28, 2025, 5:15 PM GMT+10 Hi Stewart,   This is DJ from Sendle. Stepping in for Marc. Thanks for getting back in touch.   Upon checking, we're still waiting for the response from our courier partner regarding the parcel's exact location. We will be updating you thru the tracking pages below within 7 business days.   ·         https://app.sendle.com/dashboard/sent_orders/SQD944W ·         https://app.sendle.com/dashboard/sent_orders/SP9TWP5 ·         https://app.sendle.com/dashboard/sent_orders/SZZGGXN   Unfortunately, our courier partner does not disclose the details of their third-party agents to us due to their agreement. I understand this might be frustrating, but we don’t have access to the local agent information.   The receiver has been in touch with us as well and we also provided her this information.   Hope this helps! Please let us know if you have further questions. Sincerely, ❯ DJ Customer Happiness Champion she/her sendle.com   Marc (Sendle) Aug 26, 2025, 11:37 AM GMT+10 Hi Stewart,    Thank you so much for getting back to us. This is Marc from Sendle, stepping in to help while Vin is away.    I reviewed the previous emails, and I'm seeing here that you are reaching out regarding these 3 parcels (SQD944W, SP9TWP5, and SZZGGXN) as they haven't been delivered yet. I sincerely apologize for the inconvenience that this has caused you.    By the way, I really appreciate you sharing all the necessary information. With the help of the details that you shared, I launched the investigations on your behalf for all 3 parcels. Please note that the investigations can take up to 7 business days. Once there's an update, it will be posted on the tracking pages below.    Tracking Pages ·         https://app.sendle.com/dashboard/sent_orders/SQD944W ·         https://app.sendle.com/dashboard/sent_orders/SP9TWP5 ·         https://app.sendle.com/dashboard/sent_orders/SZZGGXN   I'm sorry again for the delay and inconvenience, and thank you for your patience and understanding, Stewart. Take care! Please also let me know if you have further concerns or questions in this space or you may reach out through our messaging widget at https://support.sendle.com/hc/en-au   I’d like to invite you to participate in our survey. I would love to hear your thoughts on our recent interaction and how I assisted you today. Your feedback means a lot! Looking forward to hearing from you. Sincerely, ❯ Marc he/him sendle.com   Vin (Sendle) Aug 26, 2025, 10:30 AM GMT+10 Hi Stewart,   Thanks for reaching out. This is Vin and I am glad to assist you today.   I recognise how it is important for you to know the latest update on this, and know its delivery estimates. We are truly sorry for the delay of delivery for these 3 parcels which are SQD944W, SP9TWP5, and SZZGGXN.   Looking into this, you are right, I see that the last update we received was on August 18 and 19, when this was forwarded to the local courier to complete the delivery. I suggest that we launch an investigation for us to press importance on this matter, confirm the parcels whereabouts and gather additional details.    In order for me to initiate an investigation, may you kindly provide me with the following details for reach parcel? -parcel content -packaging description   Alternatively, you may launch an investigation into your Sendle dashboard. You can go to the tracking pages, under the 'Manage parcel' section, go to 'Late parcel enquiry'. https://app.sendle.com/dashboard/sent_orders/SQD944W   https://app.sendle.com/dashboard/sent_orders/SP9TWP5   https://app.sendle.com/dashboard/sent_orders/SZZGGXN   Thank you and looking forward to your response. Warm regards, Vin   Info Aug 26, 2025, 10:09 AM GMT+10 Hi Sendle Team, I'm chasing an update on a couple of parcels that are past their estimated delivery date and are showing 'Local Delivery'. References SQD944W, SP9TWP5, SZZGGXN. According to the receiver, these have yet to arrive, can you please contact the local delivery partner and get an update/estimate on delivery. Kind regards Stewart [9NDKE6-5D093]

subject: Sagitine - top level info
customer_question: I just wanted to share my feedback
response_body: v\:* {behavior:url(#default#VML);} o\:* {behavior:url(#default#VML);} w\:* {behavior:url(#default#VML);} .shape {behavior:url(#default#VML);} Hi Shane, How are you.  Thanks so much for your patience with me.   Here are a few details to get the ball rolling.   Sagitine is a luxury brand specializing in premium storage solutions. Our products are designed for customers who value craftsmanship, longevity, and elegance, and we have established a strong market presence in Australia but are yet to expand into any other market. We sell storage boxes as well as a Stand which is effectively a racking system for the boxes - https://sagitine.com/boxes When consumers purchase a stand the colour of the boxes they choose are included - https://sagitine.com/stands   I’m preparing to launch into the Asian market early in 2026, and have been considering warehousing facilities on the east coast of China. As part of this expansion, we are looking for a warehouse partner who can support us in two key areas:   1. Asian Market Fulfillment 2. Warehousing with the aim that some of the product would be on-shipped to Australia.   I have two key manufacturers that are both based in China – one for the stand and one for the boxes. I’m currently shipping the orders separately to Australia and holding them in warehousing facilities here. However, I’d like to hold stock in a Chinese warehouse and then send combined orders (both Boxes and Stands) in a single container to Australia.   In terms of the Asian Market Fulfillment, I am still exploring where I’ll look to expand into. Location of warehousing facilities will have a bearing on market.   Below are the details of the main products we sell.   All Stands have several cartons. For example, if a customer purchases the New York 20 Box Stand they would receive 4 cartons. 1. New York Frame 2. 2 x Milan Shoe Box 6 pack 3. 1 x Milan Shoe Box 8 pack At the moment we don’t require any pick’n pack facilities.  The goods go directly to the customer as they were received from the manufacturer.   That’s probably a good starting point for now.  Let me know if there are other key things I can send through. And then I’ll look to lock in another meeting.   Thanks again Shane Cheers Heidi     From: Shane Buckley <shane@portless.com> Sent: Tuesday, 19 August 2025 7:36 PM To: Heidi Melville <heidi@sagitine.com> Subject: Re: Heidi Melville booked a meeting with: Shane Buckley   Sorry we missed each other.    Please do give some top level points and I will answer via email. We have had several Australian brands come aboard in the past few weeks all Craft Club Referrals and they are seeing cost and expansion benefits   Thanks Shane     On Tue, Aug 19, 2025 at 9:45 AM Shane Buckley < shane@portless.com > wrote: Hey Heidi,    So Sorry about jumping on the wrong zoom link earlier.  I am on our meeting link now and I will stay on it for the next 15 minutes if you see this email and have a chance to jump back on.    Thanks Shane    On Tue, Aug 19, 2025 at 9:40 AM Shane Buckley < shane@portless.com > wrote: Hey Heidi,    Looks like I hopped on the wrong Zoom link. So sorry about that. Are you free to jump back on now? Thanks and Kind Regards  Shane Buckley  Portless Growth Consultant  Book a meeting with me     On Tue 19 Aug 2025 at 09:38, Heidi Melville < heidi@sagitine.com > wrote: Hi Shane, I jumped on the call but it looks like you’ve been caught up this morning. If you’re weather is anything like Sydney I get it – it’s torrential here!   I might flick you through an email with the top line points on it and see if we can get some info exchanged over email first, and then try to jump on a call. Hope you have a great day Cheers Heidi x   From: Shane Buckley < shane@portless.com > Sent: Friday, 15 August 2025 6:19 AM To: Heidi Melville < heidi@sagitine.com > Subject: Heidi Melville booked a meeting with: Shane Buckley     New Meeting Booked with Shane Buckley     Email address heidi@sagitine.com Date / time 19 August 2025 18:30 AEST (UTC +10:00) Location https://portless.zoom.us/j/86252059960?pwd=VtCkHocmo9eAPj8NT5FOfrndn0BYc9.1     Note: if you need to make changes to your meeting, you can here: Reschedule Cancel           -- Thanks and Kind Regards  Shane Buckley  Portless Growth Consultant  Book a meeting with me   -- Thanks and Kind Regards  Shane Buckley  Portless Growth Consultant  Book a meeting with me

subject: Sagitine 2025 order prep
customer_question: My item arrived damaged
response_body: v\:* {behavior:url(#default#VML);} o\:* {behavior:url(#default#VML);} w\:* {behavior:url(#default#VML);} .shape {behavior:url(#default#VML);} Hi Sheree, How are you? I hope you and the team are all great and soaking up this sunshine.   We’ve had another cracker 12 months so I’m in the process of preparing the details for our next big order.    I appreciate where we are with timing and that we won’t have stock in warehouse for November, but to give you an idea of where I’m at, I’m hoping to be able to place the order with you in September. I’m just juggling some cash flow issues, so as soon as I have that sorted, I’ll be able to lock it in.   In the meantime, there are are a few things and new ideas I’d love to chat with you about and thought it might be worth popping in next week or the week after.   1. Nougat – I now have a few examples of the boxes going green hued – would love to show you so we can work out if we can solve the issue. 2. The Inserts went so well.  Would love to sample a few other types.  Make-up, letter writing, and wine bottles. 3. Is it possible to emboss something on a small sample of the Leather Pulls before they’re attached to the Boxes?  I’m keen to try a Luna New Year Limited Edition Cherry Box with a Horse Motif on the Leather Pull. 4. We’ll sample 4 new colours again. Still working on the Pantone’s but the colours we’re looking at are – Burgundy, Mustard, Forest Green and Peach. 5. I’d also love to trial a lidded box that sits inside the Milan Shoe Box as a GWP.  We trialled a GWP of the Insert Sets in June as an offer and it went so well.   Let me know when is a good time to pop in. Looking forward to catching up. Cheers Heidi     Heidi Melville Director SAGITINE M: 0478 401 914 E:  heidi@sagitine.com

subject: Sagitine Order PO202510GM
customer_question: My item arrived damaged
response_body: v\:* {behavior:url(#default#VML);} o\:* {behavior:url(#default#VML);} w\:* {behavior:url(#default#VML);} .shape {behavior:url(#default#VML);} Hi Yvette, I’m getting closer to being ready to place the order for the next shipment of Stands. I’d love to be ready to go as soon as I’m able to place the order, therefore I’d like to potentially place it in two parts.   The first part of the order will be our signature selection of Stands: * Florence 8-Box Stand = 110 UNITS * Shanghai 14-Box Stand = 110 UNITS * New York 20-Box Stand = 110 UNITS   The second part would be the new Stand and the Outfit Valet (coat rack). These units would be confirmed once I know the unit price but please assume 100 units each.   I have some questions on how the packaging is labelled: 1. Are we able to start printing the label and barcode directly onto the box? 2. I will be changing the artwork for the ‘hardware’ box this time to include a QR code, can that too please be printed directly onto hardware carton?   I have also attached the damage goods ledger from the last order to date.   Here is a summary. My ultimate aim is to reach a a defective stock rate of 2%, however, for the next order I am happy to aim for under 3%. Let me know your thoughts. (I have attached the full ledger with images).   I will organise the labels and barcodes in the coming days so they are ready as well.   Please let me know if there’s anything else you need. Warm Regards Heidi x   Heidi Melville Director SAGITINE M: 0478 401 914 E:  heidi@sagitine.com

subject: Sagitine YTD down 20% rev
customer_question: My item arrived damaged
response_body: v\:* {behavior:url(#default#VML);} o\:* {behavior:url(#default#VML);} w\:* {behavior:url(#default#VML);} .shape {behavior:url(#default#VML);} Hiya Jayne, I hope you’re having a great week back and still have some of that Euro glow!   Just want to give you a heads up on what I want to talk about in our WIP tomorrow. We normally spend a bit of time getting into the business and marketing plan and which influencers are coming up, NPD and stock planning. But tomorrow, I really want to focus on the Meta performance from the last 4 months.   Revenue year to date is down 20% on last year. But Media spend is up 30%.   Our ROAS is looking pretty yuck, but most other metrics are tracking okay.   * Conversion rate is close to 1% * Our influencer program has been firing strongly. * We have lots of new content to test. * And we have lots of new creative that seems to be good. * Business plan has been very similar to last year – no hard rev driving NPD launches missing.   * And our promotion rhythm has been the same.     The two metrics that are sticking out to me are: 1. AOV YTD – at $460 it’s down on last year significantly ($670) but with more accessibly priced products I would expect the order volume to come up to counteract. 2. Our returning customer rate is huge – YTD 27% versus 22% for the same period last year.  a. I’d love to know if you can see anything in the way the Meta campaigns have been running that has driven more returning customers?   Missing target in November 24 and then being down YoY has obviously got me looking in every corner of the business. Unfortunately if I can’t work out what’s happened and have confidence in a quick turnaround, I’m going to have cut some significant costs out of the business.  So just wanted to give you a heads up, before we chat tomorrow, that I might have to pause some channels while I work it out.   Hope that all makes sense. Chat through it tomorrow Hides x       Heidi Melville Director SAGITINE M: 0478 401 914 E:  heidi@sagitine.com

Map link here   I’ll buzz you later this morning to chat x   Heidi Melville Director SAGITINE M: 0478 401 914 E:  heidi@sagitine.com

source_filename: Your Treasure Chest is arriving separately (12).msg
subject: Your Treasure Chest is arriving separately
customer_question: Where is my order?
response_body: v\:* {behavior:url(#default#VML);} o\:* {behavior:url(#default#VML);} w\:* {behavior:url(#default#VML);} .shape {behavior:url(#default#VML);} Hi Jenny, I just wanted to say thank you so much for your support and let you know that your Treasure Chest is on is way to you.   As the Treasure Chests are packaged a little differently to our Boxes and Stands, they will ship flat and separately from the rest of your order. This is the first new box shape we’ve created in quite some time, and also the first time we’ve ever developed a piece as a gift, so I would absolutely love to hear what you think once yours arrives.    I hope you love your Sagitine pieces as much as we love creating them.  As always, if you need anything at all, please get in touch, all you need to do is reply to this email. We love hearing from you.   Warm regards, Heidi x
